  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管基于Transformer的语言模型在NLP任务中表现优异，但其潜在语义空间仍是难以解释的黑箱。需要一种数学基础扎实、资源高效的方法来实现Transformer的机制可解释性。

Method: 将复述概念化为语义流形上的连续几何流，提出计算高效的均值场近似（受局部李群作用启发），将复述转换分解为可解释的几何分量：旋转、形变和平移。使用Sentence-BERT编码，在PIT-2015 Twitter语料上进行实验。

Result: 发现"线性透明性"现象，仿射算子AUC达0.7713。归一化后模型捕获了约80%非线性基线的有效分类能力（AUC 0.8405）。识别出基本几何不变量：稳定矩阵重配置角（~27.84°）和接近零的形变（表明局部等距）。跨域泛化通过TURL数据集验证。在LLM幻觉检测中，通过"廉价几何检查"在HaluEval数据集上自动检测到95.3%的事实扭曲。

Conclusion: LAG-XAI提供了一个数学基础扎实、资源高效的框架，通过将复述建模为嵌入空间中的结构化仿射变换，实现了Transformer语义空间的机制可解释性，在保持良好性能的同时提供明确的参数可解释性。

Abstract: Modern Transformer-based language models achieve strong performance in natural language processing tasks, yet their latent semantic spaces remain largely uninterpretable black boxes. This paper introduces LAG-XAI (Lie Affine Geometry for Explainable AI), a novel geometric framework that models paraphrasing not as discrete word substitutions, but as a structured affine transformation within the embedding space. By conceptualizing paraphrasing as a continuous geometric flow on a semantic manifold, we propose a computationally efficient mean-field approximation, inspired by local Lie group actions. This allows us to decompose paraphrase transitions into geometrically interpretable components: rotation, deformation, and translation. Experiments on the noisy PIT-2015 Twitter corpus, encoded with Sentence-BERT, reveal a "linear transparency" phenomenon. The proposed affine operator achieves an AUC of 0.7713. By normalizing against random chance (AUC 0.5), the model captures approximately 80% of the non-linear baseline's effective classification capacity (AUC 0.8405), offering explicit parametric interpretability in exchange for a marginal drop in absolute accuracy. The model identifies fundamental geometric invariants, including a stable matrix reconfiguration angle (~27.84°) and near-zero deformation, indicating local isometry. Cross-domain generalization is confirmed via direct cross-corpus validation on an independent TURL dataset. Furthermore, the practical utility of LAG-XAI is demonstrated in LLM hallucination detection: using a "cheap geometric check," the model automatically detected 95.3% of factual distortions on the HaluEval dataset by registering deviations beyond the permissible semantic corridor. This approach provides a mathematically grounded, resource-efficient path toward the mechanistic interpretability of Transformers.

</details>


### [221] [Stories of Your Life as Others: A Round-Trip Evaluation of LLM-Generated Life Stories Conditioned on Rich Psychometric Profiles](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06071)
*Ben Wigler,Maria Tsfasman,Tiffany Matej Hrkalovic*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: LLMs能够基于真实心理测量数据生成具有人格特征的生活叙事，独立LLM可从这些叙事中恢复人格分数，准确率接近人类重测信度，表明LLM能够稳健编码和解码个体差异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究主要依赖问卷自评、架构多样性有限，且很少使用真实人类心理测量数据，无法确定人格条件化是否产生具有心理测量学意义的个体差异表征，还是仅仅与特质描述符表面对齐。

Method: 使用290名参与者的真实心理测量档案条件化LLMs，生成第一人称生活故事叙事；然后让独立的LLMs仅从这些叙事中恢复人格分数；使用10个LLM叙事生成器和3个LLM人格评分器，涵盖6个提供商；分析系统偏差并进行内容分析。

Result: 人格分数可从生成叙事中恢复，平均相关系数r=0.750，达到人类重测信度的85%；恢复效果在10个LLM生成器和3个LLM评分器间保持稳健；评分模型通过抵消对齐诱导的默认偏差实现准确性；9/10编码特征与参与者真实对话中的相同特征显著相关，人格驱动的情绪反应模式在真实对话数据中复现。

Conclusion: 预训练中捕获的人格-语言关系支持对个体差异的稳健编码和解码，包括在真实人类行为中复现的特征性情绪变异性模式，表明LLMs能够产生具有心理测量学意义的人格表征。

Abstract: Personality traits are richly encoded in natural language, and large language models (LLMs) trained on human text can simulate personality when conditioned on persona descriptions. However, existing evaluations rely predominantly on questionnaire self-report by the conditioned model, are limited in architectural diversity, and rarely use real human psychometric data. Without addressing these limitations, it remains unclear whether personality conditioning produces psychometrically informative representations of individual differences or merely superficial alignment with trait descriptors. To test how robustly LLMs can encode personality into extended text, we condition LLMs on real psychometric profiles from 290 participants to generate first-person life story narratives, and then task independent LLMs to recover personality scores from those narratives alone. We show that personality scores can be recovered from the generated narratives at levels approaching human test-retest reliability (mean r = 0.750, 85% of the human ceiling), and that recovery is robust across 10 LLM narrative generators and 3 LLM personality scorers spanning 6 providers. Decomposing systematic biases reveals that scoring models achieve their accuracy while counteracting alignment-induced defaults. Content analysis of the generated narratives shows that personality conditioning produces behaviourally differentiated text: nine of ten coded features correlate significantly with the same features in participants' real conversations, and personality-driven emotional reactivity patterns in narratives replicate in real conversational data. These findings provide evidence that the personality-language relationship captured during pretraining supports robust encoding and decoding of individual differences, including characteristic emotional variability patterns that replicate in real human behaviour.

</details>


### [222] [Short Data, Long Context: Distilling Positional Knowledge in Transformers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06070)
*Patrick Huber,Ernie Chang,Chinnadhurai Sankar,Rylan Conway,Igor Fedorov,Md Rifat Arefin,Adithya Sagar*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 通过logit-based知识蒸馏，可以在仅使用短上下文样本的情况下，将长上下文检索能力从教师模型转移到学生模型，无需昂贵的长上下文预训练。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 扩展语言模型上下文窗口通常需要昂贵的长上下文预训练，面临训练效率和数据收集的挑战。本文旨在探索是否可以通过知识蒸馏在短上下文训练中实现长上下文能力迁移。

Method: 采用logit-based知识蒸馏方法，在长上下文窗口内使用打包的短上下文样本训练学生模型。通过Rotary Position Embedding (RoPE)分析，研究相位缩放策略、位置信息传递机制，以及查询状态在长上下文扩展中的结构化更新模式。

Result: 1) 相位缩放策略在知识蒸馏设置中同样能获得最佳长上下文性能；2) logit-based知识蒸馏可直接实现位置信息转移，通过重复token序列实验揭示了位置扰动如何通过transformer层传播到输出logits；3) 发现了长上下文扩展中查询状态的结构化更新模式，特定参数区间对长上下文训练表现出强敏感性。

Conclusion: logit-based知识蒸馏能够有效将长上下文检索能力从教师模型转移到学生模型，无需昂贵的长上下文预训练。该方法为高效扩展语言模型上下文窗口提供了新途径，揭示了位置信息通过知识蒸馏传递的机制。

Abstract: Extending the context window of language models typically requires expensive long-context pre-training, posing significant challenges for both training efficiency and data collection. In this paper, we present evidence that long-context retrieval capabilities can be transferred to student models through logit-based knowledge distillation, even when training exclusively on packed short-context samples within a long-context window. We provide comprehensive insights through the lens of Rotary Position Embedding (RoPE) and establish three key findings. First, consistent with prior work, we show that phase-wise RoPE scaling, which maximizes rotational spectrum utilization at each training stage, also achieves the best long-context performance in knowledge distillation setups. Second, we demonstrate that logit-based knowledge distillation can directly enable positional information transfer. Using an experimental setup with packed repeated token sequences, we trace the propagation of positional perturbations from query and key vectors through successive transformer layers to output logits, revealing that positional information systematically influences the teacher's output distribution and, in turn, the distillation signal received by the student model. Third, our analysis uncovers structured update patterns in the query state during long-context extension, with distinct parameter spans exhibiting strong sensitivity to long-context training.

</details>


### [223] [A Multi-Stage Validation Framework for Trustworthy Large-scale Clinical Information Extraction using Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06028)
*Maria Mahbub,Gregory M. Dams,Josh Arnold,Caitlin Rizy,Sudarshan Srinivasan,Elliot M. Fielstein,Minu A. Aghevli,Kamonica L. Craig,Elizabeth M. Oliva,Joseph Erdos,Jodie Trafton,Ioana Danciu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出一个多阶段验证框架，用于大语言模型临床信息提取的弱监督评估，应用于物质使用障碍诊断提取，实现了可扩展的验证方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型在从非结构化健康记录中提取临床信息方面具有潜力，但在真实世界应用受到可扩展和可信验证方法缺乏的限制。传统评估方法依赖标注密集的参考标准或不完整的结构化数据，难以在人群规模上实施。

Method: 提出多阶段验证框架，包括：提示校准、基于规则的合理性过滤、语义基础评估、使用独立高容量法官LLM进行针对性确认评估、选择性专家评审、外部预测有效性分析。应用于从919,783份临床笔记中提取11种物质类别的物质使用障碍诊断。

Result: 基于规则的过滤和语义基础移除了14.59%的LLM阳性提取（不支持、不相关或结构不合理）。法官LLM评估与专家评审具有高度一致性（Gwet's AC1=0.80）。主要LLM在宽松匹配标准下F1分数为0.80。LLM提取的SUD诊断预测后续SUD专科护理参与比结构化数据基线更准确（AUC=0.80）。

Conclusion: 无需标注密集评估即可实现基于LLM的临床信息提取的可扩展、可信部署是可行的。多阶段验证框架为弱监督下的严格评估提供了可行路径。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) show promise for extracting clinically meaningful information from unstructured health records, yet their translation into real-world settings is constrained by the lack of scalable and trustworthy validation approaches. Conventional evaluation methods rely heavily on annotation-intensive reference standards or incomplete structured data, limiting feasibility at population scale. We propose a multi-stage validation framework for LLM-based clinical information extraction that enables rigorous assessment under weak supervision. The framework integrates prompt calibration, rule-based plausibility filtering, semantic grounding assessment, targeted confirmatory evaluation using an independent higher-capacity judge LLM, selective expert review, and external predictive validity analysis to quantify uncertainty and characterize error modes without exhaustive manual annotation. We applied this framework to extraction of substance use disorder (SUD) diagnoses across 11 substance categories from 919,783 clinical notes. Rule-based filtering and semantic grounding removed 14.59% of LLM-positive extractions that were unsupported, irrelevant, or structurally implausible. For high-uncertainty cases, the judge LLM's assessments showed substantial agreement with subject matter expert review (Gwet's AC1=0.80). Using judge-evaluated outputs as references, the primary LLM achieved an F1 score of 0.80 under relaxed matching criteria. LLM-extracted SUD diagnoses also predicted subsequent engagement in SUD specialty care more accurately than structured-data baselines (AUC=0.80). These findings demonstrate that scalable, trustworthy deployment of LLM-based clinical information extraction is feasible without annotation-intensive evaluation.

</details>


### [224] [The Model Agreed, But Didn't Learn: Diagnosing Surface Compliance in Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05995)
*Xiaojie Gu,Ziying Huang,Weicong Hong,Jian Xie,Renze Lou,Kai Zhang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 该论文揭示了当前知识编辑方法存在的表面遵从现象：编辑器在标准基准测试中表现良好，但并未真正修改模型的内部记忆结构，只是模仿目标输出，导致认知不稳定和不可逆性降低。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型语言模型内部化大量世界知识作为参数记忆，但不可避免地继承了源语料库的过时和错误信息。确保这些内部表示的可信性和可塑性对于真实世界部署至关重要。知识编辑提供了无需重新训练即可手术式修改记忆的关键范式，但现有评估框架依赖特定提示条件下的输出评估，无法可靠验证真正的记忆修改。

Method: 引入一个简单的诊断框架，让模型在上下文学习（ICL）设置下进行判别性自我评估，这种设置更好地反映了真实世界应用环境，专门设计用于审查记忆修改引起的微妙行为变化。

Result: 揭示了普遍存在的表面遵从现象：编辑器通过模仿目标输出而非结构性覆盖内部信念来获得高基准分数。递归修改会积累表示残留，引发认知不稳定并永久降低模型记忆状态的可逆性。

Conclusion: 这些发现强调了当前编辑范式的风险，并突出了稳健记忆修改在构建可信、长期可持续的LLM系统中的关键作用。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) internalize vast world knowledge as parametric memory, yet inevitably inherit the staleness and errors of their source corpora. Consequently, ensuring the reliability and malleability of these internal representations is imperative for trustworthy real-world deployment. Knowledge editing offers a pivotal paradigm for surgically modifying memory without retraining. However, while recent editors demonstrate high success rates on standard benchmarks, it remains questionable whether current evaluation frameworks that rely on assessing output under specific prompting conditions can reliably authenticate genuine memory modification. In this work, we introduce a simple diagnostic framework that subjects models to discriminative self-assessment under in-context learning (ICL) settings that better reflect real-world application environments, specifically designed to scrutinize the subtle behavioral nuances induced by memory modifications. This probing reveals a pervasive phenomenon of Surface Compliance, where editors achieve high benchmark scores by merely mimicking target outputs without structurally overwriting internal beliefs. Moreover, we find that recursive modifications accumulate representational residues, triggering cognitive instability and permanently diminishing the reversibility of the model's memory state. These insights underscore the risks of current editing paradigms and highlight the pivotal role of robust memory modification in building trustworthy, long-term sustainable LLM systems. Code is available at https://github.com/XiaojieGu/SA-MCQ.

</details>


### [225] ["I See What You Did There": Can Large Vision-Language Models Understand Multimodal Puns?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05930)
*Naen Xu,Jiayi Sheng,Changjiang Li,Chunyi Zhou,Yuyuan Li,Tianyu Du,Jun Wang,Zhihui Fu,Jinbao Li,Shouling Ji*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 该论文提出了MultiPun数据集来评估视觉语言模型对多模态双关语的理解能力，发现现有模型难以区分真实双关语和对抗性非双关干扰项，并提出改进策略使F1分数平均提升16.5%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 虽然视觉语言模型在多模态理解和生成中广泛应用，但由于缺乏严格的基准测试，它们对双关语的理解能力尚未得到系统研究。双关语利用多义性和语音相似性创造幽默，在多模态双关中，视觉和文本元素协同作用，同时呈现字面意义和比喻意义。

Method: 首先提出多模态双关语生成流程，然后引入MultiPun数据集，包含多种类型的双关语以及对抗性非双关干扰项。评估现有模型性能后，提出提示级和模型级两种策略来增强双关语理解能力。

Result: 评估显示大多数模型难以区分真实双关语和对抗性非双关干扰项。提出的改进策略使F1分数平均提升16.5%，为开发能够通过跨模态推理掌握类人幽默微妙之处的未来视觉语言模型提供了宝贵见解。

Conclusion: 该研究填补了视觉语言模型在双关语理解方面的评估空白，提出的MultiPun数据集和改进策略为开发更擅长理解人类幽默微妙之处的多模态模型提供了重要基础。

Abstract: Puns are a common form of rhetorical wordplay that exploits polysemy and phonetic similarity to create humor. In multimodal puns, visual and textual elements synergize to ground the literal sense and evoke the figurative meaning simultaneously. Although Vision-Language Models (VLMs) are widely used in multimodal understanding and generation, their ability to understand puns has not been systematically studied due to a scarcity of rigorous benchmarks. To address this, we first propose a multimodal pun generation pipeline. We then introduce MultiPun, a dataset comprising diverse types of puns alongside adversarial non-pun distractors. Our evaluation reveals that most models struggle to distinguish genuine puns from these distractors. Moreover, we propose both prompt-level and model-level strategies to enhance pun comprehension, with an average improvement of 16.5% in F1 scores. Our findings provide valuable insights for developing future VLMs that master the subtleties of human-like humor via cross-modal reasoning.

</details>


### [226] ["OK Aura, Be Fair With Me": Demographics-Agnostic Training for Bias Mitigation in Wake-up Word Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05830)
*Fernando López,Paula Delgado-Santos,Pablo Gómez,David Solans,Jordi Luque*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 该研究评估了人口统计信息无关的训练技术在减少唤醒词检测中人口统计偏见方面的有效性，通过数据增强和知识蒸馏技术显著降低了性别、年龄和口音相关的性能差异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 语音接口广泛应用，但唤醒词检测在不同人口统计群体中存在显著偏见，需要解决跨性别、年龄和口音的公平性问题。

Method: 使用OK Aura数据库，采用人口统计信息无关的训练方法（不包含人口统计标签），探索数据增强技术和预训练基础语音模型的知识蒸馏。

Result: 人口统计信息无关的训练技术显著减少了人口统计偏见，其中一项技术相比基线实现了性别预测差异减少39.94%、年龄减少83.65%、口音减少40.48%。

Conclusion: 标签无关方法在促进唤醒词检测公平性方面具有显著效果，为减少语音技术中的人口统计偏见提供了有效途径。

Abstract: Voice-based interfaces are widely used; however, achieving fair Wake-up Word detection across diverse speaker populations remains a critical challenge due to persistent demographic biases. This study evaluates the effectiveness of demographics-agnostic training techniques in mitigating performance disparities among speakers of varying sex, age, and accent. We utilize the OK Aura database for our experiments, employing a training methodology that excludes demographic labels, which are reserved for evaluation purposes. We explore (i) data augmentation techniques to enhance model generalization and (ii) knowledge distillation of pre-trained foundational speech models. The experimental results indicate that these demographics-agnostic training techniques markedly reduce demographic bias, leading to a more equitable performance profile across different speaker groups. Specifically, one of the evaluated techniques achieves a Predictive Disparity reduction of 39.94\% for sex, 83.65\% for age, and 40.48\% for accent when compared to the baseline. This study highlights the effectiveness of label-agnostic methodologies in fostering fairness in Wake-up Word detection.

</details>


### [227] [What Models Know, How Well They Know It: Knowledge-Weighted Fine-Tuning for Learning When to Say "I Don't Know"](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05779)
*Joosung Lee,Hwiyeol Jo,Donghyeon Ko,Kyubyung Chae,Cheonbok Park,Jeonghoon Kim*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 通过多采样推理估计细粒度实例级知识分数，根据模型已有知识调整学习信号，鼓励对超出范围查询明确回答"我不知道"，在保持已知问题准确性的同时增强不确定性表达


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型语言模型虽然能力强大，但仍存在幻觉问题，主要源于预训练与微调之间的知识不对齐。需要解决这种不对齐，使模型能够明确表达不确定性

Method: 通过多采样推理可靠地估计细粒度实例级知识分数，根据模型已有知识调整学习信号，鼓励对超出范围查询明确回答"我不知道"

Result: 实验结果显示，该方法使模型在缺乏知识时能明确表达不确定性，同时保持对能回答问题的准确性。准确区分已知和未知实例能持续提升性能

Conclusion: 提出基于知识分数的微调方法能有效解决知识不对齐问题，增强模型不确定性表达能力，并提出相应的不确定性评估指标

Abstract: While large language models (LLMs) demonstrate strong capabilities across diverse user queries, they still suffer from hallucinations, often arising from knowledge misalignment between pre-training and fine-tuning. To address this misalignment, we reliably estimate a fine-grained, instance-level knowledge score via multi-sampled inference. Using the knowledge score, we scale the learning signal according to the model's existing knowledge, while encouraging explicit "I don't know" responses for out-of-scope queries. Experimental results show that this approach allows the model to explicitly express uncertainty when it lacks knowledge, while maintaining accuracy on questions it can answer. Furthermore, we propose evaluation metrics for uncertainty, showing that accurate discrimination between known and unknown instances consistently improves performance.

</details>


### [228] [LLM Reasoning as Trajectories: Step-Specific Representation Geometry and Correctness Signals](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05655)
*Lihao Sun,Hang Dong,Bo Qiao,Qingwei Lin,Dongmei Zhang,Saravan Rajmohan*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 该研究将大语言模型的思维链生成表征为表示空间中的结构化轨迹，发现数学推理遍历功能有序的步骤特定子空间，这些子空间随层深增加而更易分离。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究动机是理解大语言模型在数学推理任务中思维链生成的内在机制，探索推理过程在表示空间中的几何结构，以及如何利用这种结构来预测和控制模型的推理行为。

Method: 方法包括：1）将思维链生成表征为表示空间中的轨迹；2）分析数学推理过程中步骤特定子空间的功能有序性和可分离性；3）研究基础模型与经过推理训练模型的轨迹差异；4）开发基于轨迹的引导框架，用于推理校正和长度控制。

Result: 结果显示：1）数学推理遍历功能有序的步骤特定子空间，且随层深增加更易分离；2）基础模型已具备这种结构，推理训练主要加速向终止相关子空间的收敛；3）正确与错误解在推理后期系统性地分叉；4）基于中期推理轨迹可预测最终答案正确性（ROC-AUC达0.87）；5）轨迹引导框架能有效校正推理和控制长度。

Conclusion: 结论是推理轨迹为解释、预测和控制大语言模型推理行为提供了一个几何视角，揭示了推理过程的结构化本质，并为推理干预提供了理论基础和实用框架。

Abstract: This work characterizes large language models' chain-of-thought generation as a structured trajectory through representation space. We show that mathematical reasoning traverses functionally ordered, step-specific subspaces that become increasingly separable with layer depth. This structure already exists in base models, while reasoning training primarily accelerates convergence toward termination-related subspaces rather than introducing new representational organization. While early reasoning steps follow similar trajectories, correct and incorrect solutions diverge systematically at late stages. This late-stage divergence enables mid-reasoning prediction of final-answer correctness with ROC-AUC up to 0.87. Furthermore, we introduce trajectory-based steering, an inference-time intervention framework that enables reasoning correction and length control based on derived ideal trajectories. Together, these results establish reasoning trajectories as a geometric lens for interpreting, predicting, and controlling LLM reasoning behavior.

</details>


### [229] [FastDiSS: Few-step Match Many-step Diffusion Language Model on Sequence-to-Sequence Generation--Full Version](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05551)
*Dat Nguyen-Cong,Tung Kieu,Hoang Thanh-Tung*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出新的训练框架解决连续扩散语言模型中自条件作用在少步采样时的性能下降问题，通过扰动自条件信号匹配推理噪声，并引入token级噪声感知机制，实现更快推理速度


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 连续扩散语言模型的自条件作用在少步采样（快速推理）时性能显著下降，不准确的自条件信号会导致近似误差累积，最终主导样本质量，限制了扩散模型在部署中的实用性

Method: 提出新型训练框架：1）扰动自条件信号以匹配推理噪声，提高对先验估计误差的鲁棒性；2）引入token级噪声感知机制防止训练饱和，改善优化过程

Result: 在条件生成基准测试中，该框架超越标准连续扩散模型，提供高达400倍的推理加速，同时与其他一步扩散框架保持竞争力

Conclusion: 通过处理自条件作用在少步采样时的误差问题，提出的训练框架显著提升了连续扩散语言模型在快速推理场景下的性能，为实际部署提供了有效解决方案

Abstract: Self-conditioning has been central to the success of continuous diffusion language models, as it allows models to correct previous errors. Yet its ability degrades precisely in the regime where diffusion is most attractive for deployment: few-step sampling for fast inference. In this study, we show that when models only have a few denoising steps, inaccurate self-conditioning induces a substantial approximation gap; this mistake compounds across denoising steps and ultimately dominate the sample quality. To address this, we propose a novel training framework that handles these errors during learning by perturbing the self-conditioning signal to match inference noise, improving robustness to prior estimation errors. In addition, we introduce a token-level noise-awareness mechanism that prevents training from saturation, hence improving optimization. Extensive experiments across conditional generation benchmarks demonstrate that our framework surpasses standard continuous diffusion models while providing up to 400x faster inference speed, and remains competitive against other one-step diffusion frameworks.

</details>


### [230] [Attention Editing: A Versatile Framework for Cross-Architecture Attention Conversion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05688)
*Zhen Cheng,Hao-Bo Yang,Wan-Yi Huang,Jin-Long Li*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: Attention Editing：一种无需从头预训练即可将已训练大语言模型转换为新注意力架构的实用框架，通过渐进式蒸馏实现KV缓存效率提升


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 长上下文和长生成场景下，KV缓存的内存和带宽成本日益主导大语言模型推理开销。现有架构如MLA和混合滑动窗口注意力虽能缓解此问题，但集成到已有模型中仍很困难，先前方法对源和目标注意力模块的细粒度结构要求难以满足实际部署需求。

Method: 提出Attention Editing框架，通过渐进式蒸馏将原始注意力替换为可学习的目标模块：1）层间教师强制优化，通过中间激活监督防止冷启动误差累积；2）模型级蒸馏，监督下一词分布，可选弱特征匹配正则化。在Qwen3-8B和Qwen3-30B-A3B上实例化MLA和GateSWA（门控混合SWA设计）两种目标架构。

Result: 转换后的模型在保持竞争力的性能同时，实现了显著的效率提升，证明大规模注意力转换既可行又鲁棒。实验在Ascend 910B集群上进行，提供了国产硬件上的实用训练案例研究。

Conclusion: Attention Editing为已训练大语言模型集成新注意力架构提供了实用解决方案，无需从头预训练，通过渐进式蒸馏实现了KV缓存效率的实质性改进，为长上下文推理优化提供了可行路径。

Abstract: Key-Value (KV) cache memory and bandwidth increasingly dominate large language model inference cost in long-context and long-generation regimes. Architectures such as multi-head latent attention (MLA) and hybrid sliding-window attention (SWA) can alleviate this bound, but integrating them into existing models remains difficult. Prior methods impose fine-grained structural requirements on both source and target attention modules, which cannot meet the feasible requirement in practical deployment. We present Attention Editing, a practical framework for converting already-trained large language models (LLMs) with new attention architectures without re-pretraining from scratch. Attention editing replaces the original attention with a learnable target module and trains it using progressive distillation, consisting of (1) layer-wise teacher-forced optimization with intermediate activation supervision to prevent cold-start error accumulation, and (2) model-level distillation on next-token distributions, optionally regularized by weak feature matching. We instantiate the framework on two different target--MLA and GateSWA, a gated hybrid SWA design, and apply it to Qwen3-8B and Qwen3-30B-A3B. The resulting models maintain competitive performance while delivering substantial efficiency improvements, demonstrating that large-scale attention conversion is both feasible and robust. Notably, experiments are conducted on an Ascend 910B clusters, offering a practical training case study on domestic hardware.

</details>


### [231] [Learning What Matters: Dynamic Dimension Selection and Aggregation for Interpretable Vision-Language Reward Modeling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05445)
*Qiyuan Chen,Hongsen Huang,Jiahe Chen,Qian Shao,Jintai Chen,Hongxia Xu,Renjie Hua,Chuan Ren,Jian Wu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: VL-MDR是一个视觉语言多维度奖励框架，通过动态分解评估为细粒度可解释维度，解决生成方法慢而判别方法不透明的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 视觉语言奖励建模面临两难：生成方法可解释但速度慢，判别方法高效但像不透明的"黑盒"。需要弥合这一差距，提供既高效又可解释的奖励建模方法。

Method: 提出VL-MDR框架，采用视觉感知门控机制动态识别相关维度并自适应加权（如幻觉、推理等）。构建包含321k视觉语言偏好对的数据集，标注了21个细粒度维度。

Result: VL-MDR在VL-RewardBench等基准测试中持续优于现有开源奖励模型。使用VL-MDR构建的偏好对能有效支持DPO对齐，减少视觉幻觉并提高可靠性。

Conclusion: VL-MDR提供了一种可扩展的VLM对齐解决方案，通过多维度可解释奖励建模，在保持高效性的同时提高了透明度和性能。

Abstract: Vision-language reward modeling faces a dilemma: generative approaches are interpretable but slow, while discriminative ones are efficient but act as opaque "black boxes." To bridge this gap, we propose VL-MDR (Vision-Language Multi-Dimensional Reward), a framework that dynamically decomposes evaluation into granular, interpretable dimensions. Instead of outputting a monolithic scalar, VL-MDR employs a visual-aware gating mechanism to identify relevant dimensions and adaptively weight them (e.g., Hallucination, Reasoning) for each specific input. To support this, we curate a dataset of 321k vision-language preference pairs annotated across 21 fine-grained dimensions. Extensive experiments show that VL-MDR consistently outperforms existing open-source reward models on benchmarks like VL-RewardBench. Furthermore, we show that VL-MDR-constructed preference pairs effectively enable DPO alignment to mitigate visual hallucinations and improve reliability, providing a scalable solution for VLM alignment.

</details>


### [232] [ICR-Drive: Instruction Counterfactual Robustness for End-to-End Language-Driven Autonomous Driving](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05378)
*Kaiser Hamid,Can Cui,Nade Liang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: ICR-Drive是一个用于评估端到端语言条件自动驾驶中指令反事实鲁棒性的诊断框架，通过生成四种扰动类型的指令变体来测试模型对指令变化的敏感性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前视觉-语言-动作模型在自动驾驶中主要评估精确、规范的指令，但实际部署中指令存在表述差异、特异性不足、关键限定词缺失甚至误导性内容，导致指令级鲁棒性评估不足。

Method: ICR-Drive生成四种扰动类型的指令变体：Paraphrase（改写）、Ambiguity（模糊性）、Noise（噪声）和Misleading（误导性），在相同CARLA路线、模拟器配置和种子下重放，隔离语言指令变化对性能的影响。

Result: 在LMDrive和BEVDriver上的实验表明，微小的指令变化会导致显著的性能下降和不同的故障模式，揭示了在安全关键驾驶中部署具身基础模型存在的可靠性差距。

Conclusion: 指令级鲁棒性是自动驾驶VLA模型部署的关键瓶颈，ICR-Drive提供了一个系统化的诊断框架来评估和改善模型对指令变化的鲁棒性，对于安全关键应用至关重要。

Abstract: Recent progress in vision-language-action (VLA) models has enabled language-conditioned driving agents to execute natural-language navigation commands in closed-loop simulation, yet standard evaluations largely assume instructions are precise and well-formed. In deployment, instructions vary in phrasing and specificity, may omit critical qualifiers, and can occasionally include misleading, authority-framed text, leaving instruction-level robustness under-measured. We introduce ICR-Drive, a diagnostic framework for instruction counterfactual robustness in end-to-end language-conditioned autonomous driving. ICR-Drive generates controlled instruction variants spanning four perturbation families: Paraphrase, Ambiguity, Noise, and Misleading, where Misleading variants conflict with the navigation goal and attempt to override intent. We replay identical CARLA routes under matched simulator configurations and seeds to isolate performance changes attributable to instruction language. Robustness is quantified using standard CARLA Leaderboard metrics and per-family performance degradation relative to the baseline instruction. Experiments on LMDrive and BEVDriver show that minor instruction changes can induce substantial performance drops and distinct failure modes, revealing a reliability gap for deploying embodied foundation models in safety-critical driving.

</details>


### [233] [Context-Agent: Dynamic Discourse Trees for Non-Linear Dialogue](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05552)
*Junan Hu,Shudan Guo,Wenqi Liu,Jianhua Yin,Yinwei Wei*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: Context-Agent框架将多轮对话历史建模为动态树结构，以解决LLM在非线性对话流管理中的挑战，并通过NTM基准进行评估，显著提升了任务完成率和token效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前LLM在处理人类对话时面临根本性挑战，特别是将对话历史视为扁平线性序列的做法与自然话语固有的层次化和分支结构不匹配，导致上下文利用效率低下，在涉及话题转换或指令细化的长时交互中失去连贯性。

Method: 提出Context-Agent框架，将多轮对话历史建模为动态树结构，反映对话的固有非线性特性，使模型能够维护和导航对应不同话题的多个对话分支。同时引入NTM基准，专门评估模型在长视野非线性场景中的表现。

Result: 实验表明Context-Agent在各种LLM中提高了任务完成率并改善了token效率，证明了结构化上下文管理对于复杂动态对话的价值。

Conclusion: 通过将对话历史建模为动态树结构，Context-Agent有效解决了LLM在非线性对话流管理中的挑战，为复杂动态对话提供了更有效的上下文管理方法，相关数据集和代码已开源。

Abstract: Large Language Models demonstrate outstanding performance in many language tasks but still face fundamental challenges in managing the non-linear flow of human conversation. The prevalent approach of treating dialogue history as a flat, linear sequence is misaligned with the intrinsically hierarchical and branching structure of natural discourse, leading to inefficient context utilization and a loss of coherence during extended interactions involving topic shifts or instruction refinements. To address this limitation, we introduce Context-Agent, a novel framework that models multi-turn dialogue history as a dynamic tree structure. This approach mirrors the inherent non-linearity of conversation, enabling the model to maintain and navigate multiple dialogue branches corresponding to different topics. Furthermore, to facilitate robust evaluation, we introduce the Non-linear Task Multi-turn Dialogue (NTM) benchmark, specifically designed to assess model performance in long-horizon, non-linear scenarios. Our experiments demonstrate that Context-Agent enhances task completion rates and improves token efficiency across various LLMs, underscoring the value of structured context management for complex, dynamic dialogues. The dataset and code is available at GitHub.

</details>


### [234] [Turbulence-like 5/3 spectral scaling in contextual representations of language as a complex system](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05536)
*Zhongxin Yang,Chun Bao,Yuanwei Bin,Xiang I. A. Yang,Shiyi Chen*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 论文发现语言在嵌入空间中表现出幂律谱，指数接近5/3，类似于湍流中的Kolmogorov谱，表明语义信息以尺度无关的自相似方式跨语言尺度整合。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自然语言是一个复杂系统，具有稳健的统计规律性。研究旨在量化语言在嵌入空间中的尺度依赖性波动，探索语义信息的跨尺度组织方式。

Method: 将文本表示为基于Transformer的语言模型生成的高维嵌入空间中的轨迹，使用嵌入步长信号沿标记序列量化尺度依赖性波动，计算功率谱分析。

Result: 在多种语言和语料库中，功率谱在扩展频率范围内表现出稳健的幂律，指数接近5/3。这种缩放仅出现在上下文嵌入中（人类写作和AI生成文本），在静态词嵌入中不存在，且被标记顺序随机化破坏。

Conclusion: 观察到的缩放反映了多尺度、上下文依赖的组织，而非单纯的词汇统计。类似于湍流中的Kolmogorov谱，语义信息以尺度无关的自相似方式跨语言尺度整合，为研究语言表示的复杂结构提供了定量、模型无关的基准。

Abstract: Natural language is a complex system that exhibits robust statistical regularities. Here, we represent text as a trajectory in a high-dimensional embedding space generated by transformer-based language models, and quantify scale-dependent fluctuations along the token sequence using an embedding-step signal. Across multiple languages and corpora, the resulting power spectrum exhibits a robust power law with an exponent close to $5/3$ over an extended frequency range. This scaling is observed consistently in contextual embeddings from both human-written and AI-generated text, but is absent in static word embeddings and is disrupted by randomization of token order. These results show that the observed scaling reflects multiscale, context-dependent organization rather than lexical statistics alone. By analogy with the Kolmogorov spectrum in turbulence, our findings suggest that semantic information is integrated in a scale-free, self-similar manner across linguistic scales, and provide a quantitative, model-agnostic benchmark for studying complex structure in language representations.

</details>


### [235] [$π^2$: Structure-Originated Reasoning Data Improves Long-Context Reasoning Ability of Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05114)
*Quyet V. Do,Thinh Pham,Nguyen Nguyen,Sha Li,Pratibha Zunjare,Tu Vu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: π²：通过从维基百科表格构建高质量推理数据来提升大语言模型长上下文推理能力的管道方法


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前大语言模型在长上下文推理任务上表现有限，需要高质量、多跳的推理数据来提升其能力。现有数据集往往缺乏真实性和复杂性，无法有效训练模型进行深入分析推理。

Method: π²采用三步管道方法：1) 从维基百科提取和扩展表格；2) 基于表格和相关上下文生成现实的多跳分析推理问题，通过双路径代码执行自动确定和验证答案；3) 通过回译生成逐步结构化推理轨迹作为问答对的解决方案。

Result: 在四个长上下文推理基准测试和π²-Bench上，使用π²数据进行监督微调的GPT-OSS-20B和Qwen3-4B-Instruct-2507模型分别获得平均+4.3%和+2.7%的绝对准确率提升。GPT-OSS-20B通过自身推理轨迹进行自蒸馏，平均性能进一步提升+4.4%。

Conclusion: π²管道能够有效构建高质量推理数据，显著提升大语言模型的长上下文推理能力。该方法支持自蒸馏，展示了数据质量对模型性能的重要性。所有代码、数据和模型均已开源。

Abstract: We study a pipeline that curates reasoning data from initial structured data for improving long-context reasoning in large language models (LLMs). Our approach, $π^2$, constructs high-quality reasoning data through rigorous QA curation: 1) extracting and expanding tables from Wikipedia, 2) from the collected tables and relevant context, generating realistic and multi-hop analytical reasoning questions whose answers are automatically determined and verified through dual-path code execution, and 3) back-translating step-by-step structured reasoning traces as solutions of QA pairs given realistic web-search context. Supervised fine-tuning with \textsc{\small{gpt-oss-20b}} and \textsc{\small{Qwen3-4B-Instruct-2507}} on $π^2$ yields consistent improvements across four long-context reasoning benchmarks and our alike $π^2$-Bench, with average absolute accuracy gains of +4.3% and +2.7% respectively. Notably, our dataset facilitates self-distillation, where \textsc{\small{gpt-oss-20b}} even improves its average performance by +4.4% with its own reasoning traces, demonstrating $π^2$'s usefulness. Our code, data, and models are open-source at https://github.com/vt-pi-squared/pi-squared.

</details>


### [236] [Multilingual Language Models Encode Script Over Linguistic Structure](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05090)
*Aastha A K Verma,Anwoy Chatterjee,Mehak Gupta,Tanmoy Chakraborty*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 多语言语言模型在共享参数空间中组织不同语言的表征，研究发现这些表征主要受表面形式（如正字法）而非抽象语言身份影响，语言抽象在深层逐渐浮现但未形成统一的中间语言。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究多语言语言模型中表征组织的本质：是抽象的语言身份还是表面形式线索塑造了多语言表征。理解紧凑蒸馏模型中明确的表征权衡如何揭示语言表征的内部结构。

Method: 使用语言激活概率熵（LAPE）指标分析Llama-3.2-1B和Gemma-2-2B中的语言关联单元，通过稀疏自编码器分解激活，进行探测实验和因果干预分析。

Result: 语言关联单元强烈受正字法条件影响：罗马化导致几乎不相交的表征，既不与原生脚本输入对齐也不与英语对齐；词序重排对单元身份影响有限。深层中类型学结构可访问性增加，生成对表面形式扰动不变的单元最敏感。

Conclusion: 多语言语言模型围绕表面形式组织表征，语言抽象逐渐浮现但未坍缩为统一的中间语言，表明模型在保持表面形式特异性的同时发展出渐进的抽象能力。

Abstract: Multilingual language models (LMs) organize representations for typologically and orthographically diverse languages into a shared parameter space, yet the nature of this internal organization remains elusive. In this work, we investigate which linguistic properties - abstract language identity or surface-form cues - shape multilingual representations. Focusing on compact, distilled models where representational trade-offs are explicit, we analyze language-associated units in Llama-3.2-1B and Gemma-2-2B using the Language Activation Probability Entropy (LAPE) metric, and further decompose activations with Sparse Autoencoders. We find that these units are strongly conditioned on orthography: romanization induces near-disjoint representations that align with neither native-script inputs nor English, while word-order shuffling has limited effect on unit identity. Probing shows that typological structure becomes increasingly accessible in deeper layers, while causal interventions indicate that generation is most sensitive to units that are invariant to surface-form perturbations rather than to units identified by typological alignment alone. Overall, our results suggest that multilingual LMs organize representations around surface form, with linguistic abstraction emerging gradually without collapsing into a unified interlingua.

</details>


### [237] [Beyond LLM-as-a-Judge: Deterministic Metrics for Multilingual Generative Text Evaluation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05083)
*Firoj Alam,Gagan Bhatia,Sahinur Rahman Laskar,Shammur Absar Chowdhury*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: OmniScore是一系列基于小型模型（<1B参数）的确定性学习指标，用于替代大型语言模型作为文本生成评估的自动评判器，提供低成本、低延迟且一致的评估方案。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前使用大型语言模型作为自动评判器存在成本高、对提示设计敏感、可复现性差等问题，需要开发更实用和可扩展的替代方案。

Method: 使用大规模合成监督数据（约564k实例，107种语言）训练小型参数模型（<1B），通过确定性学习指标近似LLM评判行为，支持基于参考、基于源文本和混合评估等多种设置。

Result: 在6种语言的问答、翻译和摘要任务上评估，OmniScore模型在8,617个人工标注实例上表现良好，证明了轻量级确定性学习指标作为前沿LLM替代方案的实用性和可扩展性。

Conclusion: OmniScore系列指标为文本生成评估提供了低成本、一致且可复现的解决方案，是替代大型语言模型评判器的实用选择。

Abstract: While Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly adopted as automated judges for evaluating generated text, their outputs are often costly, and highly sensitive to prompt design, language, and aggregation strategies, severely, which limits reproducibility. To address these challenges, we propose \textbf{\textit{OmniScore}}, a family of complementary, deterministic learned metrics developed using small size ($<$1B) parameter models. OmniScore approximates LLM-judge behavior while preserving the low latency and consistency of traditional model-based scoring. We trained the models large-scale synthetic supervision ($\sim$564k instances, in \textbf{107 languages}) and evaluated using 8,617 manually annotated instances. The OmniScore family supports reliable, multi-dimensional scores across a variety of settings, including reference-based, source-grounded, and hybrid evaluations. We evaluate these models across question answering (QA), translation, and summarization in \textbf{6 languages}. Our results demonstrate that lightweight, deterministic learned metrics provide a highly practical and scalable alternative to frontier LLMs. Our models and datasets can be found at https://huggingface.co/collections/QCRI/omniscore

</details>


### [238] [TriAttention: Efficient Long Reasoning with Trigonometric KV Compression](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04921)
*Weian Mao,Xi Lin,Wei Huang,Yuxin Xie,Tianfu Fu,Bohan Zhuang,Song Han,Yukang Chen*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: TriAttention：一种基于Q/K向量集中特性的KV缓存压缩方法，通过三角函数级数估计键重要性，在保持推理精度的同时显著提升吞吐量并减少内存占用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型中的扩展推理导致严重的KV缓存内存瓶颈。现有基于注意力分数的KV缓存压缩方法在RoPE旋转后代表性查询很少，导致键选择不佳和推理不稳定。

Method: 提出TriAttention方法，利用RoPE前空间中Q/K向量高度集中在固定非零中心且跨位置保持稳定的特性（Q/K集中），通过三角函数级数利用这些中心表征的距离偏好来对键的位置进行评分，同时利用Q/K范数作为重要性估计的额外信号。

Result: 在AIME25数据集上32K令牌生成任务中，TriAttention在匹配完整注意力推理精度的同时，实现了2.5倍吞吐量提升或10.7倍KV内存减少，而现有基线方法在相同效率下只能达到约一半的精度。

Conclusion: TriAttention通过利用Q/K集中特性有效解决了KV缓存压缩问题，使OpenClaw能够在单个消费级GPU上部署，而完整注意力在长上下文场景下会导致内存不足。

Abstract: Extended reasoning in large language models (LLMs) creates severe KV cache memory bottlenecks. Leading KV cache compression methods estimate KV importance using attention scores from recent post-RoPE queries. However, queries rotate with position during RoPE, making representative queries very few, leading to poor top-key selection and unstable reasoning. To avoid this issue, we turn to the pre-RoPE space, where we observe that Q and K vectors are highly concentrated around fixed non-zero centers and remain stable across positions -- Q/K concentration. We show that this concentration causes queries to preferentially attend to keys at specific distances (e.g., nearest keys), with the centers determining which distances are preferred via a trigonometric series. Based on this, we propose TriAttention to estimate key importance by leveraging these centers. Via the trigonometric series, we use the distance preference characterized by these centers to score keys according to their positions, and also leverage Q/K norms as an additional signal for importance estimation. On AIME25 with 32K-token generation, TriAttention matches Full Attention reasoning accuracy while achieving 2.5x higher throughput or 10.7x KV memory reduction, whereas leading baselines achieve only about half the accuracy at the same efficiency. TriAttention enables OpenClaw deployment on a single consumer GPU, where long context would otherwise cause out-of-memory with Full Attention.

</details>


### [239] [Phase-Associative Memory: Sequence Modeling in Complex Hilbert Space](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05030)
*Gowrav Vishwakarma,Christopher J. Agostino*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: Phase-Associative Memory (PAM) 是一种复值循环序列模型，使用矩阵状态存储关联并通过共轭内积检索，在WikiText-103上达到30.0困惑度，接近匹配的Transformer（27.1）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索基于复值叠加和共轭检索的架构，这与人类和大型语言模型中语义解释的非经典上下文性证据一致，研究语言建模中计算形式主义的选择。

Method: 提出Phase-Associative Memory (PAM)：所有表示均为复值，关联通过外积在矩阵状态S_t∈ℂ^{d×d}中累积，检索通过共轭内积K_t*·Q_t/√d进行。

Result: 在WikiText-103上约1亿参数时，PAM验证困惑度达到30.0，与匹配的Transformer（27.1）相差约10%，尽管有4倍复数计算开销且无定制内核。

Conclusion: 从向量状态模型（全息绑定因叠加关联的O(1/√n)容量衰减而失败）到矩阵状态的实验路径表明，基于复值叠加和共轭检索的架构具有竞争力，这与语义解释的非经典上下文性证据一致。

Abstract: We present Phase-Associative Memory (PAM), a recurrent sequence model in which all representations are complex-valued, associations accumulate in a matrix state $S_{t}$ $\in$ $\mathbb{C}^{d \times d}$ via outer products, and retrieval operates through the conjugate inner product $K_t^* \cdot Q_t / \sqrt{d}$. At $\sim$100M parameters on WikiText-103, PAM reaches validation perplexity 30.0, within $\sim$10\% of a matched transformer (27.1) trained under identical conditions, despite $4\times$ arithmetic overhead from complex computation and no custom kernels. We trace the experimental path from vector-state models, where holographic binding fails due to the $O(1/\sqrt{n})$ capacity degradation of superposed associations, to the matrix state that resolves it. The competitiveness of an architecture whose native operations are complex-valued superposition and conjugate retrieval is consistent with recent empirical evidence that semantic interpretation in both humans and large language models exhibits non-classical contextuality, and we discuss what this implies for the choice of computational formalism in language modeling.

</details>


### [240] [Early Stopping for Large Reasoning Models via Confidence Dynamics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04930)
*Parsa Hosseini,Sumit Nawathe,Mahdi Salmani,Meisam Razaviyayn,Soheil Feizi*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: CoDE-Stop：基于中间答案置信度动态的早期停止方法，可在不降低准确性的情况下减少推理计算成本25-50%


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型推理模型依赖长链思维生成解决复杂问题，但扩展推理会带来巨大计算成本，甚至因过度思考而降低性能。关键挑战是确定模型何时应停止推理并产生最终答案。

Method: CoDE-Stop（Confidence Dynamics Early Stop）：通过观察中间答案置信度动态，发现正确推理轨迹往往早期达到高置信度答案，而错误推理则产生长且无成效的推理轨迹且置信度动态不可靠。基于此提出无需额外训练、易于集成到现有模型的早期停止方法。

Result: 在多个推理和科学基准测试中评估CoDE-Stop，相比先前早期停止方法，实现了更优的准确性-计算权衡，相比标准全长推理减少总token使用量25-50%。

Conclusion: CoDE-Stop通过利用中间答案置信度动态决定何时终止推理，有效平衡计算成本与准确性，为推理过程优化提供实用解决方案。

Abstract: Large reasoning models rely on long chain-of-thought generation to solve complex problems, but extended reasoning often incurs substantial computational cost and can even degrade performance due to overthinking. A key challenge is determining when the model should stop reasoning and produce the final answer. In this work, we study the confidence of intermediate answers during reasoning and observe two characteristic behaviors: correct reasoning trajectories often reach high-confidence answers early, while incorrect rollouts tend to produce long, unproductive reasoning traces and exhibit less reliable confidence dynamics. Motivated by these observations, we propose CoDE-Stop (Confidence Dynamics Early Stop), an early stopping method that leverages the dynamics of intermediate answer confidence to decide when to terminate reasoning, requiring no additional training and easily integrating into existing models. We evaluate CoDE-Stop on diverse reasoning and science benchmarks across multiple models. Compared to prior early stopping methods, it achieves a more favorable accuracy-compute tradeoff and reduces total token usage by 25-50% compared to standard full-length reasoning. In addition, we provide analyses of confidence dynamics during reasoning, offering insights into how confidence changes in both correct and incorrect trajectories.

</details>


### [241] [DQA: Diagnostic Question Answering for IT Support](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05350)
*Vishaal Kapoor,Mariam Dundua,Sarthak Ahuja,Neda Kordjazi,Evren Yortucboylu,Vaibhavi Padala,Derek Ho,Jennifer Whitted,Rebecca Steinert*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: DQA框架通过维护持久诊断状态和基于根本原因的检索聚合，显著提升了企业IT支持中的多轮诊断问答性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 企业IT支持交互本质上是诊断性的，需要从模糊的用户报告中迭代收集证据以识别根本原因。传统的多轮RAG系统缺乏明确的诊断状态，难以跨轮次积累证据和解决竞争假设

Method: DQA框架结合了对话查询重写、检索聚合和状态条件响应生成，维护持久诊断状态，并在根本原因层面而非单个文档层面聚合检索案例

Result: 在150个匿名企业IT支持场景的回放协议评估中，DQA在轨迹级成功标准下达到78.7%的成功率（多轮RAG基线为41.3%），平均轮次从8.4减少到3.9

Conclusion: DQA通过显式诊断状态管理和基于根本原因的检索聚合，显著提升了企业IT支持中的系统化故障排除能力，在满足企业延迟和上下文约束的同时实现了更好的诊断性能

Abstract: Enterprise IT support interactions are fundamentally diagnostic: effective resolution requires iterative evidence gathering from ambiguous user reports to identify an underlying root cause. While retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) provides grounding through historical cases, standard multi-turn RAG systems lack explicit diagnostic state and therefore struggle to accumulate evidence and resolve competing hypotheses across turns. We introduce DQA, a diagnostic question-answering framework that maintains persistent diagnostic state and aggregates retrieved cases at the level of root causes rather than individual documents. DQA combines conversational query rewriting, retrieval aggregation, and state-conditioned response generation to support systematic troubleshooting under enterprise latency and context constraints. We evaluate DQA on 150 anonymized enterprise IT support scenarios using a replay-based protocol. Averaged over three independent runs, DQA achieves a 78.7% success rate under a trajectory-level success criterion, compared to 41.3% for a multi-turn RAG baseline, while reducing average turns from 8.4 to 3.9.

</details>


### [242] [Rethinking Exploration in RLVR: From Entropy Regularization to Refinement via Bidirectional Entropy Modulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04894)
*Hengrui Gu,Xiaotian Han,Yujing Bian,Kaixiong Zhou*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 论文提出AsymGRPO框架，通过解耦正负rollouts的熵调制来解决RLVR中的受限探索问题，将策略熵分解为信息熵和虚假熵，实现更有效的探索。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: RLVR显著提升了LLMs的推理能力，但面临受限探索的根本限制——策略迅速收敛到狭窄解集。虽然熵正则化是维持探索的常用方法，但对LLMs效果不佳，存在高超参数敏感性和边际性能提升的问题。需要重新思考策略熵与探索的关系。

Method: 通过推导组相对优势估计的参数化公式和分析熵动态，将策略熵概念分解为信息熵（保持多样化解路径）和虚假熵（侵蚀推理模式）。提出AsymGRPO框架，显式解耦正负rollouts的调制，实现对信息熵的保持和虚假噪声的抑制。

Result: 大量实验表明，AsymGRPO相比强基线实现了更优性能，并展现出与现有熵正则化方法协同的潜力。

Conclusion: 有效探索需要熵精炼而非盲目最大化，AsymGRPO通过解耦正负rollouts的熵调制机制，解决了RLVR中的受限探索问题，为LLMs的强化学习提供了更有效的探索策略。

Abstract: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) has significantly advanced the reasoning capabilities of large language models (LLMs). However, it faces a fundamental limitation termed \textit{restricted exploration}, where the policy rapidly converges to a narrow set of solutions. While entropy regularization is a popular approach used to sustain exploration, it often proves unreliable for LLMs, suffering from high hyperparameter sensitivity and yielding only marginal performance gains. Motivated by these inefficiencies, we propose to rethink the relationship between policy entropy and exploration. By deriving a parametric formulation of group-relative advantage estimation and analyzing entropy dynamics, we conceptually decompose policy entropy into \textit{informative entropy}, which preserves diverse solution paths, and \textit{spurious entropy}, which erodes reasoning patterns. Our analysis reveals that, in contrast to blind maximization, effective exploration requires \textit{entropy refinement}-a mechanism implicitly embedded in group-relative advantage estimation that sustains informative entropy on positive rollouts while suppressing spurious entropy on negative ones. Guided by this insight, we propose \textbf{AsymGRPO}, an exploratory framework that explicitly decouples the modulation of positive and negative rollouts. This allows for independent control over the preservation of informative entropy and the suppression of spurious noise. Extensive experiments demonstrate that AsymGRPO achieves superior performance compared to strong baselines and exhibits the potential to synergize with existing entropy regularization methods.

</details>


### [243] [SkillX: Automatically Constructing Skill Knowledge Bases for Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04804)
*Chenxi Wang,Zhuoyun Yu,Xin Xie,Wuguannan Yao,Runnan Fang,Shuofei Qiao,Kexin Cao,Guozhou Zheng,Xiang Qi,Peng Zhang,Shumin Deng*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: SkillX是一个全自动框架，用于构建可跨智能体和环境重用的即插即用技能知识库，通过多级技能设计、迭代技能精炼和探索性技能扩展来提高LLM智能体的学习效率和泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前LLM智能体的自我进化范式效率低下：智能体孤立学习，从有限经验中重复发现相似行为，导致冗余探索和泛化能力差。需要一种方法让智能体能够共享和重用学习到的技能。

Method: SkillX框架包含三个协同创新：(1) 多级技能设计：将原始轨迹提炼为战略计划、功能技能和原子技能的三层层次结构；(2) 迭代技能精炼：基于执行反馈自动修订技能以持续改进库质量；(3) 探索性技能扩展：主动生成和验证新技能以扩展覆盖范围。

Result: 使用GLM-4.6作为骨干智能体自动构建可重用技能库，在AppWorld、BFCL-v3和τ²-Bench等具有挑战性的长视野、用户交互基准测试中评估其可迁移性。实验表明SkillKB在接入较弱基础智能体时能持续提高任务成功率和执行效率。

Conclusion: 结构化、层次化的经验表示对于可泛化的智能体学习至关重要。SkillX框架通过构建可重用的技能知识库，解决了当前LLM智能体学习中的冗余探索和泛化能力差的问题。

Abstract: Learning from experience is critical for building capable large language model (LLM) agents, yet prevailing self-evolving paradigms remain inefficient: agents learn in isolation, repeatedly rediscover similar behaviors from limited experience, resulting in redundant exploration and poor generalization. To address this problem, we propose SkillX, a fully automated framework for constructing a \textbf{plug-and-play skill knowledge base} that can be reused across agents and environments. SkillX operates through a fully automated pipeline built on three synergistic innovations: \textit{(i) Multi-Level Skills Design}, which distills raw trajectories into three-tiered hierarchy of strategic plans, functional skills, and atomic skills; \textit{(ii) Iterative Skills Refinement}, which automatically revises skills based on execution feedback to continuously improve library quality; and \textit{(iii) Exploratory Skills Expansion}, which proactively generates and validates novel skills to expand coverage beyond seed training data. Using a strong backbone agent (GLM-4.6), we automatically build a reusable skill library and evaluate its transferability on challenging long-horizon, user-interactive benchmarks, including AppWorld, BFCL-v3, and $τ^2$-Bench. Experiments show that SkillKB consistently improves task success and execution efficiency when plugged into weaker base agents, highlighting the importance of structured, hierarchical experience representations for generalizable agent learning. Our code will be publicly available soon at https://github.com/zjunlp/SkillX.

</details>


### [244] [Exemplar Retrieval Without Overhypothesis Induction: Limits of Distributional Sequence Learning in Early Word Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05243)
*Jon-Paul Cacioli*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 自回归变换器语言模型在形状作为稳定特征维度的合成语料上训练，能完美检索一阶示例但二阶泛化仍处于随机水平，表明其依赖模板匹配而非结构化抽象


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究旨在探索何种学习机制足以支持儿童从具体特征学习到二阶泛化（如形状是定义物体类别的稳定特征），即超越具体示例的归纳推理能力

Method: 使用参数规模3.4M-25.6M的自回归变换器语言模型，在形状作为跨类别稳定特征维度的合成语料上进行训练，设计了8个条件控制替代解释，通过1040项wug测试电池评估

Result: 120个预注册运行中，所有模型都实现了完美的一阶示例检索（100%），但对新名词的二阶泛化保持在随机水平（50-52%），特征交换诊断显示模型依赖框架到特征的模板匹配而非结构化抽象

Conclusion: 研究揭示了在发育规模训练条件下，自回归分布序列学习在实现二阶泛化方面的明显局限性，模型未能形成结构化名词-领域-特征抽象

Abstract: Background: Children do not simply learn that balls are round and blocks are square. They learn that shape is the kind of feature that tends to define object categories -- a second-order generalisation known as an overhypothesis [1, 2]. What kind of learning mechanism is sufficient for this inductive leap? Methods: We trained autoregressive transformer language models (3.4M-25.6M parameters) on synthetic corpora in which shape is the stable feature dimension across categories, with eight conditions controlling for alternative explanations. Results: Across 120 pre-registered runs evaluated on a 1,040-item wug test battery, every model achieved perfect first-order exemplar retrieval (100%) while second-order generalisation to novel nouns remained at chance (50-52%), a result confirmed by equivalence testing. A feature-swap diagnostic revealed that models rely on frame-to-feature template matching rather than structured noun-to-domain-to-feature abstraction. Conclusions: These results reveal a clear limitation of autoregressive distributional sequence learning under developmental-scale training conditions.

</details>


### [245] [XMark: Reliable Multi-Bit Watermarking for LLM-Generated Texts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05242)
*Jiahao Xu,Rui Hu,Olivera Kotevska,Zikai Zhang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: XMark是一种用于LLM生成文本的多比特水印方法，通过改进编码器设计减少对数分布失真，在保持文本质量的同时提高解码准确率，特别是在生成文本长度有限的情况下表现优异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM多比特水印方法存在计算复杂度高、文本质量与解码准确率权衡不佳的问题，特别是在生成文本长度有限时解码准确率显著下降，需要一种更有效的解决方案。

Method: 提出XMark方法，其编码器设计能产生较少失真的对数分布用于水印标记生成，同时其定制解码器能在有限标记数量下可靠恢复编码信息。

Result: 在多种下游任务上的实验表明，XMark显著提高了解码准确率，同时保持了水印文本的质量，优于现有方法。

Conclusion: XMark通过创新的编码器设计解决了现有多比特水印方法在计算可行性、文本质量与解码准确率权衡方面的局限性，特别是在有限标记场景下表现出色。

Abstract: Multi-bit watermarking has emerged as a promising solution for embedding imperceptible binary messages into Large Language Model (LLM)-generated text, enabling reliable attribution and tracing of malicious usage of LLMs. Despite recent progress, existing methods still face key limitations: some become computationally infeasible for large messages, while others suffer from a poor trade-off between text quality and decoding accuracy. Moreover, the decoding accuracy of existing methods drops significantly when the number of tokens in the generated text is limited, a condition that frequently arises in practical usage. To address these challenges, we propose \textsc{XMark}, a novel method for encoding and decoding binary messages in LLM-generated texts. The unique design of \textsc{XMark}'s encoder produces a less distorted logit distribution for watermarked token generation, preserving text quality, and also enables its tailored decoder to reliably recover the encoded message with limited tokens. Extensive experiments across diverse downstream tasks show that \textsc{XMark} significantly improves decoding accuracy while preserving the quality of watermarked text, outperforming prior methods. The code is at https://github.com/JiiahaoXU/XMark.

</details>


### [246] [HUKUKBERT: Domain-Specific Language Model for Turkish Law](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04790)
*Mehmet Utku Öztürk,Tansu Türkoğlu,Buse Buz-Yalug*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了HukukBERT，这是首个针对土耳其法律领域的大规模预训练语言模型，在18GB法律语料上训练，在土耳其法律术语预测任务中达到84.40%的Top-1准确率，显著优于现有模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 土耳其法律领域的NLP研究因缺乏领域特定数据和模型而受限。虽然英语法律领域已有LEGAL-BERT等模型，但土耳其语法律领域缺乏对应的高质量大规模模型。

Method: 采用混合领域自适应预训练方法，结合全词掩码、词元跨度掩码、词跨度掩码和关键词掩码技术，使用48K WordPiece分词器在18GB清洗后的土耳其法律语料上进行训练。

Result: 在土耳其法律术语预测任务中达到84.40%的Top-1准确率，显著优于现有模型；在土耳其法院判决书结构分割任务中达到92.8%的文档通过率，均创下新纪录。

Conclusion: HukukBERT是土耳其法律领域最全面的语言模型，填补了该领域的空白，为土耳其法律NLP任务（如命名实体识别、判决预测、法律文档分类等）提供了有力支持。

Abstract: Recent advances in natural language processing (NLP) have increasingly enabled LegalTech applications, yet existing studies specific to Turkish law have still been limited due to the scarcity of domain-specific data and models. Although extensive models like LEGAL-BERT have been developed for English legal texts, the Turkish legal domain lacks a domain-specific high-volume counterpart. In this paper, we introduce HukukBERT, the most comprehensive legal language model for Turkish, trained on a 18 GB cleaned legal corpus using a hybrid Domain-Adaptive Pre-Training (DAPT) methodology integrating Whole-Word Masking, Token Span Masking, Word Span Masking, and targeted Keyword Masking. We systematically compared our 48K WordPiece tokenizer and DAPT approach against general-purpose and existing domain-specific Turkish models. Evaluated on a novel Legal Cloze Test benchmark -- a masked legal term prediction task designed for Turkish court decisions -- HukukBERT achieves state-of-the-art performance with 84.40\% Top-1 accuracy, substantially outperforming existing models. Furthermore, we evaluated HukukBERT in the downstream task of structural segmentation of official Turkish court decisions, where it achieves a 92.8\% document pass rate, establishing a new state-of-the-art. We release HukukBERT to support future research in Turkish legal NLP tasks, including recognition of named entities, prediction of judgment, and classification of legal documents.

</details>


### [247] [Improving Clinical Trial Recruitment using Clinical Narratives and Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05190)
*Ziyi Chen,Mengxian Lyu,Cheng Peng,Yonghui Wu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 该研究探索使用大语言模型（LLM）自动筛选临床叙事以促进临床试验招募，比较了编码器和解码器生成式LLM，并测试三种处理长文档的策略，其中MedGemma模型结合RAG策略在N2C2数据集上取得了89.05%的最佳F1分数。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 临床试验患者筛选是一个劳动密集型瓶颈，导致招募不足和试验失败。LLM的突破为使用人工智能改进筛选提供了机会，但需要解决处理长临床文档的挑战。

Method: 系统探索编码器和解码器生成式LLM，包括通用和医学专用模型。测试三种处理长文档策略：1)原始长上下文使用默认窗口；2)基于NER的抽取式摘要；3)RAG基于资格标准的动态证据检索。使用2018 N2C2 Track 1基准数据集进行评估。

Result: MedGemma模型结合RAG策略取得最佳性能，微F1分数达89.05%。生成式LLM显著改善了需要跨长文档长期推理的试验标准，而对短上下文标准（如实验室测试）仅显示增量改进。

Conclusion: LLM在临床试验招募中的实际应用需要考虑特定标准来选择基于规则的查询、编码器LLM或生成式LLM，以在合理计算成本内最大化效率。生成式LLM特别适合需要长期推理的复杂标准。

Abstract: Screening patients for enrollment is a well-known, labor-intensive bottleneck that leads to under-enrollment and, ultimately, trial failures. Recent breakthroughs in large language models (LLMs) offer a promising opportunity to use artificial intelligence to improve screening. This study systematically explored both encoder- and decoder-based generative LLMs for screening clinical narratives to facilitate clinical trial recruitment. We examined both general-purpose LLMs and medical-adapted LLMs and explored three strategies to alleviate the "Lost in the Middle" issue when handling long documents, including 1) Original long-context: using the default context windows of LLMs, 2) NER-based extractive summarization: converting the long document into summarizations using named entity recognition, 3) RAG: dynamic evidence retrieval based on eligibility criteria. The 2018 N2C2 Track 1 benchmark dataset is used for evaluation. Our experimental results show that the MedGemma model with the RAG strategy achieved the best micro-F1 score of 89.05%, outperforming other models. Generative LLMs have remarkably improved trial criteria that require long-term reasoning across long documents, whereas trial criteria that span a short piece of context (e.g., lab tests) show incremental improvements. The real-world adoption of LLMs for trial recruitment must consider specific criteria for selecting among rule-based queries, encoder-based LLMs, and generative LLMs to maximize efficiency within reasonable computing costs.

</details>


### [248] [What Makes a Good Response? An Empirical Analysis of Quality in Qualitative Interviews](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05163)
*Jonathan Ivey,Anjalie Field,Ziang Xiao*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 验证了10种访谈回答质量评估指标的有效性，发现与核心研究问题的直接相关性是最佳预测指标，而清晰度和基于惊奇度的信息性指标无效


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 虽然定性和NLP研究者提出了多种访谈质量评估指标，但这些指标缺乏验证，无法证明高分回答确实对研究目标有贡献。需要确定哪些指标能真正预测回答对研究发现的贡献度

Method: 构建了包含343份访谈转录本、16,940个参与者回答的定性访谈语料库，涵盖14个真实研究项目。识别、实施并评估了10种提出的访谈回答质量评估指标，分析哪些指标能预测回答对研究发现的贡献

Result: 发现与关键研究问题的直接相关性是回答质量的最强预测指标。而两种常用于评估NLP访谈系统的指标——清晰度和基于惊奇度的信息性，并不能预测回答质量

Conclusion: 为定性研究设计和自动化访谈系统评估提供了分析见解和可扩展的实用指标，强调直接相关性作为质量评估的核心标准

Abstract: Qualitative interviews provide essential insights into human experiences when they elicit high-quality responses. While qualitative and NLP researchers have proposed various measures of interview quality, these measures lack validation that high-scoring responses actually contribute to the study's goals. In this work, we identify, implement, and evaluate 10 proposed measures of interview response quality to determine which are actually predictive of a response's contribution to the study findings. To conduct our analysis, we introduce the Qualitative Interview Corpus, a newly constructed dataset of 343 interview transcripts with 16,940 participant responses from 14 real research projects. We find that direct relevance to a key research question is the strongest predictor of response quality. We additionally find that two measures commonly used to evaluate NLP interview systems, clarity and surprisal-based informativeness, are not predictive of response quality. Our work provides analytic insights and grounded, scalable metrics to inform the design of qualitative studies and the evaluation of automated interview systems.

</details>


### [249] [Responses Fall Short of Understanding: Revealing the Gap between Internal Representations and Responses in Visual Document Understanding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04411)
*Haruka Kawasaki,Ryota Tanaka,Kyosuke Nishida*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 该论文研究了视觉文档理解任务中大型视觉语言模型的内部表示与生成响应之间的差距，发现中间层比最终层更线性地编码任务所需信息，并通过微调中间层来缩小这一差距。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前大型视觉语言模型在视觉文档理解任务上的性能评估通常基于生成响应，但这不能反映模型是否真正在内部捕获了所需信息。作者旨在探究VDU任务所需信息在LVLM不同层中的表示情况，并揭示内部表示与生成响应之间的差距。

Method: 使用线性探测技术分析LVLM中LLM不同层的信息表示；发现中间层比最终层更线性地编码任务所需信息；基于这一发现，探索针对中间层的微调策略。

Result: 研究发现：(1) 内部表示与生成响应之间存在明显差距；(2) 解决任务所需信息通常从中间层比从最终层更线性地编码。实验表明，微调中间层能同时提高线性探测准确率和响应准确率，并缩小内部表示与生成响应之间的差距。

Conclusion: 视觉文档理解任务中，大型视觉语言模型的中间层比最终层更有效地编码任务相关信息，通过微调中间层可以改善模型性能并缩小内部表示与外部响应之间的差距，这为理解LVLM的内部工作机制和优化策略提供了新见解。

Abstract: Visual document understanding (VDU) is a challenging task for large vision language models (LVLMs), requiring the integration of visual perception, text recognition, and reasoning over structured layouts. Although recent LVLMs have shown progress on VDU benchmarks, their performance is typically evaluated based on generated responses, which may not necessarily reflect whether the model has actually captured the required information internally. In this paper, we investigate how information required to solve VDU tasks is represented across different layers of LLMs within LVLMs using linear probing. Our study reveals that (1) there is a clear gap between internal representations and generated responses, and (2) information required to solve the task is often encoded more linearly from intermediate layers than from the final layer. Motivated by these findings, we explore fine-tuning strategies that target intermediate layers. Experiments show that fine-tuning intermediate layers improves both linear probing accuracy and response accuracy while narrowing the gap.

</details>


### [250] [This Treatment Works, Right? Evaluating LLM Sensitivity to Patient Question Framing in Medical QA](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05051)
*Hye Sun Yun,Geetika Kapoor,Michael Mackert,Ramez Kouzy,Wei Xu,Junyi Jessy Li,Byron C. Wallace*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 研究评估了在医疗问答中，即使基于相同证据，大语言模型对查询措辞的敏感性，发现正负框架的查询对更容易产生矛盾结论，且多轮对话会放大这种不一致性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 患者经常使用复杂且难以清晰表述的医疗问题咨询大语言模型，但LLMs对提示措辞敏感，理想情况下应基于相同证据时对不同的措辞保持一致的响应，这在医疗等高风险领域尤为重要。

Method: 在受控的检索增强生成(RAG)环境中进行系统评估，使用专家选择的临床试验摘要文档而非自动检索。构建包含6,614个查询对的数据集，考察两个维度：问题框架（正面vs负面）和语言风格（技术性vs通俗语言）。评估八个LLMs的响应一致性。

Result: 正负框架的查询对显著比相同框架的查询对更容易产生矛盾结论。这种框架效应在多轮对话中被进一步放大，持续的劝说增加了不一致性。框架与语言风格之间没有显著的交互作用。

Conclusion: 即使在基于相同证据的情况下，LLMs在医疗问答中的响应也会因查询措辞而受到系统性影响，这突显了措辞鲁棒性作为RAG系统在高风险环境中评估标准的重要性。

Abstract: Patients are increasingly turning to large language models (LLMs) with medical questions that are complex and difficult to articulate clearly. However, LLMs are sensitive to prompt phrasings and can be influenced by the way questions are worded. Ideally, LLMs should respond consistently regardless of phrasing, particularly when grounded in the same underlying evidence. We investigate this through a systematic evaluation in a controlled retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) setting for medical question answering (QA), where expert-selected documents are used rather than retrieved automatically. We examine two dimensions of patient query variation: question framing (positive vs. negative) and language style (technical vs. plain language). We construct a dataset of 6,614 query pairs grounded in clinical trial abstracts and evaluate response consistency across eight LLMs. Our findings show that positively- and negatively-framed pairs are significantly more likely to produce contradictory conclusions than same-framing pairs. This framing effect is further amplified in multi-turn conversations, where sustained persuasion increases inconsistency. We find no significant interaction between framing and language style. Our results demonstrate that LLM responses in medical QA can be systematically influenced through query phrasing alone, even when grounded in the same evidence, highlighting the importance of phrasing robustness as an evaluation criterion for RAG-based systems in high-stakes settings.

</details>


### [251] [How Alignment Routes: Localizing, Scaling, and Controlling Policy Circuits in Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04385)
*Gregory N. Frank*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 论文发现对齐训练语言模型中存在稀疏路由机制：门控注意力头检测内容并触发下游放大器头，增强拒绝信号。该机制在政治审查和安全拒绝任务中稳定存在，可通过干预控制策略强度，且意图识别与策略路由在结构上分离。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究对齐训练语言模型中是否存在系统性的内部机制来解释其拒绝行为，特别是政治审查和安全拒绝等敏感内容的处理机制，以理解模型如何实现内容过滤策略。

Method: 使用政治审查和安全拒绝作为自然实验，在9个来自6个实验室的模型上进行验证（120个提示对）。采用必要性充分性互换测试、自举重采样稳定性分析、缩放对比较、信号调制实验和密码编码测试等方法。

Result: 1. 门控头通过互换测试（p<0.001）；2. 核心放大器头稳定性高（Jaccard 0.92-1.0）；3. 路由机制随模型规模扩展而分布（消融效果减弱17倍）；4. 调制检测层信号可连续控制策略强度；5. 密码编码下门控头必要性崩溃70-99%，模型转向解谜而非拒绝。

Conclusion: 对齐训练语言模型存在稀疏路由机制，该机制将意图识别与策略路由结构分离：预训练提供广泛语义理解，后训练实现较窄的策略绑定，后者在输入变换下泛化能力较弱。这一发现有助于理解模型对齐的内部工作机制。

Abstract: This paper identifies a recurring sparse routing mechanism in alignment-trained language models: a gate attention head reads detected content and triggers downstream amplifier heads that boost the signal toward refusal. Using political censorship and safety refusal as natural experiments, the mechanism is traced across 9 models from 6 labs, all validated on corpora of 120 prompt pairs. The gate head passes necessity and sufficiency interchange tests (p < 0.001, permutation null), and core amplifier heads are stable under bootstrap resampling (Jaccard 0.92-1.0). Three same-generation scaling pairs show that routing distributes at scale (ablation up to 17x weaker) while remaining detectable by interchange. Modulating the detection-layer signal continuously controls policy strength from hard refusal through steering to factual compliance, with routing thresholds that vary by topic. The circuit also reveals a structural separation between intent recognition and policy routing: under cipher encoding, the gate head's interchange necessity collapses 70-99% across three models (n=120), and the model responds with puzzle-solving rather than refusal. The routing mechanism never fires, even though probe scores at deeper layers indicate the model begins to represent the harmful content. This asymmetry is consistent with different robustness properties of pretraining and post-training: broad semantic understanding versus narrower policy binding that generalizes less well under input transformation.

</details>


### [252] [Plausibility as Commonsense Reasoning: Humans Succeed, Large Language Models Do not](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04825)
*Sercan Karakaş*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 研究测试LLMs在土耳其语关系从句附着歧义中是否像人类一样整合世界知识和句法结构，发现人类对合理性敏感而LLMs表现不一致


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究大型语言模型是否以人类类似、结构敏感的方式在歧义消解中整合世界知识和句法结构，特别是在土耳其语前置关系从句附着歧义中

Method: 使用土耳其语前置关系从句附着歧义设计实验，保持句法配置固定且两种解析都语用可能，通过分级事件合理性选择性地支持高附着或低附着。首先通过独立评分验证对比，然后进行速度强制选择理解实验测试人类，最后评估土耳其语和多语言LLMs在并行偏好设置中比较匹配的高附着/低附着续写

Result: 人类表现出大而正确的合理性效应，而土耳其语和多语言LLMs在合理性驱动的偏好转移方面表现微弱、不稳定或相反

Conclusion: 测试的模型中，合理性信息不像在人类判断中那样可靠地指导附着偏好，土耳其语关系从句附着可作为超越广泛基准的有用跨语言诊断工具

Abstract: Large language models achieve strong performance on many language tasks, yet it remains unclear whether they integrate world knowledge with syntactic structure in a human-like, structure-sensitive way during ambiguity resolution. We test this question in Turkish prenominal relative-clause attachment ambiguities, where the same surface string permits high attachment (HA) or low attachment (LA). We construct ambiguous items that keep the syntactic configuration fixed and ensure both parses remain pragmatically possible, while graded event plausibility selectively favors High Attachment vs.\ Low Attachment. The contrasts are validated with independent norming ratings. In a speeded forced-choice comprehension experiment, humans show a large, correctly directed plausibility effect. We then evaluate Turkish and multilingual LLMs in a parallel preference-based setup that compares matched HA/LA continuations via mean per-token log-probability. Across models, plausibility-driven shifts are weak, unstable, or reversed. The results suggest that, in the tested models, plausibility information does not guide attachment preferences as reliably as it does in human judgments, and they highlight Turkish RC attachment as a useful cross-linguistic diagnostic beyond broad benchmarks.

</details>


### [253] [LiveFact: A Dynamic, Time-Aware Benchmark for LLM-Driven Fake News Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04815)
*Cheng Xu,Changhong Jin,Yingjie Niu,Nan Yan,Yuke Mei,Shuhao Guan,Liming Chen,M-Tahar Kechadi*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: LiveFact是一个持续更新的基准测试，用于评估LLM在动态、不完全信息下的虚假新闻检测和事实核查推理能力，解决了传统静态基准的数据污染和时态不确定性评估不足问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前虚假新闻检测和事实核查的评估框架落后于LLM发展，存在两个主要问题：1）静态基准容易受到基准数据污染（BDC）影响；2）无法有效评估时态不确定性下的推理能力，即现实世界中信息不断演变的"战争迷雾"情况。

Method: 提出LiveFact基准测试，采用动态时态证据集模拟真实世界信息演变。设计双模式评估：分类模式用于最终验证，推理模式用于基于证据的推理。同时包含显式监控基准数据污染的组件。

Result: 测试22个LLM显示，开源混合专家模型（如Qwen3-235B-A22B）已匹配或超越专有最先进系统。更重要的是发现显著的"推理差距"：能力强的模型在早期数据切片中表现出认知谦逊，能够识别不可验证的声明，这是传统静态基准忽略的方面。

Conclusion: LiveFact为评估稳健、时态感知的AI验证系统设定了可持续标准，解决了传统基准在数据污染和时态推理评估方面的不足，推动了虚假新闻检测从简单分类向复杂推理的转变。

Abstract: The rapid development of Large Language Models (LLMs) has transformed fake news detection and fact-checking tasks from simple classification to complex reasoning. However, evaluation frameworks have not kept pace. Current benchmarks are static, making them vulnerable to benchmark data contamination (BDC) and ineffective at assessing reasoning under temporal uncertainty. To address this, we introduce LiveFact a continuously updated benchmark that simulates the real-world "fog of war" in misinformation detection. LiveFact uses dynamic, temporal evidence sets to evaluate models on their ability to reason with evolving, incomplete information rather than on memorized knowledge. We propose a dual-mode evaluation: Classification Mode for final verification and Inference Mode for evidence-based reasoning, along with a component to monitor BDC explicitly. Tests with 22 LLMs show that open-source Mixture-of-Experts models, such as Qwen3-235B-A22B, now match or outperform proprietary state-of-the-art systems. More importantly, our analysis finds a significant "reasoning gap." Capable models exhibit epistemic humility by recognizing unverifiable claims in early data slices-an aspect traditional static benchmarks overlook. LiveFact sets a sustainable standard for evaluating robust, temporally aware AI verification.

</details>


### [254] [Hallucination Basins: A Dynamic Framework for Understanding and Controlling LLM Hallucinations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04743)
*Kalyan Cherukuri,Lav R. Varshney*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一个几何动力系统框架来解释LLM幻觉现象，发现幻觉源于潜在空间中的任务依赖盆地结构，并通过几何感知引导减少幻觉概率


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型语言模型会产生幻觉：它们生成流畅但事实错误的输出。现有研究缺乏对幻觉现象的几何和动力学机制的系统理解，需要建立理论框架来解释幻觉的产生机制

Method: 1. 提出几何动力系统框架，将幻觉建模为潜在空间中的任务依赖盆地结构；2. 使用多个开源模型和基准测试分析自回归隐藏状态轨迹；3. 形式化任务复杂度和多盆地定理；4. 表征L层Transformer中的盆地涌现；5. 开发几何感知引导技术减少幻觉

Result: 1. 可分性具有强烈任务依赖性而非普遍性：事实性任务显示更清晰的盆地分离，而摘要和误解较多的任务通常稳定性较差且经常重叠；2. 形式化了任务复杂度和多盆地行为；3. 几何感知引导可以在不重新训练的情况下减少幻觉概率

Conclusion: 幻觉源于潜在空间中的任务依赖盆地结构，几何动力系统框架为理解LLM幻觉提供了理论基础，几何感知引导是减少幻觉的有效方法，为模型改进提供了新方向

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) hallucinate: they produce fluent outputs that are factually incorrect. We present a geometric dynamical systems framework in which hallucinations arise from task-dependent basin structure in latent space. Using autoregressive hidden-state trajectories across multiple open-source models and benchmarks, we find that separability is strongly task-dependent rather than universal: factoid settings can show clearer basin separation, whereas summarization and misconception-heavy settings are typically less stable and often overlap. We formalize this behavior with task-complexity and multi-basin theorems, characterize basin emergence in L-layer transformers, and show that geometry-aware steering can reduce hallucination probability without retraining.

</details>


### [255] [High-Stakes Personalization: Rethinking LLM Customization for Individual Investor Decision-Making](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04300)
*Yash Ganpat Sawant*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 论文分析了LLM个性化在个人投资决策领域的独特挑战，揭示了当前定制范式的四个根本局限性，并提出了相应的架构解决方案和研究方向。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前LLM个性化系统大多在用户偏好稳定、缺乏客观真实标准的领域运行，而个人投资决策作为一个高风险、时间跨度长、结果随机的领域，暴露了现有LLM定制范式的根本局限性，需要深入研究。

Method: 基于作者构建和部署的AI增强投资组合管理系统，通过实际应用经验识别出个人投资领域对LLM个性化提出的四个核心挑战，并描述相应的架构应对方案。

Result: 识别出四个关键局限性：行为记忆复杂性、漂移下的论点一致性、风格-信号张力、以及无真实标准的对齐问题。提出了针对这些挑战的架构解决方案，并指出了高风险、时间扩展决策领域中个性化NLP的开放研究方向。

Conclusion: 个人投资决策领域为LLM个性化研究提供了独特的挑战场景，暴露了当前定制范式的根本局限性。需要开发新的架构和方法来处理行为记忆复杂性、时间一致性、主观与客观平衡等问题，以支持高风险、时间扩展的决策环境。

Abstract: Personalized LLM systems have advanced rapidly, yet most operate in domains where user preferences are stable and ground truth is either absent or subjective. We argue that individual investor decision-making presents a uniquely challenging domain for LLM personalization - one that exposes fundamental limitations in current customization paradigms. Drawing on our system, built and deployed for AI-augmented portfolio management, we identify four axes along which individual investing exposes fundamental limitations in standard LLM customization: (1) behavioral memory complexity, where investor patterns are temporally evolving, self-contradictory, and financially consequential; (2) thesis consistency under drift, where maintaining coherent investment rationale over weeks or months strains stateless and session-bounded architectures; (3) style-signal tension, where the system must simultaneously respect personal investment philosophy and surface objective evidence that may contradict it; and (4) alignment without ground truth, where personalization quality cannot be evaluated against a fixed label set because outcomes are stochastic and delayed. We describe the architectural responses that emerged from building the system and propose open research directions for personalized NLP in high-stakes, temporally extended decision domains.

</details>


### [256] [Metaphors We Compute By: A Computational Audit of Cultural Translation vs. Thinking in LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04732)
*Yuan Chang,Jiaming Qu,Zhu Li*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 论文通过隐喻生成任务对LLMs进行文化包容性审计，发现模型存在刻板印象和西方默认主义，仅提示文化身份无法保证文化扎根推理


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLMs被描述为多语言模型，但说一门语言不等于在文化内推理。本文旨在探究LLMs是否真正进行文化感知推理，还是仅仅是利用主导概念框架进行文化翻译

Method: 使用隐喻生成任务作为案例研究，涵盖五个文化背景和多个抽象概念，计算审计LLMs在创意写作任务中的文化包容性

Result: 模型对某些文化背景表现出刻板印象的隐喻使用，并存在西方默认主义。仅提示文化身份并不能保证文化扎根推理

Conclusion: LLMs在文化推理方面存在局限性，需要更深入的文化理解和建模，而不仅仅是多语言能力

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are often described as multilingual because they can understand and respond in many languages. However, speaking a language is not the same as reasoning within a culture. This distinction motivates a critical question: do LLMs truly conduct culture-aware reasoning? This paper presents a preliminary computational audit of cultural inclusivity in a creative writing task. We empirically examine whether LLMs act as culturally diverse creative partners or merely as cultural translators that leverage a dominant conceptual framework with localized expressions. Using a metaphor generation task spanning five cultural settings and several abstract concepts as a case study, we find that the model exhibits stereotyped metaphor usage for certain settings, as well as Western defaultism. These findings suggest that merely prompting an LLM with a cultural identity does not guarantee culturally grounded reasoning.

</details>


### [257] [Individual and Combined Effects of English as a Second Language and Typos on LLM Performance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04723)
*Serena Liu,Yutong Yang,Prisha Sheth,Weixuan Dong,Mingjiao Diao,Xinru Zhu,Nikhil Banga,Oscar Melendez,Arnav Sharma,Minda Zhao,Marina Lin,Mengyu Wang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 研究探讨了英语作为第二语言（ESL）的输入变体与拼写错误对大型语言模型性能的综合影响，发现两者结合比单独因素导致更大的性能下降，但并非简单叠加效应。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 由于大型语言模型主要基于英语数据训练，非英语母语者常以ESL方式使用，且输入常包含拼写错误。现有研究通常单独分析ESL变体或拼写错误，但现实中两者常同时出现，需要研究其综合影响以更准确评估模型在实际使用中的性能。

Method: 使用Trans-EnV框架将标准英语输入转换为8种ESL变体，并应用MulTypo工具在三个级别（低、中、高）注入拼写错误，系统评估两者结合对模型性能的影响。

Result: ESL变体与拼写错误结合通常比单独因素导致更大的性能下降，但并非简单的叠加效应。封闭式任务中性能下降模式更一致，开放式任务结果更复杂。评估仅基于标准英语可能高估模型实际性能。

Conclusion: 在干净标准英语上的评估可能高估模型在实际使用中的性能，单独评估ESL变体或拼写错误不能完全捕捉模型在真实场景中的行为，需要综合考虑两者交互影响。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are used globally, and because much of their training data is in English, they typically perform best on English inputs. As a result, many non-native English speakers interact with them in English as a second language (ESL), and these inputs often contain typographical errors. Prior work has largely studied the effects of ESL variation and typographical errors separately, even though they often co-occur in real-world use. In this study, we use the Trans-EnV framework to transform standard English inputs into eight ESL variants and apply MulTypo to inject typos at three levels: low, moderate, and severe. We find that combining ESL variation and typos generally leads to larger performance drops than either factor alone, though the combined effect is not simply additive. This pattern is clearest on closed-ended tasks, where performance degradation can be characterized more consistently across ESL variants and typo levels, while results on open-ended tasks are more mixed. Overall, these findings suggest that evaluations on clean standard English may overestimate real-world model performance, and that evaluating ESL variation and typographical errors in isolation does not fully capture model behavior in realistic settings.

</details>


### [258] [What Makes Good Multilingual Reasoning? Disentangling Reasoning Traces with Measurable Features](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04720)
*Dayeon Ki,Kevin Duh,Marine Carpuat*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 该研究挑战了"多语言推理只需模仿英语推理"的假设，通过量化分析推理特征与准确率的关系，发现特征关联强度因语言而异，甚至可能相反，指出需要适应语言特定推理模式的设计。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型推理模型在英语与其他语言之间存在显著性能差距，当前工作通常假设通过使所有语言的推理都类似英语推理就能缩小这一差距。本研究质疑这一假设，探索多语言环境下有效推理的特征，以及英语衍生的推理特征在其他语言中的实际帮助程度。

Method: 1) 定义一套可测量的推理特征，涵盖多语言对齐、推理步骤和推理流程三个方面；2) 使用逻辑回归量化每个特征与最终答案准确率的关联；3) 在多语言推理轨迹上训练稀疏自编码器，自动发现实例化或扩展这些特征的潜在推理概念；4) 将特征作为测试时选择策略，检验是否能引导模型实现更强的多语言推理。

Result: 在两个数学推理基准、四个大型推理模型和10种语言上的实验表明：大多数特征与准确率正相关，但关联强度在不同语言间差异显著，在某些情况下甚至出现相反关联。这些发现挑战了以英语为中心的奖励设计。

Conclusion: 研究结果表明需要适应语言特定推理模式的自适应目标，而非简单的英语中心主义方法。这对多语言基准和奖励设计具有具体意义，强调应考虑不同语言推理模式的差异性。

Abstract: Large Reasoning Models (LRMs) still exhibit large performance gaps between English and other languages, yet much current work assumes these gaps can be closed simply by making reasoning in every language resemble English reasoning. This work challenges this assumption by asking instead: what actually characterizes effective reasoning in multilingual settings, and to what extent do English-derived reasoning features genuinely help in other languages?
