As a compelling demonstration, we focus on defocus-to-focus image translation-an essential yet underexplored challenge in automated microscopy pipelines. Our method not only restores focused detail from defocused inputs without paired supervision but also outperforms state-of-the-art techniques across multiple evaluation metrics. This work lays the groundwork for a new class of adaptable SEM models, accelerating materials discovery by bridging foundational representation learning with real-world imaging needs.

</details>


### [296] [Weight-Informed Self-Explaining Clustering for Mixed-Type Tabular Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05857)
*Lehao Li,Qiang Huang,Yihao Ang,Bryan Kian Hsiang Low,Anthony K. H. Tung,Xiaokui Xiao*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: WISE是一个用于混合类型表格数据聚类的自解释框架，统一了表示学习、特征加权、聚类和解释，在稀疏空间中对齐异构特征，通过多视图特征权重感知实现高质量聚类，并提供可加性保证的特征级解释。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 混合类型表格数据聚类面临三大挑战：数值和分类特征的表示不对齐、特征相关性不均衡且依赖上下文、聚类过程与解释分离且后置。现有方法无法统一解决这些挑战，需要一种完全无监督且透明的端到端框架。

Method: WISE框架包含三个核心组件：1) BEP（二进制编码填充）将异构特征对齐到统一的稀疏空间；2) LOFO（留一特征出）策略生成多个高质量且多样化的特征加权视图；3) 两阶段权重感知聚类过程聚合替代语义分区。此外，DFI（判别性频繁项）提供从实例到聚类一致的特征级解释，具有可加性分解保证。

Result: 在六个真实世界数据集上的实验表明，WISE在聚类质量上持续优于经典和神经基线方法，同时保持高效性，并能产生忠实、人类可解释的解释，这些解释基于驱动聚类的相同原语。

Conclusion: WISE成功解决了混合类型表格数据聚类的关键挑战，通过统一表示、特征加权、聚类和解释，实现了高质量聚类和内在可解释性，为探索性分析提供了透明且有效的解决方案。

Abstract: Clustering mixed-type tabular data is fundamental for exploratory analysis, yet remains challenging due to misaligned numerical-categorical representations, uneven and context-dependent feature relevance, and disconnected and post-hoc explanation from the clustering process. We propose WISE, a Weight-Informed Self-Explaining framework that unifies representation, feature weighting, clustering, and interpretation in a fully unsupervised and transparent pipeline. WISE introduces Binary Encoding with Padding (BEP) to align heterogeneous features in a unified sparse space, a Leave-One-Feature-Out (LOFO) strategy to sense multiple high-quality and diverse feature-weighting views, and a two-stage weight-aware clustering procedure to aggregate alternative semantic partitions. To ensure intrinsic interpretability, we further develop Discriminative FreqItems (DFI), which yields feature-level explanations that are consistent from instances to clusters with an additive decomposition guarantee. Extensive experiments on six real-world datasets demonstrate that WISE consistently outperforms classical and neural baselines in clustering quality while remaining efficient, and produces faithful, human-interpretable explanations grounded in the same primitives that drive clustering.

</details>


### [297] [Modeling Patient Care Trajectories with Transformer Hawkes Processes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05844)
*Saumya Pandey,Varun Chandola*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 基于Transformer Hawkes Process框架建模患者医疗轨迹，通过逆平方根类别权重解决极端类别不平衡问题，提升罕见但重要临床事件的预测性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 患者医疗轨迹由不规则时间戳事件（门诊、住院、急诊）组成，建模这些轨迹对理解利用模式和预测未来护理需求至关重要，但面临时间不规则性和严重类别不平衡的挑战

Method: 结合Transformer编码历史事件与Hawkes过程动态，构建连续时间模型预测事件类型和发生时间；引入基于逆平方根类别的失衡感知训练策略，不改变数据分布但提升对罕见临床事件的敏感性

Result: 在真实世界数据上的实验显示性能提升，并为识别高风险患者群体提供临床有意义的洞见

Conclusion: 提出的Transformer Hawkes Process框架结合失衡感知训练策略，能有效建模不规则时间医疗轨迹，在保持整体性能的同时提升对罕见重要事件的预测能力

Abstract: Patient healthcare utilization consists of irregularly time-stamped events, such as outpatient visits, inpatient admissions, and emergency encounters, forming individualized care trajectories. Modeling these trajectories is crucial for understanding utilization patterns and predicting future care needs, but is challenging due to temporal irregularity and severe class imbalance. In this work, we build on the Transformer Hawkes Process framework to model patient trajectories in continuous time. By combining Transformer-based history encoding with Hawkes process dynamics, the model captures event dependencies and jointly predicts event type and time-to-event. To address extreme imbalance, we introduce an imbalance-aware training strategy using inverse square-root class weighting. This improves sensitivity to rare but clinically important events without altering the data distribution. Experiments on real-world data demonstrate improved performance and provide clinically meaningful insights for identifying high-risk patient populations.

</details>


### [298] [EEG-MFTNet: An Enhanced EEGNet Architecture with Multi-Scale Temporal Convolutions and Transformer Fusion for Cross-Session Motor Imagery Decoding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05843)
*Panagiotis Andrikopoulos,Siamak Mehrkanoon*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: EEG-MFTNet：一种基于EEGNet的新型深度学习模型，通过多尺度时间卷积和Transformer编码器增强，用于脑电信号中的运动想象解码，在SHU数据集上取得58.9%的平均分类准确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 脑机接口为运动障碍患者提供重要支持，但脑电信号中的运动想象解码面临噪声和跨会话变异性的挑战，需要更准确、鲁棒的解码方法。

Method: 提出EEG-MFTNet模型，基于EEGNet架构，增强多尺度时间卷积和Transformer编码器流，旨在捕捉脑电信号的短程和长程时间依赖关系。

Result: 在SHU数据集上使用受试者依赖的跨会话设置进行评估，EEG-MFTNet平均分类准确率达58.9%，优于EEGNet及其近期衍生模型，同时保持低计算复杂度和推理延迟。

Conclusion: EEG-MFTNet展示了实时脑机接口应用的潜力，强调了架构创新对改善运动想象解码的重要性，有助于开发更鲁棒、自适应的脑机接口系统，对辅助技术和神经康复具有重要意义。

Abstract: Brain-computer interfaces (BCIs) enable direct communication between the brain and external devices, providing critical support for individuals with motor impairments. However, accurate motor imagery (MI) decoding from electroencephalography (EEG) remains challenging due to noise and cross-session variability. This study introduces EEG-MFTNet, a novel deep learning model based on the EEGNet architecture, enhanced with multi-scale temporal convolutions and a Transformer encoder stream. These components are designed to capture both short and long-range temporal dependencies in EEG signals. The model is evaluated on the SHU dataset using a subject-dependent cross-session setup, outperforming baseline models, including EEGNet and its recent derivatives. EEG-MFTNet achieves an average classification accuracy of 58.9% while maintaining low computational complexity and inference latency. The results highlight the model's potential for real-time BCI applications and underscore the importance of architectural innovations in improving MI decoding. This work contributes to the development of more robust and adaptive BCI systems, with implications for assistive technologies and neurorehabilitation.

</details>


### [299] [Expectation Maximization (EM) Converges for General Agnostic Mixtures](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05842)
*Avishek Ghosh*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文研究了在非生成式（agnostic）设置下拟合k个参数函数的问题，提出并分析了梯度EM算法，证明了在适当初始化和分离条件下，该算法能以指数速度收敛到总体损失最小化器。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 混合线性回归在统计学和机器学习中已有深入研究，但传统方法假设数据由生成模型产生。最近的研究将混合线性回归扩展到非生成式设置，但仅限于线性模型和二次损失。本文旨在将这一框架扩展到更广泛的参数函数类别和更一般的损失函数。

Method: 提出并分析梯度EM算法，用于拟合k个任意参数函数，使用强凸且光滑的损失函数。该框架涵盖混合线性回归（正则化）、混合线性分类器（混合逻辑回归、混合支持向量机）和混合广义线性回归等广泛问题。

Result: 在适当的初始化和分离条件下，梯度EM算法的迭代以高概率指数收敛到适当定义的总体损失最小化器。这表明EM类型算法在非生成式设置下能够收敛到最优解，超越了混合线性回归的范围。

Conclusion: 梯度EM算法在非生成式设置下对广泛类别的参数函数拟合问题有效，能够收敛到最优解。这扩展了EM类型算法的适用范围，为混合模型在更一般设置下的应用提供了理论保证。

Abstract: Mixture of linear regression is well studied in statistics and machine learning, where the data points are generated probabilistically using $k$ linear models. Algorithms like Expectation Maximization (EM) may be used to recover the ground truth regressors for this problem. Recently, in \cite{pal2022learning,ghosh_agnostic} the mixed linear regression problem is studied in the agnostic setting, where no generative model on data is assumed. Rather, given a set of data points, the objective is \emph{fit} $k$ lines by minimizing a suitable loss function. It is shown that a modification of EM, namely gradient EM converges exponentially to appropriately defined loss minimizer even in the agnostic setting.
  In this paper, we study the problem of \emph{fitting} $k$ parametric functions to given set of data points. We adhere to the agnostic setup. However, instead of fitting lines equipped with quadratic loss, we consider any arbitrary parametric function fitting equipped with a strongly convex and smooth loss. This framework encompasses a large class of problems including mixed linear regression (regularized), mixed linear classifiers (mixed logistic regression, mixed Support Vector Machines) and mixed generalized linear regression. We propose and analyze gradient EM for this problem and show that with proper initialization and separation condition, the iterates of gradient EM converge exponentially to appropriately defined population loss minimizers with high probability. This shows the effectiveness of EM type algorithm which converges to \emph{optimal} solution in the non-generative setup beyond mixture of linear regression.

</details>


### [300] [Hidden in the Multiplicative Interaction: Uncovering Fragility in Multimodal Contrastive Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05834)
*Tillmann Rheude,Stefan Hegselmann,Roland Eils,Benjamin Wild*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Gated Symile：一种带门控机制的多模态对比学习方法，通过注意力机制自适应调节不可靠模态的贡献，提高三模态场景下的鲁棒性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有Symile方法将所有模态对称处理，未显式建模模态间的可靠性差异。在实际应用中，超出图像-文本对的其他模态可能存在错位、信息弱或缺失等问题，统一处理会降低性能。这种脆弱性在乘法交互中可能被隐藏，即使单个不可靠模态也会静默地破坏乘积项。

Method: 提出Gated Symile，引入对比门控机制，基于注意力机制自适应调节每个候选样本的模态贡献。门控通过将嵌入向量向可学习的中性方向插值来抑制不可靠输入，并在可靠的跨模态对齐不太可能时提供显式的NULL选项。

Result: 在受控的合成基准测试（揭示这种脆弱性）和三个真实世界三模态数据集上，Gated Symile比调优良好的Symile和CLIP模型获得了更高的top-1检索准确率。

Conclusion: 门控机制是迈向在非完美和超过两个模态情况下实现鲁棒多模态对比学习的重要一步。研究结果强调了在乘法交互中显式处理模态可靠性的重要性。

Abstract: Multimodal contrastive learning is increasingly enriched by going beyond image-text pairs. Among recent contrastive methods, Symile is a strong approach for this challenge because its multiplicative interaction objective captures higher-order cross-modal dependence. Yet, we find that Symile treats all modalities symmetrically and does not explicitly model reliability differences, a limitation that becomes especially present in trimodal multiplicative interactions. In practice, modalities beyond image-text pairs can be misaligned, weakly informative, or missing, and treating them uniformly can silently degrade performance. This fragility can be hidden in the multiplicative interaction: Symile may outperform pairwise CLIP even if a single unreliable modality silently corrupts the product terms. We propose Gated Symile, a contrastive gating mechanism that adapts modality contributions on an attention-based, per-candidate basis. The gate suppresses unreliable inputs by interpolating embeddings toward learnable neutral directions and incorporating an explicit NULL option when reliable cross-modal alignment is unlikely. Across a controlled synthetic benchmark that uncovers this fragility and three real-world trimodal datasets for which such failures could be masked by averages, Gated Symile achieves higher top-1 retrieval accuracy than well-tuned Symile and CLIP models. More broadly, our results highlight gating as a step toward robust multimodal contrastive learning under imperfect and more than two modalities.

</details>


### [301] [Bivariate Causal Discovery Using Rate-Distortion MDL: An Information Dimension Approach](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05829)
*Tiago Brogueira,Mário A. T. Figueiredo*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于率失真理论的双变量因果发现新方法RDMDL，通过改进对原因变量描述长度的估计来解决现有MDL方法的不足。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于最小描述长度（MDL）原理的双变量因果发现方法在估计原因变量的描述长度方面存在缺陷，主要依赖因果机制的描述长度做决策。需要更准确地估计原因变量的描述长度以改进因果方向判断。

Method: 基于率失真理论提出新的原因变量描述长度测量方法，对应达到代表底层分布的失真水平所需的最小速率。失真水平通过基于直方图的密度估计规则推导，速率使用信息维度的相关概念基于渐近近似计算。将此方法与传统的因果机制描述方法结合，提出新的双变量因果发现方法RDMDL。

Result: 实验表明RDMDL在Tübingen数据集上取得了有竞争力的性能。所有代码和实验都已公开在GitHub上。

Conclusion: 通过率失真理论改进原因变量描述长度的估计，RDMDL方法在双变量因果发现任务中表现出色，解决了现有MDL方法的局限性。

Abstract: Approaches to bivariate causal discovery based on the minimum description length (MDL) principle approximate the (uncomputable) Kolmogorov complexity of the models in each causal direction, selecting the one with the lower total complexity. The premise is that nature's mechanisms are simpler in their true causal order. Inherently, the description length (complexity) in each direction includes the description of the cause variable and that of the causal mechanism. In this work, we argue that current state-of-the-art MDL-based methods do not correctly address the problem of estimating the description length of the cause variable, effectively leaving the decision to the description length of the causal mechanism. Based on rate-distortion theory, we propose a new way to measure the description length of the cause, corresponding to the minimum rate required to achieve a distortion level representative of the underlying distribution. This distortion level is deduced using rules from histogram-based density estimation, while the rate is computed using the related concept of information dimension, based on an asymptotic approximation. Combining it with a traditional approach for the causal mechanism, we introduce a new bivariate causal discovery method, termed rate-distortion MDL (RDMDL). We show experimentally that RDMDL achieves competitive performance on the Tübingen dataset. All the code and experiments are publicly available at github.com/tiagobrogueira/Causal-Discovery-In-Exchangeable-Data.

</details>


### [302] [Vintix II: Decision Pre-Trained Transformer is a Scalable In-Context Reinforcement Learner](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05112)
*Andrei Polubarov,Lyubaykin Nikita,Alexander Derevyagin,Artyom Grishin,Igor Saprygin,Aleksandr Serkov,Mark Averchenko,Daniil Tikhonov,Maksim Zhdanov,Alexander Nikulin,Ilya Zisman,Albina Klepach,Alexey Zemtsov,Vladislav Kurenkov*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 将决策预训练Transformer（DPT）扩展到多领域环境，使用流匹配进行训练，实现了比先前算法蒸馏方法更强的泛化能力


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 虽然算法蒸馏（AD）开创了上下文强化学习范式并在多领域环境中进行了扩展，但其在未见任务上的泛化能力有限。决策预训练Transformer（DPT）在简化领域中表现出更强的上下文强化学习能力，但其可扩展性尚未得到验证

Method: 将DPT扩展到多样化的多领域环境，采用流匹配作为训练方法，这种方法保持了其作为贝叶斯后验采样的解释。在数百个多样化任务上进行训练

Result: 获得了在保留测试集上实现明显泛化增益的智能体，改进了先前的AD扩展，在在线和离线推理中都表现出更强的性能

Conclusion: 强化了上下文强化学习作为训练通用智能体的可行替代方案，相对于专家蒸馏方法具有优势

Abstract: Recent progress in in-context reinforcement learning (ICRL) has demonstrated its potential for training generalist agents that can acquire new tasks directly at inference. Algorithm Distillation (AD) pioneered this paradigm and was subsequently scaled to multi-domain settings, although its ability to generalize to unseen tasks remained limited. The Decision Pre-Trained Transformer (DPT) was introduced as an alternative, showing stronger in-context reinforcement learning abilities in simplified domains, but its scalability had not been established. In this work, we extend DPT to diverse multi-domain environments, applying Flow Matching as a natural training choice that preserves its interpretation as Bayesian posterior sampling. As a result, we obtain an agent trained across hundreds of diverse tasks that achieves clear gains in generalization to the held-out test set. This agent improves upon prior AD scaling and demonstrates stronger performance in both online and offline inference, reinforcing ICRL as a viable alternative to expert distillation for training generalist agents.

</details>


### [303] [Graph Topology Information Enhanced Heterogeneous Graph Representation Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05732)
*He Zhao,Zhiwei Zeng,Yongwei Wang,Chunyan Miao*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: ToGRL是一个用于异构图表示学习的图拓扑学习增强框架，通过提取任务相关拓扑信息构建新图结构，结合提示调优提升下游任务性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现实世界中的异构图通常存在噪声且结构非最优，这会影响图表示学习模型在下游任务中的性能。现有的图结构学习方法主要针对同构图设计，而异构图上的GSL研究较少，面临两个挑战：1) 输入图结构质量对异构图表示学习模型影响更大；2) 现有方法在异构图上面临内存消耗问题

Method: 提出ToGRL框架，包含两个主要模块：1) GSL模块从原始图中提取下游任务相关的拓扑信息并投影为拓扑嵌入，用于构建具有平滑图信号的新图；采用两阶段方法将邻接矩阵优化与节点表示学习分离以减少内存消耗；2) 表示学习模块以新图为输入学习下游任务嵌入；同时利用提示调优更好地利用学习到的表示知识，增强对下游任务的适应性

Result: 在五个真实世界数据集上的广泛实验表明，ToGRL大幅优于现有最先进方法

Conclusion: ToGRL通过提取任务相关拓扑信息构建高质量图结构，采用两阶段优化减少内存消耗，结合提示调优增强适应性，为异构图表示学习提供了一种有效的解决方案

Abstract: Real-world heterogeneous graphs are inherently noisy and usually not in the optimal graph structures for downstream tasks, which often adversely affects the performance of GRL models in downstream tasks. Although Graph Structure Learning (GSL) methods have been proposed to learn graph structures and downstream tasks simultaneously, existing methods are predominantly designed for homogeneous graphs, while GSL for heterogeneous graphs remains largely unexplored. Two challenges arise in this context. Firstly, the quality of the input graph structure has a more profound impact on GNN-based heterogeneous GRL models compared to their homogeneous counterparts. Secondly, most existing homogenous GRL models encounter memory consumption issues when applied directly to heterogeneous graphs. In this paper, we propose a novel Graph Topology learning Enhanced Heterogeneous Graph Representation Learning framework (ToGRL).ToGRL learns high-quality graph structures and representations for downstream tasks by incorporating task-relevant latent topology information. Specifically, a novel GSL module is first proposed to extract downstream task-related topology information from a raw graph structure and project it into topology embeddings. These embeddings are utilized to construct a new graph with smooth graph signals. This two-stage approach to GSL separates the optimization of the adjacency matrix from node representation learning to reduce memory consumption. Following this, a representation learning module takes the new graph as input to learn embeddings for downstream tasks. ToGRL also leverages prompt tuning to better utilize the knowledge embedded in learned representations, thus enhancing adaptability to downstream tasks. Extensive experiments on five real-world datasets show that our ToGRL outperforms state-of-the-art methods by a large margin.

</details>


### [304] [Controllable Image Generation with Composed Parallel Token Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05730)
*Jamie Stirling,Noura Al-Moubayed,Chris G. Willcocks,Hubert P. H. Shum*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出一种理论基础的离散概率生成过程组合方法，显著提升多条件图像生成的保真度和效率


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有条件离散生成模型难以忠实地组合多个输入条件，需要一种理论严谨的方法来精确指定训练数据之外的新条件组合

Method: 推导出离散概率生成过程的组合理论框架，以掩码生成（吸收扩散）为特例，结合VQ-VAE/VQ-GAN的丰富组合词汇，支持概念加权和条件否定

Result: 在3个数据集上相比SOTA实现63.4%的相对错误率降低，平均FID提升-9.58，速度提升2.3-12倍，并能应用于预训练文本到图像模型

Conclusion: 提出的理论框架有效解决了多条件组合问题，在保真度、效率和灵活性方面均有显著提升，为离散生成模型提供了强大的组合控制能力

Abstract: Conditional discrete generative models struggle to faithfully compose multiple input conditions. To address this, we derive a theoretically-grounded formulation for composing discrete probabilistic generative processes, with masked generation (absorbing diffusion) as a special case. Our formulation enables precise specification of novel combinations and numbers of input conditions that lie outside the training data, with concept weighting enabling emphasis or negation of individual conditions. In synergy with the richly compositional learned vocabulary of VQ-VAE and VQ-GAN, our method attains a $63.4\%$ relative reduction in error rate compared to the previous state-of-the-art, averaged across 3 datasets (positional CLEVR, relational CLEVR and FFHQ), simultaneously obtaining an average absolute FID improvement of $-9.58$. Meanwhile, our method offers a $2.3\times$ to $12\times$ real-time speed-up over comparable methods, and is readily applied to an open pre-trained discrete text-to-image model for fine-grained control of text-to-image generation.

</details>


### [305] [Optimal-Transport-Guided Functional Flow Matching for Turbulent Field Generation in Hilbert Space](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05700)
*Li Kunpeng,Wan Chenguang,Qu Zhisong,Lim Kyungtak,Virginie Grandgirard,Xavier Garbet,Yu Hua,Ong Yew Soon*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了FOT-CFM框架，直接在无限维函数空间中定义生成模型，用于高保真湍流建模，相比传统像素基方法能更好地处理函数形式的数据。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统基于知识的系统难以捕捉湍流的多尺度间歇性和复杂时空动态。深度生成模型（如扩散模型和流匹配）虽然表现良好，但其离散的像素基本质限制了在湍流计算中的应用，因为湍流数据本质上是函数形式的。

Method: 提出了函数最优传输条件流匹配（FOT-CFM）框架，直接在无限维希尔伯特空间中定义生成动态。将物理场视为无限维希尔伯特空间的元素，在概率测度层面学习分辨率不变的生成动态。通过整合最优传输理论，在希尔伯特空间中构建噪声和数据测度之间的确定性直线概率路径，实现无模拟训练并加速采样过程。

Result: 在包括Navier-Stokes方程、Kolmogorov流和Hasegawa-Wakatani方程在内的多种混沌动力系统上进行了严格评估。实验结果表明，FOT-CFM在再现高阶湍流统计量和能量谱方面，相比最先进的基线方法具有更优的保真度。

Conclusion: FOT-CFM通过在无限维函数空间中直接定义生成框架，克服了传统像素基方法的局限性，为湍流建模提供了更有效的解决方案，能够更好地处理函数形式的数据并生成高保真的湍流统计特性。

Abstract: High-fidelity modeling of turbulent flows requires capturing complex spatiotemporal dynamics and multi-scale intermittency, posing a fundamental challenge for traditional knowledge-based systems. While deep generative models, such as diffusion models and Flow Matching, have shown promising performance, they are fundamentally constrained by their discrete, pixel-based nature. This limitation restricts their applicability in turbulence computing, where data inherently exists in a functional form. To address this gap, we propose Functional Optimal Transport Conditional Flow Matching (FOT-CFM), a generative framework defined directly in infinite-dimensional function space. Unlike conventional approaches defined on fixed grids, FOT-CFM treats physical fields as elements of an infinite-dimensional Hilbert space, and learns resolution-invariant generative dynamics directly at the level of probability measures. By integrating Optimal Transport (OT) theory, we construct deterministic, straight-line probability paths between noise and data measures in Hilbert space. This formulation enables simulation-free training and significantly accelerates the sampling process. We rigorously evaluate the proposed system on a diverse suite of chaotic dynamical systems, including the Navier-Stokes equations, Kolmogorov Flow, and Hasegawa-Wakatani equations, all of which exhibit rich multi-scale turbulent structures. Experimental results demonstrate that FOT-CFM achieves superior fidelity in reproducing high-order turbulent statistics and energy spectra compared to state-of-the-art baselines.

</details>


### [306] [Same Graph, Different Likelihoods: Calibration of Autoregressive Graph Generators via Permutation-Equivalent Encodings](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05613)
*Laurits Fredsgaard,Aaron Thomas,Michael Riis Andersen,Mikkel N. Schmidt,Mahito Sugiyama*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出线性化不确定性(LU)作为评估自回归图生成器一致性的指标，发现现有方法在训练线性化上表现良好但在随机排列下校准误差显著增加，表明模型学习的是线性化策略而非图结构本身。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自回归图生成器通过序列化过程定义似然，但这些似然只有在同一图的所有线性化中保持一致时才具有意义。现有线性化方法如SENT虽然能完美解码，但同一图存在多个等效线性化，需要评估模型在不同线性化下的一致性。

Method: 提出线性化不确定性(LU)指标，使用等效线性化间负对数似然(NLL)的变异系数来量化不一致性。在四个线性化策略和两个数据集上训练transformer模型，比较原生顺序和随机排列下的NLL和预期校准误差(ECE)。在QM9分子图基准上评估生成图的质量相关性。

Result: 有偏排序在其原生顺序上获得较低NLL，但在随机排列下ECE高出两个数量级，表明模型学习的是训练线性化而非底层图结构。在QM9上，生成图的NLL与分子稳定性负相关(AUC=0.43)，而LU与稳定性高度相关(AUC=0.85)，显示基于排列的评估能更可靠地检查生成分子质量。

Conclusion: 线性化不确定性(LU)是评估自回归图生成器一致性的有效指标，现有方法过度拟合特定线性化策略，而基于排列的评估能更可靠地评估生成质量，特别是在分子图生成任务中。

Abstract: Autoregressive graph generators define likelihoods via a sequential construction process, but these likelihoods are only meaningful if they are consistent across all linearizations of the same graph. Segmented Eulerian Neighborhood Trails (SENT), a recent linearization method, converts graphs into sequences that can be perfectly decoded and efficiently processed by language models, but admit multiple equivalent linearizations of the same graph. We quantify violations in assigned negative log-likelihood (NLL) using the coefficient of variation across equivalent linearizations, which we call Linearization Uncertainty (LU). Training transformers under four linearization strategies on two datasets, we show that biased orderings achieve lower NLL on their native order but exhibit expected calibration error (ECE) two orders of magnitude higher under random permutation, indicating that these models have learned their training linearization rather than the underlying graph. On the molecular graph benchmark QM9, NLL for generated graphs is negatively correlated with molecular stability (AUC $=0.43$), while LU achieves AUC $=0.85$, suggesting that permutation-based evaluation provides a more reliable quality check for generated molecules. Code is available at https://github.com/lauritsf/linearization-uncertainty

</details>


### [307] [Channel-wise Retrieval for Multivariate Time Series Forecasting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05543)
*Junhyeok Kang,Jun Seo,Soyeon Park,Sangjun Han,Seohui Bae,Hyeokjun Choe,Soonyoung Lee*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: CRAFT提出了一种通道独立的检索增强预测框架，通过时域稀疏关系图和频域谱相似性排名，解决了现有方法忽略通道异质性的问题，在多个基准测试中实现了更优的预测精度和效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有检索增强预测方法采用通道无关策略，对所有变量使用相同的参考历史片段，忽略了不同通道具有不同周期性和频谱特性的异质性，这限制了模型捕捉长程依赖关系的能力。

Method: CRAFT采用两阶段流水线：1) 在时域构建稀疏关系图以修剪不相关候选；2) 在频域计算谱相似性对参考片段进行排名，强调主导周期成分并抑制噪声。该方法为每个通道独立执行检索。

Result: 在七个公共基准测试中，CRAFT超越了最先进的预测基线方法，实现了更优的预测精度，同时保持了实用的推理效率。

Conclusion: 通过通道独立的检索策略和结合时域与频域分析的两阶段方法，CRAFT能够有效处理多变量时间序列中的通道异质性，显著提升了长程依赖的捕捉能力和预测性能。

Abstract: Multivariate time series forecasting often struggles to capture long-range dependencies due to fixed lookback windows. Retrieval-augmented forecasting addresses this by retrieving historical segments from memory, but existing approaches rely on a channel-agnostic strategy that applies the same references to all variables. This neglects inter-variable heterogeneity, where different channels exhibit distinct periodicities and spectral profiles. We propose CRAFT (Channel-wise retrieval-augmented forecasting), a novel framework that performs retrieval independently for each channel. To ensure efficiency, CRAFT adopts a two-stage pipeline: a sparse relation graph constructed in the time domain prunes irrelevant candidates, and spectral similarity in the frequency domain ranks references, emphasizing dominant periodic components while suppressing noise. Experiments on seven public benchmarks demonstrate that CRAFT outperforms state-of-the-art forecasting baselines, achieving superior accuracy with practical inference efficiency.

</details>


### [308] [FlashSAC: Fast and Stable Off-Policy Reinforcement Learning for High-Dimensional Robot Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04539)
*Donghu Kim,Youngdo Lee,Minho Park,Kinam Kim,I Made Aswin Nahendra,Takuma Seno,Sehee Min,Daniel Palenicek,Florian Vogt,Danica Kragic,Jan Peters,Jaegul Choo,Hojoon Lee*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: FlashSAC是一种基于Soft Actor-Critic的快速稳定离策略强化学习算法，通过减少梯度更新、使用更大模型和更高数据吞吐量来提升训练效率，同时在增加规模时通过约束权重、特征和梯度范数来保持稳定性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有强化学习方法存在局限性：在策略方法（如PPO）依赖狭窄分布的策略数据，在高维状态和动作空间中难以准确评估策略；离策略方法虽然能从更广泛的状态-动作分布中学习，但收敛缓慢且不稳定，因为拟合多样数据的价值函数需要大量梯度更新，导致批评器误差通过自举累积。

Method: FlashSAC基于Soft Actor-Critic构建，借鉴监督学习中的缩放定律，显著减少梯度更新次数，同时通过更大模型和更高数据吞吐量来补偿。为在增加规模时保持稳定性，算法明确约束权重、特征和梯度范数，控制批评器误差累积。

Result: 在10个模拟器的60多个任务中，FlashSAC在最终性能和训练效率上始终优于PPO和强大的离策略基线方法，在高维任务（如灵巧操作）上提升最大。在仿真到现实的人形机器人运动任务中，FlashSAC将训练时间从数小时缩短到数分钟，展示了离策略强化学习在仿真到现实迁移中的潜力。

Conclusion: FlashSAC通过结合缩放定律和稳定性约束，成功解决了离策略强化学习中的收敛缓慢和不稳定问题，为高维机器人控制任务提供了高效稳定的解决方案，特别是在仿真到现实迁移方面展现出显著优势。

Abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) is a core approach for robot control when expert demonstrations are unavailable. On-policy methods such as Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) are widely used for their stability, but their reliance on narrowly distributed on-policy data limits accurate policy evaluation in high-dimensional state and action spaces. Off-policy methods can overcome this limitation by learning from a broader state-action distribution, yet suffer from slow convergence and instability, as fitting a value function over diverse data requires many gradient updates, causing critic errors to accumulate through bootstrapping. We present FlashSAC, a fast and stable off-policy RL algorithm built on Soft Actor-Critic. Motivated by scaling laws observed in supervised learning, FlashSAC sharply reduces gradient updates while compensating with larger models and higher data throughput. To maintain stability at increased scale, FlashSAC explicitly bounds weight, feature, and gradient norms, curbing critic error accumulation. Across over 60 tasks in 10 simulators, FlashSAC consistently outperforms PPO and strong off-policy baselines in both final performance and training efficiency, with the largest gains on high-dimensional tasks such as dexterous manipulation. In sim-to-real humanoid locomotion, FlashSAC reduces training time from hours to minutes, demonstrating the promise of off-policy RL for sim-to-real transfer.

</details>


### [309] [Training Without Orthogonalization, Inference With SVD: A Gradient Analysis of Rotation Representations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05414)
*Chris Choy*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 论文通过理论分析解释了为什么在训练中移除SVD正交化、仅在推理时应用能改善旋转估计，揭示了SVD梯度畸变的量化机制和Gram-Schmidt梯度信号不对称问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究表明在训练中移除正交化、仅在推理时应用SVD投影能改善深度学习中的旋转估计，但缺乏理论解释：1) 为什么SVD正交化会损害训练；2) 为什么在推理时应优先选择SVD而非Gram-Schmidt。本文旨在填补这一理论空白。

Method: 对3×3矩阵和SO(3)投影的SVD正交化进行详细的梯度分析，推导SVD反向传播雅可比矩阵的精确谱，分析其秩、奇异值和条件数；同时分析6D Gram-Schmidt雅可比矩阵的谱特性，比较不同参数化方法的梯度行为。

Result: 1) SVD反向传播雅可比矩阵的秩为3（与SO(3)维度匹配），非零奇异值为2/(s_i + s_j)，条件数κ = (s_1 + s_2)/(s_2 + s_3)；2) 当预测矩阵远离SO(3)时（如训练早期s_3≈0），梯度畸变最严重；3) 即使稳定化的SVD梯度也会引入梯度方向误差；4) 6D Gram-Schmidt雅可比矩阵具有不对称谱，参数接收不等的梯度信号，解释了为什么9D参数化更优。

Conclusion: 理论分析为"训练时使用直接9D回归、仅在推理时应用SVD投影"的方法提供了理论基础：SVD在训练中引入可量化的梯度畸变，而Gram-Schmidt存在梯度信号不对称问题，因此最佳策略是在训练中避免正交化操作。

Abstract: Recent work has shown that removing orthogonalization during training and applying it only at inference improves rotation estimation in deep learning, with empirical evidence favoring 9D representations with SVD projection. However, the theoretical understanding of why SVD orthogonalization specifically harms training, and why it should be preferred over Gram-Schmidt at inference, remains incomplete. We provide a detailed gradient analysis of SVD orthogonalization specialized to $3 \times 3$ matrices and $SO(3)$ projection. Our central result derives the exact spectrum of the SVD backward pass Jacobian: it has rank $3$ (matching the dimension of $SO(3)$) with nonzero singular values $2/(s_i + s_j)$ and condition number $κ= (s_1 + s_2)/(s_2 + s_3)$, creating quantifiable gradient distortion that is most severe when the predicted matrix is far from $SO(3)$ (e.g., early in training when $s_3 \approx 0$). We further show that even stabilized SVD gradients introduce gradient direction error, whereas removing SVD from the training loop avoids this tradeoff entirely. We also prove that the 6D Gram-Schmidt Jacobian has an asymmetric spectrum: its parameters receive unequal gradient signal, explaining why 9D parameterization is preferable. Together, these results provide the theoretical foundation for training with direct 9D regression and applying SVD projection only at inference.

</details>


### [310] [Top-K Retrieval with Fixed-Size Linear-Attention Completion: Backbone- and KV-Format-Preserving Attention for KV-Cache Read Reduction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05438)
*Yasuto Hoshi,Daisuke Miyashita,Jun Deguchi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出一种检索-完成注意力模块，通过结合精确计算和估计来减少长上下文生成中的KV缓存流量，同时保持主干权重和KV缓存格式不变。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 长上下文生成受到解码时键值（KV）缓存流量的限制，特别是在KV被卸载到GPU内存之外时。查询感知检索（如Top-K选择）通过仅加载部分KV对来减少流量，但在子集上重新归一化softmax时，当注意力质量分布在未检索的标记上时会引入偏差。

Method: 提出检索-完成注意力模块：对每个查询，精确计算sink/tail锚点和查询相关的Top-K检索标记的注意力，使用预填充时计算的固定大小特征图摘要来估计剩余中间区域的分子和分母，在未归一化域中添加精确和估计的贡献，然后应用单一归一化。

Result: 在长上下文基准测试中，该方法在匹配的标记等效读取预算下优于仅使用Top-K选择的方法，在高熵注意力头中获得了最大的改进。

Conclusion: 提出的检索-完成注意力模块能够在不改变主干权重和KV缓存格式的情况下，有效减少长上下文生成中的KV缓存流量，同时通过结合精确计算和估计来恢复缺失的softmax质量，避免了额外的注意力侧KV读取。

Abstract: Long-context generation is increasingly limited by decode-time key-value (KV) cache traffic, particularly when KV is offloaded beyond GPU memory. Query-aware retrieval (e.g., Top-K selection) reduces this traffic by loading only a subset of KV pairs, but renormalizing the softmax over the subset introduces bias when attention mass is spread over unretrieved tokens. We propose a retrieval-completion attention module that keeps backbone weights and the KV-cache format unchanged. For each query, we compute exact attention over sink/tail anchors and the query-dependent retrieved Top-K tokens, and estimate the remaining mid-region numerator and denominator using a fixed-size feature-map summary computed at prefill time. We add the exact and estimated contributions in the unnormalized domain and apply a single normalization, recovering the missing softmax mass without additional attention-side KV reads. Across long-context benchmarks, the proposed method improves over selection-only Top-K at matched token-equivalent read budgets, with the largest gains in high-entropy heads.

</details>


### [311] [Cross-Machine Anomaly Detection Leveraging Pre-trained Time-series Model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05335)
*Yangmeng Li,Kei Sano,Toshihiro Kitao,Ryoji Anzaki,Yukiya Saitoh,Hironori Moki,Dragan Djurdjanovic*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出跨机器时间序列异常检测框架，通过域不变特征提取器分离机器相关和条件相关特征，提升异常检测在未见目标机器上的泛化能力


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 制造业需要可靠的异常检测方法，但不同机器即使执行相同流程也存在行为差异，传统方法难以处理这种跨机器泛化问题

Method: 集成域不变特征提取器和无监督异常检测模块，利用预训练基础模型MOMENT，通过随机森林分类器将嵌入分解为机器相关和条件相关特征

Result: 在三个执行相同操作的工业机器数据集上，该方法优于基于原始信号和MOMENT嵌入特征的基线方法，验证了跨机器泛化的有效性

Conclusion: 提出的跨机器时间序列异常检测框架通过分离机器特定特征和条件相关特征，显著提升了异常检测在不同机器间的泛化性能

Abstract: Achieving resilient and high-quality manufacturing requires reliable data-driven anomaly detection methods that are capable of addressing differences in behaviors among different individual machines which are nominally the same and are executing the same processes. To address the problem of detecting anomalies in a machine using sensory data gathered from different individual machines executing the same procedure, this paper proposes a cross-machine time-series anomaly detection framework that integrates a domain-invariant feature extractor with an unsupervised anomaly detection module. Leveraging the pre-trained foundation model MOMENT, the extractor employs Random Forest Classifiers to disentangle embeddings into machine-related and condition-related features, with the latter serving as representations which are invariant to differences between individual machines. These refined features enable the downstream anomaly detectors to generalize effectively to unseen target machines. Experiments on an industrial dataset collected from three different machines performing nominally the same operation demonstrate that the proposed approach outperforms both the raw-signal-based and MOMENT-embedding feature baselines, confirming its effectiveness in enhancing cross-machine generalization.

</details>


### [312] [A Theoretical Framework for Statistical Evaluability of Generative Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05324)
*Shashaank Aiyer,Yishay Mansour,Shay Moran,Han Shao*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一个评估生成模型的理论框架，分析了测试基指标和Rényi散度的可评估性，发现IPMs可以从有限样本中评估，而Rényi和KL散度则不能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 生成模型评估比监督学习更困难，因为生成模型具有开放性，不清楚哪些指标合适，以及这些指标是否可以从有限样本中可靠评估。需要建立理论框架来解决生成模型评估的挑战。

Method: 引入理论框架研究两类指标：测试基指标（包括积分概率度量IPMs）和Rényi散度。分析这些指标从有限样本中评估的能力，使用fat-shattering维度等理论工具。

Result: IPMs相对于任何有界测试类可以从有限样本中评估，达到乘性和加性近似误差。当测试类具有有限fat-shattering维度时，IPMs可以任意精度评估。相反，Rényi和KL散度不能从有限样本中评估，因为它们的值可能由罕见事件决定。还分析了困惑度作为评估方法的潜力和局限性。

Conclusion: 为生成模型评估建立了理论框架，明确了哪些指标可以从有限样本中可靠评估。IPMs是可评估的，而Rényi散度不可评估，这对生成模型评估实践具有重要指导意义。

Abstract: Statistical evaluation aims to estimate the generalization performance of a model using held-out i.i.d.\ test data sampled from the ground-truth distribution. In supervised learning settings such as classification, performance metrics such as error rate are well-defined, and test error reliably approximates population error given sufficiently large datasets. In contrast, evaluation is more challenging for generative models due to their open-ended nature: it is unclear which metrics are appropriate and whether such metrics can be reliably evaluated from finite samples.
  In this work, we introduce a theoretical framework for evaluating generative models and establish evaluability results for commonly used metrics. We study two categories of metrics: test-based metrics, including integral probability metrics (IPMs), and Rényi divergences. We show that IPMs with respect to any bounded test class can be evaluated from finite samples up to multiplicative and additive approximation errors. Moreover, when the test class has finite fat-shattering dimension, IPMs can be evaluated with arbitrary precision. In contrast, Rényi and KL divergences are not evaluable from finite samples, as their values can be critically determined by rare events. We also analyze the potential and limitations of perplexity as an evaluation method.

</details>


### [313] [LLMs Should Express Uncertainty Explicitly](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05306)
*Junyu Guo,Shangding Gu,Ming Jin,Costas Spanos,Javad Lavaei*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文研究将不确定性作为LLM的控制接口，比较全局置信度表达和推理时不确定性标记两种互补接口，发现它们分别优化最终答案信任决策和干预时机判断。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法通常将不确定性视为生成后需要估计的潜在变量，而非模型被训练表达的信号。作者认为应将不确定性作为控制接口来研究，以支持决策场景如弃权、检索和验证。

Method: 比较两种不确定性接口：1) 全局接口：模型对其最终答案表达校准的置信度分数；2) 局部接口：模型在推理过程中进入高风险状态时发出显式的<uncertain>标记。分析这两种接口在自适应RAG控制、错误覆盖和检索触发等方面的表现。

Result: 1) 置信度表达显著改善校准，减少过度自信错误，产生最强的自适应RAG控制器，更选择性地使用检索；2) 推理时不确定性标记使先前沉默的失败在生成过程中可见，提高错误答案覆盖率，提供有效的高召回检索触发器；3) 两种接口内部工作机制不同：置信度表达主要优化现有不确定性的解码方式，而推理时标记诱导更广泛的后期层重组。

Conclusion: LLM中的有效不确定性应被训练为任务匹配的通信方式：全局置信度用于决定是否信任最终答案，局部信号用于决定何时需要干预。这两种互补接口共同提供更全面的不确定性管理框架。

Abstract: Large language models are increasingly used in settings where uncertainty must drive decisions such as abstention, retrieval, and verification. Most existing methods treat uncertainty as a latent quantity to estimate after generation rather than a signal the model is trained to express. We instead study uncertainty as an interface for control. We compare two complementary interfaces: a global interface, where the model verbalizes a calibrated confidence score for its final answer, and a local interface, where the model emits an explicit <uncertain> marker during reasoning when it enters a high-risk state. These interfaces provide different but complementary benefits. Verbalized confidence substantially improves calibration, reduces overconfident errors, and yields the strongest overall Adaptive RAG controller while using retrieval more selectively. Reasoning-time uncertainty signaling makes previously silent failures visible during generation, improves wrong-answer coverage, and provides an effective high-recall retrieval trigger. Our findings further show that the two interfaces work differently internally: verbal confidence mainly refines how existing uncertainty is decoded, whereas reasoning-time signaling induces a broader late-layer reorganization. Together, these results suggest that effective uncertainty in LLMs should be trained as task-matched communication: global confidence for deciding whether to trust a final answer, and local signals for deciding when intervention is needed.

</details>


### [314] [Jeffreys Flow: Robust Boltzmann Generators for Rare Event Sampling via Parallel Tempering Distillation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05303)
*Guang Lin,Christian Moya,Di Qi,Xuda Ye*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出Jeffreys Flow框架，通过Jeffreys散度蒸馏并行回火轨迹数据，解决Boltzmann生成器中反向KL散度导致的模式崩溃问题，平衡局部精度与全局模式覆盖。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 粗糙能量景观的物理系统采样受罕见事件和亚稳态陷阱阻碍。现有Boltzmann生成器依赖反向Kullback-Leibler散度常导致灾难性模式崩溃，在多模态分布中遗漏特定模式。

Method: 引入Jeffreys Flow生成框架，从并行回火轨迹中蒸馏经验采样数据，使用对称Jeffreys散度平衡局部目标寻求精度与全局模式覆盖。

Result: 最小化Jeffreys散度能抑制模式崩溃，通过蒸馏经验参考数据结构性地修正固有误差。框架在高维非凸基准测试中展现可扩展性和准确性，包括修正副本交换随机梯度Langevin动力学中的随机梯度偏差，以及大幅加速量子热态路径积分蒙特卡洛的精确重要性采样。

Conclusion: Jeffreys Flow通过对称Jeffreys散度有效解决Boltzmann生成器的模式崩溃问题，在复杂物理系统采样中实现更好的模式覆盖和准确性，为高维非凸问题提供稳健的生成框架。

Abstract: Sampling physical systems with rough energy landscapes is hindered by rare events and metastable trapping. While Boltzmann generators already offer a solution, their reliance on the reverse Kullback--Leibler divergence frequently induces catastrophic mode collapse, missing specific modes in multi-modal distributions. Here, we introduce the Jeffreys Flow, a robust generative framework that mitigates this failure by distilling empirical sampling data from Parallel Tempering trajectories using the symmetric Jeffreys divergence. This formulation effectively balances local target-seeking precision with global modes coverage. We show that minimizing Jeffreys divergence suppresses mode collapse and structurally corrects inherent inaccuracies via distillation of the empirical reference data. We demonstrate the framework's scalability and accuracy on highly non-convex multidimensional benchmarks, including the systematic correction of stochastic gradient biases in Replica Exchange Stochastic Gradient Langevin Dynamics and the massive acceleration of exact importance sampling in Path Integral Monte Carlo for quantum thermal states.

</details>


### [315] [Extending Tabular Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Models for Time-Series Data Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05257)
*Umang Dobhal,Christina Garcia,Sozo Inoue*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出TabDDPM的时间序列扩展，通过轻量级时间适配器和上下文感知嵌入模块增强时间相干性，在WISDM加速度计数据集上生成更真实的合成时间序列数据。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: TabDDPM虽然能生成高质量的异构表格数据，但假设样本独立，无法处理时间序列中关键的时间依赖性，限制了其在时间序列领域的应用。

Method: 提出TabDDPM的时间扩展：1) 将传感器数据重构为窗口化序列；2) 使用轻量级时间适配器；3) 通过时间步嵌入、条件活动标签和观测/缺失掩码显式建模时间上下文；4) 引入上下文感知嵌入模块。

Result: 在WISDM加速度计数据集上，使用二元转移矩阵和自相关分析验证显示：增强的时间真实性、多样性和相干性；生成与真实世界传感器模式相似的合成时间序列；达到可比的分类性能（宏观F1分数0.64，准确率0.71）；特别有利于少数类表示和保持与真实分布的统计对齐。

Conclusion: 扩散模型在配备时间推理能力后，能为序列数据合成提供有效且适应性强的解决方案。未来工作将探索扩展到更长序列和集成更强的时间架构。

Abstract: Diffusion models are increasingly being utilised to create synthetic tabular and time series data for privacy-preserving augmentation. Tabular Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Models (TabDDPM) generate high-quality synthetic data from heterogeneous tabular datasets but assume independence between samples, limiting their applicability to time-series domains where temporal dependencies are critical. To address this, we propose a temporal extension of TabDDPM, introducing sequence awareness through the use of lightweight temporal adapters and context-aware embedding modules. By reformulating sensor data into windowed sequences and explicitly modeling temporal context via timestep embeddings, conditional activity labels, and observed/missing masks, our approach enables the generation of temporally coherent synthetic sequences. Compared to baseline and interpolation techniques, validation using bigram transition matrices and autocorrelation analysis shows enhanced temporal realism, diversity, and coherence. On the WISDM accelerometer dataset, the suggested system produces synthetic time-series that closely resemble real world sensor patterns and achieves comparable classification performance (macro F1-score 0.64, accuracy 0.71). This is especially advantageous for minority class representation and preserving statistical alignment with real distributions. These developments demonstrate that diffusion based models provide effective and adaptable solutions for sequential data synthesis when they are equipped for temporal reasoning. Future work will explore scaling to longer sequences and integrating stronger temporal architectures.

</details>


### [316] [On the Geometry of Positional Encodings in Transformers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05217)
*Giansalvo Cirrincione*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文建立了位置编码的数学理论，证明了位置信号的必要性、位置分离定理、基于多维尺度分析的最优编码构造方法，以及最小参数化表示。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 位置编码是Transformer架构中处理词序信息的关键组件，但现有设计缺乏数学理论指导，主要依赖试错方法。需要建立系统的数学理论来理解位置编码应该实现什么功能以及如何优化设计。

Method: 1. 理论分析：证明必要性定理（无位置信号无法处理词序敏感任务）和位置分离定理（训练在全局最小化时赋予不同位置不同表示）。2. 最优编码构造：基于Hellinger距离的多维尺度分析（MDS）构建信息最优编码的近似。3. 参数优化：推导最小参数化表示（r(n+d)参数替代nd参数）。4. 实验验证：在SST-2和IMDB数据集上测试BERT-base，验证理论预测。

Result: 1. 理论证明：位置信号对词序敏感任务是必要的；训练收敛时不同位置获得不同表示。2. 最优编码：通过MDS构造的编码质量由单一指标"应力"衡量。3. 参数效率：最优编码的有效秩r≤n-1，参数需求从nd减少到r(n+d)。4. 实验发现：ALiBi编码比正弦编码和RoPE具有更低的应力值，与近似平移等变下的秩-1 MDS编码解释一致。

Conclusion: 该论文建立了位置编码的完整数学理论框架，提供了理论指导下的编码设计原则。证明了位置编码的必要性和优化方法，为未来位置编码设计提供了理论基础和实用工具。ALiBi编码的低应力表现验证了理论预测的有效性。

Abstract: Neural language models process sequences of words, but the mathematical operations inside them are insensitive to the order in which words appear. Positional encodings are the component added to remedy this. Despite their importance, positional encodings have been designed largely by trial and error, without a mathematical theory of what they ought to do.
  This paper develops such a theory. Four results are established. First, any Transformer without a positional signal cannot solve any task sensitive to word order (Necessity Theorem). Second, training assigns distinct vector representations to distinct sequence positions at every global minimiser, under mild and verifiable conditions (Positional Separation Theorem). Third, the best achievable approximation to an information-optimal encoding is constructed via classical multidimensional scaling (MDS) on the Hellinger distance between positional distributions; the quality of any encoding is measured by a single number, the stress (Proposition 5, Algorithm 1). Fourth, the optimal encoding has effective rank r = rank(B) <= n-1 and can be represented with r(n+d) parameters instead of nd (minimal parametrisation result).
  Appendix A develops a proof of the Monotonicity Conjecture within the Neural Tangent Kernel (NTK) regime for masked language modelling (MLM) losses, sequence classification losses, and general losses satisfying a positional sufficiency condition, through five lemmas. Experiments on SST-2 and IMDB with BERT-base confirm the theoretical predictions and reveal that Attention with Linear Biases (ALiBi) achieves much lower stress than the sinusoidal encoding and Rotary Position Embedding (RoPE), consistent with a rank-1 interpretation of the MDS encoding under approximate shift-equivariance.

</details>


### [317] [FNO$^{\angle θ}$: Extended Fourier neural operator for learning state and optimal control of distributed parameter systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05187)
*Zhexian Li,Ketan Savla*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出扩展的傅里叶神经算子架构，用于学习偏微分方程系统的状态和线性二次加性最优控制，通过将频率变量从实域扩展到复域来改进FNO性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 基于Ehrenpreis-Palamodov基本定理，线性常系数PDE的状态和最优控制可在复域中表示为积分，这启发了将FNO的频率变量从实域扩展到复域以更好地表示PDE解和控制

Method: 修改FNO层，将逆傅里叶变换中的频率变量从实域扩展到复域，以捕捉基本定理中的积分表示，从而学习PDE系统的状态和线性二次加性最优控制

Result: 在非线性Burgers方程的状态和最优控制学习中，相比标准FNO，训练误差提高了数量级，对非周期边界值的预测更准确

Conclusion: 扩展FNO架构通过将频率变量扩展到复域，能更有效地学习PDE系统的状态和最优控制，在训练误差和边界值预测方面显著优于标准FNO

Abstract: We propose an extended Fourier neural operator (FNO) architecture for learning state and linear quadratic additive optimal control of systems governed by partial differential equations. Using the Ehrenpreis-Palamodov fundamental principle, we show that any state and optimal control of linear PDEs with constant coefficients can be represented as an integral in the complex domain. The integrand of this representation involves the same exponential term as in the inverse Fourier transform, where the latter is used to represent the convolution operator in FNO layer. Motivated by this observation, we modify the FNO layer by extending the frequency variable in the inverse Fourier transform from the real to complex domain to capture the integral representation from the fundamental principle. We illustrate the performance of FNO in learning state and optimal control for the nonlinear Burgers' equation, showing order of magnitude improvements in training errors and more accurate predictions of non-periodic boundary values over FNO.

</details>


### [318] [Cross-fitted Proximal Learning for Model-Based Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05185)
*Nishanth Venkatesh,Andreas A. Malikopoulos*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种用于混杂部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程的交叉拟合桥函数估计方法，通过更高效的数据利用改进现有两阶段估计器


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在离线强化学习中，存在隐藏混杂因子的部分可观测系统会导致基于观测数据学习的模型产生偏差。现有基于桥函数的政策评估方法需要估计满足条件矩限制的奖励-发射和观测-转移桥函数，但现有估计器在数据利用效率上存在局限。

Method: 将桥函数学习形式化为条件矩限制问题，其中干扰项由条件均值嵌入和条件密度给出。开发了现有两阶段桥估计器的K折交叉拟合扩展，保留原始基于桥的识别策略，同时比单一样本分割更高效地利用数据。

Result: 推导了交叉拟合估计器的oracle比较器界，并将误差分解为第一阶段（由干扰项估计引起）和第二阶段（由经验平均引起）的误差项。该方法在统计上更有效地利用了可用数据。

Conclusion: 提出的交叉拟合桥函数估计方法改进了混杂部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程中的政策评估，通过更高效的数据利用和明确的误差分解，为离线强化学习中的模型偏差问题提供了更稳健的解决方案。

Abstract: Model-based reinforcement learning is attractive for sequential decision-making because it explicitly estimates reward and transition models and then supports planning through simulated rollouts. In offline settings with hidden confounding, however, models learned directly from observational data may be biased. This challenge is especially pronounced in partially observable systems, where latent factors may jointly affect actions, rewards, and future observations. Recent work has shown that policy evaluation in such confounded partially observable Markov decision processes (POMDPs) can be reduced to estimating reward-emission and observation-transition bridge functions satisfying conditional moment restrictions (CMRs). In this paper, we study the statistical estimation of these bridge functions. We formulate bridge learning as a CMR problem with nuisance objects given by a conditional mean embedding and a conditional density. We then develop a $K$-fold cross-fitted extension of the existing two-stage bridge estimator. The proposed procedure preserves the original bridge-based identification strategy while using the available data more efficiently than a single sample split. We also derive an oracle-comparator bound for the cross-fitted estimator and decompose the resulting error into a Stage I term induced by nuisance estimation and a Stage II term induced by empirical averaging.

</details>


### [319] [General Multimodal Protein Design Enables DNA-Encoding of Chemistry](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05181)
*Jarrid Rector-Brooks,Théophile Lambert,Marta Skreta,Daniel Roth,Yueming Long,Zi-Qi Li,Xi Zhang,Miruna Cretu,Francesca-Zhoufan Li,Tanvi Ganapathy,Emily Jin,Avishek Joey Bose,Jason Yang,Kirill Neklyudov,Yoshua Bengio,Alexander Tong,Frances H. Arnold,Cheng-Hao Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: DISCO是一个多模态扩散模型，能够围绕任意生物分子共同设计蛋白质序列和3D结构，成功设计了催化新型碳烯转移反应的血红素酶


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自然进化探索的酶化学空间有限，而现有深度生成模型需要预先指定催化残基。需要开发能够从反应中间体出发、无需预设催化位点就能设计新型酶的方法

Method: DISCO（DIffusion for Sequence-structure CO-design）是一个多模态扩散模型，结合序列和结构共同设计，采用推理时缩放方法优化两个模态的目标函数。模型仅以反应中间体为条件进行设计

Result: DISCO设计了具有新颖活性位点几何结构的血红素酶，能够催化多种新型碳烯转移反应（烯烃环丙烷化、螺环丙烷化、B-H和C(sp³)-H插入），活性超过工程化酶。随机突变进一步证明可通过定向进化提高酶活性

Conclusion: DISCO为可进化酶提供了可扩展的设计路径，拓宽了基因可编码转化的潜在范围，实现了从反应中间体直接设计功能性酶的能力

Abstract: Evolution is an extraordinary engine for enzymatic diversity, yet the chemistry it has explored remains a narrow slice of what DNA can encode. Deep generative models can design new proteins that bind ligands, but none have created enzymes without pre-specifying catalytic residues. We introduce DISCO (DIffusion for Sequence-structure CO-design), a multimodal model that co-designs protein sequence and 3D structure around arbitrary biomolecules, as well as inference-time scaling methods that optimize objectives across both modalities. Conditioned solely on reactive intermediates, DISCO designs diverse heme enzymes with novel active-site geometries. These enzymes catalyze new-to-nature carbene-transfer reactions, including alkene cyclopropanation, spirocyclopropanation, B-H, and C(sp$^3$)-H insertions, with high activities exceeding those of engineered enzymes. Random mutagenesis of a selected design further confirmed that enzyme activity can be improved through directed evolution. By providing a scalable route to evolvable enzymes, DISCO broadens the potential scope of genetically encodable transformations. Code is available at https://github.com/DISCO-design/DISCO.

</details>


### [320] [Not All Turns Are Equally Hard: Adaptive Thinking Budgets For Efficient Multi-Turn Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05164)
*Neharika Jali,Anupam Nayak,Gauri Joshi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: TAB是一种面向多轮推理的令牌预算自适应分配策略，通过强化学习训练，在保持准确率的同时节省高达35-40%的计算令牌。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着LLM推理性能趋于平稳，提高推理时计算效率变得至关重要。现有方法主要针对单轮设置，无法处理多轮推理中的序列依赖关系，导致简单查询过度思考和推理链过长的问题。

Method: 将多轮推理建模为序列计算分配问题，形式化为多目标马尔可夫决策过程。提出TAB（Turn-Adaptive Budgets）策略，通过Group Relative Policy Optimization（GRPO）训练，学习在满足全局每问题令牌约束的同时最大化任务准确率。对于已知所有子问题的情况，进一步提出TAB All-SubQ策略。

Result: 在数学推理基准测试中，TAB实现了优越的准确率-令牌权衡，节省高达35%的令牌同时保持准确率优于静态和现成LLM预算基线。TAB All-SubQ进一步节省高达40%的令牌。

Conclusion: TAB通过自适应地将较小预算分配给较简单的轮次，并为关键困难推理步骤保留适当令牌，有效解决了多轮推理中的计算效率问题，为LLM推理优化提供了新方向。

Abstract: As LLM reasoning performance plateau, improving inference-time compute efficiency is crucial to mitigate overthinking and long thinking traces even for simple queries. Prior approaches including length regularization, adaptive routing, and difficulty-based budget allocation primarily focus on single-turn settings and fail to address the sequential dependencies inherent in multi-turn reasoning.In this work, we formulate multi-turn reasoning as a sequential compute allocation problem and model it as a multi-objective Markov Decision Process. We propose TAB: Turn-Adaptive Budgets, a budget allocation policy trained via Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) that learns to maximize task accuracy while respecting global per-problem token constraints. Consequently, TAB takes as input the conversation history and learns to adaptively allocate smaller budgets to easier turns and save appropriate number of tokens for the crucial harder reasoning steps. Our experiments on mathematical reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that TAB achieves a superior accuracy-tokens tradeoff saving up to 35% tokens while maintaining accuracy over static and off-the-shelf LLM budget baselines. Further, for systems where a plan of all sub-questions is available apriori, we propose TAB All-SubQ, a budget allocation policy that budgets tokens based on the conversation history and all past and future sub-questions saving up to 40% tokens over baselines.

</details>


### [321] [Reasoning Through Chess: How Reasoning Evolves from Data Through Fine-Tuning and Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05134)
*Lucas Dionisopoulos,Nicklas Majamaki,Prithviraj Ammanabrolu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该研究探讨了如何通过监督微调和强化学习提升语言模型在象棋任务中的推理能力，发现直接预测最佳走法的微调能带来最强的下游性能但产生不忠实的推理，而多步轨迹训练则能保持忠实推理和稳定的强化学习。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究动机是探索如何让语言模型在原本表现不佳的任务（如象棋）中提升推理能力，特别关注从监督微调到强化学习过程中推理能力如何演化，以及不同训练数据对模型性能的影响。

Method: 研究方法包括：1）使用理论启发的数据集进行监督微调；2）应用强化学习进一步优化模型；3）对比直接预测最佳走法与多步轨迹训练两种策略；4）分析推理忠实性、走法质量分布变化和幻觉率等指标。

Result: 主要结果：1）直接预测最佳走法的微调能带来最有效的强化学习和最强的下游性能，但会产生不忠实的推理；2）多步轨迹训练能达到相当的下游性能，同时保持忠实推理和更稳定的强化学习；3）强化学习显著改善了走法质量分布并降低了幻觉率；4）监督微调检查点的多个指标能有效预测强化学习后的模型性能。

Conclusion: 结论：在象棋推理任务中，训练策略的选择需要在性能与推理忠实性之间权衡。直接预测最佳走法能获得最强性能但牺牲推理忠实性，而多步轨迹训练能在保持忠实推理的同时获得相当性能。研究还识别了能预测强化学习后性能的监督微调指标，并成功开发出超越领先开源推理模型的7B参数象棋模型。

Abstract: How can you get a language model to reason in a task it natively struggles with? We study how reasoning evolves in a language model -- from supervised fine-tuning (SFT) to reinforcement learning (RL) -- by analyzing how a set of theoretically-inspired datasets impacts language model performance in chess. We find that fine-tuning a model to directly predict the best move leads to effective RL and the strongest downstream performance -- however, the RL step elicits unfaithful reasoning (reasoning inconsistent with the chosen move). Alternatively, training on multi-move trajectories yields comparable downstream performance with faithful reasoning and more stable RL. We show that RL induces a substantial positive shift in the distribution of move quality and reduces hallucination rates as a side effect. Finally, we find several SFT-checkpoint metrics -- metrics spanning evaluation performance, hallucination rates, and reasoning quality -- to be predictive of post-RL model performance. We release checkpoints and final models as well as training data, evaluations, and code which allowed us to surpass leading open-source reasoning models in chess with a 7B-parameter model.

</details>


### [322] [Super Agents and Confounders: Influence of surrounding agents on vehicle trajectory prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.03463)
*Daniel Jost,Luca Paparusso,Martin Stoll,Jörg Wagner,Raghu Rajan,Joschka Bödecker*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 研究发现当前轨迹预测模型存在严重缺陷：过多周围参与者信息反而降低预测精度，模型学习到不稳定、非因果的决策模式。提出使用条件信息瓶颈（CIB）来有效压缩和筛选有用信息，提高预测性能和鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在高度交互的驾驶场景中，轨迹预测通常依赖于周围交通参与者（如车辆和行人）的信息。然而，研究发现现有最先进的轨迹预测模型存在一个令人惊讶的关键缺陷：许多周围参与者的信息不仅没有改善预测精度，反而降低了预测准确性。这表明模型可能学习到了不稳定和非因果的决策模式。

Method: 首先使用基于Shapley值的归因方法对现有轨迹预测模型进行综合分析，揭示其决策模式的不稳定性和非因果性。在此基础上，提出集成条件信息瓶颈（CIB）的方法，该方法不需要额外监督，能够有效压缩参与者特征并忽略对预测任务无益的特征。

Result: 在多个数据集和模型架构上的综合实验表明，这种简单而有效的方法在许多情况下不仅提高了整体轨迹预测性能，还增强了对不同扰动的鲁棒性。研究还提供了可解释的指标来识别非鲁棒行为。

Conclusion: 研究强调了在轨迹预测中需要有选择性地整合上下文信息的重要性，因为这些信息常常包含虚假或误导性信号。提出的条件信息瓶颈方法为解决这一问题提供了有前景的途径，同时为识别模型非鲁棒行为提供了可解释的度量标准。

Abstract: In highly interactive driving scenes, trajectory prediction is conditioned on information from surrounding traffic participants such as cars and pedestrians. Our main contribution is a comprehensive analysis of state-of-the-art trajectory predictors, which reveals a surprising and critical flaw: many surrounding agents degrade prediction accuracy rather than improve it. Using Shapley-based attribution, we rigorously demonstrate that models learn unstable and non-causal decision-making schemes that vary significantly across training runs. Building on these insights, we propose to integrate a Conditional Information Bottleneck (CIB), which does not require additional supervision and is trained to effectively compress agent features as well as ignore those that are not beneficial for the prediction task. Comprehensive experiments using multiple datasets and model architectures demonstrate that this simple yet effective approach not only improves overall trajectory prediction performance in many cases but also increases robustness to different perturbations. Our results highlight the importance of selectively integrating contextual information, which can often contain spurious or misleading signals, in trajectory prediction. Moreover, we provide interpretable metrics for identifying non-robust behavior and present a promising avenue towards a solution.

</details>


### [323] [Hierarchical SVG Tokenization: Learning Compact Visual Programs for Scalable Vector Graphics Modeling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05072)
*Ximing Xing,Ziteng Xue,Zhenxi Li,Weicong Liang,Linqing Wang,Zhantao Yang,Tiankai Hang,Zijin Yin,Qinglin Lu,Chunyu Wang,Qian Yu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: HiVG提出了一种针对SVG生成的分层标记化框架，通过原子标记和几何约束的片段标记来改进向量图形生成，解决了传统字节级标记化在几何结构表示上的不足。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有大型语言模型在SVG生成中仍使用从自然语言处理继承的通用字节级标记化方法，这种方法无法有效反映向量图形的几何结构。数值坐标被分割成离散符号，破坏了空间关系并引入严重的标记冗余，导致坐标幻觉和低效的长序列生成。

Method: HiVG框架将原始SVG字符串分解为结构化的原子标记，并将可执行命令-参数组压缩为几何约束的片段标记。引入分层均值-噪声初始化策略，向新标记嵌入中注入数值排序信号和语义先验。结合逐步增加程序复杂度的课程训练范式。

Result: 在文本到SVG和图像到SVG任务上的广泛实验表明，相比传统标记化方案，HiVG在生成保真度、空间一致性和序列效率方面均有显著改进。

Conclusion: HiVG通过分层标记化框架有效解决了SVG生成中的几何结构表示问题，提高了生成质量和效率，为自回归向量图形生成提供了更优的解决方案。

Abstract: Recent large language models have shifted SVG generation from differentiable rendering optimization to autoregressive program synthesis. However, existing approaches still rely on generic byte-level tokenization inherited from natural language processing, which poorly reflects the geometric structure of vector graphics. Numerical coordinates are fragmented into discrete symbols, destroying spatial relationships and introducing severe token redundancy, often leading to coordinate hallucination and inefficient long-sequence generation. To address these challenges, we propose HiVG, a hierarchical SVG tokenization framework tailored for autoregressive vector graphics generation. HiVG decomposes raw SVG strings into structured \textit{atomic tokens} and further compresses executable command--parameter groups into geometry-constrained \textit{segment tokens}, substantially improving sequence efficiency while preserving syntactic validity. To further mitigate spatial mismatch, we introduce a Hierarchical Mean--Noise (HMN) initialization strategy that injects numerical ordering signals and semantic priors into new token embeddings. Combined with a curriculum training paradigm that progressively increases program complexity, HiVG enables more stable learning of executable SVG programs. Extensive experiments on both text-to-SVG and image-to-SVG tasks demonstrate improved generation fidelity, spatial consistency, and sequence efficiency compared with conventional tokenization schemes.

</details>


### [324] [Towards Scaling Law Analysis For Spatiotemporal Weather Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05068)
*Alexander Kiefer,Prasanna Balaprakash,Xiao Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该研究将神经缩放分析扩展到自回归天气预报，从单步训练损失扩展到长时滚动和逐通道指标，揭示了跨通道和跨时间尺度的异质性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 天气预报难以用NLP和CV中相对成熟的计算最优缩放定律来表征：自回归滚动会在长时域上累积误差，输出耦合多个具有不同尺度和可预测性的物理通道，全局聚合的测试指标可能与短时域训练隐含的逐通道、后期行为存在尖锐分歧。

Method: 扩展神经缩放分析框架，从单步训练损失到长时滚动预测和逐通道指标。量化：(1)预测误差在通道间的分布及其随预测时域的增长速率；(2)全局聚合误差下测试误差的幂律缩放是否成立；(3)该拟合如何随时域和通道在参数、数据和计算三个缩放维度上联合变化。

Result: 发现强烈的跨通道和跨时域异质性：全局聚合的缩放可能看起来有利，但许多通道在后期预测时性能会退化。不同物理通道的误差增长模式和缩放行为存在显著差异。

Conclusion: 研究结果对加权目标函数、时域感知课程学习和跨输出资源分配具有重要启示。需要更精细的缩放分析来捕捉天气预报中不同物理通道和预测时域的特异性行为。

Abstract: Compute-optimal scaling laws are relatively well studied for NLP and CV, where objectives are typically single-step and targets are comparatively homogeneous. Weather forecasting is harder to characterize in the same framework: autoregressive rollouts compound errors over long horizons, outputs couple many physical channels with disparate scales and predictability, and globally pooled test metrics can disagree sharply with per-channel, late-lead behavior implied by short-horizon training. We extend neural scaling analysis for autoregressive weather forecasting from single-step training loss to long rollouts and per-channel metrics. We quantify (1) how prediction error is distributed across channels and how its growth rate evolves with forecast horizon, (2) if power law scaling holds for test error, relative to rollout length when error is pooled globally, and (3) how that fit varies jointly with horizon and channel for parameter, data, and compute-based scaling axes. We find strong cross-channel and cross-horizon heterogeneity: pooled scaling can look favorable while many channels degrade at late leads. We discuss implications for weighted objectives, horizon-aware curricula, and resource allocation across outputs.

</details>


### [325] [Dynamic Linear Coregionalization for Realistic Synthetic Multivariate Time Series](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05064)
*Annita Vapsi,Penghang Liu,Saheed Obitayo,Aakriti,Manoj Cherukumalli,Prathamesh Patil,Amit Varshney,Nicolas Marchesotti,Elizabeth Fons,Vamsi K. Potluru,Manuela Veloso*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: DynLMC是一种动态线性协同区域化模型，通过建模时变、机制切换的相关性和跨通道滞后结构，生成具有真实相关动态的多元时间序列合成数据，提升基础模型的零样本预测能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有时间序列合成数据生成器大多假设静态相关性，缺乏真实的跨通道依赖关系，这限制了时间序列基础模型的训练效果和可迁移性。

Method: 提出DynLMC（动态线性协同区域化模型），该模型包含时变、机制切换的相关性和跨通道滞后结构，能够生成具有真实相关动态的多元时间序列合成数据。

Result: 在DynLMC生成的合成数据上微调三个基础模型，在九个基准测试中均获得一致的零样本预测性能提升，表明建模动态跨通道相关性能够增强时间序列基础模型的可迁移性。

Conclusion: 建模动态跨通道相关性对于提升时间序列基础模型的性能至关重要，这强调了以数据为中心的预训练方法的重要性。

Abstract: Synthetic data is essential for training foundation models for time series (FMTS), but most generators assume static correlations, and are typically missing realistic inter-channel dependencies. We introduce DynLMC, a Dynamic Linear Model of Coregionalization, that incorporates time-varying, regime-switching correlations and cross-channel lag structures. Our approach produces synthetic multivariate time series with correlation dynamics that closely resemble real data. Fine-tuning three foundational models on DynLMC-generated data yields consistent zero-shot forecasting improvements across nine benchmarks. Our results demonstrate that modeling dynamic inter-channel correlations enhances FMTS transferability, highlighting the importance of data-centric pretraining.

</details>


### [326] [Blind-Spot Mass: A Good-Turing Framework for Quantifying Deployment Coverage Risk in Machine Learning Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05057)
*Biplab Pal,Santanu Bhattacharya,Madanjit Singh*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 盲点质量是一种基于Good-Turing框架的机器学习部署覆盖风险量化方法，用于估计在有限训练数据中结构性地缺乏支持的操作状态的概率质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代ML系统的操作状态分布通常是重尾的，这意味着大量有效但罕见的状态在有限的训练和评估数据中结构性地缺乏支持。这导致"覆盖盲点"问题：模型在标准测试集上可能表现准确，但在部署状态空间的大片区域中仍然不可靠。

Method: 提出盲点质量B_n(τ)，这是一个部署指标，使用Good-Turing未见过物种估计来计算，估计经验支持低于阈值τ的状态的总概率质量。进一步推导出覆盖强加的准确率上限，将整体性能分解为受支持部分和盲点部分，从而区分容量限制和数据限制。

Result: 在可穿戴人类活动识别(HAR)中使用腕戴惯性数据进行验证，然后在包含275个入院记录的MIMIC-IV医院数据库中复制分析，盲点质量曲线在τ=5时收敛到相同的95%。这种跨结构独立领域的复制表明盲点质量是量化组合覆盖风险的通用ML方法，而非特定应用的人工产物。

Conclusion: 盲点分解识别哪些活动或临床状态主导风险，为工业从业者提供有针对性的数据收集、归一化/重归一化以及物理或领域知情约束的可操作指导，以实现更安全的部署。

Abstract: Blind-spot mass is a Good-Turing framework for quantifying deployment coverage risk in machine learning. In modern ML systems, operational state distributions are often heavy-tailed, implying that a long tail of valid but rare states is structurally under-supported in finite training and evaluation data. This creates a form of 'coverage blindness': models can appear accurate on standard test sets yet remain unreliable across large regions of the deployment state space.
  We propose blind-spot mass B_n(tau), a deployment metric estimating the total probability mass assigned to states whose empirical support falls below a threshold tau. B_n(tau) is computed using Good-Turing unseen-species estimation and yields a principled estimate of how much of the operational distribution lies in reliability-critical, under-supported regimes. We further derive a coverage-imposed accuracy ceiling, decomposing overall performance into supported and blind components and separating capacity limits from data limits.
  We validate the framework in wearable human activity recognition (HAR) using wrist-worn inertial data. We then replicate the same analysis in the MIMIC-IV hospital database with 275 admissions, where the blind-spot mass curve converges to the same 95% at tau = 5 across clinical state abstractions. This replication across structurally independent domains - differing in modality, feature space, label space, and application - shows that blind-spot mass is a general ML methodology for quantifying combinatorial coverage risk, not an application-specific artifact.
  Blind-spot decomposition identifies which activities or clinical regimes dominate risk, providing actionable guidance for industrial practitioners on targeted data collection, normalization/renormalization, and physics- or domain-informed constraints for safer deployment.

</details>


### [327] [Stratifying Reinforcement Learning with Signal Temporal Logic](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04923)
*Justin Curry,Alberto Speranzon*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文为信号时序逻辑（STL）开发了一种基于分层理论的语义学，揭示了分层理论与STL之间的对应原理，并将其应用于深度强化学习的嵌入空间分析。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 论文旨在建立信号时序逻辑（STL）与分层理论之间的理论联系，为分析深度强化学习（DRL）生成的嵌入空间结构提供新的理论框架，并开发计算工具来揭示这些空间的几何特性。

Method: 1. 开发基于分层理论的STL语义学，将原子谓词解释为分层空间中的成员测试；2. 在Minigrid游戏中展示分层理论的作用；3. 对玩此类游戏的DRL智能体的潜在嵌入应用数值技术，使用STL公式的鲁棒性作为奖励；4. 提出计算高效的签名来揭示嵌入空间的分层结构。

Result: 揭示了分层理论与STL之间的对应原理，表明大多数STL公式可视为诱导时空分层；提出了计算高效的签名，初步证据显示这些签名有望揭示嵌入空间的分层结构；为分析DRL嵌入空间与决策空间几何关系提供了理论框架。

Conclusion: 该研究建立了STL与分层理论之间的理论联系，为分析DRL嵌入空间提供了新的理论视角和计算工具，既支持现有高维分析工具的重用，又激励新计算技术的开发，在形式化验证和机器学习交叉领域具有重要价值。

Abstract: In this paper, we develop a stratification-based semantics for Signal Temporal Logic (STL) in which each atomic predicate is interpreted as a membership test in a stratified space. This perspective reveals a novel correspondence principle between stratification theory and STL, showing that most STL formulas can be viewed as inducing a stratification of space-time. The significance of this interpretation is twofold. First, it offers a fresh theoretical framework for analyzing the structure of the embedding space generated by deep reinforcement learning (DRL) and relates it to the geometry of the ambient decision space. Second, it provides a principled framework that both enables the reuse of existing high-dimensional analysis tools and motivates the creation of novel computational techniques. To ground the theory, we (1) illustrate the role of stratification theory in Minigrid games and (2) apply numerical techniques to the latent embeddings of a DRL agent playing such a game where the robustness of STL formulas is used as the reward. In the process, we propose computationally efficient signatures that, based on preliminary evidence, appear promising for uncovering the stratification structure of such embedding spaces.

</details>


### [328] [HI-MoE: Hierarchical Instance-Conditioned Mixture-of-Experts for Object Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04908)
*Vadim Vashkelis,Natalia Trukhina*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: HI-MoE是一种面向目标检测的DETR风格混合专家架构，通过两阶段路由机制在场景和实例层面进行稀疏计算，相比传统图像/补丁级MoE方法更好地匹配检测任务的实例中心特性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视觉MoE方法主要在图像或补丁级别操作，这与目标检测的基本推理单元（对应候选实例的对象查询）不匹配。需要一种更适合检测任务异构、实例中心结构的稀疏计算架构。

Method: 提出分层实例条件混合专家（HI-MoE）：1）轻量级场景路由器选择场景一致的专家子集；2）实例路由器将每个对象查询分配给该子集中的少量专家。这种两阶段路由设计旨在保持稀疏计算的同时更好地匹配检测任务结构。

Result: 在COCO数据集上，HI-MoE优于密集DINO基线和简单的token级或仅实例路由变体，在小物体检测上表现尤其突出。在LVIS上的初步专业化分析显示专家具有特定模式。

Conclusion: HI-MoE通过分层路由机制为DETR风格检测器提供了有效的稀疏计算架构，更好地匹配检测任务的实例中心特性，在小物体检测方面表现优异，为后续实验验证提供了基础框架。

Abstract: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architectures enable conditional computation by activating only a subset of model parameters for each input. Although sparse routing has been highly effective in language models and has also shown promise in vision, most vision MoE methods operate at the image or patch level. This granularity is poorly aligned with object detection, where the fundamental unit of reasoning is an object query corresponding to a candidate instance. We propose Hierarchical Instance-Conditioned Mixture-of-Experts (HI-MoE), a DETR-style detection architecture that performs routing in two stages: a lightweight scene router first selects a scene-consistent expert subset, and an instance router then assigns each object query to a small number of experts within that subset. This design aims to preserve sparse computation while better matching the heterogeneous, instance-centric structure of detection. In the current draft, experiments are concentrated on COCO with preliminary specialization analysis on LVIS. Under these settings, HI-MoE improves over a dense DINO baseline and over simpler token-level or instance-only routing variants, with especially strong gains on small objects. We also provide an initial visualization of expert specialization patterns. We present the method, ablations, and current limitations in a form intended to support further experimental validation.

</details>


### [329] [Are Latent Reasoning Models Easily Interpretable?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04902)
*Connor Dilgren,Sarah Wiegreffe*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 研究发现当前潜在推理模型（LRMs）的推理标记常被浪费，且多数情况下编码了可解释的推理过程，可解释性可作为预测正确性的信号。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 潜在推理模型（LRMs）因推理成本低且能并行探索多推理路径而受关注，但其可解释性差，难以监控。本文旨在探究LRMs的可解释性问题，验证其推理标记的实际作用。

Method: 1. 分析两个最先进的LRMs，测试推理标记的必要性；2. 在推理标记必要时，解码黄金推理轨迹；3. 提出无需先验知识即可从潜在标记解码验证的自然语言推理轨迹的方法。

Result: 1. 逻辑推理数据集中，LRMs几乎总能在不使用潜在推理的情况下得到相同答案，推理标记利用率低；2. 当推理标记必要且预测正确时，可解码出65-93%的黄金推理轨迹；3. 多数正确预测可找到验证轨迹，但错误预测中仅少数能找到。

Conclusion: 当前LRMs主要编码可解释的推理过程，而非不透明的黑箱；可解释性本身可作为预测正确性的信号；LRMs未充分利用推理标记，这解释了其性能未显著超越显式推理方法的原因。

Abstract: Latent reasoning models (LRMs) have attracted significant research interest due to their low inference cost (relative to explicit reasoning models) and theoretical ability to explore multiple reasoning paths in parallel. However, these benefits come at the cost of reduced interpretability: LRMs are difficult to monitor because they do not reason in natural language. This paper presents an investigation into LRM interpretability by examining two state-of-the-art LRMs. First, we find that latent reasoning tokens are often unnecessary for LRMs' predictions; on logical reasoning datasets, LRMs can almost always produce the same final answers without using latent reasoning at all. This underutilization of reasoning tokens may partially explain why LRMs do not consistently outperform explicit reasoning methods and raises doubts about the stated role of these tokens in prior work. Second, we demonstrate that when latent reasoning tokens are necessary for performance, we can decode gold reasoning traces up to 65-93% of the time for correctly predicted instances. This suggests LRMs often implement the expected solution rather than an uninterpretable reasoning process. Finally, we present a method to decode a verified natural language reasoning trace from latent tokens without knowing a gold reasoning trace a priori, demonstrating that it is possible to find a verified trace for a majority of correct predictions but only a minority of incorrect predictions. Our findings highlight that current LRMs largely encode interpretable processes, and interpretability itself can be a signal of prediction correctness.

</details>


### [330] [Data Attribution in Adaptive Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04892)
*Amit Kiran Rege*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了针对自适应学习场景的归因方法，解决了传统静态数据集归因方法无法处理训练数据生成反馈循环的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器学习模型越来越多地生成自己的训练数据（如在线赌博机、强化学习、语言模型后训练流程），在这些自适应设置中，单个训练观测既更新学习者，又改变学习者未来收集数据的分布。标准的归因方法是为静态数据集设计的，忽略了这种反馈效应。

Method: 通过条件干预目标形式化有限时域自适应学习的发生级归因，证明重放侧信息通常无法恢复该目标，并识别出可以从记录数据中识别目标的结构类别。

Result: 建立了自适应学习归因的理论框架，确定了在何种条件下可以从记录数据中识别归因目标，揭示了重放侧信息在一般情况下的局限性。

Conclusion: 需要专门针对自适应学习场景设计归因方法，传统静态归因方法不适用于处理训练数据生成的反馈循环，论文提出的框架为此类问题提供了理论基础。

Abstract: Machine learning models increasingly generate their own training data -- online bandits, reinforcement learning, and post-training pipelines for language models are leading examples. In these adaptive settings, a single training observation both updates the learner and shifts the distribution of future data the learner will collect. Standard attribution methods, designed for static datasets, ignore this feedback. We formalize occurrence-level attribution for finite-horizon adaptive learning via a conditional interventional target, prove that replay-side information cannot recover it in general, and identify a structural class in which the target is identified from logged data.

</details>


### [331] [Optimizing LLM Prompt Engineering with DSPy Based Declarative Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04869)
*Shiek Ruksana,Sailesh Kiran Kurra,Thipparthi Sanjay Baradwaj*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: DSPy框架通过声明式学习自动优化LLM提示，提升事实准确性30-45%，降低幻觉率25%


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统提示工程依赖启发式试错，缺乏可扩展性、可重复性和跨任务泛化能力，需要系统化的自动优化方法

Method: 提出统一的DSPy LLM架构，结合符号规划、无梯度优化和自动模块重写，实现声明式提示优化，包括提示合成、校正、校准和自适应推理控制

Result: 在推理任务、检索增强生成和多步思维链基准测试中，输出可靠性、效率和泛化能力持续提升，事实准确性提高30-45%，幻觉率降低约25%

Conclusion: DSPy框架为LLM提示优化提供了有效的声明式学习方法，显著改善模型性能，但仍需进一步研究解决其局限性

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have shown strong performance across a wide range of natural language processing tasks; however, their effectiveness is highly dependent on prompt design, structure, and embedded reasoning signals. Conventional prompt engineering methods largely rely on heuristic trial-and-error processes, which limits scalability, reproducibility, and generalization across tasks. DSPy, a declarative framework for optimizing text-processing pipelines, offers an alternative approach by enabling automated, modular, and learnable prompt construction for LLM-based systems.This paper presents a systematic study of DSPy-based declarative learning for prompt optimization, with emphasis on prompt synthesis, correction, calibration, and adaptive reasoning control. We introduce a unified DSPy LLM architecture that combines symbolic planning, gradient free optimization, and automated module rewriting to reduce hallucinations, improve factual grounding, and avoid unnecessary prompt complexity. Experimental evaluations conducted on reasoning tasks, retrieval-augmented generation, and multi-step chain-of-thought benchmarks demonstrate consistent gains in output reliability, efficiency, and generalization across models. The results show improvements of up to 30 to 45% in factual accuracy and a reduction of approximately 25% in hallucination rates. Finally, we outline key limitations and discuss future research directions for declarative prompt optimization frameworks.

</details>


### [332] [Noise Immunity in In-Context Tabular Learning: An Empirical Robustness Analysis of TabPFN's Attention Mechanisms](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04868)
*James Hu,Mahdi Ghelichi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: TabPFN作为表格基础模型，在数据质量不佳（如无关特征、相关特征组、标签噪声）时表现出高度鲁棒性，通过注意力机制保持预测性能和内部一致性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 工业领域（金融、医疗）中表格预测普遍存在，但为每个新表格重新训练定制模型成本高或不可行，且数据质量问题（无关预测变量、相关特征组、标签噪声）常见。需要研究表格基础模型在这些次优条件下的鲁棒性。

Method: 研究TabPFN及其注意力机制在二元分类问题中的表现，使用受控合成扰动：1）通过注入随机不相关特征和非线性相关特征改变数据集宽度；2）增加训练行数改变数据集大小；3）增加错误标签比例改变标签质量。分析内部信号包括注意力集中度和基于注意力的特征排序指标。

Result: TabPFN表现出显著韧性：ROC-AUC保持高位，注意力保持结构化和锐利，信息丰富的特征通过基于注意力的指标获得高排名。注意力热图、特征-令牌嵌入和SHAP图的定性可视化进一步支持了TabPFN在各层中逐渐集中于有用特征并将其信号与噪声分离的一致模式。

Conclusion: TabPFN是一种鲁棒的表格基础模型，能够在各种数据缺陷场景下保持预测性能和连贯的内部行为，特别适用于工业领域中的表格预测任务。

Abstract: Tabular foundation models (TFMs) such as TabPFN (Tabular Prior-Data Fitted Network) are designed to generalize across heterogeneous tabular datasets through in-context learning (ICL). They perform prediction in a single forward pass conditioned on labeled examples without dataset-specific parameter updates. This paradigm is particularly attractive in industrial domains (e.g., finance and healthcare) where tabular prediction is pervasive. Retraining a bespoke model for each new table can be costly or infeasible in these settings, while data quality issues such as irrelevant predictors, correlated feature groups, and label noise are common. In this paper, we provide strong empirical evidence that TabPFN is highly robust under these sub-optimal conditions. We study TabPFN and its attention mechanisms for binary classification problems with controlled synthetic perturbations that vary: (i) dataset width by injecting random uncorrelated features and by introducing nonlinearly correlated features, (ii) dataset size by increasing the number of training rows, and (iii) label quality by increasing the fraction of mislabeled targets. Beyond predictive performance, we analyze internal signals including attention concentration and attention-based feature ranking metrics. Across these parametric tests, TabPFN is remarkably resilient: ROC-AUC remains high, attention stays structured and sharp, and informative features are highly ranked by attention-based metrics. Qualitative visualizations with attention heatmaps, feature-token embeddings, and SHAP plots further support a consistent pattern across layers in which TabPFN increasingly concentrates on useful features while separating their signals from noise. Together, these findings suggest that TabPFN is a robust TFM capable of maintaining both predictive performance and coherent internal behavior under various scenarios of data imperfections.

</details>


### [333] [FairLogue: A Toolkit for Intersectional Fairness Analysis in Clinical Machine Learning Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04858)
*Nick Souligne,Vignesh Subbian*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Fairlogue是一个用于医疗机器学习中交叉公平评估的Python工具包，包含观察性和反事实框架，在青光眼手术预测任务中识别出交叉群体比单轴分析更大的公平差距。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
