### [370] [Good Rankings, Wrong Probabilities: A Calibration Audit of Multimodal Cancer Survival Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04239)
*Sajad Ghawami*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该研究首次系统评估了多模态WSI-基因组学生存预测模型的校准性能，发现即使具有高C-index的模型也存在显著校准问题，提出校准评估对临床模型的重要性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管多模态深度学习模型在癌症生存预测中表现出色（C-index高），但其生存概率的校准性能尚未得到系统评估。校准对临床决策至关重要，因为不准确的概率估计可能导致错误的治疗决策。

Method: 研究进行了两个实验：实验A评估3个模型在TCGA-BRCA上的原生离散时间生存输出；实验B评估11种架构在5种TCGA癌症类型上通过Breslow重建的生存曲线。使用fold-level 1-calibration审计，采用Benjamini-Hochberg校正进行多重检验，并测试了Platt缩放的后处理校准方法。

Result: 实验A中所有3个模型在多数fold上未能通过1-calibration（15个fold级测试中12个拒绝原假设）。总共290个fold级测试中，166个在中位事件时间拒绝正确校准的原假设。MCAT在GBMLGG上C-index达0.817，但在所有5个fold上校准失败。门控融合与更好的校准相关，而双线性和拼接融合则不然。Platt缩放能减少校准错误而不影响判别性能。

Conclusion: 仅依赖一致性指数（C-index）不足以评估临床使用的生存模型。多模态生存模型普遍存在校准问题，需要系统校准评估和改进。门控融合和Platt缩放是改善校准的有效策略，校准性能应成为模型评估的关键指标。

Abstract: Multimodal deep learning models that fuse whole-slide histopathology images with genomic data have achieved strong discriminative performance for cancer survival prediction, as measured by the concordance index. Yet whether the survival probabilities derived from these models - either directly from native outputs or via standard post-hoc reconstruction - are calibrated remains largely unexamined.
  We conduct, to our knowledge, the first systematic fold-level 1-calibration audit of multimodal WSI-genomics survival architectures, evaluating native discrete-time survival outputs (Experiment A: 3 models on TCGA-BRCA) and Breslow-reconstructed survival curves from scalar risk scores (Experiment B: 11 architectures across 5 TCGA cancer types). In Experiment A, all three models fail 1-calibration on a majority of folds (12 of 15 fold-level tests reject after Benjamini-Hochberg correction). Across the full 290 fold-level tests, 166 reject the null of correct calibration at the median event time after Benjamini-Hochberg correction (FDR = 0.05). MCAT achieves C-index 0.817 on GBMLGG yet fails 1-calibration on all five folds.
  Gating-based fusion is associated with better calibration; bilinear and concatenation fusion are not. Post-hoc Platt scaling reduces miscalibration at the evaluated horizon (e.g., MCAT: 5/5 folds failing to 2/5) without affecting discrimination. The concordance index alone is insufficient for evaluating survival models intended for clinical use.

</details>


### [371] [Subspace Control: Turning Constrained Model Steering into Controllable Spectral Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04231)
*Yancheng Huang,Changsheng Wang,Chongyu Fan,Yicheng Lang,Bingqi Shang,Yang Zhang,Mingyi Hong,Qing Qu,Alvaro Velasquez,Sijia Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出SIFT框架，通过谱子空间控制解决基础模型定制化中的约束优化问题，有效缓解目标与约束间的干扰


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 基础模型（如大语言模型）在实际部署前需要定制化以满足安全、隐私等约束条件，但现有方法在解决这类约束优化问题时面临目标与约束间干扰的挑战

Method: 提出谱干扰无训练（SIFT）框架：1）从模型合并角度分析谱跨任务干扰产生机制，提出通过子空间正交化的一步解决方案；2）建立该方案与谱优化器Muon中梯度正交化的联系；3）引入局部化方案在优化过程中选择性干预，实现可控更新以缓解目标-约束冲突

Result: 在四个代表性应用（机器遗忘、安全对齐、文本到语音适应、幻觉缓解）中评估SIFT，相比基于控制和无控制的基线方法，SIFT在所有任务上都取得了显著且稳健的性能提升

Conclusion: SIFT框架通过谱子空间控制有效解决了基础模型约束优化中的目标-约束干扰问题，为模型定制化提供了可扩展且高效的解决方案

Abstract: Foundation models, such as large language models (LLMs), are powerful but often require customization before deployment to satisfy practical constraints such as safety, privacy, and task-specific requirements, leading to "constrained" optimization problems for model steering and adaptation. However, solving such problems remains largely underexplored and is particularly challenging due to interference between the primary objective and constraint objectives during optimization. In this paper, we propose a subspace control framework for constrained model training. Specifically, (i) we first analyze, from a model merging perspective, how spectral cross-task interference arises and show that it can be resolved via a one-shot solution that orthogonalizes the merged subspace; (ii) we establish a connection between this solution and gradient orthogonalization in the spectral optimizer Muon; and (iii) building on these insights, we introduce SIFT (spectral interference-free training), which leverages a localization scheme to selectively intervene during optimization, enabling controllable updates that mitigate objective-constraint conflicts. We evaluate SIFT across four representative applications: (a) machine unlearning, (b) safety alignment, (c) text-to-speech adaptation, and (d) hallucination mitigation. Compared to both control-based and control-free baselines, SIFT consistently achieves substantial and robust performance improvements across all tasks. Code is available at https://github.com/OPTML-Group/SIFT.

</details>


### [372] [Three Phases of Expert Routing: How Load Balance Evolves During Mixture-of-Experts Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04230)
*Charafeddine Mouzouni*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该研究将MoE令牌路由建模为拥塞博弈，引入有效拥塞系数γ_eff量化平衡-质量权衡，通过分析训练动态揭示MoE路由学习的三阶段轨迹：激增期、稳定期和松弛期。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究动机在于理解MoE模型中令牌路由的动态学习过程，特别是路由如何在训练过程中平衡负载分配与专家专业化质量之间的权衡，这一过程在收敛模型的静态分析中不可见。

Method: 将MoE令牌路由建模为拥塞博弈，引入有效拥塞系数γ_eff作为核心参数；分析OLMoE-1B-7B（20个检查点）和OpenMoE-8B（6个检查点）的训练动态；开发有效拥塞分解、多类型扩展和基于令牌聚类的负载预测改进方法；使用四种独立质量估计器进行鲁棒性验证。

Result: 发现MoE路由学习呈现三阶段轨迹：1）激增期（γ_eff:14→36-39）：路由学习负载平衡；2）稳定期（B_0:2.4→2.3）：专家在稳定平衡下专业化；3）松弛期（γ_eff:27→9）：路由为质量牺牲平衡。多类型扩展将负载预测平均提升30%，所有质量估计器相关性r≥0.89。

Conclusion: MoE训练早期优先考虑负载平衡，后期优先考虑质量优化；拥塞博弈框架揭示了温度缩放softmax的物理意义及其演化过程；该理论框架提供了理解MoE路由动态学习的新视角，而非替代现有预测方法。

Abstract: We model Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) token routing as a congestion game with a single effective parameter, the congestion coefficient gamma_eff, that quantifies the balance-quality tradeoff. Tracking gamma_eff across training checkpoints of two open-source MoE models, OLMoE-1B-7B (20 checkpoints, with dense sampling in the surge region) and OpenMoE-8B (6 checkpoints), reveals a three-phase trajectory: a surge phase where the router learns to balance load (gamma_eff: 14 to 36-39, peaking in the step 30K-40K region), a stabilization phase where experts specialize under steady balance (B_0: 2.4 to 2.3, steps 100K-400K), and a relaxation phase where the router trades balance for quality as experts differentiate (gamma_eff: 27 to 9, steps 400K-1.2M). This non-monotone trajectory, invisible to post-hoc analysis of converged models, reveals that early MoE training prioritizes balance while late training prioritizes quality. The theoretical framework is honest about its limits: the single-type equilibrium reduces to temperature-scaled softmax (held-out L1: MFG = 0.199 vs. softmax = 0.200). The game is not a better predictor; it reveals what the temperature means and, critically, how that temperature evolves. We complement the dynamics with an effective congestion decomposition, a multi-type extension that improves load prediction via token clustering on all 16 layers (mean: 30%), scope diagnostics (K/M, epsilon_l), and robustness verification across four independent quality estimators (r >= 0.89). All confidence intervals are from bootstrap resampling over 50 independent text batches.

</details>


### [373] [Learning-Based Multi-Criteria Decision Making Model for Sawmill Location Problems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04996)
*Mahid Ahmed,Ali Dogru,Chaoyang Zhang,Chao Meng*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出基于学习的多准则决策框架，结合机器学习与GIS空间分析，用于锯木厂选址优化，在密西西比州案例中识别出10-11%的高适宜区域。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 锯木厂选址对木材供应链的效率、盈利能力和可持续性至关重要，传统方法可能存在主观偏见，需要数据驱动、客观且可复现的选址评估方法。

Method: 提出LB-MCDM框架，集成机器学习与基于GIS的多准则决策分析。使用五种ML算法（随机森林、支持向量机、XGBoost、逻辑回归、K近邻）评估选址适宜性，并采用SHAP技术解释各准则的相对重要性。

Result: 随机森林分类器表现最佳，SHAP分析显示供需比（反映当地市场竞争动态）是最重要影响因素，其次是道路、铁路线和城市区域距离。模型验证表明密西西比州10-11%的土地高度适宜锯木厂选址。

Conclusion: LB-MCDM框架为锯木厂选址提供了数据驱动、客观且可复现的决策支持方法，能够有效识别高适宜区域，为木材供应链优化提供科学依据。

Abstract: Strategically locating a sawmill is vital for enhancing the efficiency, profitability, and sustainability of timber supply chains. Our study proposes a Learning-Based Multi-Criteria Decision-Making (LB-MCDM) framework that integrates machine learning (ML) with GIS-based spatial location analysis via MCDM. The proposed framework provides a data-driven, unbiased, and replicable approach to assessing site suitability. We demonstrate the utility of the proposed model through a case study in Mississippi (MS). We apply five ML algorithms (Random Forest Classifier, Support Vector Classifier, XGBoost Classifier, Logistic Regression, and K-Nearest Neighbors Classifier) to identify the most suitable sawmill locations in Mississippi. Among these models, the Random Forest Classifier achieved the highest performance. We use the SHAP (SHapley Additive exPlanations) technique to determine the relative importance of each criterion, revealing the Supply-Demand Ratio, a composite feature that reflects local market competition dynamics, as the most influential factor, followed by Road, Rail Line and Urban Area Distance. The validation of suitability maps generated by our LB-MCDM model suggests that 10-11% of the MS landscape is highly suitable for sawmill location.

</details>


### [374] [Which Leakage Types Matter?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04199)
*Simon Roth*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 通过28个受试内反事实实验和边界实验，系统评估了机器学习中四类数据泄漏的严重程度，发现教科书强调的归一化泄漏影响最小，而实际数据集大小下的选择泄漏影响最大。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统机器学习教材通常强调数据预处理阶段的数据泄漏风险（如归一化泄漏），但缺乏对不同类型数据泄漏严重程度的系统量化评估。本研究旨在通过大规模实验测量四类数据泄漏的实际影响，为实践提供实证指导。

Method: 采用28个受试内反事实实验设计，覆盖2,047个表格数据集，加上129个时间数据集的边界实验。系统测量了四类数据泄漏：I类（估计泄漏-在全数据上拟合缩放器）、II类（选择泄漏-窥探、种子挑选）、III类（记忆泄漏）、IV类（边界泄漏）。使用ΔAUC作为评估指标。

Result: I类泄漏影响可忽略：所有9种条件下|ΔAUC|≤0.005。II类泄漏影响显著：约90%的测量效应是噪声利用，会夸大报告分数。III类泄漏随模型容量增加：d_z从0.37（朴素贝叶斯）到1.11（决策树）。IV类泄漏在随机交叉验证下不可见。研究发现教科书强调的重点与实际影响相反。

Conclusion: 数据泄漏的严重程度与传统教科书强调的重点相反：归一化泄漏影响最小，而实际数据集大小下的选择泄漏影响最大。研究为机器学习实践提供了实证指导，强调需要特别关注选择泄漏和记忆泄漏，而非过度关注预处理阶段的泄漏风险。

Abstract: Twenty-eight within-subject counterfactual experiments across 2,047 tabular datasets, plus a boundary experiment on 129 temporal datasets, measuring the severity of four data leakage classes in machine learning. Class I (estimation - fitting scalers on full data) is negligible: all nine conditions produce $|Δ\text{AUC}| \leq 0.005$. Class II (selection - peeking, seed cherry-picking) is substantial: ~90% of the measured effect is noise exploitation that inflates reported scores. Class III (memorization) scales with model capacity: d_z = 0.37 (Naive Bayes) to 1.11 (Decision Tree). Class IV (boundary) is invisible under random CV. The textbook emphasis is inverted: normalization leakage matters least; selection leakage at practical dataset sizes matters most.

</details>


### [375] [Stable and Privacy-Preserving Synthetic Educational Data with Empirical Marginals: A Copula-Based Approach](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04195)
*Gabriel Diaz Ramos,Lorenzo Luzi,Debshila Basu Mallick,Richard Baraniuk*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: NPGC是一种非参数高斯Copula合成数据生成方法，用于在教育数据挖掘中保护隐私，通过经验统计锚定保持边际分布，避免深度学习方法的分布漂移问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在严格隐私保护法规框架下，教育数据挖掘需要既能进行数据分析又能保护学生敏感信息的方法。现有深度学习参数化生成方法会扭曲边际分布，在迭代再生中产生分布漂移和支持度损失，影响可靠性。

Method: 提出非参数高斯Copula（NPGC）方法，用经验统计锚定替代深度学习和参数优化，通过Copula框架建模依赖关系。集成差分隐私于边际和相关层面，支持异构变量类型，将缺失数据作为显式状态处理。

Result: 在五个基准数据集上评估显示，NPGC在多次再生循环中保持稳定，获得有竞争力的下游性能，且计算成本显著更低。在实际在线学习平台部署验证了其实用性。

Conclusion: NPGC为隐私保护研究提供了一种实用、稳定且计算高效的合成数据生成方法，特别适用于教育数据挖掘领域，能在保护隐私的同时保持数据统计特性。

Abstract: To advance Educational Data Mining (EDM) within strict privacy-protecting regulatory frameworks, researchers must develop methods that enable data-driven analysis while protecting sensitive student information. Synthetic data generation is one such approach, enabling the release of statistically generated samples instead of real student records; however, existing deep learning and parametric generators often distort marginal distributions and degrade under iterative regeneration, leading to distribution drift and progressive loss of distributional support that compromise reliability. In response, we introduce the Non-Parametric Gaussian Copula (NPGC), a plug-and-play synthesis method that replaces deep learning and parametric optimization with empirical statistical anchoring to preserve the observed marginal distributions while modeling dependencies through a copula framework. NPGC integrates Differential Privacy (DP) at both the marginal and correlation levels, supports heterogeneous variable types, and treats missing data as an explicit state to retain informative absence patterns. We evaluate NPGC against deep learning and parametric baselines on five benchmark datasets and demonstrate that it remains stable across multiple regeneration cycles and achieves competitive downstream performance at substantially lower computational cost. We further validate NPGC through deployment in a real-world online learning platform, demonstrating its practicality for privacy-preserving research.

</details>


### [376] [Uncertainty-Aware Foundation Models for Clinical Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04175)
*Qian Zhou,Yuanyun Zhang,Shi Li*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出不确定性感知的医疗基础模型框架，将患者表示为潜在状态分布而非点嵌入，以处理临床数据的不完整性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 临床观测本质不完整，反映对潜在生理状态的稀疏、不规则、模态依赖的测量，现有医疗基础模型主要遵循NLP和CV范式，强调大规模预训练和确定性表示，未能充分处理这种不完整性

Method: 提出不确定性感知基础模型框架：1) 将患者表示为潜在状态分布而非点嵌入；2) 学习集合值表示并强制同一患者不同部分视图间的一致性；3) 集成多模态编码器和可扩展自监督目标，结合重建、对比对齐和分布正则化

Result: 在多样化临床任务中，该方法相比强基线提升了预测性能、缺失数据下的鲁棒性以及不确定性校准

Conclusion: 建模未观测内容而不仅仅是已观测内容，构成了医疗基础模型的关键归纳偏置

Abstract: Healthcare foundation models have largely followed paradigms from natural language processing and computer vision, emphasizing large scale pretraining and deterministic representations over heterogeneous clinical data. However, clinical observations are inherently incomplete, reflecting sparse, irregular, and modality dependent measurements of an underlying physiologic state. In this work, we propose a framework for uncertainty aware foundation modeling that represents each patient not as a point embedding, but as a distribution over plausible latent states. By learning set valued representations and enforcing consistency across partial views of the same patient, the model captures what is invariantly inferable while explicitly encoding epistemic uncertainty. We integrate this formulation with multimodal encoders and scalable self supervised objectives, combining reconstruction, contrastive alignment, and distributional regularization. Across diverse clinical tasks, our approach improves predictive performance, robustness under missing data, and uncertainty calibration relative to strong baselines. These results suggest that modeling what is not observed rather than only what is constitutes a critical inductive bias for healthcare foundation models.

</details>


### [377] [The Geometric Alignment Tax: Tokenization vs. Continuous Geometry in Scientific Foundation Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04155)
*Prashant C. Raju*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 论文发现生物和物理基础模型在追求预测准确性的同时，其内部表示系统性地破坏了所建模系统的连续几何结构，根源在于"几何对齐税"——强制连续流形通过离散分类瓶颈的内在代价。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前生物和物理基础模型虽然优化了预测准确性，但其内部表示无法保持所建模系统的连续几何结构。这种几何失真限制了模型对底层物理和生物系统的理解能力，需要探究其根本原因和解决方案。

Method: 1) 在合成动力系统上进行受控消融实验，比较交叉熵损失与连续头部的效果；2) 使用率失真理论和MINE评估14个生物基础模型；3) 分析学习到的码书量化效果；4) 通过受控实验验证Evo 2模型的反向互补鲁棒性本质。

Result: 1) 在相同编码器上，用连续头部替换交叉熵可将几何失真减少8.5倍；2) 学习到的码书表现出非单调双重约束：更精细的量化会恶化几何结构，尽管改善了重建；3) 在连续目标下，三种架构差异为1.3倍，在离散标记化下差异达3000倍；4) 识别出三种失败机制：局部-全局解耦、表示压缩和几何空虚；5) Evo 2的反向互补鲁棒性反映了保守的序列组成，而非学习到的对称性；6) 没有模型能同时实现低失真、高互信息和全局一致性。

Conclusion: 基础模型中的离散分类瓶颈导致了"几何对齐税"，系统性地破坏了连续几何结构。当前方法无法同时保持几何完整性、信息内容和全局一致性，需要新的架构设计来克服这一根本限制。

Abstract: Foundation models for biology and physics optimize predictive accuracy, but their internal representations systematically fail to preserve the continuous geometry of the systems they model. We identify the root cause: the Geometric Alignment Tax, an intrinsic cost of forcing continuous manifolds through discrete categorical bottlenecks. Controlled ablations on synthetic dynamical systems demonstrate that replacing cross-entropy with a continuous head on an identical encoder reduces geometric distortion by up to 8.5x, while learned codebooks exhibit a non-monotonic double bind where finer quantization worsens geometry despite improving reconstruction. Under continuous objectives, three architectures differ by 1.3x; under discrete tokenization, they diverge by 3,000x. Evaluating 14 biological foundation models with rate-distortion theory and MINE, we identify three failure regimes: Local-Global Decoupling, Representational Compression, and Geometric Vacuity. A controlled experiment confirms that Evo 2's reverse-complement robustness on real DNA reflects conserved sequence composition, not learned symmetry. No model achieves simultaneously low distortion, high mutual information, and global coherence.

</details>


### [378] [Spectral Path Regression: Directional Chebyshev Harmonics for Interpretable Tabular Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04091)
*Milo Coombs*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出一种新的多元逼近方法，用方向谐波模式替代传统的张量积结构，通过选择少量结构化频率向量控制复杂度，实现紧凑、高效且可解释的回归模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统Chebyshev多项式等经典逼近基在多元情况下存在维度灾难问题，其张量积结构随维度指数增长，且轴对齐结构与实际表格数据不匹配。

Method: 使用方向谐波模式$\cos(\mathbf{m}^{\top}\arccos(\mathbf{x}))$替代张量化振荡，通过角空间中的方向而非坐标索引来组织多元结构。通过选择少量结构化频率向量（谱路径）控制复杂度，训练简化为单次闭式岭回归求解，无需迭代优化。

Result: 在标准连续特征表格回归基准测试中，该方法实现了与强非线性基线相当的准确性，同时保持模型紧凑、计算高效，并能通过解析表达式对学习到的特征交互进行显式解释。

Conclusion: 该方法成功解决了经典逼近基的维度灾难问题，提供了一种紧凑、高效且可解释的多元回归框架，在保持计算效率的同时实现了与复杂非线性模型相当的预测性能。

Abstract: Classical approximation bases such as Chebyshev polynomials provide principled and interpretable representations, but their multivariate tensor-product constructions scale exponentially with dimension and impose axis-aligned structure that is poorly matched to real tabular data. We address this by replacing tensorised oscillations with directional harmonic modes of the form $\cos(\mathbf{m}^{\top}\arccos(\mathbf{x}))$, which organise multivariate structure by direction in angular space rather than by coordinate index. This representation yields a discrete spectral regression model in which complexity is controlled by selecting a small number of structured frequency vectors (spectral paths), and training reduces to a single closed-form ridge solve with no iterative optimisation. Experiments on standard continuous-feature tabular regression benchmarks show that the resulting models achieve accuracy competitive with strong nonlinear baselines while remaining compact, computationally efficient, and explicitly interpretable through analytic expressions of learned feature interactions.

</details>


### [379] [Fine-grained Analysis of Stability and Generalization for Stochastic Bilevel Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04090)
*Xuelin Zhang,Hong Chen,Bin Gu,Tieliang Gong,Feng Zheng*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文对随机双层优化方法进行了系统性泛化分析，建立了参数稳定性与泛化误差之间的定量关系，并为单时间尺度和双时间尺度SGD方法在三种不同凸性设置下提供了泛化上界。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随机双层优化在机器学习中应用广泛，但其泛化保证在统计学习理论视角下研究不足。现有研究主要关注计算行为，而缺乏对泛化性能的系统性理论分析。

Method: 1) 建立平均参数稳定性与泛化误差之间的定量联系；2) 针对单时间尺度SGD和双时间尺度SGD，分别在非凸-非凸、凸-凸、强凸-强凸三种设置下推导平均参数稳定性的上界；3) 通过实验验证理论结果。

Result: 1) 成功建立了平均参数稳定性与泛化误差的定量关系；2) 推导出了三种不同凸性设置下单时间尺度和双时间尺度SGD的平均参数稳定性上界；3) 实验验证了理论发现的有效性。

Conclusion: 该研究为随机双层优化方法提供了系统的泛化理论分析框架，相比先前算法稳定性分析，不需要在每次迭代时重新初始化内层参数，且适用于更一般的目标函数，具有更好的理论普适性。

Abstract: Stochastic bilevel optimization (SBO) has been integrated into many machine learning paradigms recently, including hyperparameter optimization, meta learning, and reinforcement learning. Along with the wide range of applications, there have been numerous studies on the computational behavior of SBO. However, the generalization guarantees of SBO methods are far less understood from the lens of statistical learning theory. In this paper, we provide a systematic generalization analysis of the first-order gradient-based bilevel optimization methods. Firstly, we establish the quantitative connections between the on-average argument stability and the generalization gap of SBO methods. Then, we derive the upper bounds of on-average argument stability for single-timescale stochastic gradient descent (SGD) and two-timescale SGD, where three settings (nonconvex-nonconvex (NC-NC), convex-convex (C-C), and strongly-convex-strongly-convex (SC-SC)) are considered respectively. Experimental analysis validates our theoretical findings. Compared with the previous algorithmic stability analysis, our results do not require reinitializing the inner-level parameters at each iteration and are applicable to more general objective functions.

</details>


### [380] [ArrowFlow: Hierarchical Machine Learning in the Space of Permutations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04087)
*Ozgur Yilmaz*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: ArrowFlow是一种完全在排列空间中运行的机器学习架构，使用排序滤波器作为计算单元，通过置换矩阵累积进行非梯度更新，实现无需浮点参数的核心计算。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索一种根本不同的计算范式，将序数结构提升为一等公民，证明在无需梯度方法的情况下也能实现具有竞争力的分类性能，同时与整数专用和神经形态硬件自然对齐。

Method: 基于排列空间的架构，使用排序滤波器作为计算单元，通过Spearman's footrule距离比较输入，采用基于位移证据的置换矩阵累积进行非梯度更新。层次化组合：每层的输出排序成为下一层的输入，实现深度序数表示学习。

Result: 在UCI基准测试中，ArrowFlow在Iris数据集上表现最佳（2.7% vs. 3.3%），在大多数UCI数据集上具有竞争力。单个多项式度参数作为主开关：度1提供噪声鲁棒性（8-28%退化减少）、隐私保护（+0.5pp成本）和缺失特征弹性；更高度数以牺牲这些特性换取更好的干净准确率。

Conclusion: ArrowFlow证明了在根本不同的计算范式中实现竞争性分类的可能性，将序数结构提升为一等公民，与整数专用和神经形态硬件自然对齐。它不是为超越基于梯度的方法而设计，而是作为一种存在性证明。

Abstract: We introduce ArrowFlow, a machine learning architecture that operates entirely in the space of permutations. Its computational units are ranking filters, learned orderings that compare inputs via Spearman's footrule distance and update through permutation-matrix accumulation, a non-gradient rule rooted in displacement evidence. Layers compose hierarchically: each layer's output ranking becomes the next layer's input, enabling deep ordinal representation learning without any floating-point parameters in the core computation.
  We connect the architecture to Arrow's impossibility theorem, showing that violations of social-choice fairness axioms (context dependence, specialization, symmetry breaking) serve as inductive biases for nonlinearity, sparsity, and stability.
  Experiments span UCI tabular benchmarks, MNIST, gene expression cancer classification (TCGA), and preference data, all against GridSearchCV-tuned baselines. ArrowFlow beats all baselines on Iris (2.7% vs. 3.3%) and is competitive on most UCI datasets. A single parameter, polynomial degree, acts as a master switch: degree 1 yields noise robustness (8-28% less degradation), privacy preservation (+0.5pp cost), and missing-feature resilience; higher degrees trade these for improved clean accuracy.
  ArrowFlow is not designed to surpass gradient-based methods. It is an existence proof that competitive classification is possible in a fundamentally different computational paradigm, one that elevates ordinal structure to a first-class citizen, with natural alignment to integer-only and neuromorphic hardware.

</details>


### [381] [Can LLMs Learn to Reason Robustly under Noisy Supervision?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.03993)
*Shenzhi Yang,Guangcheng Zhu,Bowen Song,Sharon Li,Haobo Wang,Xing Zheng,Yingfan Ma,Zhongqi Chen,Weiqiang Wang,Gang Chen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文首次系统分析了RLVR中的噪声标签机制，区分了非活跃和活跃噪声标签，提出了基于早期正确性一致性的在线标签精炼方法，在多种噪声比例下显著提升了模型的鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: RLVR依赖大量完美标签进行训练，但实际应用中专家稀缺导致不可避免的噪声标签问题尚未得到充分研究。现有工作缺乏对RLVR中噪声标签机制的系统分析，特别是考虑到RLVR特有的基于rollout的条件机制。

Method: 1. 区分两种噪声标签：非活跃噪声标签（降低数据效率）和活跃噪声标签（被强化并可能导致模型偏向错误分布）。2. 发现早期正确性一致性现象：在训练早期，干净和噪声样本的准确率同步提升。3. 提出在线标签精炼（OLR）：当满足两个条件时（多数答案的rollout通过率呈正斜率，历史一致性稳定），用多数投票答案逐步修正潜在噪声标签。

Result: 在6个分布内数学推理基准（AIME24/25、AMC、MATH-500、Minerva、Olympiad）和3个分布外任务（ARC-c、GPQA-diamond、MMLU-pro）上评估。在0.1到0.9的噪声比例范围内，OLR在非活跃和活跃噪声标签设置下均显著提升鲁棒性：分布内基准平均提升3.6%到3.9%，分布外评估平均提升3.3%到4.6%。

Conclusion: RLVR中的噪声标签机制需要特别关注，区分活跃/非活跃噪声有助于理解其影响。早期正确性一致性现象为噪声标签修正提供了机会窗口。提出的OLR方法通过渐进式自我修正机制，在不同噪声比例和任务类型下均能有效提升模型鲁棒性。

Abstract: Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) effectively trains reasoning models that rely on abundant perfect labels, but its vulnerability to unavoidable noisy labels due to expert scarcity remains critically underexplored. In this work, we take the first step toward a systematic analysis of noisy label mechanisms in RLVR. In contrast to supervised classification, most RLVR algorithms incorporate a rollout-based condition: a label's influence on training is contingent on whether the current policy can generate rollouts that realize it, a property that naturally extends to noisy labels. Based on this observation, we distinguish two types of noise: inactive noisy labels, which reduce data efficiency, and active noisy labels, which are reinforced and risk skewing the model toward incorrect distributions. From experiments on training with noisy samples, we identify an Early Correctness Coherence phenomenon: although noisy samples begin to lag behind in later stages, accuracy on both clean and noisy samples increases similarly in early training. Motivated by this dynamic, we propose Online Label Refinement (OLR), which progressively corrects potentially noisy labels with majority-voted answers when two conditions hold: a positive slope in the majority answer's rollout pass rate and stable historical consistency across updates, enabling gradual self-correction as the policy improves. We evaluate OLR on six in-distribution mathematical reasoning benchmarks (AIME24/25, AMC, MATH-500, Minerva, and Olympiad) and three out-of-distribution tasks (ARC-c, GPQA-diamond, and MMLU-pro). Across noise ratios from 0.1 to 0.9, OLR consistently improves robustness under both inactive and active noisy-label settings, achieving average gains of 3.6% to 3.9% on in-distribution benchmarks and 3.3% to 4.6% on out-of-distribution evaluations.

</details>


### [382] [Autoencoder-Based Parameter Estimation for Superposed Multi-Component Damped Sinusoidal Signals](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.03985)
*Momoka Iida,Hayato Motohashi,Hirotaka Takahashi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出基于自编码器的多分量阻尼正弦信号参数估计方法，在噪声环境下准确估计频率、相位、衰减时间和振幅等参数


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 阻尼正弦振荡广泛存在于物理系统中，但信号快速衰减、多分量叠加和观测噪声使得参数估计困难，需要开发鲁棒的分析方法

Method: 使用自编码器方法，通过潜在空间估计噪声多分量阻尼正弦信号的频率、相位、衰减时间和振幅，比较高斯分布和均匀分布训练数据的影响

Result: 该方法在挑战性场景下（如次主导分量或相位接近相反的成分）仍能高精度估计参数，对训练分布变化保持合理鲁棒性

Conclusion: 该方法为分析短时、噪声信号提供了有效工具，展示了在复杂物理系统参数估计中的潜力

Abstract: Damped sinusoidal oscillations are widely observed in many physical systems, and their analysis provides access to underlying physical properties. However, parameter estimation becomes difficult when the signal decays rapidly, multiple components are superposed, and observational noise is present. In this study, we develop an autoencoder-based method that uses the latent space to estimate the frequency, phase, decay time, and amplitude of each component in noisy multi-component damped sinusoidal signals. We investigate multi-component cases under Gaussian-distribution training and further examine the effect of the training-data distribution through comparisons between Gaussian and uniform training. The performance is evaluated through waveform reconstruction and parameter-estimation accuracy. We find that the proposed method can estimate the parameters with high accuracy even in challenging setups, such as those involving a subdominant component or nearly opposite-phase components, while remaining reasonably robust when the training distribution is less informative. This demonstrates its potential as a tool for analyzing short-duration, noisy signals.

</details>


### [383] [BWTA: Accurate and Efficient Binarized Transformer by Algorithm-Hardware Co-design](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.03957)
*Yifu Ding,Xianglong Liu,Shenghao Jin,Jinyang Guo,Jiwen Lu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出BWTA量化方案（二值权重+三值激活），结合平滑多阶段量化训练和优化的CUDA内核，实现超低位量化Transformer模型的高精度和高效推理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 超低位量化虽然能大幅提升Transformer模型的效率，但存在精度下降和GPU支持有限的问题，阻碍了其广泛应用。需要解决零值点失真问题并开发高效的推理实现。

Method: 1. BWTA量化方案：二值化权重+三值化激活，将微小值投影为零以保持精度；2. 平滑多阶段量化训练：结合层级退化策略和幅度对齐投影因子实现稳定快速收敛；3. 优化的CUDA内核：指令级并行比特打包，为线性和注意力算子提供全面的二值/三值矩阵乘法实现。

Result: BERT模型接近全精度性能（GLUE平均下降3.5%，5个任务下降小于2%），LLM获得可比的困惑度和准确率。效率方面：内核级比FP16快16-24倍，LLM端到端预填充速度达216-330 tokens/s，内存占用更低。

Conclusion: BWTA作为算法-硬件协同设计，在不牺牲模型质量的前提下，实现了实用、低延迟的超低位推理，为Transformer模型的高效部署提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: Ultra low-bit quantization brings substantial efficiency for Transformer-based models, but the accuracy degradation and limited GPU support hinder its wide usage. In this paper, we analyze zero-point distortion in binarization and propose a Binary Weights & Ternary Activations (BWTA) quantization scheme, which projects tiny values to zero and preserves the accuracy of extremely low-bit models. For training, we propose Smooth Multi-Stage Quantization, combining a Levelwise Degradation Strategy and a Magnitude-Alignment Projection Factor to enable stable and fast convergence. For inference, we develop a BWTA MatMul CUDA kernel with instruction-level parallel bit-packing and comprehensive binary/ternary MatMul implementations for both linear and attention operators, allowing seamless integration across Transformer architectures. Experiments show that BWTA approaches full-precision performance for BERT, with an average 3.5% drop on GLUE and less than 2% drop on five tasks, and achieves comparable perplexity and accuracy for LLMs. In efficiency, it delivers 16 to 24 times kernel-level speedup over FP16 on NVIDIA GPUs, and 216 to 330 tokens/s end-to-end prefill speedup with lower memory footprint on LLMs. As an algorithm-hardware co-design, BWTA demonstrates practical, low-latency ultra-low-bit inference without sacrificing model quality.

</details>


### [384] [Diagonal-Tiled Mixed-Precision Attention for Efficient Low-Bit MXFP Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.03950)
*Yifu Ding,Xinhao Zhang,Jinyang Guo*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出一种基于MXFP数据格式的低比特混合精度注意力核(DMA)，通过两种低比特计算和Triton实现的融合核，在B200 GPU上实现高效推理且保持模型性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Transformer大语言模型的推理成本过高，主要由于注意力机制的二次复杂度和高精度操作的内存带宽限制，需要开发高效的推理方法。

Method: 使用微缩放浮点(MXFP)数据格式，提出对角线分块混合精度注意力核(DMA)，在分块级别集成两种低比特计算，通过Triton实现硬件级并行和内存效率优化的融合核。

Result: 在NVIDIA B200 GPU上的实验表明，该核在保持生成质量（性能下降可忽略）的同时，通过核融合实现了显著的加速。

Conclusion: DMA注意力核利用下一代GPU架构的计算能力，通过低比特混合精度计算和硬件优化，为大语言模型提供了高效推理解决方案。

Abstract: Transformer-based large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable performance across a wide range of real-world tasks, but their inference cost remains prohibitively high due to the quadratic complexity of attention and the memory bandwidth limitations of high-precision operations. In this work, we present a low-bit mixed-precision attention kernel using the microscaling floating-point (MXFP) data format, utilizing the computing capability on next-generation GPU architectures. Our Diagonal-Tiled Mixed-Precision Attention (DMA) incorporates two kinds of low-bit computation at the tiling-level, and is a delicate fused kernel implemented using Triton, exploiting hardware-level parallelism and memory efficiency to enable fast and efficient inference without compromising model performance. Extensive empirical evaluations on NVIDIA B200 GPUs show that our kernel maintains generation quality with negligible degradation, and meanwhile achieves significant speedup by kernel fusion. We release our code at https://github.com/yifu-ding/MP-Sparse-Attn.

</details>


### [385] [Cactus: Accelerating Auto-Regressive Decoding with Constrained Acceptance Speculative Sampling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04987)
*Yongchang Hao,Lili Mou*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出Cactus方法，通过约束优化框架改进推测采样，在保证与验证器分布可控偏差的同时提高接受率


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统推测采样严格匹配验证器分布过于限制，而典型接受采样使用启发式方法会扭曲分布质量。需要一种既能提高接受率又能控制分布偏差的方法。

Method: 从约束优化角度形式化推测采样算法，提出Cactus（约束接受推测采样）方法，保证与验证器分布的可控偏差并提高接受率。

Result: 在广泛基准测试中验证了方法的有效性，实现了更高的接受率同时保持输出质量。

Conclusion: Cactus通过约束优化框架改进了推测采样，在保证分布质量的同时提高了解码效率，为加速自回归大语言模型提供了更优方案。

Abstract: Speculative sampling (SpS) has been successful in accelerating the decoding throughput of auto-regressive large language models by leveraging smaller draft models. SpS strictly enforces the generated distribution to match that of the verifier LLM. This is unnecessarily restrictive as slight variations of the verifier's distribution, such as sampling with top-$k$ or temperature, would also be acceptable. Typical acceptance sampling (TAS) alleviates this issue by accepting more tokens using entropy-based heuristics. However, this approach distorts the verifier distribution, potentially degrading output quality when the verifier encodes critical information. In this work, we formalize the speculative sampling algorithm through the lens of constrained optimization. Based on this formulation, we propose Cactus (constrained acceptance speculative sampling), a method that guarantees controlled divergence from the verifier distribution and increasing acceptance rates. Empirical results across a wide range of benchmarks confirm the effectiveness of our approach.

</details>


### [386] [Enhancing sample efficiency in reinforcement-learning-based flow control: replacing the critic with an adaptive reduced-order model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04986)
*Zesheng Yao,Zhen-Hua Wan,Canjun Yang,Qingchao Xia,Mengqi Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出一种基于自适应降阶模型(ROM)的强化学习框架，用于主动流动控制，通过ROM提供梯度信息来改善模型无关深度强化学习的样本效率问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 模型无关深度强化学习方法存在样本效率低的问题，这限制了其在流动控制等复杂物理系统中的应用。需要开发能够利用物理知识并减少数据需求的控制方法。

Method: 提出自适应ROM强化学习框架：1) 设计包含物理洞察的ROM结构，结合线性动力系统和神经常微分方程(NODE)估计流动非线性；2) 通过算子推断识别线性参数，数据驱动训练NODE；3) 在控制器-环境交互中持续更新ROM；4) 通过ROM的可微分仿真优化控制器。

Result: 在两个典型流动控制问题上验证：1) Blasius边界层流动中，方法简化为单次系统辨识和控制器优化，性能优于传统线性设计，与DRL方法相当但数据需求极少；2) 方柱绕流中，相比DRL方法，用显著更少的探索数据实现了更好的减阻效果。

Conclusion: 该方法解决了模型无关DRL控制算法的关键组件问题，为设计更样本高效的基于DRL的主动流动控制器奠定了基础，通过结合物理模型和数据驱动方法实现了更好的数据效率。

Abstract: Model-free deep reinforcement learning (DRL) methods suffer from poor sample efficiency. To overcome this limitation, this work introduces an adaptive reduced-order-model (ROM)-based reinforcement learning framework for active flow control. In contrast to conventional actor--critic architectures, the proposed approach leverages a ROM to estimate the gradient information required for controller optimization. The design of the ROM structure incorporates physical insights. The ROM integrates a linear dynamical system and a neural ordinary differential equation (NODE) for estimating the nonlinearity in the flow. The parameters of the linear component are identified via operator inference, while the NODE is trained in a data-driven manner using gradient-based optimization. During controller--environment interactions, the ROM is continuously updated with newly collected data, enabling adaptive refinement of the model. The controller is then optimized through differentiable simulation of the ROM. The proposed ROM-based DRL framework is validated on two canonical flow control problems: Blasius boundary layer flow and flow past a square cylinder. For the Blasius boundary layer, the proposed method effectively reduces to a single-episode system identification and controller optimization process, yet it yields controllers that outperform traditional linear designs and achieve performance comparable to DRL approaches with minimal data. For the flow past a square cylinder, the proposed method achieves superior drag reduction with significantly fewer exploration data compared with DRL approaches. The work addresses a key component of model-free DRL control algorithms and lays the foundation for designing more sample-efficient DRL-based active flow controllers.

</details>


### [387] [ACES: Who Tests the Tests? Leave-One-Out AUC Consistency for Code Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.03922)
*Hui Sun,Yun-Ji Zhang,Zheng Xie,Ren-Biao Liu,Yali Du,Xin-Ye Li,Ming Li*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出ACES方法，通过留一法评估测试质量，打破代码生成中测试正确性与代码正确性的循环依赖问题，实现更准确的代码选择。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在LLM生成的代码选择中，使用LLM生成的测试存在挑战，因为测试本身可能不正确。现有方法要么平等对待所有测试，要么依赖启发式方法过滤不可靠测试，但确定测试正确性需要知道哪些代码正确，形成循环依赖。

Method: 提出ACES方法，核心思想是测试投票应该排名而非计数。通过留一法评估：保留一个测试，用其他测试的聚合分数对代码排名，然后测量保留测试的通过/失败模式是否与这个排名一致。将这种一致性形式化为留一法AUC(LOO-AUC)，并证明其期望值与每个测试区分正确代码和错误代码的能力成正比。提出ACES-C（闭式权重）和ACES-O（迭代优化）两个变体。

Result: 在多个代码生成基准测试中实现了最先进的Pass@k性能，仅使用二进制通过矩阵且开销可忽略。

Conclusion: ACES方法通过将测试评估从计数转向排名，有效解决了代码生成中测试可靠性的循环依赖问题，为LLM生成的代码选择提供了理论基础和实用工具。

Abstract: Selecting LLM-generated code candidates using LLM-generated tests is challenging because the tests themselves may be incorrect. Existing methods either treat all tests equally or rely on ad-hoc heuristics to filter unreliable tests. Yet determining test correctness requires knowing which codes are correct, creating a \emph{circular dependency}. Our key insight is that we need not determine test correctness at all: \emph{test votes should rank, not merely count}. What matters is not how many codes pass a test, but whether the test can \emph{distinguish} correct from incorrect code. We break the circular dependency via leave-one-out evaluation: hold out one test, rank codes by their aggregate scores on all remaining tests, and measure whether the held-out test's pass/fail pattern agrees with this ranking. We formalize this agreement as the leave-one-out AUC~(LOO-AUC) and prove that the expected LOO-AUC is proportional to each test's ability to separate correct code from incorrect code. Building on this, we propose \textbf{ACES}~(\textbf{A}UC \textbf{C}onsist\textbf{E}ncy \textbf{S}coring) with two complementary variants: ACES-C provides closed-form weights that provably approximate the oracle in expectation under a mild assumption on average test quality; ACES-O drops this assumption and iteratively optimizes a differentiable LOO-AUC objective. Both operate solely on the binary pass matrix with negligible overhead, and achieve state-of-the-art Pass@$k$ on multiple code generation benchmarks.

</details>


### [388] [Align Your Structures: Generating Trajectories with Structure Pretraining for Molecular Dynamics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.03911)
*Aniketh Iyengar,Jiaqi Han,Pengwei Sun,Mingjian Jiang,Jianwen Xie,Stefano Ermon*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种利用结构预训练生成分子动力学轨迹的新框架，通过扩散模型生成结构，再通过插值器模块确保时间一致性，有效解决了MD数据稀缺和高维建模的挑战。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 分子动力学轨迹生成面临两个主要挑战：1) MD轨迹数据稀缺，难以训练深度生成模型；2) 高维MD分布建模复杂。现有方法难以同时解决数据稀缺和建模复杂性。

Method: 提出两阶段框架：1) 在大规模构象数据集上训练基于扩散的结构生成模型；2) 在MD轨迹数据上训练插值器模块，确保生成结构的时间一致性。该方法将复杂MD建模分解为结构生成和时间对齐两个可管理子问题。

Result: 在QM9和DRUGS小分子数据集上进行了无条件生成、正向模拟和插值任务的全面评估，并扩展到四肽和蛋白质单体系统。实验结果显示，该方法在几何、动力学和能量测量方面均表现出显著精度提升，能够生成化学真实的MD轨迹。

Conclusion: 通过利用丰富的结构数据缓解MD轨迹数据稀缺问题，并将复杂MD建模任务分解为结构生成和时间对齐两个子问题，该框架能够有效生成高质量的分子动力学轨迹，为MD模拟提供了新的生成方法。

Abstract: Generating molecular dynamics (MD) trajectories using deep generative models has attracted increasing attention, yet remains inherently challenging due to the limited availability of MD data and the complexities involved in modeling high-dimensional MD distributions. To overcome these challenges, we propose a novel framework that leverages structure pretraining for MD trajectory generation. Specifically, we first train a diffusion-based structure generation model on a large-scale conformer dataset, on top of which we introduce an interpolator module trained on MD trajectory data, designed to enforce temporal consistency among generated structures. Our approach effectively harnesses abundant structural data to mitigate the scarcity of MD trajectory data and effectively decomposes the intricate MD modeling task into two manageable subproblems: structural generation and temporal alignment. We comprehensively evaluate our method on the QM9 and DRUGS small-molecule datasets across unconditional generation, forward simulation, and interpolation tasks, and further extend our framework and analysis to tetrapeptide and protein monomer systems. Experimental results confirm that our approach excels in generating chemically realistic MD trajectories, as evidenced by remarkable improvements of accuracy in geometric, dynamical, and energetic measurements.

</details>


### [389] [Improving Model Performance by Adapting the KGE Metric to Account for System Non-Stationarity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.03906)
*M Jawad,HV Gupta,YH Wang,MA Farmani,A Behrangi,GY Niu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出JKGE_ss指标用于检测和考虑水文数据中的动态非平稳性，相比传统NSE和KGE_ss指标能更好地评估模型在变化条件下的性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 地球科学系统存在显著的时间非平稳性（季节和气候变化、自然和人为土地利用变化），传统模型评估指标基于统计平稳性假设，无法适应变化条件，可能导致模型性能评估误导

Method: 开发JKGE_ss指标（基于KGE_ss改进），强调系统存储时间变化的再现，而非使用长期均值作为基准；在不同水文气候条件下（降水主导、积雪主导、强干旱）测试物理概念和数据驱动模型

Result: JKGE_ss在所有测试情况下都改善了系统时间动态的再现，涵盖所有时间尺度、干湿年份以及全流量范围（特别是退水期），优于传统指标

Conclusion: 由于传统指标无法充分处理系统动态的时间变化，建议在地球科学模型开发中采用JKGE_ss指标，以更准确地评估变化条件下的模型性能

Abstract: Geoscientific systems tend to be characterized by pronounced temporal non-stationarity, arising from seasonal and climatic variability in hydrometeorological drivers, and from natural and anthropogenic changes to land use and cover. As has been pointed out, such variability renders "the assumption of statistical stationarity obsolete in water management", and requires us to "account for, rather than ignore, non-stationary trends" in the data. However, metrics used for model development are typically based on the implicit and unjustifiable assumption that the data generating process is time-stationary.
  Here, we introduce the JKGE_ss metric (adapted from KGE_ss) that detects and accounts for dynamical non-stationarity in the statistical properties of the data and thereby improves information extraction and model performance. Unlike NSE and KGE_ss, which use the long-term mean as a benchmark against which to evaluate model efficiency, JKGE_ss emphasizes reproduction of temporal variations in system storage.
  We tested the robustness of the new metric by training physical-conceptual and data-based catchment-scale models of varying complexity across a wide range of hydroclimatic conditions, from recent-precipitation-dominated to snow-dominated to strongly arid. In all cases, the result was improved reproduction of system temporal dynamics at all time scales, across wet to dry years, and over the full range of flow levels (especially recession periods).
  Since traditional metrics fail to adequately account for temporal shifts in system dynamics, potentially resulting in misleading assessments of model performance under changing conditions, we recommend the adoption of JKGE_ss for geoscientific model development.

</details>


### [390] [Territory Paint Wars: Diagnosing and Mitigating Failure Modes in Competitive Multi-Agent PPO](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04983)
*Diyansha Singh*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文介绍了Territory Paint Wars——一个基于Unity的竞争性多智能体强化学习环境，用于系统研究PPO在自对弈中的失效模式，发现了五种实现层面的失效模式，并揭示了竞争性过拟合现象，提出了对手混合策略来缓解该问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究动机是系统性地调查近端策略优化（PPO）在自对弈竞争性多智能体强化学习环境中的失效模式。当前缺乏能够复现和系统研究这些失效模式的基准环境，特别是在对称零和游戏设置下。

Method: 方法包括：1）开发Territory Paint Wars——一个最小化的竞争性多智能体强化学习Unity环境；2）在对称零和游戏设置中训练PPO智能体；3）通过控制性消融实验识别五种实现层面的失效模式；4）发现并分析竞争性过拟合现象；5）提出对手混合策略作为干预措施。

Result: 结果发现：1）初始训练84,000回合的智能体对均匀随机对手仅获得26.8%胜率；2）识别出五种关键失效模式：奖励尺度不平衡、缺失终止信号、无效的长时程信用分配、未归一化的观测、错误的胜利检测；3）修正后发现了竞争性过拟合现象——自对弈性能稳定但泛化胜率从73.5%崩溃至21.6%；4）对手混合策略（20%训练回合使用固定随机策略）将泛化胜率恢复至77.1%（±12.6%，10个种子）。

Conclusion: 结论是：1）PPO在竞争性自对弈中存在多种实现层面的失效模式；2）竞争性过拟合是一种隐蔽的失效模式，无法通过标准自对弈指标检测；3）对手混合策略是缓解竞争性过拟合的有效最小干预方法；4）Territory Paint Wars为研究竞争性MARL失效模式提供了可复现的基准。

Abstract: We present Territory Paint Wars, a minimal competitive multi-agent reinforcement learning environment implemented in Unity, and use it to systematically investigate failure modes of Proximal Policy Optimisation (PPO) under self-play. A first agent trained for $84{,}000$ episodes achieves only $26.8\%$ win rate against a uniformly-random opponent in a symmetric zero-sum game. Through controlled ablations we identify five implementation-level failure modes -- reward-scale imbalance, missing terminal signal, ineffective long-horizon credit assignment, unnormalised observations, and incorrect win detection -- each of which contributes critically to this failure in this setting.
  After correcting these issues, we uncover a distinct emergent pathology: competitive overfitting, where co-adapting agents maintain stable self-play performance while generalisation win rate collapses from $73.5\%$ to $21.6\%$. Critically, this failure is undetectable via standard self-play metrics: both agents co-adapt equally, so the self-play win rate remains near $50\%$ throughout the collapse.
  We propose a minimal intervention -- opponent mixing, where $20\%$ of training episodes substitute a fixed uniformly-random policy for the co-adaptive opponent -- which mitigates competitive overfitting and restores generalisation to $77.1\%$ ($\pm 12.6\%$, $10$ seeds) without population-based training or additional infrastructure. We open-source Territory Paint Wars to provide a reproducible benchmark for studying competitive MARL failure modes.

</details>


### [391] [Provable Multi-Task Reinforcement Learning: A Representation Learning Framework with Low Rank Rewards](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.03891)
*Yaoze Guo,Shana Moothedath*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种用于多任务强化学习的低秩矩阵估计方法，通过奖励无关的强化学习框架学习数据收集策略，在更一般的特征分布假设下实现准确的低秩矩阵恢复，从而学习共享表示并构建近似最优策略。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多任务表示学习（MTRL）通过跨相关任务学习共享潜在表示来提高学习效率。然而，在多任务强化学习（RL）中，由于数据的复杂性和策略依赖性导致误差的时间累积，学习共享表示具有挑战性。现有方法依赖于高斯特征、不相干条件或最优解访问等限制性假设，需要一种在更一般的RL特征分布下有效的方法。

Method: 采用奖励无关的强化学习框架，首先学习数据收集策略，该策略指导探索策略以估计未知的奖励矩阵。提出一种低秩矩阵估计方法，在更一般的特征分布假设下操作，不依赖现有方法的限制性假设。通过理论分析建立低秩矩阵恢复的可行性，并表征表示误差与样本复杂度之间的关系。

Result: 理论分析表明，在放宽的假设下可以实现准确的低秩矩阵恢复。利用学习到的表示构建近似最优策略，并证明了遗憾界。实验结果表明，该方法能够从有限数据中有效学习鲁棒的共享表示和任务动态。

Conclusion: 该方法在多任务强化学习中成功实现了共享表示学习，克服了现有方法的限制性假设，在更一般的特征分布条件下实现了准确的低秩矩阵恢复和近似最优策略学习，为多任务强化学习中的表示学习提供了更通用的解决方案。

Abstract: Multi-task representation learning (MTRL) is an approach that learns shared latent representations across related tasks, facilitating collaborative learning that improves the overall learning efficiency. This paper studies MTRL for multi-task reinforcement learning (RL), where multiple tasks have the same state-action space and transition probabilities, but different rewards. We consider T linear Markov Decision Processes (MDPs) where the reward functions and transition dynamics admit linear feature embeddings of dimension d. The relatedness among the tasks is captured by a low-rank structure on the reward matrices. Learning shared representations across multiple RL tasks is challenging due to the complex and policy-dependent nature of data that leads to a temporal progression of error. Our approach adopts a reward-free reinforcement learning framework to first learn a data-collection policy. This policy then informs an exploration strategy for estimating the unknown reward matrices. Importantly, the data collected under this well-designed policy enable accurate estimation, which ultimately supports the learning of an near-optimal policy. Unlike existing approaches that rely on restrictive assumptions such as Gaussian features, incoherence conditions, or access to optimal solutions, we propose a low-rank matrix estimation method that operates under more general feature distributions encountered in RL settings. Theoretical analysis establishes that accurate low-rank matrix recovery is achievable under these relaxed assumptions, and we characterize the relationship between representation error and sample complexity. Leveraging the learned representation, we construct near-optimal policies and prove a regret bound. Experimental results demonstrate that our method effectively learns robust shared representations and task dynamics from finite data.

</details>


### [392] [Regime-Calibrated Demand Priors for Ride-Hailing Fleet Dispatch and Repositioning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.03883)
*Indar Kumar,Akanksha Tiwari*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出一种基于需求机制校准的网约车调度方法，通过历史行程数据分段、相似性匹配和校准需求先验，显著减少乘客等待时间


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 网约车调度需要准确预测随时间、星期、季节和特殊事件变化的需求模式，传统方法难以适应这种高度变化的需求模式

Method: 采用机制校准方法：1) 将历史行程数据分段为需求机制；2) 通过Kolmogorov-Smirnov距离、Wasserstein-1距离、特征距离、方差比、事件模式相似性和时间邻近度组成的相似性集成，匹配当前运营时段与最相似的历史类比；3) 使用校准后的需求先验驱动基于线性规划的车辆重新定位策略和匈牙利匹配的批量调度

Result: 在520万次纽约TLC行程的8种不同场景评估中，平均等待时间减少31.1%，P95等待时间减少37.6%，等待时间基尼系数从0.441改善到0.409；校准贡献16.9%减少，LP重新定位贡献15.5%；方法无需训练，具有确定性，可解释，可泛化到芝加哥（减少23.3%），且在不同车队规模下稳健

Conclusion: 提出的机制校准调度方法能有效减少乘客等待时间，提高调度效率，具有无需训练、确定性、可解释、可泛化和稳健性等优势，为网约车调度提供了一种有效的解决方案

Abstract: Effective ride-hailing dispatch requires anticipating demand patterns that vary substantially across time-of-day, day-of-week, season, and special events. We propose a regime-calibrated approach that (i) segments historical trip data into demand regimes, (ii) matches the current operating period to the most similar historical analogues via a similarity ensemble combining Kolmogorov-Smirnov distance, Wasserstein-1 distance, feature distance, variance ratio, event pattern similarity, and temporal proximity, and (iii) uses the resulting calibrated demand prior to drive both an LP-based fleet repositioning policy and batch dispatch with Hungarian matching. In ablation, a distributional-only metric subset achieves the strongest mean-wait reduction, while the full ensemble is retained as a robustness-oriented default that preserves calendar and event context.
  Evaluated on 5.2 million NYC TLC trips across 8 diverse scenarios (winter/summer, weekday/weekend/holiday, morning/evening/night) with 5 random seeds each, our method reduces mean rider wait times by 31.1% (bootstrap 95% CI: [26.5, 36.6]; Friedman chi-squared = 80.0, p = 4.25e-18; Cohen's d = 7.5-29.9). P95 wait drops 37.6% and the Gini coefficient of wait times improves from 0.441 to 0.409. The two contributions compose multiplicatively: calibration provides 16.9% reduction relative to the replay baseline; LP repositioning adds a further 15.5%. The approach requires no training, is deterministic and explainable, generalizes to Chicago (23.3% wait reduction using the NYC-built regime library without retraining), and is robust across fleet sizes (32-47% improvement for 0.5x-2.0x fleet scaling). Code is available at https://github.com/IndarKarhana/regime-calibrated-dispatch.

</details>


### [393] [Spatiotemporal Interpolation of GEDI Biomass with Calibrated Uncertainty](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.03874)
*Robin Young,Srinivasan Keshav*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该研究扩展了注意力神经过程框架，利用地理空间基础模型嵌入，解决GEDI激光雷达数据在时空上的不连续覆盖问题，特别是填补时间空白并产生校准良好的不确定性估计。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: NASA的GEDI激光雷达系统提供可靠的地上生物量密度数据，但其轨道采样导致时空覆盖不规则，且存在长时间观测空白（如2023-2024年的13个月休眠期）。现有机器学习方法主要填补空间空白，但时间插值特别是跨越干扰事件期间的问题尚未解决，且传统集成方法产生系统性校准错误的预测区间。

Method: 扩展注意力神经过程框架，将其应用于联合稀疏时空设置，使用地理空间基础模型嵌入。将空间和时间对称处理，实证验证"空间换时间"替代形式，即利用其他时间邻近位置的观测来预测缺失时段。

Result: ANP方法在干扰机制下产生校准良好的不确定性估计，支持其在需要可靠不确定性量化的森林碳核算测量、报告和验证应用中的使用。

Conclusion: 扩展的ANP框架能够有效填补GEDI数据的时间空白，提供校准良好的不确定性估计，为森林碳核算的测量、报告和验证应用提供了可靠工具，解决了时空覆盖不连续和不确定性量化问题。

Abstract: Monitoring deforestation-driven carbon emissions requires both spatially explicit and temporally continuous estimates of aboveground biomass density (AGBD) with calibrated uncertainty. NASA's Global Ecosystem Dynamics Investigation (GEDI) provides reliable LIDAR-derived AGBD, but its orbital sampling causes irregular spatiotemporal coverage, and occasional operational interruptions, including a 13-month hibernation from March 2023 to April 2024, leave extended gaps in the observational record. Prior work has used machine learning approaches to fill GEDI's spatial gaps using satellite-derived features, but temporal interpolation of biomass through unobserved periods, particularly across active disturbance events, remains largely unaddressed. Moreover, standard ensemble methods for biomass mapping have been shown to produce systematically miscalibrated prediction intervals. To address these gaps, we extend the Attentive Neural Process (ANP) framework, previously applied to spatial biomass interpolation, to jointly sparse spatiotemporal settings using geospatial foundation model embeddings. We treat space and time symmetrically, empirically validating a form of space-for-time substitution in which observations from nearby locations at other times inform predictions at held-out periods. Our results demonstrate that the ANP produces well-calibrated uncertainty estimates across disturbance regimes, supporting its use in Measurement, Reporting, and Verification (MRV) applications that require reliable uncertainty quantification for forest carbon accounting.

</details>


### [394] [SODA: Semi On-Policy Black-Box Distillation for Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.03873)
*Xiwen Chen,Jingjing Wang,Wenhui Zhu,Peijie Qiu,Xuanzhao Dong,Hejian Sang,Zhipeng Wang,Alborz Geramifard,Feng Luo*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: SODA是一种高效的黑盒知识蒸馏方法，通过半在线策略利用教师模型的最优响应与学生模型的静态次优输出构建对比信号，避免了传统方法的训练不稳定性和高计算开销。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有黑盒知识蒸馏方法存在严格权衡：简单的离线策略方法无法纠正学生模型的固有错误，而完全在线策略方法虽然能解决这个问题，但引入了训练不稳定性和巨大的计算开销。需要一种既能有效对齐分布又高效稳定的方法。

Method: 提出SODA（半在线对齐蒸馏），利用前沿教师模型与小型基础模型之间的能力差距。由于学生模型的零样本响应几乎严格劣于教师模型的最优响应，只需将教师的最优响应与学生模型的一次性静态输出快照配对，就能构建有效的对比信号。这种方法让学生模型暴露于自身的静态次优行为，实现高质量的分布对齐，无需昂贵的动态rollout和脆弱的对抗平衡。

Result: 在四个紧凑型Qwen2.5和Llama-3模型上的广泛评估验证了半在线策略范式的有效性。SODA在16个基准测试结果中的15个上匹配或超越了最先进方法。更重要的是，它在实现更优蒸馏质量的同时，训练速度快10倍，峰值GPU内存消耗减少27%，并完全消除了对抗不稳定性。

Conclusion: SODA通过半在线蒸馏范式成功解决了黑盒知识蒸馏的效率与稳定性权衡问题，证明了让学生模型暴露于自身静态次优行为足以实现高质量分布对齐，为高效的大语言模型蒸馏提供了新思路。

Abstract: Black-box knowledge distillation for large language models presents a strict trade-off. Simple off-policy methods (e.g., sequence-level knowledge distillation) struggle to correct the student's inherent errors. Fully on-policy methods (e.g., Generative Adversarial Distillation) solve this via adversarial training but introduce well-known training instability and crippling computational overhead. To address this dilemma, we propose SODA (Semi On-policy Distillation with Alignment), a highly efficient alternative motivated by the inherent capability gap between frontier teachers and much smaller base models. Because a compact student model's natural, zero-shot responses are almost strictly inferior to the powerful teacher's targets, we can construct a highly effective contrastive signal simply by pairing the teacher's optimal response with a one-time static snapshot of the student's outputs. This demonstrates that exposing the small student to its own static inferior behaviors is sufficient for high-quality distribution alignment, eliminating the need for costly dynamic rollouts and fragile adversarial balancing. Extensive evaluations across four compact Qwen2.5 and Llama-3 models validate this semi on-policy paradigm. SODA matches or outperforms the state-of-the-art methods on 15 out of 16 benchmark results. More importantly, it achieves this superior distillation quality while training 10 times faster, consuming 27% less peak GPU memory, and completely eliminating adversarial instability.

</details>


### [395] [Where to Steer: Input-Dependent Layer Selection for Steering Improves LLM Alignment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.03867)
*Soham Gadgil,Chris Lin,Su-In Lee*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: W2S框架通过输入自适应的层选择来优化LLM的导向向量干预，相比固定层方法显著提升对齐效果


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有导向向量方法通常在全局固定层应用干预，隐含假设最优干预层对所有输入不变。作者认为这一假设存在根本限制，因为与目标行为相关的表征可能在不同输入中编码于不同层。

Method: 提出Where to Steer (W2S)框架，通过学习从输入嵌入到最优导向层的映射，根据输入自适应选择干预层。该方法通过理论分析和实证证据支持输入依赖的层选择策略。

Result: 在多个LLM和对齐行为上，W2S始终优于固定层基线方法，在分布内和分布外设置中均表现出改进效果。实证证据显示最优导向层在实际应用中随输入变化显著。

Conclusion: 研究强调了输入依赖控制在LLM对齐中的重要性，证明自适应层选择是当前导向向量方法中缺失的关键设计维度。W2S框架为更精细的模型行为控制提供了有效途径。

Abstract: Steering vectors have emerged as a lightweight and effective approach for aligning large language models (LLMs) at inference time, enabling modulation over model behaviors by shifting LLM representations towards a target behavior. However, existing methods typically apply steering vectors at a globally fixed layer, implicitly assuming that the optimal intervention layer is invariant across inputs. We argue that this assumption is fundamentally limited, as representations relevant to a target behavior can be encoded at different layers depending on the input. Theoretically, we show that different inputs can require steering at different layers to achieve alignment with a desirable model behavior. We also provide empirical evidence that the optimal steering layer varies substantially across inputs in practice. Motivated by these observations, we introduce Where to Steer (W2S), a framework that adaptively selects the intervention layer conditioned on the input, by learning a mapping from input embeddings to optimal steering layers. Across multiple LLMs and alignment behaviors, W2S consistently outperforms fixed-layer baselines, with improvements in both in-distribution and out-of-distribution settings. Our findings highlight the importance of input-dependent control in LLM alignment and demonstrate that adaptive layer selection is a key design dimension missing in the current methodology of steering vectors.

</details>


### [396] [Collapse-Free Prototype Readout Layer for Transformer Encoders](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.03850)
*Giansalvo Cirrincione,Rahul Ranjeev Kumar*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: DDCL-Attention是一种基于原型的Transformer编码器读出层，通过软概率匹配将token分配给少量全局原型向量，以线性复杂度生成紧凑的token摘要，替代了传统的池化方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统Transformer编码器使用简单的池化方法（如平均池化或类别token）进行token汇总，这些方法可能无法有效捕捉序列中的重要信息。需要一种更智能、可学习的压缩机制来生成紧凑且信息丰富的序列表示。

Method: 使用少量全局原型向量，通过软概率匹配将token分配给这些原型，形成紧凑的token摘要。该方法包含三个关键设计：1）将训练损失精确分解为重构项和多样性项，防止原型坍缩；2）基于Tikhonov奇异摄动理论和显式学习率约束，确保与编码器联合训练的稳定性；3）支持三种应用模式：最终读出层、可微分码本（扩展VQ-VAE）和分层文档压缩器。

Result: 在四个数据集上的实验验证了理论预测：损失分解精确成立；当满足稳定性条件时，原型分离度按预期增长；码本达到完全利用率，优于标准的硬向量量化。在轨道碎片分类任务上的额外研究表明，该方法也适用于科学表格数据等非标准NLP和视觉任务。

Conclusion: DDCL-Attention提供了一种有效且通用的原型化读出层，能够稳定训练、防止原型坍缩，并在多种应用场景中表现优异，为Transformer架构提供了更强大的序列压缩能力。

Abstract: DDCL-Attention is a prototype-based readout layer for transformer encoders that replaces simple pooling methods, such as mean pooling or class tokens, with a learned compression mechanism. It uses a small set of global prototype vectors and assigns tokens to them through soft probabilistic matching, producing compact token summaries at linear complexity in sequence length.
  The method offers three main advantages. First, it avoids prototype collapse through an exact decomposition of the training loss into a reconstruction term and a diversity term, ensuring that prototypes remain distinct. Second, its joint training with the encoder is shown to be stable under a practical timescale condition, using Tikhonov's singular perturbation theory and explicit learning-rate constraints. Third, the same framework supports three uses: a final readout layer, a differentiable codebook extending VQ-VAE, and a hierarchical document compressor.
  Experiments on four datasets confirm the theoretical predictions: the loss decomposition holds exactly, prototype separation grows as expected when the stability condition is met, and the codebook reaches full utilization, outperforming standard hard vector quantization. An additional study on orbital debris classification shows that the method also applies beyond standard NLP and vision tasks, including scientific tabular data.

</details>


<div id='cs.GT'></div>

# cs.GT [[Back]](#toc)

### [397] [Polynomial-Time Algorithm for Thiele Voting Rules with Voter Interval Preferences](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05953)
*Pasin Manurangsi,Krzysztof Sornat*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 提出多项式时间算法，在Voter Interval域上计算任意Thiele投票规则下的最优委员会，解决了10年未决的开放问题


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决在Voter Interval域上计算Thiele投票规则最优委员会的10年开放问题，该问题最初由Elkind和Lackner（2015）提出，后由Peters（2018）扩展到所有Thiele规则

Method: 提出区间族凹性定理，证明最优Thiele得分是委员会规模的凹函数；使用基于拉格朗日松弛的优化框架，将基数约束移入目标函数；在Voter Interval配置下约束矩阵完全幺模，可在多项式时间内求解

Result: 成功设计出多项式时间算法，可计算Voter Interval域上任意Thiele规则（包括广义Thiele规则）的最优委员会，解决了10年未决的开放问题

Conclusion: 通过区间族凹性定理和拉格朗日松弛优化框架，在Voter Interval域上实现了Thiele投票规则最优委员会的高效计算，该成果通过人机协作完成，部分关键定理由AI辅助证明

Abstract: We present a polynomial-time algorithm for computing an optimal committee of size $k$ under any given Thiele voting rule for elections on the Voter Interval domain (i.e., when voters can be ordered so that each candidate is approved by a consecutive voters). Our result extends to the Generalized Thiele rule, in which each voter has an individual weight (scoring) sequence. This resolves a 10-year-old open problem that was originally posed for Proportional Approval Voting and later extended to every Thiele rule (Elkind and Lackner, IJCAI 2015; Peters, AAAI 2018).
  Our main technical ingredient is a new structural result -- a concavity theorem for families of intervals. It shows that, given two solutions of different sizes, one can construct a solution of any intermediate size whose score is at least the corresponding linear interpolation of the two scores. As a consequence, on Voter Interval profiles, the optimal total Thiele score is a concave function of the committee size. We exploit this concavity within an optimization framework based on a Lagrangian relaxation of a natural integer linear program formulation, obtained by moving the cardinality constraint into the objective. On Voter Interval profiles, the resulting constraint matrix is totally unimodular, so it can be solved in polynomial time.
  Our main algorithm and its proof were obtained via human--AI collaboration. In particular, a slightly simplified version of the main structural theorem used by the algorithm was obtained in a single call to Gemini Deep Think.

</details>


### [398] [JD-BP: A Joint-Decision Generative Framework for Auto-Bidding and Pricing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05845)
*Linghui Meng,Chun Gan,Shengsheng Niu,Chengcheng Zhang,Chenchen Li,Chuan Yang,Yi Mao,Xin Zhu,Jie He,Zhangang Lin,Ching Law*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: JD-BP是一个联合生成决策框架，用于竞价和定价，通过联合输出竞价值和定价修正项来优化实时竞价策略，解决模型预测误差和反馈延迟导致的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的自动竞价服务在关键绩效指标约束下优化实时竞价策略，但模型预测误差和反馈延迟等不确定性会导致竞价策略偏离事后最优，造成分配效率低下。

Method: 提出JD-BP框架：1) 联合输出竞价值和定价修正项；2) 设计无记忆的Return-to-Go机制处理历史约束违反；3) 提出轨迹增强算法从基础竞价策略生成联合竞价-定价轨迹；4) 采用基于能量的直接偏好优化方法和交叉注意力模块增强联合学习性能。

Result: 在AuctionNet数据集上的离线实验显示JD-BP达到最先进性能。在JD.com的在线A/B测试证实其实际有效性，广告收入增加4.70%，目标成本改善6.48%。

Conclusion: JD-BP通过联合竞价和定价决策，有效解决了自动竞价中的不确定性挑战，在离线实验和在线部署中均表现出优越性能，为实时竞价优化提供了有效的解决方案。

Abstract: Auto-bidding services optimize real-time bidding strategies for advertisers under key performance indicator (KPI) constraints such as target return on investment and budget. However, uncertainties such as model prediction errors and feedback latency can cause bidding strategies to deviate from ex-post optimality, leading to inefficient allocation. To address this issue, we propose JD-BP, a Joint generative Decision framework for Bidding and Pricing. Unlike prior methods, JD-BP jointly outputs a bid value and a pricing correction term that acts additively with the payment rule such as GSP. To mitigate adverse effects of historical constraint violations, we design a memory-less Return-to-Go that encourages future value maximizing of bidding actions while the cumulated bias is handled by the pricing correction. Moreover, a trajectory augmentation algorithm is proposed to generate joint bidding-pricing trajectories from a (possibly arbitrary) base bidding policy, enabling efficient plug-and-play deployment of our algorithm from existing RL/generative bidding models. Finally, we employ an Energy-Based Direct Preference Optimization method in conjunction with a cross-attention module to enhance the joint learning performance of bidding and pricing correction. Offline experiments on the AuctionNet dataset demonstrate that JD-BP achieves state-of-the-art performance. Online A/B tests at JD.com confirm its practical effectiveness, showing a 4.70% increase in ad revenue and a 6.48% improvement in target cost.

</details>


### [399] [On the Exploitability of FTRL Dynamics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05129)
*Yiheng Su,Emmanouil-Vasileios Vlatakis-Gkaragkounis*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: FTRL学习者在双人零和博弈中具有固有的可剥削性，剥削程度与次优动作数量成正比，在随机博弈中可保证Ω(ηT/poly(n,m))的剩余收益


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究FTRL学习者在双人零和博弈中的可剥削性，揭示这是FTRL家族的内在特性而非特定实例的伪影，挑战先前分析结论

Method: 分析固定优化器下的剥削定律（Ω(N/η)）和交替优化器下的随机博弈保证（Ω(ηT/poly(n,m))），探索几何二分法（非陡峭vs陡峭正则化器）和双边收益不确定性下的持续性

Result: 证明剥削性是FTRL的内在特性，剥削程度与次优动作数量N成正比，在随机博弈中可保证显著剩余收益，发现非陡峭正则化器允许优化器通过有限时间消除次优动作获得最大剩余

Conclusion: FTRL学习者具有固有的可剥削性，几何二分法揭示了不同正则化器的脆弱性差异，提出了量化正则化器对策略操纵敏感性的易感性度量

Abstract: In this paper we investigate the exploitability of a Follow-the-Regularized-Leader (FTRL) learner with constant step size $η$ in $n\times m$ two-player zero-sum games played over $T$ rounds against a clairvoyant optimizer. In contrast with prior analysis, we show that exploitability is an inherent feature of the FTRL family, rather than an artifact of specific instantiations. First, for fixed optimizer, we establish a sweeping law of order $Ω(N/η)$, proving that exploitation scales to the number of the learner's suboptimal actions $N$ and vanishes in their absence. Second, for alternating optimizer, a surplus of $Ω(ηT/\mathrm{poly}(n,m))$ can be guaranteed regardless of the equilibrium structure, with high probability, in random games. Our analysis uncovers once more the sharp geometric dichotomy: non-steep regularizers allow the optimizer to extract maximum surplus via finite-time elimination of suboptimal actions, whereas steep ones introduce a vanishing correction that may delay exploitation. Finally, we discuss whether this leverage persists under bilateral payoff uncertainty and we propose susceptibility measure to quantify which regularizers are most vulnerable to strategic manipulation.

</details>


<div id='cs.SD'></div>

# cs.SD [[Back]](#toc)

### [400] [Generating Synthetic Doctor-Patient Conversations for Long-form Audio Summarization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06138)
*Yanis Labrak,David Grünert,Séverin Baroudi,Jiyun Chun,Pawel Cyrta,Sergio Burdisso,Ahmed Hassoon,David Liu,Adam Rothschild,Reed Van Deusen,Petr Motlicek,Andrew Perrault,Ricard Marxer,Thomas Schaaf*

Main category: cs.SD

TL;DR: 提出用于长上下文音频推理的合成数据生成管道，应用于医生-患者首次就诊对话和SOAP笔记生成任务，并发布包含8800个对话、1300小时音频和参考笔记的数据集。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 长上下文音频推理在训练数据和评估方面都缺乏支持。现有基准测试针对短上下文任务，而最相关的开放式生成任务在自动评估方面存在挑战。

Method: 提出三阶段合成数据生成管道：1) 角色驱动的对话生成；2) 带重叠/停顿建模的多说话人音频合成、房间声学和声音事件；3) 基于LLM的参考SOAP笔记生成。全部基于开源模型构建。

Result: 发布了8800个合成对话，包含1300小时对应音频和参考笔记。评估当前开源系统发现，级联方法仍然显著优于端到端模型。

Conclusion: 提出的合成数据管道既可作为训练资源，也可作为受控评估环境，为长上下文音频推理任务提供了有效的解决方案和基准测试框架。

Abstract: Long-context audio reasoning is underserved in both training data and evaluation. Existing benchmarks target short-context tasks, and the open-ended generation tasks most relevant to long-context reasoning pose well-known challenges for automatic evaluation. We propose a synthetic data generation pipeline designed to serve both as a training resource and as a controlled evaluation environment, and instantiate it for first-visit doctor-patient conversations with SOAP note generation as the task. The pipeline has three stages, persona-driven dialogue generation, multi-speaker audio synthesis with overlap/pause modeling, room acoustics, and sound events, and LLM-based reference SOAP note production, built entirely on open-weight models. We release 8,800 synthetic conversations with 1.3k hours of corresponding audio and reference notes. Evaluating current open-weight systems, we find that cascaded approaches still substantially outperform end-to-end models.

</details>


### [401] [Controllable Singing Style Conversion with Boundary-Aware Information Bottleneck](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05526)
*Zhetao Hu,Yiquan Zhou,Wenyu Wang,Zhiyu Wu,Xin Gao,Jihua Zhu*

Main category: cs.SD

TL;DR: S4团队在SVCC2025中提出的歌唱风格转换系统，通过边界感知Whisper瓶颈、显式帧级技术矩阵和高频带补全策略，实现了细粒度风格转换与控制，在自然度方面获得最佳表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决歌唱风格转换中的关键挑战：风格泄漏、动态渲染以及在有限数据下的高保真生成。现有方法在处理源风格残留、动态风格稳定性和高频细节方面存在不足。

Method: 1. 边界感知Whisper瓶颈：聚合音素跨度表示以抑制残留源风格同时保留语言内容；2. 显式帧级技术矩阵：通过针对性F0处理增强推理稳定性，实现动态风格渲染；3. 感知驱动高频带补全：利用辅助48kHz SVC模型增强高频频谱，克服数据稀缺问题。

Result: 在SVCC2025官方主观评估中，系统在所有提交方案中获得了最佳自然度表现，同时在说话人相似度和技术控制方面保持竞争力，且使用的额外歌唱数据显著少于其他顶级系统。

Conclusion: 提出的系统通过创新的边界感知表示、动态风格渲染和高频增强策略，有效解决了歌唱风格转换中的关键挑战，在有限数据下实现了高质量的细粒度风格转换与控制。

Abstract: This paper presents the submission of the S4 team to the Singing Voice Conversion Challenge 2025 (SVCC2025)-a novel singing style conversion system that advances fine-grained style conversion and control within in-domain settings. To address the critical challenges of style leakage, dynamic rendering, and high-fidelity generation with limited data, we introduce three key innovations: a boundary-aware Whisper bottleneck that pools phoneme-span representations to suppress residual source style while preserving linguistic content; an explicit frame-level technique matrix, enhanced by targeted F0 processing during inference, for stable and distinct dynamic style rendering; and a perceptually motivated high-frequency band completion strategy that leverages an auxiliary standard 48kHz SVC model to augment the high-frequency spectrum, thereby overcoming data scarcity without overfitting. In the official SVCC2025 subjective evaluation, our system achieves the best naturalness performance among all submissions while maintaining competitive results in speaker similarity and technique control, despite using significantly less extra singing data than other top-performing systems. Audio samples are available online.

</details>


### [402] [Anchored Cyclic Generation: A Novel Paradigm for Long-Sequence Symbolic Music Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05343)
*Boyu Cao,Lekai Qian,Dehan Li,Haoyu Gu,Mingda Xu,Qi Liu*

Main category: cs.SD

TL;DR: 提出锚定循环生成（ACG）范式解决自回归模型在符号音乐生成中的错误累积问题，并基于此开发层次化锚定循环生成（Hi-ACG）框架，显著提升长序列音乐生成的质量和结构完整性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自回归模型在序列生成任务中存在严重的错误累积问题，特别是在符号音乐生成中，这导致生成的音乐质量差且结构完整性不足。现有方法难以解决这一根本性挑战。

Method: 提出锚定循环生成（ACG）范式，利用已识别音乐中的锚定特征来指导后续生成过程，有效缓解自回归方法的错误累积。进一步提出层次化锚定循环生成（Hi-ACG）框架，采用系统性的全局到局部生成策略，并配合专门设计的钢琴token作为高效音乐表示。

Result: ACG范式使预测特征向量与真实语义向量之间的余弦距离平均减少34.7%。在长序列符号音乐生成任务中，Hi-ACG框架在主观和客观评估上均显著优于现有主流方法。该框架还展现出优秀的任务泛化能力，在音乐补全等相关任务中取得卓越性能。

Conclusion: ACG范式和Hi-ACG框架有效解决了自回归模型在符号音乐生成中的错误累积问题，显著提升了长序列音乐生成的质量和结构完整性，并展现出良好的任务泛化能力。

Abstract: Generating long sequences with structural coherence remains a fundamental challenge for autoregressive models across sequential generation tasks. In symbolic music generation, this challenge is particularly pronounced, as existing methods are constrained by the inherent severe error accumulation problem of autoregressive models, leading to poor performance in music quality and structural integrity. In this paper, we propose the Anchored Cyclic Generation (ACG) paradigm, which relies on anchor features from already identified music to guide subsequent generation during the autoregressive process, effectively mitigating error accumulation in autoregressive methods. Based on the ACG paradigm, we further propose the Hierarchical Anchored Cyclic Generation (Hi-ACG) framework, which employs a systematic global-to-local generation strategy and is highly compatible with our specifically designed piano token, an efficient musical representation. The experimental results demonstrate that compared to traditional autoregressive models, the ACG paradigm achieves reduces cosine distance by an average of 34.7% between predicted feature vectors and ground-truth semantic vectors. In long-sequence symbolic music generation tasks, the Hi-ACG framework significantly outperforms existing mainstream methods in both subjective and objective evaluations. Furthermore, the framework exhibits excellent task generalization capabilities, achieving superior performance in related tasks such as music completion.

</details>


### [403] [OmniSonic: Towards Universal and Holistic Audio Generation from Video and Text](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04348)
*Weiguo Pian,Saksham Singh Kushwaha,Zhimin Chen,Shijian Deng,Kai Wang,Yunhui Guo,Yapeng Tian*

Main category: cs.SD

TL;DR: 提出Universal Holistic Audio Generation (UniHAGen)任务和OmniSonic框架，用于生成包含屏幕内外声音（环境声、乐器声、人声）的完整听觉场景，解决了现有模型仅关注屏幕内声音或无法处理人声的局限性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视频条件音频生成模型通常只关注屏幕内可见发声事件的环境声，忽略了屏幕外听觉事件。近期整体文本-视频到音频生成模型虽然尝试生成包含屏幕内外声音的听觉场景，但仅限于非语音声音，无法生成或整合人声。需要开发能够同时处理屏幕内外环境声和人声的通用整体音频生成方法。

Method: 提出OmniSonic框架，基于流匹配扩散模型，联合视频和文本条件。采用TriAttn-DiT架构，通过三个交叉注意力操作同时处理屏幕内环境声、屏幕外环境声和语音条件，并使用混合专家门控机制自适应平衡它们在生成过程中的贡献。构建了UniHAGen-Bench基准数据集，包含超过1000个样本，涵盖三种代表性的屏幕内外语音-环境场景。

Result: 广泛实验表明，OmniSonic在客观指标和人工评估中始终优于最先进方法，为通用整体音频生成建立了强大的基线。在UniHAGen-Bench基准测试中表现出色，能够生成包含屏幕内外环境声和人声的完整听觉场景。

Conclusion: 提出了Universal Holistic Audio Generation (UniHAGen)任务和OmniSonic框架，解决了现有音频生成模型的局限性。通过TriAttn-DiT架构和MoE门控机制，实现了对屏幕内外环境声和人声的同时处理与平衡。实验证明该方法在生成完整听觉场景方面优于现有技术，为通用整体音频生成领域建立了新的基准。

Abstract: In this paper, we propose Universal Holistic Audio Generation (UniHAGen), a task for synthesizing comprehensive auditory scenes that include both on-screen and off-screen sounds across diverse domains (e.g., ambient events, musical instruments, and human speech). Prior video-conditioned audio generation models typically focus on producing on-screen environmental sounds that correspond to visible sounding events, neglecting off-screen auditory events. While recent holistic joint text-video-to-audio generation models aim to produce auditory scenes with both on- and off-screen sound but they are limited to non-speech sounds, lacking the ability to generate or integrate human speech. To overcome these limitations, we introduce OmniSonic, a flow-matching-based diffusion framework jointly conditioned on video and text. It features a TriAttn-DiT architecture that performs three cross-attention operations to process on-screen environmental sound, off-screen environmental sound, and speech conditions simultaneously, with a Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) gating mechanism that adaptively balances their contributions during generation. Furthermore, we construct UniHAGen-Bench, a new benchmark with over one thousand samples covering three representative on/off-screen speech-environment scenarios. Extensive experiments show that OmniSonic consistently outperforms state-of-the-art approaches on both objective metrics and human evaluations, establishing a strong baseline for universal and holistic audio generation. Project page: https://weiguopian.github.io/OmniSonic_webpage/

</details>


### [404] [Generalizable Audio-Visual Navigation via Binaural Difference Attention and Action Transition Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05007)
*Jia Li,Yinfeng Yu*

Main category: cs.SD

TL;DR: BDATP框架通过双耳差异注意力增强空间定位，结合动作转移预测作为正则化，提升音频-视觉导航在未见场景中的泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有音频-视觉导航方法在未见场景中泛化能力不足，容易过度拟合语义声音特征和特定训练环境，需要提升空间定位能力和减少环境特定过拟合。

Method: 提出BDATP框架，包含两个核心模块：1) Binaural Difference Attention (BDA)显式建模双耳差异以增强空间定位，减少对语义类别的依赖；2) Action Transition Prediction (ATP)引入辅助动作预测目标作为正则化项，缓解环境特定过拟合。

Result: 在Replica和Matterport3D数据集上的实验表明，BDATP可无缝集成到各种主流基线方法中，带来一致且显著的性能提升。在Replica数据集上，对未听过声音的绝对改进高达21.6个百分点，在大多数设置中达到最先进的成功率。

Conclusion: BDATP框架通过联合优化感知和策略，显著提升了音频-视觉导航的泛化能力和鲁棒性，可广泛应用于不同的导航架构。

Abstract: In Audio-Visual Navigation (AVN), agents must locate sound sources in unseen 3D environments using visual and auditory cues. However, existing methods often struggle with generalization in unseen scenarios, as they tend to overfit to semantic sound features and specific training environments. To address these challenges, we propose the \textbf{Binaural Difference Attention with Action Transition Prediction (BDATP)} framework, which jointly optimizes perception and policy. Specifically, the \textbf{Binaural Difference Attention (BDA)} module explicitly models interaural differences to enhance spatial orientation, reducing reliance on semantic categories. Simultaneously, the \textbf{Action Transition Prediction (ATP)} task introduces an auxiliary action prediction objective as a regularization term, mitigating environment-specific overfitting. Extensive experiments on the Replica and Matterport3D datasets demonstrate that BDATP can be seamlessly integrated into various mainstream baselines, yielding consistent and significant performance gains. Notably, our framework achieves state-of-the-art Success Rates across most settings, with a remarkable absolute improvement of up to 21.6 percentage points in Replica dataset for unheard sounds. These results underscore BDATP's superior generalization capability and its robustness across diverse navigation architectures.

</details>


<div id='stat.CO'></div>

# stat.CO [[Back]](#toc)

### [405] [A Large-Scale Empirical Comparison of Meta-Learners and Causal Forests for Heterogeneous Treatment Effect Estimation in Marketing Uplift Modeling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06123)
*Aman Singh*

Main category: stat.CO

TL;DR: UpliftBench对四种CATE估计方法在Criteo Uplift v2.1数据集上进行大规模实证评估，S-Learner表现最佳，Qini系数0.376，前20%客户贡献77.7%增量转化，提升效果3.9倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在精准营销中，个体层面的条件平均处理效应（CATE）估计至关重要，但工业规模上的提升建模方法系统性基准测试仍然有限。需要为实践者提供基于证据的方法选择指导。

Method: 使用Criteo Uplift v2.1数据集（1398万客户记录），评估四种CATE估计方法：S-Learner、T-Learner、X-Learner（均使用LightGBM作为基础学习器）和Causal Forest（来自EconML）。通过Qini系数和累积增益曲线进行评估，使用SHAP分析识别异质性处理效应驱动因素，利用Causal Forest进行不确定性量化。

Result: S-Learner表现最佳，Qini系数0.376；前20%客户（按预测CATE排序）贡献77.7%的增量转化，相比随机目标提升3.9倍。SHAP分析显示f8是12个匿名协变量中主要的异质性处理效应驱动因素。Causal Forest不确定性量化显示：1.9%客户是"确信可说服者"（95%置信区间下限>0），0.1%是"确信沉睡者"（95%置信区间上限<0）。

Conclusion: 研究为大规模提升建模管道的方法选择提供了基于证据的实践指导。S-Learner在工业规模数据集上表现最佳，同时展示了不确定性量化在识别确信可说服者和沉睡者方面的价值。

Abstract: Estimating Conditional Average Treatment Effects (CATE) at the individual level is central to precision marketing, yet systematic benchmarking of uplift modeling methods at industrial scale remains limited. We present UpliftBench, an empirical evaluation of four CATE estimators: S-Learner, T-Learner, X-Learner (all with LightGBM base learners), and Causal Forest (EconML), applied to the Criteo Uplift v2.1 dataset comprising 13.98 million customer records. The near-random treatment assignment (propensity AUC = 0.509) provides strong internal validity for causal estimation. Evaluated via Qini coefficient and cumulative gain curves, the S-Learner achieves the highest Qini score of 0.376, with the top 20% of customers ranked by predicted CATE capturing 77.7% of all incremental conversions, a 3.9x improvement over random targeting. SHAP analysis identifies f8 as the dominant heterogeneous treatment effect (HTE) driver among the 12 anonymized covariates. Causal Forest uncertainty quantification reveals that 1.9% of customers are confident persuadables (lower 95% CI > 0) and 0.1% are confident sleeping dogs (upper 95% CI < 0). Our results provide practitioners with evidence-based guidance on method selection for large-scale uplift modeling pipelines.

</details>


### [406] [fastml: Guarded Resampling Workflows for Safer Automated Machine Learning in R](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05225)
*Selcuk Korkmaz,Dincer Goksuluk,Eda Karaismailoglu*

Main category: stat.CO

TL;DR: fastml是一个R包，通过"防护重采样"技术防止预处理泄漏，在重采样内部重新估计预处理步骤，提供泄漏感知的机器学习接口。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 预处理泄漏是机器学习中一个隐蔽但严重的问题，当数据依赖的转换（如缩放、插补）在重采样之前估计时，会人为夸大模型性能，且难以检测。

Method: fastml采用"防护重采样"方法，在每个重采样折叠内部重新估计预处理步骤，并将其应用于相应的评估数据。支持分组和时间排序重采样，阻止高风险配置，审计外部依赖，提供沙箱执行和集成模型解释。

Result: 蒙特卡洛模拟显示全局预处理相对于防护重采样显著夸大了表观性能。fastml在保持与tidymodels相同验证性能的同时减少了工作流编排，并通过统一接口支持多种生存模型类的一致基准测试。

Conclusion: fastml提供了一个有效的泄漏感知机器学习框架，通过防护重采样防止预处理泄漏，简化了工作流编排，并支持跨不同模型类的一致基准测试。
