Abstract: Preprocessing leakage arises when scaling, imputation, or other data-dependent transformations are estimated before resampling, inflating apparent performance while remaining hard to detect. We present fastml, an R package that provides a single-call interface for leakage-aware machine learning through guarded resampling, where preprocessing is re-estimated inside each resample and applied to the corresponding assessment data. The package supports grouped and time-ordered resampling, blocks high-risk configurations, audits recipes for external dependencies, and includes sandboxed execution and integrated model explanation. We evaluate fastml with a Monte Carlo simulation contrasting global and fold-local normalization, a usability comparison with tidymodels under matched specifications, and survival benchmarks across datasets of different sizes. The simulation demonstrates that global preprocessing substantially inflates apparent performance relative to guarded resampling. fastml matched held-out performance obtained with tidymodels while reducing workflow orchestration, and it supported consistent benchmarking of multiple survival model classes through a unified interface.

</details>


<div id='cs.CE'></div>

# cs.CE [[Back]](#toc)

### [407] [INTERACT: An AI-Driven Extended Reality Framework for Accesible Communication Featuring Real-Time Sign Language Interpretation and Emotion Recognition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05605)
*Nikolaos D. Tantaroudas,Andrew J. McCracken,Ilias Karachalios,Evangelos Papatheou*

Main category: cs.CE

TL;DR: INTERACT是一个AI驱动的XR平台，集成了实时语音转文字、国际手语3D虚拟人渲染、多语言翻译和情感识别功能，旨在提升听障和多语言用户的视频会议可访问性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 全球有超过4.3亿人患有听力障碍，预计2050年将超过7亿人。传统无障碍措施成本高、可用性有限且存在物流障碍，而扩展现实技术为沉浸式和包容性通信提供了新可能。

Method: 基于CORTEX2框架，在Meta Quest 3头显上部署，集成Whisper进行语音识别、NLLB进行多语言翻译、RoBERTa进行情感分类、Google MediaPipe进行手势提取，实现实时语音转文字、国际手语3D虚拟人渲染、多语言翻译和情感识别。

Result: 试点评估显示92%用户满意度，转录准确率超过85%，情感检测精度达90%，整体体验平均评分4.6/5.0，90%参与者愿意参与进一步测试。

Conclusion: INTERACT平台在提升教育、文化和专业环境中的可访问性方面展现出强大潜力，为听障和多语言用户提供了创新的沉浸式通信解决方案。

Abstract: Video conferencing has become central to professional collaboration, yet most platforms offer limited support for deaf, hard-of-hearing, and multilingual users. The World Health Organisation estimates that over 430 million people worldwide require rehabilitation for disabling hearing loss, a figure projected to exceed 700 million by 2050. Conventional accessibility measures remain constrained by high costs, limited availability, and logistical barriers, while Extended Reality (XR) technologies open new possibilities for immersive and inclusive communication. This paper presents INTERACT (Inclusive Networking for Translation and Embodied Real-Time Augmented Communication Tool), an AI-driven XR platform that integrates real-time speech-to-text conversion, International Sign Language (ISL) rendering through 3D avatars, multilingual translation, and emotion recognition within an immersive virtual environment. Built on the CORTEX2 framework and deployed on Meta Quest 3 headsets, INTERACT combines Whisper for speech recognition, NLLB for multilingual translation, RoBERTa for emotion classification, and Google MediaPipe for gesture extraction. Pilot evaluations were conducted in two phases, first with technical experts from academia and industry, and subsequently with members of the deaf community. The trials reported 92% user satisfaction, transcription accuracy above 85%, and 90% emotion-detection precision, with a mean overall experience rating of 4.6 out of 5.0 and 90% of participants willing to take part in further testing. The results highlight strong potential for advancing accessibility across educational, cultural, and professional settings. An extended version of this work, including full pilot data and implementation details, has been published as an Open Research Europe article [Tantaroudas et al., 2026a].

</details>


### [408] [AI-Driven Modular Services for Accessible Multilingual Education in Immersive Extended Reality Settings: Integrating Speech Processing, Translation, and Sign Language Rendering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05591)
*N. D. Tantaroudas,A. J. McCracken,I. Karachalios,E. Papatheou*

Main category: cs.CE

TL;DR: 该研究提出了一个集成六种AI服务的模块化平台，用于XR环境中的多语言教学，包括语音识别、翻译、语音合成、情感分类、对话摘要和国际手语渲染，并通过技术基准测试验证了其实时部署的可行性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 构建一个在XR环境中协调跨模态AI服务的平台，为无障碍、多语言教学提供解决方案，符合欧盟数字无障碍目标，支持公平学习环境。

Method: 开发模块化平台集成六种AI服务：OpenAI Whisper语音识别、Meta NLLB多语言翻译、AWS Polly语音合成、RoBERTa情感分类、flan t5 base samsum对话摘要、Google MediaPipe国际手语渲染。处理国际手语手势记录获取手部关键点坐标，映射到VR环境中的三维虚拟化身动画。进行技术基准测试，包括语音合成提供商比较和多语言翻译模型评估。

Result: 技术评估确认平台适合实时XR部署。语音合成基准测试显示AWS Polly具有最低延迟且价格竞争力强。EuroLLM 1.7B Instruct变体获得更高BLEU分数，超越NLLB。平台验证了在XR环境中协调跨模态AI服务进行无障碍多语言教学的可行性。

Conclusion: 该模块化平台证明了在XR环境中协调跨模态AI服务进行无障碍多语言教学的可行性。模块化设计支持独立扩展和适应不同教育场景，为实现欧盟数字无障碍目标提供了基础，为公平学习解决方案奠定了基础。

Abstract: This work introduces a modular platform that brings together six AI services, automatic speech recognition via OpenAI Whisper, multilingual translation through Meta NLLB, speech synthesis using AWS Polly, emotion classification with RoBERTa, dialogue summarisation via flan t5 base samsum, and International Sign (IS) rendering through Google MediaPipe. A corpus of IS gesture recordings was processed to derive hand landmark coordinates, which were subsequently mapped onto three dimensional avatar animations inside a virtual reality (VR) environment. Validation comprised technical benchmarking of each AI component, including comparative assessments of speech synthesis providers and multilingual translation models (NLLB 200 and EuroLLM 1.7B variants). Technical evaluations confirmed the suitability of the platform for real time XR deployment. Speech synthesis benchmarking established that AWS Polly delivers the lowest latency at a competitive price point. The EuroLLM 1.7B Instruct variant attained a higher BLEU score, surpassing NLLB. These findings establish the viability of orchestrating cross modal AI services within XR settings for accessible, multilingual language instruction. The modular design permits independent scaling and adaptation to varied educational contexts, providing a foundation for equitable learning solutions aligned with European Union digital accessibility goals.

</details>


### [409] [Generative modeling of granular flow on inclined planes using conditional flow matching](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04453)
*Xuyang Li,Rui Li,Teng Man,Yimin Lu*

Main category: cs.CE

TL;DR: 首个基于条件流匹配的颗粒流重建框架，从稀疏边界观测恢复内部流场、应力和能量波动


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 颗粒流在自然和工业过程中普遍存在，但其内部运动学和力学难以直接观测，传统数值模拟计算成本高，确定性模型在不适定问题中易产生过度平滑的预测

Method: 基于高保真离散元模拟训练条件流匹配生成模型，推理时通过可微前向算子和稀疏感知梯度引导机制强制测量一致性，物理解码器将重建速度场映射到应力状态和能量波动量

Result: 框架从完整观测到仅16%信息窗口都能准确恢复内部流场，在仅11%数据稀释空间分辨率下仍有效，在最不适定重建机制中优于确定性CNN基线，通过集成生成提供空间不确定性估计

Conclusion: 条件生成建模为非侵入式推断颗粒介质隐藏体力学提供了实用途径，对颗粒和多相系统中的逆问题具有更广泛适用性

Abstract: Granular flows govern many natural and industrial processes, yet their interior kinematics and mechanics remain largely unobservable, as experiments access only boundaries or free surfaces. Conventional numerical simulations are computationally expensive for fast inverse reconstruction, and deterministic models tend to collapse to over-smoothed mean predictions in ill-posed settings. This study, to the best of the authors' knowledge, presents the first conditional flow matching (CFM) framework for granular-flow reconstruction from sparse boundary observations. Trained on high-fidelity particle-resolved discrete element simulations, the generative model is guided at inference by a differentiable forward operator with a sparsity-aware gradient guidance mechanism, which enforces measurement consistency without hyperparameter tuning and prevents unphysical velocity predictions in non-material regions. A physics decoder maps the reconstructed velocity fields to stress states and energy fluctuation quantities, including mean stress, deviatoric stress, and granular temperature. The framework accurately recovers interior flow fields from full observation to only 16% of the informative window, and it remains effective under strongly diluted spatial resolution with only 11% of data. It also outperforms a deterministic CNN baseline in the most ill-posed reconstruction regime and provides spatially resolved uncertainty estimates through ensemble generation. These results demonstrate that conditional generative modeling offers a practical route for non-invasive inference of hidden bulk mechanics in granular media, with broader applicability for inverse problems in particulate and multiphase systems.

</details>


<div id='quant-ph'></div>

# quant-ph [[Back]](#toc)

### [410] [Unsharp Measurement with Adaptive Gaussian POVMs for Quantum-Inspired Image Processing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04685)
*Debashis Saikia,Bikash K. Behera,Mayukha Pal,Prasanta K. Panigrahi*

Main category: quant-ph

TL;DR: 提出基于量子测量的灰度图像概率变换框架，使用自适应POVM直接作用于像素强度，通过高斯模型构建测量算子，引入锐化参数γ控制测量局域化程度，参数k控制变换分辨率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有图像处理方法主要围绕分割或阈值化，本文提出直接作用于像素强度的测量诱导变换框架，利用量子测量理论实现数据自适应的图像变换。

Method: 将强度值嵌入有限维希尔伯特空间，基于图像直方图的高斯模型构建数据自适应测量算子，定义强度可观测量的非锐利测量，通过测量结果的期望值重构图像。引入锐化参数γ控制从非锐利测量到投影测量的连续过渡，参数k控制高斯中心数量从而控制变换分辨率。

Result: 在标准基准图像上的实验结果表明，该方法能够实现有效的数据自适应变换，同时保持结构信息。

Conclusion: 提出的量子测量框架为灰度图像变换提供了新的概率方法，通过测量局域化与平滑之间的权衡实现自适应变换，参数γ和k分别控制变换的锐化程度和分辨率。

Abstract: We propose a quantum measurement-based framework for probabilistic transformation of grayscale images using adaptive positive operator-valued measures (POVMs). In contrast, to existing approaches that are largely centered around segmentation or thresholding, the transformation is formulated here as a measurement-induced process acting directly on pixel intensities. The intensity values are embedded in a finite-dimensional Hilbert space, which allows the construction of data-adaptive measurement operators derived from Gaussian models of the image histogram. These operators naturally define an unsharp measurement of the intensity observable, with the reconstructed image obtained through expectation values of the measurement outcomes. To control the degree of measurement localization, we introduce a nonlinear sharpening transformation with a sharpening parameter, $γ$, that induces a continuous transition from unsharp measurements to projective measurements. This transition reflects an inherent trade-off between probabilistic smoothing and localization of intensity structures. In addition to the nonlinear sharpening parameter, we introduce another parameter $k$ (number of gaussian centers) which controls the resolution of the image during the transformation. Experimental results on standard benchmark images show that the proposed method gives effective data-adaptive transformations while preserving structural information.

</details>


### [411] [A Quantum Search Approach to Magic Square Constraint Problems with Classical Benchmarking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04786)
*Rituparna R,Harsha Varthini,Aswani Kumar Cherukuri*

Main category: quant-ph

TL;DR: 论文提出一种用于组合约束满足问题的量子搜索方法，以幻方生成为例，通过Grover算法实现量子加速搜索，相比经典搜索具有二次查询优势。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究量子计算在组合约束满足问题中的应用潜力，特别是利用Grover算法的量子加速优势来解决幻方构造这类NP难问题，探索量子-经典混合计算范式。

Method: 将幻方构造重新表述为量子搜索问题：1）使用Siamese构造和部分约束检查进行经典预处理，生成紧凑候选域；2）设计可逆的约束敏感oracle标记有效配置；3）通过Grover算法进行振幅放大；4）实现多寄存器模运算电路、oracle逻辑和扩散算子。

Result: Qiskit实现验证了量子搜索管道的正确性，在小规模网格实例上成功演示，确认了相比经典暴力枚举和回溯搜索的理论二次查询优势，但受限于经典状态向量模拟器的指数内存增长，无法处理大规模实例。

Conclusion: 该工作展示了量子搜索在组合约束满足问题中的可行性，提出了有效的量子-经典混合方法框架，验证了Grover算法的理论加速优势，为未来量子硬件上的实际应用奠定了基础。

Abstract: This paper presents a quantum search approach to combinatorial constraint satisfaction problems, demonstrated through the generation of magic squares. We reformulate magic square construction as a quantum search problem in which a reversible, constraint-sensitive oracle marks valid configurations for amplitude amplification via Grover's algorithm. Classical pre-processing using the Siamese construction and partial constraint checks generates a compact candidate domain before quantum encoding. Rather than integrating classical and quantum solvers in an iterative loop, this work uses the classical component for structured initialisation and the quantum component for search, and benchmarks the quantum approach against classical brute-force enumeration and backtracking. Our Qiskit implementation demonstrates the design of multi-register modular arithmetic circuits, oracle logic, and diffusion operators. Experiments are conducted on small grid instances, as larger grids are intractable on classical statevector simulators due to exponential memory growth. The results validate the correctness of the proposed quantum search pipeline and confirm the theoretical quadratic query advantage over classical search.

</details>


<div id='cs.AR'></div>

# cs.AR [[Back]](#toc)

### [412] [Comparative Characterization of KV Cache Management Strategies for LLM Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05012)
*Oteo Mamo,Olga Kogiou,Hyunjin Yi,Weikuan Yu*

Main category: cs.AR

TL;DR: 对vLLM、InfiniGen和H2O三种KV缓存管理框架进行实证研究，分析它们在内存消耗和推理性能方面的权衡，确定不同条件下的最佳选择。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着LLM模型规模增大、上下文长度增长和并发请求竞争有限内存资源，KV缓存的增长带来了显著的系统级挑战。尽管出现了多个KV缓存管理框架，但它们在内存消耗和推理性能方面的比较权衡尚未被充分理解。

Method: 对三种最先进的KV缓存管理框架（vLLM、InfiniGen和H2O）进行实证研究，这些框架采用张量卸载、令牌驱逐启发式方法和推测性调度等技术来平衡内存使用和性能。评估指标包括延迟、吞吐量和内存使用，关键参数包括请求率、模型大小和稀疏度水平。

Result: 研究结果确定了每个框架表现最佳的条件，揭示了在内存和性能约束下最合适的KV缓存策略选择和配置。

Conclusion: 该研究为在不同系统约束和负载条件下选择最合适的KV缓存管理框架提供了实证依据，有助于优化LLM推理效率。

Abstract: Efficient inference with Large Language Models (LLMs) increasingly relies on Key-Value (KV) caches to store previously computed key and value vectors at each layer. These caches are essential to minimize redundant computation during autoregressive token generation, lowering computational complexity from quadratic to linear. However, the growth of KV caches has posed significant system-level challenges, particularly as model sizes increase, context lengths grow, and concurrent requests compete for limited memory resources. Even though several recent frameworks for KV cache management have emerged, their comparative trade-offs in memory consumption and inference performance have not been fully understood, especially under varying request sizes and model configurations. In this work, we conduct an empirical study of three state-of-the-art KV cache management frameworks: vLLM, InfiniGen, and H2O. These frameworks employ techniques such as tensor offloading, token eviction heuristics, and speculative scheduling to balance memory usage and performance. We evaluate their performance in terms of a range of metrics such as latency, throughput, and memory usage across a spectrum of key parameters including request rates, model sizes, and sparsity levels. Our results pinpoint the conditions for each framework to perform the best, revealing the most suitable selection and configuration of KV cache strategies under memory and performance constraints.

</details>


### [413] [Neuromorphic Computing for Low-Power Artificial Intelligence](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04727)
*Keshava Katti,Pratik Chaudhari,Deep Jariwala*

Main category: cs.AR

TL;DR: 该论文综述了经典CMOS技术的能效限制，并探讨了通过跨层神经形态计算方法（包括新材料、非易失性器件、混合信号电路和专用学习算法）来克服这些限制的路径。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 经典计算正面临能效的基本限制，无法通过增加电路密度或改进标准半导体工艺来解决。人工智能日益增长的计算和存储需求需要信息表示、存储、通信和处理方式的颠覆性创新。

Method: 采用跨层协同设计方法，包括：1）新材料和非易失性器件结构；2）新型混合信号电路和架构；3）针对这些物理基板特性定制的学习算法。结合存内计算、模拟动力学和受大脑启发的稀疏通信等神经形态计算技术。

Result: 神经形态计算通过利用新型器件模式、存内计算、模拟动力学和稀疏通信，为提升当前AI系统的能效和可扩展性提供了有前景的路径。

Conclusion: 实现神经形态计算的潜力需要跨层协同设计，而不仅仅是替换芯片。这种跨层神经形态方法有望克服经典CMOS技术的关键限制，为AI系统提供更高效、可扩展的解决方案。

Abstract: Classical computing is beginning to encounter fundamental limits of energy efficiency. This presents a challenge that can no longer be solved by strategies such as increasing circuit density or refining standard semiconductor processes. The growing computational and memory demands of artificial intelligence (AI) require disruptive innovation in how information is represented, stored, communicated, and processed. By leveraging novel device modalities and compute-in-memory (CIM), in addition to analog dynamics and sparse communication inspired by the brain, neuromorphic computing offers a promising path toward improvements in the energy efficiency and scalability of current AI systems. But realizing this potential is not a matter of replacing one chip with another; rather, it requires a co-design effort, spanning new materials and non-volatile device structures, novel mixed-signal circuits and architectures, and learning algorithms tailored to the physics of these substrates. This article surveys the key limitations of classical complementary metal-oxide-semiconductor (CMOS) technology and outlines how such cross-layer neuromorphic approaches may overcome them.

</details>


<div id='physics.med-ph'></div>

# physics.med-ph [[Back]](#toc)

### [414] [Untargeted analysis of volatile markers of post-exercise fat oxidation in exhaled breath](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05707)
*André Homeyer,Júlia Blanka Sziládi,Jan-Philipp Redlich,Jonathan Beauchamp,Y Lan Pham*

Main category: physics.med-ph

TL;DR: 该研究通过呼气挥发性有机化合物分析寻找脂肪氧化生物标志物，确认丙酮是关键标记物，并发现运动期间丙酮测量可预测运动后脂肪氧化变化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 丙酮作为监测脂肪氧化的非侵入性生物标志物存在局限性：受混杂因素影响且浓度变化滞后（运动后数小时），难以实现实时评估。需要寻找其他呼气生物标志物，并探索运动期间测量能否预测运动后脂肪氧化变化。

Method: 19名参与者完成两次25分钟骑行训练（间隔5分钟休息）。使用质子转移反应飞行时间质谱（PTR-TOF-MS）分析运动期间和90分钟恢复期后的挥发性有机化合物排放。血液β-羟基丁酸（BOHB）浓度作为脂肪氧化的参考标记。从773个相关分析特征中筛选与BOHB强相关的信号。

Result: 在773个检测特征中，只有4个信号与BOHB呈强相关（ρ≥0.82，p=0.0002），这些信号均归因于丙酮或其同位素/碎片。运动结束时这些信号的测量能准确预测参与者运动后BOHB的显著变化（F1分数≥0.83，准确率=0.89）。

Conclusion: 研究未发现新的呼气脂肪氧化生物标志物，但确认丙酮是关键标记物。运动期间的呼气丙酮测量已能基本预测运动后脂肪氧化变化，为实时监测提供了可能性。

Abstract: Breath acetone represents a promising non-invasive biomarker for monitoring fat oxidation during exercise. However, its utility is limited by confounding factors, as well as by the fact that significant changes in concentration occur only hours post-exercise, which makes real-time assessment difficult. We performed an untargeted screening for volatile organic compounds (VOCs) that could serve as markers of fat oxidation beyond acetone, and investigated whether breath measurements taken during exercise could predict post-exercise changes in fat oxidation. Nineteen participants completed two 25-min cycling sessions separated by a brief 5-min rest period. VOC emissions were analysed using proton-transfer-reaction time-of-flight mass spectrometry (PTR-TOF-MS) during exercise and after a 90-min recovery period. Blood $β$-hydroxybutyrate (BOHB) concentrations served as the reference marker for fat oxidation. Among 773 relevant analytical features detected in the PTR-TOF-MS measurements, only four signals exhibited strong correlations with BOHB ($ρ$ $\geq$ 0.82, p = 0.0002)-all attributable to acetone or its isotopologues or fragments. End-of-exercise measurements of these signals enabled accurate prediction of participants with substantial post-exercise BOHB changes (F1 score $\geq$ 0.83, accuracy = 0.89). Our study did not reveal any novel breath-based biomarkers of fat oxidation, but it confirmed acetone as the key marker. Moreover, our findings suggest that breath acetone measurements during exercise may already enable basic predictions of post-exercise fat oxidation.

</details>


<div id='cs.DC'></div>

# cs.DC [[Back]](#toc)

### [415] [CoStream: Codec-Guided Resource-Efficient System for Video Streaming Analytics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06036)
*Yulin Zou,Yan Chen,Wenyan Chen,JooYoung Park,Shivaraman Nitin,Luo Tao,Francisco Romero,Dmitrii Ustiugov*

Main category: cs.DC

TL;DR: CoStream：基于视频编解码器元数据的低开销流式视频分析系统，通过编解码器指导的补丁剪枝和选择性KV缓存刷新，实现端到端优化，提升3倍吞吐量并减少87%GPU计算


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 视频流分析是视觉语言模型服务的关键工作负载，但多模态推理的高成本限制了可扩展性。现有系统通过利用视频流中的时空冗余来降低推理成本，但仅针对视觉Transformer或LLM进行优化，未挖掘端到端机会。此外，现有方法识别冗余的开销较大，需要离线分析训练或昂贵的在线计算，不适合动态实时流。

Method: CoStream基于关键观察：视频编解码器在压缩过程中已提取了视频流的时空结构信息。系统将编解码器元数据作为低成本运行时信号，统一优化视频解码、视觉处理和LLM预填充。具体包括：1）在ViT编码前进行编解码器指导的补丁剪枝；2）在LLM预填充期间进行选择性键值缓存刷新。这些优化完全在线，无需离线训练。

Result: 实验表明，CoStream相比最先进的基线方法，实现了高达3倍的吞吐量提升和高达87%的GPU计算减少，同时保持竞争力，F1分数仅下降0-8%。

Conclusion: CoStream通过利用视频编解码器已有的元数据作为低成本运行时信号，实现了端到端的流式视频分析优化，显著提升了系统效率，同时保持了准确性，为实时视频分析提供了高效解决方案。

Abstract: Video streaming analytics is a crucial workload for vision-language model serving, but the high cost of multimodal inference limits scalability. Prior systems reduce inference cost by exploiting temporal and spatial redundancy in video streams, but they target either the vision transformer (ViT) or the LLM with a limited view, leaving end-to-end opportunities untapped. Moreover, existing methods incur significant overhead to identify redundancy, either through offline profiling and training or costly online computation, making them ill-suited for dynamic real-time streams.
  We present CoStream, a codec-guided streaming video analytics system built on a key observation that video codecs already extract the temporal and spatial structure of each stream as a byproduct of compression. CoStream treats this codec metadata as a low-cost runtime signal to unify optimization across video decoding, visual processing, and LLM prefilling, with transmission reduction as an inherent benefit of operating directly on compressed bitstreams. This drives codec-guided patch pruning before ViT encoding and selective key-value cache refresh during LLM prefilling, both of which are fully online and do not require offline training. Experiments show that CoStream achieves up to 3x throughput improvement and up to 87% GPU compute reduction over state-of-the-art baselines, while maintaining competitive accuracy with only 0-8% F1 drop.

</details>


### [416] [LP-GEMM: Integrating Layout Propagation into GEMM Operations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04599)
*César Guedes Carneiro,Lucas Alvarenga,Guido Araujo,Sandro Rigo*

Main category: cs.DC

TL;DR: LP-GEMM提出一种GEMM分解方法，通过跨连续GEMM操作传播打包布局，消除冗余的数据重新打包，显著提升科学计算和机器学习工作负载中依赖GEMM序列的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在科学计算和现代机器学习工作负载中，依赖的通用矩阵乘法(GEMM)序列通常主导执行时间。虽然最先进的BLAS库积极优化单个GEMM调用，但它们受限于BLAS API要求每个调用独立打包输入矩阵并将输出恢复到规范内存布局。在连续GEMM中，这些约束导致冗余的打包和解包，浪费宝贵的计算资源。

Method: LP-GEMM引入一种GEMM核分解方法，支持跨连续GEMM操作的打包布局传播。该方法消除了不必要的数据重新打包，同时在边界处保持完整的BLAS语义正确性。在x86(AVX-512)和RISC-V(RVV 1.0)架构上评估LP-GEMM，涵盖类MLP和类Attention工作负载。

Result: 在Intel x86上，LP-GEMM对连续GEMM的平均加速比为OpenBLAS的2.25倍，相对于Intel MKL等供应商优化库也有竞争力。通过实现仅使用BLAS级GEMM调用的Llama-3.2推理路径独立C++版本，证明了该方法在微基准测试之外的实用性。

Conclusion: 利用操作间的数据布局传播可以显著提升性能。LP-GEMM通过消除连续GEMM中的冗余打包，在保持BLAS语义的同时实现了显著的性能改进，为依赖GEMM序列的工作负载提供了有效的优化方案。

Abstract: In Scientific Computing and modern Machine Learning (ML) workloads, sequences of dependent General Matrix Multiplications (GEMMs) often dominate execution time. While state-of-the-art BLAS libraries aggressively optimize individual GEMM calls, they remain constrained by the BLAS API, which requires each call to independently pack input matrices and restore outputs to a canonical memory layout. In sequential GEMMs, these constraints cause redundant packing and unpacking, wasting valuable computational resources.
  This paper introduces LP-GEMM, a decomposition of the GEMM kernel that enables packing-layout propagation across sequential GEMM operations. This approach eliminates unnecessary data repacking while preserving full BLAS semantic correctness at the boundaries. We evaluate LP-GEMM on x86 (AVX-512) and RISC-V (RVV 1.0) architectures across MLP-like and Attention-like workloads. Our results show average speedups of 2.25x over OpenBLAS on Intel x86 for sequential GEMMs and competitive gains relative to vendor-optimized libraries such as Intel MKL.
  We demonstrate the practicality of the approach beyond microbenchmarks by implementing a standalone C++ version of the Llama-3.2 inference path using exclusively BLAS-level GEMM calls. These results confirm that leveraging data layout propagation between operations can significantly boost performance.

</details>


<div id='stat.ML'></div>

# stat.ML [[Back]](#toc)

### [417] [Efficient machine unlearning with minimax optimality](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05669)
*Jingyi Xie,Linjun Zhang,Sai Li*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 提出统计框架下的机器遗忘方法，针对平方损失开发ULS算法，证明其极小极大最优性，建立无需完全重训练的推断程序


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为满足GDPR等法规要求和消除偏见/损坏数据影响，需要高效的数据移除方法，避免完全重训练的高昂成本

Method: 建立通用损失函数的统计框架，针对平方损失开发遗忘最小二乘法（ULS），利用预训练估计器、遗忘样本和少量剩余数据子样本来估计剩余数据模型参数

Result: 估计误差分解为oracle项和遗忘成本项，后者由遗忘比例和遗忘模型偏差决定；建立了无需完全重训练的渐近有效推断程序；实验表明方法性能接近重训练但数据访问需求显著降低

Conclusion: 提出的统计框架和ULS方法在机器遗忘任务中实现了理论保证和实际有效性，为满足数据移除法规要求提供了高效解决方案

Abstract: There is a growing demand for efficient data removal to comply with regulations like the GDPR and to mitigate the influence of biased or corrupted data. This has motivated the field of machine unlearning, which aims to eliminate the influence of specific data subsets without the cost of full retraining. In this work, we propose a statistical framework for machine unlearning with generic loss functions and establish theoretical guarantees. For squared loss, especially, we develop Unlearning Least Squares (ULS) and establish its minimax optimality for estimating the model parameter of remaining data when only the pre-trained estimator, forget samples, and a small subsample of the remaining data are available. Our results reveal that the estimation error decomposes into an oracle term and an unlearning cost determined by the forget proportion and the forget model bias. We further establish asymptotically valid inference procedures without requiring full retraining. Numerical experiments and real-data applications demonstrate that the proposed method achieves performance close to retraining while requiring substantially less data access.

</details>


### [418] [Hierarchical Contrastive Learning for Multimodal Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05462)
*Huichao Li,Junhan Yu,Doudou Zhou*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: HCL提出分层对比学习框架，学习全局共享、部分共享和模态特定的表示，通过分层潜变量建模和结构感知对比目标解决传统二分解方法的局限性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统多模态表示学习采用共享-私有二分解方法，将潜信息视为完全共享或完全私有。这种二元视角存在不足：许多因素仅由模态子集共享，忽略这种部分共享会导致过度对齐无关信号并模糊互补信息。

Method: 提出分层对比学习(HCL)框架，结合分层潜变量建模、结构稀疏性和结构感知对比目标。该框架学习全局共享、部分共享和模态特定表示，仅对齐真正共享潜因素的模态。

Result: 在潜变量不相关条件下，证明了分层分解的可识别性，建立了加载矩阵的恢复保证，推导了下游预测的参数估计和超额风险界限。模拟实验显示能准确恢复分层结构并有效选择任务相关组件。在电子健康记录多模态数据上，HCL产生更具信息量的表示并持续提升预测性能。

Conclusion: HCL通过分层表示学习框架有效解决了传统二分解方法的局限性，能够捕捉多模态数据中复杂的共享模式，在理论和实证上都表现出优越性。

Abstract: Multimodal representation learning is commonly built on a shared-private decomposition, treating latent information as either common to all modalities or specific to one. This binary view is often inadequate: many factors are shared by only subsets of modalities, and ignoring such partial sharing can over-align unrelated signals and obscure complementary information. We propose Hierarchical Contrastive Learning (HCL), a framework that learns globally shared, partially shared, and modality-specific representations within a unified model. HCL combines a hierarchical latent-variable formulation with structural sparsity and a structure-aware contrastive objective that aligns only modalities that genuinely share a latent factor. Under uncorrelated latent variables, we prove identifiability of the hierarchical decomposition, establish recovery guarantees for the loading matrices, and derive parameter estimation and excess-risk bounds for downstream prediction. Simulations show accurate recovery of hierarchical structure and effective selection of task-relevant components. On multimodal electronic health records, HCL yields more informative representations and consistently improves predictive performance.

</details>


### [419] [MEC: Machine-Learning-Assisted Generalized Entropy Calibration for Semi-Supervised Mean Estimation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05446)
*Se Yoon Lee,Jae Kwang Kim*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 提出MEC方法，通过校准加权改进预测驱动推断，在模型误设下保持效率，实现接近名义覆盖率和更紧置信区间


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高质量标签获取成本高，而未标记协变量丰富，需要可靠的半监督推断方法。现有预测驱动推断(PPI)在小样本上训练机器学习预测器提升效率，但在模型误设下可能损失效率，且因标签重用导致覆盖失真

Method: 提出机器学习辅助广义熵校准(MEC)，是PPI的交叉拟合、校准加权变体。通过基于Bregman投影的校准框架重新加权标记样本，使其更好地与目标总体对齐。该方法对预测器的仿射变换具有鲁棒性，通过用较弱的投影误差条件替代原始预测误差条件来放宽有效性要求

Result: MEC在比现有PPI变体更弱的假设下达到半参数效率界。在模拟和实际数据应用中，MEC实现接近名义覆盖率和比CF-PPI及原始PPI更紧的置信区间

Conclusion: MEC通过校准加权改进了预测驱动推断，在模型误设下保持效率，提供可靠的半监督推断方法，具有更好的统计性质和实际应用价值

Abstract: Obtaining high-quality labels is costly, whereas unlabeled covariates are often abundant, motivating semi-supervised inference methods with reliable uncertainty quantification. Prediction-powered inference (PPI) leverages a machine-learning predictor trained on a small labeled sample to improve efficiency, but it can lose efficiency under model misspecification and suffer from coverage distortions due to label reuse. We introduce Machine-Learning-Assisted Generalized Entropy Calibration (MEC), a cross-fitted, calibration-weighted variant of PPI. MEC improves efficiency by reweighting labeled samples to better align with the target population, using a principled calibration framework based on Bregman projections. This yields robustness to affine transformations of the predictor and relaxes requirements for validity by replacing conditions on raw prediction error with weaker projection-error conditions. As a result, MEC attains the semiparametric efficiency bound under weaker assumptions than existing PPI variants. Across simulations and a real-data application, MEC achieves near-nominal coverage and tighter confidence intervals than CF-PPI and vanilla PPI.

</details>


### [420] [Individual-heterogeneous sub-Gaussian Mixture Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05337)
*Huan Qing*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 提出个体异质性子高斯混合模型，通过为每个观测分配异质性参数来捕捉实际数据中的尺度变化，并开发了能在高维条件下精确恢复聚类标签的谱方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 经典高斯混合模型假设聚类内部同质性，但实际数据中观测值通常具有不同的尺度或强度，这种异质性在现实应用中普遍存在，需要更灵活的建模框架。

Method: 提出个体异质性子高斯混合模型，为每个观测分配独立的异质性参数；基于该模型开发高效的谱方法，在温和分离条件下能精确恢复真实聚类标签，适用于特征数远大于样本数的高维场景。

Result: 数值实验表明，该方法在合成和真实数据上均优于现有聚类算法，包括为经典高斯混合模型设计的算法；理论证明在温和分离条件下能实现精确聚类恢复。

Conclusion: 个体异质性子高斯混合模型能有效捕捉实际数据中的异质性，提出的谱方法在高维条件下具有理论保证和实际优势，为异质性聚类问题提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: The classical Gaussian mixture model assumes homogeneity within clusters, an assumption that often fails in real-world data where observations naturally exhibit varying scales or intensities. To address this, we introduce the individual-heterogeneous sub-Gaussian mixture model, a flexible framework that assigns each observation its own heterogeneity parameter, thereby explicitly capturing the heterogeneity inherent in practical applications. Built upon this model, we propose an efficient spectral method that provably achieves exact recovery of the true cluster labels under mild separation conditions, even in high-dimensional settings where the number of features far exceeds the number of samples. Numerical experiments on both synthetic and real data demonstrate that our method consistently outperforms existing clustering algorithms, including those designed for classical Gaussian mixture models.

</details>


### [421] [A Muon-Accelerated Algorithm for Low Separation Rank Tensor Generalized Linear Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04726)
*Xiao Liang,Shuang Li*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: LSRTR-M算法在LSR-TGLM框架中引入Muon更新，替代原有的QR投影步骤，显著提升了计算效率和收敛速度


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统LSRTR算法在处理张量广义线性模型时，采用块坐标下降和QR投影来保持因子矩阵正交性，但重复的投影步骤计算量大且收敛慢，需要更高效的算法

Method: 提出LSRTR-M算法，在LSRTR框架中引入Muon（MomentUm Orthogonalized by Newton-Schulz）更新，保留原始块坐标下降方案，但用Muon步骤替代投影式因子更新

Result: 在合成线性、逻辑和泊松LSR-TGLM中，LSRTR-M在迭代次数和实际运行时间上都收敛更快，同时达到更低的归一化估计和预测误差；在Vessel MNIST 3D任务中，进一步提高了计算效率并保持竞争力的分类性能

Conclusion: LSRTR-M通过Muon更新有效解决了传统LSRTR算法的计算瓶颈，为张量广义线性模型提供了更高效、可扩展的估计和分类方法

Abstract: Tensor-valued data arise naturally in multidimensional signal and imaging problems, such as biomedical imaging. When incorporated into generalized linear models (GLMs), naive vectorization can destroy their multi-way structure and lead to high-dimensional, ill-posed estimation. To address this challenge, Low Separation Rank (LSR) decompositions reduce model complexity by imposing low-rank multilinear structure on the coefficient tensor. A representative approach for estimating LSR-based tensor GLMs (LSR-TGLMs) is the Low Separation Rank Tensor Regression (LSRTR) algorithm, which adopts block coordinate descent and enforces orthogonality of the factor matrices through repeated QR-based projections. However, the repeated projection steps can be computationally demanding and slow convergence. Motivated by the need for scalable estimation and classification from such data, we propose LSRTR-M, which incorporates Muon (MomentUm Orthogonalized by Newton-Schulz) updates into the LSRTR framework. Specifically, LSRTR-M preserves the original block coordinate scheme while replacing the projection-based factor updates with Muon steps. Across synthetic linear, logistic, and Poisson LSR-TGLMs, LSRTR-M converges faster in both iteration count and wall-clock time, while achieving lower normalized estimation and prediction errors. On the Vessel MNIST 3D task, it further improves computational efficiency while maintaining competitive classification performance.

</details>


### [422] [Noisy Nonreciprocal Pairwise Comparisons: Scale Variation, Noise Calibration, and Admissible Ranking Regions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04588)
*Jean-Pierre Magnot*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种处理非互易性成对比较矩阵的新方法，将非互易性分解为真实的尺度变化和随机扰动，而非简单地将其视为缺陷进行修正。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统方法通常将成对比较矩阵中的非互易性视为需要立即修正的缺陷。然而，作者认为部分非互易性可能反映了评估尺度的真实变化，而另一部分则是随机扰动。需要一种能够区分这两种成分并保留有用信息的分析方法。

Method: 提出一个加性模型：未知的基础比较矩阵是一致的但不一定是互易的。该矩阵包含互易成分（承载全局排序信息）和对称成分（描述可能的尺度变化）。在此结构化矩阵周围添加随机扰动，并展示如何估计噪声水平、评估尺度变化是否适度，以及为可接受的排序区域分配概率。与直接投影到互易矩阵的方法进行了比较。

Result: 该方法能够：1) 估计噪声水平；2) 评估尺度变化的程度；3) 为严格成对比较下的可接受排序区域分配概率。使用高斯扰动模型（基于中心极限定理的启发式理由）使得能够推导出显式估计器和概率评估，同时保持模型在决策问题中的可解释性。

Conclusion: 非互易性不应被简单地视为缺陷而完全消除，部分非互易性可能包含关于评估尺度变化的真实信息。提出的方法能够区分尺度变化和随机噪声，为决策分析提供了更精细的工具，相比直接投影到互易矩阵的方法保留了更多信息。

Abstract: Pairwise comparisons are widely used in decision analysis, preference modeling, and evaluation problems. In many practical situations, the observed comparison matrix is not reciprocal. This lack of reciprocity is often treated as a defect to be corrected immediately. In this article, we adopt a different point of view: part of the nonreciprocity may reflect a genuine variation in the evaluation scale, while another part is due to random perturbations.
  We introduce an additive model in which the unknown underlying comparison matrix is consistent but not necessarily reciprocal. The reciprocal component carries the global ranking information, whereas the symmetric component describes possible scale variation. Around this structured matrix, we add a random perturbation and show how to estimate the noise level, assess whether the scale variation remains moderate, and assign probabilities to admissible ranking regions in the sense of strict ranking by pairwise comparisons. We also compare this approach with the brutal projection onto reciprocal matrices, which suppresses all symmetric information at once.
  The Gaussian perturbation model is used here not because human decisions are exactly Gaussian, but because observed judgment errors often result from the accumulation of many small effects. In such a context, the central limit principle provides a natural heuristic justification for Gaussian noise. This makes it possible to derive explicit estimators and probability assessments while keeping the model interpretable for decision problems.

</details>


### [423] [Generative Modeling under Non-Monotonic MAR Missingness via Approximate Wasserstein Gradient Flows](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04567)
*Gitte Kremling,Jeffrey Näf,Johannes Lederer*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: FLOWGEM是一种处理随机缺失数据的迭代生成方法，通过最小化观测数据分布与生成样本分布之间的KL散度，使用Wasserstein梯度流的离散化粒子演化来生成完整数据集。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 数据科学中缺失值的普遍存在对后续分析构成重大风险。尽管已有大量研究，但处理一般非单调缺失的原则性非参数方法仍然稀缺，而常用的临时插补方法是否能恢复正确分布尚不明确。

Method: FLOWGEM是一种原则性迭代方法，通过最小化观测数据分布与生成样本分布在不同缺失模式下的期望KL散度。采用Wasserstein梯度流的离散化粒子演化，其中速度场使用密度比的局部线性估计器近似，从而迭代地将初始粒子集合传输到目标分布。

Result: 模拟研究和真实数据基准测试表明，FLOWGEM在一系列设置中实现了最先进的性能，包括具有挑战性的非单调MAR机制情况。

Conclusion: FLOWGEM作为现有插补方法的原则性和实用替代方案，在理论严谨性和实证性能之间架起了桥梁，是填补这一空白的关键一步。

Abstract: The prevalence of missing values in data science poses a substantial risk to any further analyses. Despite a wealth of research, principled nonparametric methods to deal with general non-monotone missingness are still scarce. Instead, ad-hoc imputation methods are often used, for which it remains unclear whether the correct distribution can be recovered. In this paper, we propose FLOWGEM, a principled iterative method for generating a complete dataset from a dataset with values Missing at Random (MAR). Motivated by convergence results of the ignoring maximum likelihood estimator, our approach minimizes the expected Kullback-Leibler (KL) divergence between the observed data distribution and the distribution of the generated sample over different missingness patterns. To minimize the KL divergence, we employ a discretized particle evolution of the corresponding Wasserstein Gradient Flow, where the velocity field is approximated using a local linear estimator of the density ratio. This construction yields a data generation scheme that iteratively transports an initial particle ensemble toward the target distribution. Simulation studies and real-data benchmarks demonstrate that FLOWGEM achieves state-of-the-art performance across a range of settings, including the challenging case of non-monotonic MAR mechanisms. Together, these results position FLOWGEM as a principled and practical alternative to existing imputation methods, and a decisive step towards closing the gap between theoretical rigor and empirical performance.

</details>


### [424] [Avoiding Non-Integrable Beliefs in Expectation Propagation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04264)
*Zilu Zhao,Jichao Chen,Dirk Slock*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 提出了两种新的期望传播框架，允许非可积消息，确保信念可积性，并应用于广义线性模型的信号恢复问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 期望传播算法在优化约束Bethe自由能时，迭代过程可能超出可行集，导致信念不可积。现有方法限制消息可积性，但这缩小了实际可行集，且在因子不可积的极端情况下，仅保证消息可积仍不足以保证信念可积。

Method: 提出了两种新的期望传播框架：1）允许非可积消息，但确保最终信念可积；2）通过特定机制在迭代过程中保持信念可积性。两种方法都放宽了对消息可积性的限制。

Result: 提出的两种框架能够确保期望传播算法在整个迭代过程中保持信念的可积性，即使在因子不可积的极端情况下也能正常工作。在广义线性模型的信号恢复问题中验证了方法的有效性。

Conclusion: 通过放宽消息可积性限制并确保信念可积性，提出的新框架扩展了期望传播算法的适用范围，解决了传统方法在极端情况下的局限性，为广义线性模型等应用提供了更稳健的推理工具。

Abstract: Expectation Propagation (EP) is a widely used iterative message-passing algorithm that decomposes a global inference problem into multiple local ones. It approximates marginal distributions as ``beliefs'' using intermediate functions called ``messages''. It has been shown that the stationary points of EP are the same as corresponding constrained Bethe Free Energy (BFE) optimization problem. Therefore, EP is an iterative method of optimizing the constrained BFE. However, the iterative method may fall out of the feasible set of the BFE optimization problem, i.e., the beliefs are not integrable. In most literature, the authors use various methods to keep all the messages integrable. In most Bayesian estimation problems, limiting the messages to be integrable shrinks the actual feasible set. Furthermore, in extreme cases where the factors are not integrable, making the message itself integrable is not enough to have integrable beliefs. In this paper, two EP frameworks are proposed to ensure that EP has integrable beliefs. Both of the methods allows non-integrable messages. We then investigate the signal recovery problem in Generalized Linear Model (GLM) using our proposed methods.

</details>


### [425] [Sharp asymptotic theory for Q-learning with LDTZ learning rate and its generalization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04218)
*Soham Bonnerjee,Zhipeng Lou,Wei Biao Wu*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 该论文分析了Q-learning中线性衰减至零(LD2Z)和幂律衰减至零(PD2Z-ν)学习率调度的理论性质，证明了它们同时具备常数学习率的快速初始衰减和多项式衰减的渐近收敛保证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统Q-learning理论主要研究常数或多项式衰减学习率，但这些方法存在持续偏差或收敛过慢的问题。LD2Z调度在实践中表现出色但缺乏理论分析，需要填补这一空白。

Method: 提出PD2Z-ν学习率调度类，建立非渐近误差界，推导尾部Polyak-Ruppert平均估计器的中心极限定理，并提供Q-learning迭代部分和过程的时间均匀高斯近似。

Result: 获得PD2Z-ν的尖锐非渐近误差界，建立了新的中心极限理论，提供了强不变原理，并通过大量数值实验验证了理论结果。

Conclusion: LD2Z和PD2Z-ν调度实现了"两全其美"的特性：继承了常数学习率的快速初始衰减，同时保持了多项式衰减的渐近收敛保证，这解释了LD2Z的实证成功并为推断提供了实用指南。

Abstract: Despite the sustained popularity of Q-learning as a practical tool for policy determination, a majority of relevant theoretical literature deals with either constant ($η_{t}\equiv η$) or polynomially decaying ($η_{t} = ηt^{-α}$) learning schedules. However, it is well known that these choices suffer from either persistent bias or prohibitively slow convergence. In contrast, the recently proposed linear decay to zero (\texttt{LD2Z}: $η_{t,n}=η(1-t/n)$) schedule has shown appreciable empirical performance, but its theoretical and statistical properties remain largely unexplored, especially in the Q-learning setting. We address this gap in the literature by first considering a general class of power-law decay to zero (\texttt{PD2Z}-$ν$: $η_{t,n}=η(1-t/n)^ν$). Proceeding step-by-step, we present a sharp non-asymptotic error bound for Q-learning with \texttt{PD2Z}-$ν$ schedule, which then is used to derive a central limit theory for a new \textit{tail} Polyak-Ruppert averaging estimator. Finally, we also provide a novel time-uniform Gaussian approximation (also known as \textit{strong invariance principle}) for the partial sum process of Q-learning iterates, which facilitates bootstrap-based inference. All our theoretical results are complemented by extensive numerical experiments. Beyond being new theoretical and statistical contributions to the Q-learning literature, our results definitively establish that \texttt{LD2Z} and in general \texttt{PD2Z}-$ν$ achieve a best-of-both-worlds property: they inherit the rapid decay from initialization (characteristic of constant step-sizes) while retaining the asymptotic convergence guarantees (characteristic of polynomially decaying schedules). This dual advantage explains the empirical success of \texttt{LD2Z} while providing practical guidelines for inference through our results.

</details>


### [426] [Nearly Optimal Best Arm Identification for Semiparametric Bandits](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.03969)
*Seok-Jin Kim*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 论文研究了半参数赌博机中的固定置信度最佳臂识别问题，其中奖励是臂特征的线性函数加上未知的基线偏移。作者建立了可达到的实例相关下界，并提出了基于XY设计的相消除算法，获得了近乎最优的样本复杂度上界。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 半参数赌博机设置中，奖励包含臂特征的线性项和未知的基线偏移，这需要正交化回归。与线性赌博机BAI不同，该设置的实例最优样本复杂度尚未解决，需要新的理论和方法来填补这一空白。

Method: 针对传导设置，建立了由移位特征上相应线性赌博机复杂度表征的实例相关下界。提出了基于新型XY设计的正交化回归相消除算法，该算法计算高效，能够处理半参数结构。

Result: 获得了近乎最优的高概率样本复杂度上界，仅相差对数因子和一个加性d²项。在合成实例和Jester数据集上的实验显示，该方法明显优于现有基线方法。

Conclusion: 该工作解决了半参数赌博机中固定置信度BAI的实例最优样本复杂度问题，提出了理论下界和高效算法，填补了该领域的重要空白，并为实际应用提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: We study fixed-confidence Best Arm Identification (BAI) in semiparametric bandits, where rewards are linear in arm features plus an unknown additive baseline shift. Unlike linear-bandit BAI, this setting requires orthogonalized regression, and its instance-optimal sample complexity has remained open. For the transductive setting, we establish an attainable instance-dependent lower bound characterized by the corresponding linear-bandit complexity on shifted features. We then propose a computationally efficient phase-elimination algorithm based on a new $XY$-design for orthogonalized regression. Our analysis yields a nearly optimal high-probability sample-complexity upper bound, up to log factors and an additive $d^2$ term, and experiments on synthetic instances and the Jester dataset show clear gains over prior baselines.

</details>


### [427] [Biconvex Biclustering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.03936)
*Sam Rosen,Eric C. Chi,Jason Xu*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 提出一种双凸修改的凸双聚类方法，通过联合学习特征权重和双聚类来提升高维数据性能，并提供理论保证和高效算法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统凸双聚类在高维设置下性能受限，现有启发式方法需要先验丢弃噪声特征，缺乏自适应性和理论保证。

Method: 提出双凸修改的凸双聚类方法，通过联合学习特征权重和双聚类，使用基于近端交替最小化的高效算法，提供超参数调优指导和优化子问题解决方案。

Result: 在亚高斯误差下建立了目标函数的有限样本界，模拟实验显示方法能准确恢复潜在双聚类并适当加权特征，优于同类方法，在淋巴瘤基因微阵列数据中成功恢复与分类匹配的双聚类。

Conclusion: 该方法通过双凸修改提升了凸双聚类在高维数据中的性能，实现了特征的自适应加权和选择，具有理论保证和实际应用价值。

Abstract: This article proposes a biconvex modification to convex biclustering in order to improve its performance in high-dimensional settings. In contrast to heuristics that discard a subset of noisy features a priori, our method jointly learns and accordingly weighs informative features while discovering biclusters. Moreover, the method is adaptive to the data, and is accompanied by an efficient algorithm based on proximal alternating minimization, complete with detailed guidance on hyperparameter tuning and efficient solutions to optimization subproblems. These contributions are theoretically grounded; we establish finite-sample bounds on the objective function under sub-Gaussian errors, and generalize these guarantees to cases where input affinities need not be uniform. Extensive simulation results reveal our method consistently recovers underlying biclusters while weighing and selecting features appropriately, outperforming peer methods. An application to a gene microarray dataset of lymphoma samples recovers biclusters matching an underlying classification, while giving additional interpretation to the mRNA samples via the column groupings and fitted weights.

</details>


<div id='q-bio.GN'></div>

# q-bio.GN [[Back]](#toc)

### [428] [Transcriptomic Models for Immunotherapy Response Prediction Show Limited Cross-cohort Generalisability](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05478)
*Yuheng Liang,Lucy Chuo,Ahmadreza Argha,Nona Farbehi,Lu Chen,Roohallah Alizadehsani,Mehdi Hosseinzadeh,Amin Beheshti,Thantrira Porntaveetusm,Youqiong Ye,Hamid Alinejad-Rokny*

Main category: q-bio.GN

TL;DR: 系统评估了9种转录组学免疫检查点抑制剂反应预测模型，发现其在独立数据集上的跨队列泛化能力有限，预测性能普遍不佳


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 免疫检查点抑制剂虽然改变了癌症治疗，但大量患者存在内在或获得性耐药，准确预测治疗反应是未满足的临床需求。转录组学生物标志物（包括bulk和单细胞RNA测序）提供了有前景的途径，但现有预测模型的跨队列泛化能力尚不明确。

Method: 系统性地对9种最先进的转录组学ICI反应预测模型进行基准测试，包括5种基于bulk RNA-seq的模型（COMPASS、IRNet、NetBio、IKCScore、TNBC-ICI）和4种基于scRNA-seq的模型（PRECISE、DeepGeneX、Tres和scCURE）。使用模型开发时未见过的公开独立数据集进行评估，并进行通路水平分析以揭示生物标志物信号的一致性。

Result: 总体预测性能有限：bulk RNA-seq模型在大多数队列中表现接近随机水平，scRNA-seq模型仅显示边际改善。通路分析显示跨模型的生物标志物信号稀疏且不一致。scRNA-seq预测器在免疫相关程序（如移植排斥）上有所收敛，而bulk RNA-seq模型几乎没有可重复的重叠。PRECISE和NetBio识别出最一致的免疫相关主题，而IRNet主要捕获与ICI生物学弱相关的代谢通路。

Conclusion: 当前转录组学ICI预测模型在跨队列稳健性和生物学一致性方面存在局限性，强调了改进领域适应、标准化预处理和基于生物学原理的模型设计的必要性。

Abstract: Immune checkpoint inhibitors (ICIs) have transformed cancer therapy; yet substantial proportion of patients exhibit intrinsic or acquired resistance, making accurate pre-treatment response prediction a critical unmet need. Transcriptomics-based biomarkers derived from bulk and single-cell RNA sequencing (scRNA-seq) offer a promising avenue for capturing tumour-immune interactions, yet the cross-cohort generalisability of existing prediction models remains unclear.We systematically benchmark nine state-of-the-art transcriptomic ICI response predictors, five bulk RNA-seq-based models (COMPASS, IRNet, NetBio, IKCScore, and TNBC-ICI) and four scRNA-seq-based models (PRECISE, DeepGeneX, Tres and scCURE), using publicly available independent datasets unseen during model development. Overall, predictive performance was modest: bulk RNA-seq models performed at or near chance level across most cohorts, while scRNA-seq models showed only marginal improvements. Pathway-level analyses revealed sparse and inconsistent biomarker signals across models. Although scRNA-seq-based predictors converged on immune-related programs such as allograft rejection, bulk RNA-seq-based models exhibited little reproducible overlap. PRECISE and NetBio identified the most coherent immune-related themes, whereas IRNet predominantly captured metabolic pathways weakly aligned with ICI biology. Together, these findings demonstrate the limited cross-cohort robustness and biological consistency of current transcriptomic ICI prediction models, underscoring the need for improved domain adaptation, standardised preprocessing, and biologically grounded model design.

</details>


### [429] [An Imbalanced Dataset with Multiple Feature Representations for Studying Quality Control of Next-Generation Sequencing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04981)
*Philipp Röchner,Clarissa Krämer,Johannes U Mayer,Franz Rothlauf,Steffen Albrecht,Maximilian Sprang*

Main category: q-bio.GN

TL;DR: 研究人员创建了一个包含37,491个NGS样本的数据集，提供两种质量相关特征表示（QC-34特征和BL特征），用于开发自动化质量控制工具。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有NGS存储库提供的质量相关特征有限，阻碍了自动化质量控制工具的开发。需要包含质量特征的数据集来训练和评估机器学习模型。

Method: 从37,491个人类和鼠类NGS样本中提取两种特征表示：1) 34个来自质量控制工具的特征（QC-34特征）；2) 从ENCODE blocklist识别的有问题基因组区域的读取计数中提取的特征（BL特征，数量从8到1,183个不等）。所有样本都带有基于自动化质量控制和领域专家评估的二元质量标签。

Result: 数据集包含3.2%的低质量样本。监督机器学习算法能够准确从特征中预测质量标签，证实了所提供特征表示的相关性。该数据集使研究人员能够研究不同特征类型（QC-34 vs. BL特征）和粒度（不同数量的BL特征）对质量问题检测的影响。

Conclusion: 提出的数据集和特征表示为开发NGS数据的自动化质量控制工具提供了有价值的资源，使研究人员能够比较不同特征表示在质量问题检测中的效果。

Abstract: Next-generation sequencing (NGS) is a key technique for studying the DNA and RNA of organisms. However, identifying quality problems in NGS data across different experimental settings remains challenging. To develop automated quality-control tools, researchers require datasets with features that capture the characteristics of quality problems. Existing NGS repositories, however, offer only a limited number of quality-related features. To address this gap, we propose a dataset derived from 37.491 NGS samples with two types of quality-related feature representations. The first type consists of 34 features derived from quality control tools (QC-34 features). The second type has a variable number of features ranging from eight to 1.183. These features were derived from read counts in problematic genomic regions identified by the ENCODE blocklist (BL features). All features describe the same human and mouse samples from five genomic assays, allowing direct comparison of feature representations. The proposed dataset includes a binary quality label, derived from automated quality control and domain experts. Among all samples, $3.2\%$ are of low quality. Supervised machine learning algorithms accurately predicted quality labels from the features, confirming the relevance of the provided feature representations. The proposed feature representations enable researchers to study how different feature types (QC-34 vs. BL features) and granularities (varying number of BL features) affect the detection of quality problems.

</details>


<div id='cs.ET'></div>

# cs.ET [[Back]](#toc)

### [430] [Probabilistic Tree Inference Enabled by FDSOI Ferroelectric FETs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05115)
*Pengyu Ren,Xingtian Wang,Boyang Cheng,Jiahui Duan,Giuk Kim,Xuezhong Niu,Halid Mulaosmanovic,Stefan Duenkel,Sven Beyer,X. Sharon Hu,Ningyuan Cao,Kai Ni*

Main category: cs.ET

TL;DR: 提出基于FDSOI-FeFET的单片硬件平台，原生支持ACAM和GRNG功能，用于高效实现贝叶斯决策树，在不确定性量化、可解释性和噪声鲁棒性方面表现优异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自动驾驶、医疗诊断和金融系统等应用需要具备不确定性量化、可解释性和噪声鲁棒性的机器学习模型。贝叶斯决策树适合这些任务，但现有硬件实现存在内存瓶颈、不规则处理模式以及多平台集成复杂性和能耗问题。

Method: 开发基于FDSOI-FeFET的单片硬件平台，利用铁电晶体管的极化特性实现紧凑的多位存储用于ACAM，利用栅漏重叠区的带间隧穿和浮体空穴存储提供高质量熵源用于GRNG。

Result: 在MNIST数据集上，相比传统决策树，在数据集噪声和设备变化条件下分类准确率提升超过40%。相比CPU和GPU基线，速度提升超过两个数量级，能效提升超过四个数量级。

Conclusion: 该单片FDSOI-FeFET硬件平台为贝叶斯决策树提供了可扩展的高效能解决方案，特别适合资源受限和安全关键环境的应用部署。

Abstract: Artificial intelligence applications in autonomous driving, medical diagnostics, and financial systems increasingly demand machine learning models that can provide robust uncertainty quantification, interpretability, and noise resilience. Bayesian decision trees (BDTs) are attractive for these tasks because they combine probabilistic reasoning, interpretable decision-making, and robustness to noise. However, existing hardware implementations of BDTs based on CPUs and GPUs are limited by memory bottlenecks and irregular processing patterns, while multi-platform solutions exploiting analog content-addressable memory (ACAM) and Gaussian random number generators (GRNGs) introduce integration complexity and energy overheads. Here we report a monolithic FDSOI-FeFET hardware platform that natively supports both ACAM and GRNG functionalities. The ferroelectric polarization of FeFETs enables compact, energy-efficient multi-bit storage for ACAM, and band-to-band tunneling in the gate-to-drain overlap region and subsequent hole storage in the floating body provides a high-quality entropy source for GRNG. System-level evaluations demonstrate that the proposed architecture provides robust uncertainty estimation, interpretability, and noise tolerance with high energy efficiency. Under both dataset noise and device variations, it achieves over 40% higher classification accuracy on MNIST compared to conventional decision trees. Moreover, it delivers more than two orders of magnitude speedup over CPU and GPU baselines and over four orders of magnitude improvement in energy efficiency, making it a scalable solution for deploying BDTs in resource-constrained and safety-critical environments.

</details>


### [431] [SAIL: Scene-aware Adaptive Iterative Learning for Long-Tail Trajectory Prediction in Autonomous Vehicles](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04573)
*Bin Rao,Haicheng Liao,Chengyue Wang,Keqiang Li,Zhenning Li,Hai Yang*

Main category: cs.ET

TL;DR: SAIL框架通过定义轨迹的三个关键属性维度（预测误差、碰撞风险、状态复杂度），结合属性引导的数据增强、自适应对比学习策略，显著提升自动驾驶车辆在长尾场景下的轨迹预测性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自动驾驶轨迹预测模型在长尾场景（罕见但安全关键的事件，如突发机动、高碰撞风险和复杂交互）中表现不佳，主要原因是数据不平衡、长尾轨迹定义不充分以及学习策略优先考虑常见行为而非罕见行为。

Method: 提出SAIL框架：1) 在三个关键属性维度（预测误差、碰撞风险、状态复杂度）上定义和建模轨迹；2) 结合属性引导的数据增强和特征提取；3) 采用自适应对比学习策略，包括连续余弦动量调度、相似度加权的硬负样本挖掘、基于演化特征聚类的动态伪标签机制；4) 引入聚焦机制强化每个识别类别中硬正样本的学习。

Result: 在nuScenes和ETH/UCY数据集上的广泛评估表明，SAIL在最难的1%长尾样本上相比最先进的基线方法减少了28.8%的预测误差，同时在所有场景中保持竞争力的准确性。

Conclusion: SAIL框架通过系统性地解决长尾问题，提升了自动驾驶在现实世界混合自动驾驶环境中的可靠轨迹预测能力，为安全导航提供了重要技术支撑。

Abstract: Autonomous vehicles (AVs) rely on accurate trajectory prediction for safe navigation in diverse traffic environments, yet existing models struggle with long-tail scenarios-rare but safety-critical events characterized by abrupt maneuvers, high collision risks, and complex interactions. These challenges stem from data imbalance, inadequate definitions of long-tail trajectories, and suboptimal learning strategies that prioritize common behaviors over infrequent ones. To address this, we propose SAIL, a novel framework that systematically tackles the long-tail problem by first defining and modeling trajectories across three key attribute dimensions: prediction error, collision risk, and state complexity. Our approach then synergizes an attribute-guided augmentation and feature extraction process with a highly adaptive contrastive learning strategy. This strategy employs a continuous cosine momentum schedule, similarity-weighted hard-negative mining, and a dynamic pseudo-labeling mechanism based on evolving feature clustering. Furthermore, it incorporates a focusing mechanism to intensify learning on hard-positive samples within each identified class. This comprehensive design enables SAIL to excel at identifying and forecasting diverse and challenging long-tail events. Extensive evaluations on the nuScenes and ETH/UCY datasets demonstrate SAIL's superior performance, achieving up to 28.8% reduction in prediction error on the hardest 1% of long-tail samples compared to state-of-the-art baselines, while maintaining competitive accuracy across all scenarios. This framework advances reliable AV trajectory prediction in real-world, mixed-autonomy settings.

</details>


<div id='cs.DB'></div>

# cs.DB [[Back]](#toc)

### [432] [Cardinality Estimation for High Dimensional Similarity Queries with Adaptive Bucket Probing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04603)
*Zhonghan Chen,Qintian Guo,Ruiyuan Zhang,Xiaofang Zhou*

Main category: cs.DB

TL;DR: 提出基于LSH的高维相似性搜索基数估计框架，具备轻量级、易构建、在线效率高的特点


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决高维空间中相似性搜索的基数估计问题，需要设计轻量级、易构建且能提供准确估计并满足在线效率要求的框架

Method: 利用局部敏感哈希(LSH)划分向量空间并保持距离邻近性；采用经典多探针LSH原理自适应探索相邻桶以处理不同距离阈值；使用渐进采样减少距离计算量；在产品量化中采用非对称距离计算加速高维空间距离计算；包含支持大规模动态数据更新的更新算法

Result: 实验证明该方法能准确估计相似性查询的基数，并具有令人满意的效率

Conclusion: 提出的框架成功解决了高维相似性搜索的基数估计问题，实现了轻量级、易构建、准确且高效的解决方案，并能支持大规模动态数据更新场景

Abstract: In this work, we address the problem of cardinality estimation for similarity search in high-dimensional spaces. Our goal is to design a framework that is lightweight, easy to construct, and capable of providing accurate estimates with satisfying online efficiency. We leverage locality-sensitive hashing (LSH) to partition the vector space while preserving distance proximity. Building on this, we adopt the principles of classical multi-probe LSH to adaptively explore neighboring buckets, accounting for distance thresholds of varying magnitudes. To improve online efficiency, we employ progressive sampling to reduce the number of distance computations and utilize asymmetric distance computation in product quantization to accelerate distance calculations in high-dimensional spaces. In addition to handling static datasets, our framework includes updating algorithm designed to efficiently support large-scale dynamic scenarios of data updates.Experiments demonstrate that our methods can accurately estimate the cardinality of similarity queries, yielding satisfying efficiency.

</details>


<div id='physics.acc-ph'></div>

# physics.acc-ph [[Back]](#toc)

### [433] [PhaseFlow4D: Physically Constrained 4D Beam Reconstruction via Feedback-Guided Latent Diffusion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.03885)
*Alexander Scheinker,Alexander Plastun,Peter Ostroumov*

Main category: physics.acc-ph

TL;DR: PhaseFlow4D：基于反馈引导的潜在扩散模型，从稀疏的2D投影重建和跟踪带电粒子束的4D横向相空间密度分布，比传统物理模拟快11000倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在真实粒子加速器系统中，直接单次测量带电粒子束的高维4D相空间分布（ρ(x,p_x,y,p_y)）在物理上是不可能的，只能获得有限的1D或2D投影。需要从稀疏的2D观测中重建和跟踪完整的4D相空间分布。

Method: 提出PhaseFlow4D：1）4D VAE编码器-解码器架构，解码器生成完整的4D相空间张量；2）从4D张量解析计算2D投影并与实际2D束流测量比较，构建投影一致性约束作为硬物理先验；3）自适应反馈循环持续调整潜在扩散模型的条件向量，实现在线跟踪时变分布而无需重新训练。

Result: 在稀有同位素束流装置（FRIB）的重离子束多粒子模拟上验证：1）实现准确的4D重建，比传统物理模拟（100核HPC系统约6小时）快11000倍；2）在时变源条件下忠实跟踪分布变化；3）证明基于不完全观测的原则性生成重建方法可稳健地迁移到视觉领域之外。

Conclusion: PhaseFlow4D成功解决了从稀疏2D投影重建和跟踪4D相空间分布的问题，通过架构化的硬物理约束确保物理正确性，自适应反馈机制实现实时跟踪，为粒子加速器诊断提供了高效解决方案，并展示了生成模型在非视觉领域的应用潜力。

Abstract: We address the problem of recovering a time-varying 4D distribution from a sparse sequence of 2D projections - analogous to novel-view synthesis from sparse cameras, but applied to the 4D transverse phase space density $ρ(x,p_x,y,p_y)$ of charged particle beams. Direct single shot measurement of this high-dimensional distribution is physically impossible in real particle accelerator systems; only limited 1D or 2D projections are accessible. We propose PhaseFlow4D, a feedback-guided latent diffusion model that reconstructs and tracks the full 4D phase space from incomplete 2D observations alone, with built-in hard physics constraints. Our core technical contribution is a 4D VAE whose decoder generates the full 4D phase space tensor, from which 2D projections are analytically computed and compared against 2D beam measurements. This projection-consistency constraint guarantees physical correctness by construction - not as a soft penalty, but as an architectural prior. An adaptive feedback loop then continuously tunes the conditioning vector of the latent diffusion model to track time-varying distributions online without retraining. We validate on multi-particle simulations of heavy-ion beams at the Facility for Rare Isotope Beams (FRIB), where full physics simulations require $\sim$6 hours on a 100-core HPC system. PhaseFlow4D achieves accurate 4D reconstructions 11000$\times$ faster while faithfully tracking distribution shifts under time-varying source conditions - demonstrating that principled generative reconstruction under incomplete observations transfers robustly beyond visual domains.

</details>


<div id='cs.DL'></div>

# cs.DL [[Back]](#toc)

### [434] [Paper Espresso: From Paper Overload to Research Insight](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04562)
*Mingzhe Du,Luu Anh Tuan,Dong Huang,See-kiong Ng*

Main category: cs.DL

TL;DR: Paper Espresso是一个开源平台，使用大语言模型自动发现、总结和分析arXiv上的热门论文，提供结构化摘要和趋势分析，已处理超过13,300篇论文。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 科学出版速度加快使得研究人员难以跟上最新进展，需要自动化工具来发现和总结热门研究论文。

Method: 使用大语言模型生成结构化摘要（包含主题标签和关键词），并通过LLM驱动的主题整合提供日、周、月多粒度趋势分析。

Result: 35个月持续部署处理了13,300多篇论文，公开了所有结构化元数据，揭示了AI研究领域的丰富动态：2025年中强化学习用于LLM推理的激增、6,673个非饱和主题出现、主题新颖性与社区参与度正相关（最新颖论文的中位数点赞数高2.0倍）。

Conclusion: Paper Espresso为研究人员提供了有效的工具来跟踪科学进展，揭示了AI研究领域的动态模式，并公开了所有结构化数据供社区使用。

Abstract: The accelerating pace of scientific publishing makes it increasingly difficult for researchers to stay current. We present Paper Espresso, an open-source platform that automatically discovers, summarizes, and analyzes trending arXiv papers. The system uses large language models (LLMs) to generate structured summaries with topical labels and keywords, and provides multi-granularity trend analysis at daily, weekly, and monthly scales through LLM-driven topic consolidation. Over 35 months of continuous deployment, Paper Espresso has processed over 13,300 papers and publicly released all structured metadata, revealing rich dynamics in the AI research landscape: a mid-2025 surge in reinforcement learning for LLM reasoning, non-saturating topic emergence (6,673 unique topics), and a positive correlation between topic novelty and community engagement (2.0x median upvotes for the most novel papers). A live demo is available at https://huggingface.co/spaces/Elfsong/Paper_Espresso.

</details>


<div id='cs.SE'></div>

# cs.SE [[Back]](#toc)

### [435] [QiMeng-PRepair: Precise Code Repair via Edit-Aware Reward Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05963)
*Changxin Ke,Rui Zhang,Jiaming Guo,Yuanbo Wen,Li Ding,Shuo Wang,Xuyuan Zhu,Xiong Peng,Di Huang,Zidong Du,Xing Hu,Qi Guo,Yunji Chen*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 提出PRepair框架解决LLM代码修复中的过度编辑问题，通过自破坏和自修复组件训练模型进行精确修复，显著提升修复精度和效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型语言模型在代码修复中常出现过度编辑问题，即过度修改覆盖了原本正确的代码，这阻碍了错误定位。需要量化过度编辑的影响并引入精确修复任务，最大化重用正确代码同时只修复错误部分。

Method: 提出PRepair框架，包含两个组件：1) Self-Breaking：通过受控错误注入和最小最大采样生成多样化的错误程序；2) Self-Repairing：使用编辑感知组相对策略优化(EA-GRPO)训练模型，采用编辑感知奖励来鼓励最小但正确的编辑。

Result: PRepair在修复精度指标$\mathrm{fix}_1@1$下提升高达31.4%，该指标同时考虑修复正确性和程度。结合推测编辑时显著提高解码吞吐量，展示了精确且实用的代码修复潜力。

Conclusion: PRepair框架有效缓解了LLM代码修复中的过度编辑问题，通过自监督训练方法实现了更精确的修复，在保持修复正确性的同时最小化代码修改，具有实际应用价值。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) achieve strong program repair performance but often suffer from over-editing, where excessive modifications overwrite correct code and hinder bug localization. We systematically quantify its impact and introduce precise repair task, which maximizes reuse of correct code while fixing only buggy parts. Building on this insight, we propose PRepair, a framework that mitigates over-editing and improves repair accuracy. PRepair has two components: Self-Breaking, which generates diverse buggy programs via controlled bug injection and min-max sampling, and Self-Repairing, which trains models with Edit-Aware Group Relative Policy Optimization (EA-GRPO) using an edit-aware reward to encourage minimal yet correct edits. Experiments show that PRepair improves repair precision by up to 31.4% under $\mathrm{fix}_1@1$, a metric that jointly considers repair correctness and extent, and significantly increases decoding throughput when combined with speculative editing, demonstrating its potential for precise and practical code repair.

</details>


### [436] [CAKE: Cloud Architecture Knowledge Evaluation of Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05755)
*Tim Lukas Adam,Phongsakon Mark Konrad,Riccardo Terrenzi,Florian Girardo Lukas,Rahime Yilmaz,Krzysztof Sierszecki,Serkan Ayvaz*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: CAKE基准测试评估LLM对云原生软件架构的理解，包含188个专家验证问题，涵盖布鲁姆分类法的四个认知层次和五个云原生主题。评估22个模型配置发现：MCQ准确率在3B参数后趋于稳定，自由回答分数随模型规模持续提升，两种格式捕捉不同知识维度，推理增强提升自由回答质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前缺乏评估大型语言模型对云原生软件架构实际理解能力的基准测试。虽然LLM作为软件架构副驾驶被广泛应用，但现有基准无法有效衡量其在云原生架构领域的认知能力，需要专门设计的评估框架来填补这一空白。

Method: 提出CAKE基准，包含188个专家验证问题，覆盖布鲁姆修订分类法的四个认知层次（回忆、分析、设计、实现）和五个云原生主题。评估22个模型配置（0.5B-70B参数），使用三次运行多数投票处理选择题，采用LLM-as-a-judge方法评估自由回答。同时测试推理增强（+think）和工具增强（+tool）对性能的影响。

Result: 1) MCQ准确率在3B参数后趋于稳定，最佳模型达到99.2%；2) 自由回答分数在所有认知层次上随模型规模稳步提升；3) 两种评估格式捕捉不同知识维度，MCQ接近天花板而自由回答仍能区分模型能力；4) 推理增强提升自由回答质量，工具增强对小模型性能有负面影响。

Conclusion: 评估格式从根本上影响LLM架构知识的测量方式。MCQ和自由回答分别反映不同的能力维度，需要结合使用以获得全面评估。模型规模对两种格式的影响不同，推理增强能有效提升复杂任务表现。该基准为LLM在云原生架构领域的评估提供了标准化框架。

Abstract: In today's software architecture, large language models (LLMs) serve as software architecture co-pilots. However, no benchmark currently exists to evaluate large language models' actual understanding of cloud-native software architecture. For this reason we present a benchmark called CAKE, which consists of 188 expert-validated questions covering four cognitive levels of Bloom's revised taxonomy -- recall, analyze, design, and implement -- and five cloud-native topics. Evaluation is conducted on 22 model configurations (0.5B--70B parameters) across four LLM families, using three-run majority voting for multiple-choice questions (MCQs) and LLM-as-a-judge scoring for free-responses (FR). Based on this evaluation, four notable findings were identified. First, MCQ accuracy plateaus above 3B parameters, with the best model reaching 99.2\%. Second, free-response scores scale steadily across all cognitive levels. Third, the two formats capture different facets of knowledge, as the MCQ accuracy approaches a ceiling while free-responses continue to differentiate models. Finally, reasoning augmentation (+think) improves free-response quality, while tool augmentation (+tool) degrades performance for small models. These results suggest that the evaluation format fundamentally shapes how we measure architectural knowledge in LLMs.

</details>


### [437] [On the Role of Fault Localization Context for LLM-Based Program Repair](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05481)
*Melika Sepidband,Hung Viet Pham,Hadi Hemmati*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 该研究通过大规模实证分析发现，在基于LLM的自动程序修复中，增加故障定位上下文并不总是提升修复性能。文件级定位是关键因素，而扩展行级上下文常因噪声放大而降低性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 故障定位(FL)是基于大语言模型(LLM)的自动程序修复(APR)的关键组件，但其影响尚未得到充分探索。具体来说，不清楚需要多少定位信息、超出预测错误位置的额外上下文是否有益，以及应如何检索此类上下文。

Method: 在500个SWE-bench验证实例上使用GPT-5-mini进行大规模实证研究，评估了61种配置，这些配置在文件级、元素级和行级上下文方面有所不同。比较了LLM基于检索与结构化启发式方法的效果。

Result: 更多上下文并不一致地改善修复性能。文件级定位是主导因素，相比无文件基线提升15-17倍。扩展文件上下文通常与性能改善相关，成功修复最常见于约6-10个相关文件的配置。元素级上下文扩展提供条件性增益，强烈依赖于文件上下文质量，而行级上下文扩展常因噪声放大而降低性能。LLM基于检索通常优于结构化启发式方法，同时使用更少的文件和token。

Conclusion: 最有效的故障定位上下文策略通常结合了高层次抽象上的广泛语义理解和精确的行级定位。这些发现挑战了"增加定位上下文能统一改善APR"的假设，并为设计基于LLM的故障定位策略提供了实用指导。

Abstract: Fault Localization (FL) is a key component of Large Language Model (LLM)-based Automated Program Repair (APR), yet its impact remains underexplored. In particular, it is unclear how much localization is needed, whether additional context beyond the predicted buggy location is beneficial, and how such context should be retrieved. We conduct a large-scale empirical study on 500 SWE-bench Verified instances using GPT-5-mini, evaluating 61 configurations that vary file-level, element-level, and line-level context. Our results show that more context does not consistently improve repair performance. File-level localization is the dominant factor, yielding a 15-17x improvement over a no-file baseline. Expanding file context is often associated with improved performance, with successful repairs most commonly observed in configurations with approximately 6-10 relevant files. Element-level context expansion provides conditional gains that depend strongly on the file context quality, while line-level context expansion frequently degrades performance due to noise amplification. LLM-based retrieval generally outperforms structural heuristics while using fewer files and tokens. Overall, the most effective FL context strategy typically combines a broad semantic understanding at higher abstraction levels with precise line-level localization. These findings challenge our assumption that increasing the localization context uniformly improves APR, and provide practical guidance for designing LLM-based FL strategies.

</details>


### [438] [Spec Kit Agents: Context-Grounded Agentic Workflows](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05278)
*Pardis Taghavi,Santosh Bhavani*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: Spec Kit Agents：一个多智能体规格驱动开发框架，通过上下文锚定钩子解决AI编码智能体在大型代码库中的"上下文盲"问题，提升代码生成质量并保持测试兼容性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统规格驱动开发中AI编码智能体在大型、演化的代码库中容易产生"上下文盲"问题，导致API幻觉和架构违规，需要更好的上下文锚定机制来提升代码生成质量。

Method: 提出Spec Kit Agents多智能体SDD流水线（包含PM和开发者角色），添加阶段级上下文锚定钩子：只读探测钩子在每个阶段（规格化、规划、任务、实现）基于代码库证据进行锚定，验证钩子检查中间产物与环境一致性。

Result: 在5个代码库的32个功能共128次运行中，上下文锚定钩子将LLM-as-judge综合评分（1-5分）提升0.15分（+3.0%），同时保持99.7-100%的代码库级测试兼容性。在SWE-bench Lite基准测试中，增强钩子将基线提升1.7%，达到58.2%的Pass@1。

Conclusion: Spec Kit Agents通过上下文锚定钩子有效解决了AI编码智能体在大型代码库中的上下文盲问题，显著提升了代码生成质量，同时保持了高测试兼容性，为规格驱动开发提供了实用的多智能体框架。

Abstract: Spec-driven development (SDD) with AI coding agents provides a structured workflow, but agents often remain "context blind" in large, evolving repositories, leading to hallucinated APIs and architectural violations. We present Spec Kit Agents, a multi-agent SDD pipeline (with PM and developer roles) that adds phase-level, context-grounding hooks. Read-only probing hooks ground each stage (Specify, Plan, Tasks, Implement) in repository evidence, while validation hooks check intermediate artifacts against the environment. We evaluate 128 runs covering 32 features across five repositories. Context-grounding hooks improve judged quality by +0.15 on a 1-5 composite LLM-as-judge score (+3.0 percent of the full score; Wilcoxon signed-rank, p < 0.05) while maintaining 99.7-100 percent repository-level test compatibility. We further evaluate the framework on SWE-bench Lite, where augmentation hooks improve baseline by 1.7 percent, achieving 58.2 percent Pass@1.

</details>


### [439] [Compiled AI: Deterministic Code Generation for LLM-Based Workflow Automation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05150)
*Geert Trooskens,Aaron Karlsberg,Anmol Sharma,Lamara De Brouwer,Max Van Puyvelde,Matthew Young,John Thickstun,Gil Alterovitz,Walter A. De Brouwer*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 编译式AI：在编译阶段由大语言模型生成可执行代码，运行时无需模型调用，实现确定性执行，特别适用于高风险的医疗企业工作流。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决高风险的医疗企业工作流中对可靠性、可审计性、成本效率和安全性有严格要求的场景，通过编译式AI范式替代运行时模型调用，提高系统确定性。

Method: 提出约束性LLM代码生成系统架构、四阶段生成验证流水线（将概率性模型输出转化为生产就绪代码），以及包含令牌摊销、确定性、可靠性、安全性和成本的评估框架。

Result: 函数调用任务完成率96%，零执行令牌，在约17个交易时与运行时推理成本持平，1000个交易时令牌消耗减少57倍；文档智能任务关键字段提取达80.0%，行项目识别准确率80.4%；安全评估中提示注入检测准确率96.7%，静态代码安全分析准确率87.5%，零误报。

Conclusion: 编译式AI通过将模型调用从运行时移至编译时，实现了高确定性、可审计性、成本效率和安全性，特别适用于高风险企业工作流，为LLM在生产环境中的可靠部署提供了可行方案。

Abstract: We study compiled AI, a paradigm in which large language models generate executable code artifacts during a compilation phase, after which workflows execute deterministically without further model invocation. This paradigm has antecedents in prior work on declarative pipeline optimization (DSPy) and hybrid neural-symbolic planning (LLM+P); our contribution is a systems-oriented study of its application to high-stakes enterprise workflows, with particular emphasis on healthcare settings where reliability and auditability are critical.
  By constraining generation to narrow business-logic functions embedded in validated templates, compiled AI trades runtime flexibility for predictability, auditability, cost efficiency, and reduced security exposure. We introduce (i) a system architecture for constrained LLM-based code generation, (ii) a four-stage generation-and-validation pipeline that converts probabilistic model output into production-ready code artifacts, and (iii) an evaluation framework measuring operational metrics including token amortization, determinism, reliability, security, and cost.
  We evaluate on two task types: function-calling (BFCL, n=400) and document intelligence (DocILE, n=5,680 invoices). On function-calling, compiled AI achieves 96% task completion with zero execution tokens, breaking even with runtime inference at approximately 17 transactions and reducing token consumption by 57x at 1,000 transactions. On document intelligence, our Code Factory variant matches Direct LLM on key field extraction (KILE: 80.0%) while achieving the highest line item recognition accuracy (LIR: 80.4%). Security evaluation across 135 test cases demonstrates 96.7% accuracy on prompt injection detection and 87.5% on static code safety analysis with zero false positives.

</details>


### [440] [Edit, But Verify: An Empirical Audit of Instructed Code-Editing Benchmarks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05100)
*Amir M. Ebrahimi,Gopi Krishnan Rajbahadur*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 对现有代码编辑基准（CanItEdit和EDIT-Bench）的审计研究，发现它们在编程语言分布、编辑意图、应用领域、测试覆盖率和基准质量等方面与真实世界代码编辑活动存在显著偏差，提出了构建更可靠基准的六个经验性要求。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 指令代码编辑（LLM根据自然语言指令修改现有代码）占真实世界编码助手交互的约19%，但很少有基准直接评估这种能力。现有基准（CanItEdit和EDIT-Bench）是否能够准确反映真实世界的编辑能力尚不清楚。

Method: 对150多个代码相关基准进行调查，聚焦于CanItEdit和EDIT-Bench两个基准。通过比较它们的编程语言、编辑意图和应用领域与真实世界分布（Copilot Arena、AIDev、GitHub Octoverse），并测量所有213个问题的测试数量、语句覆盖率和测试范围。

Result: 1. 两个基准90%以上评估集中在Python，而GitHub最常用语言TypeScript完全缺失；2. 后端和前端开发（占真实编辑活动46%）基本缺失；3. 文档、测试和维护编辑（占人类PRs 31.4%）零表示；4. 测试数量有限（CanItEdit中位数13，EDIT-Bench中位数4）；5. EDIT-Bench中59%的低覆盖率测试套件无法检测编辑区域外的修改；6. EDIT-Bench有15个问题所有40个LLM都无法解决，其中11个问题源于基准本身缺陷；7. 基准内存在代码库重复问题。

Conclusion: 现有基准测量的能力范围比部署决策所需的更窄。提出了六个经验性要求，并发布所有审计工件，以便社区构建能够可靠反映真实世界编辑能力的指令代码编辑基准。

Abstract: Instructed code editing, where an LLM modifies existing code based on a natural language instruction, accounts for roughly 19% of real-world coding assistant interactions. Yet very few benchmarks directly evaluate this capability. From a survey of over 150 code-related benchmarks, we find that only two, CanItEdit and EDIT-Bench, target instructed code editing with human-authored instructions and test-based evaluation. We audit both by comparing their programming languages, edit intents, and application domains against distributions observed in the wild (Copilot Arena, AIDev, GitHub Octoverse), and by measuring test counts, statement coverage, and test scope across all 213 problems. Both benchmarks concentrate over 90\% of evaluation on Python while TypeScript, GitHub's most-used language, is absent. Backend and frontend development, which together constitute 46% of real-world editing activity, are largely missing, and documentation, testing, and maintenance edits (31.4% of human PRs) have zero representation. Both benchmarks have modest test counts (CanItEdit median 13, EDIT-Bench median 4), though CanItEdit compensates with near-complete whole-file coverage and fail-before/pass-after validation. 59\% of EDIT-Bench's low-coverage suites would not detect modifications outside the edit region. EDIT-Bench has 15 problems that are not solved by any of 40 LLMs and 11 of these problems trace failures to poor benchmark artifacts rather than model limitations. Further, 29% of EDIT-Bench problems and 6% of CanItEdit problems share a codebase with at least one other problem within the benchmark. In summary, these benchmarks measure a narrower construct than deployment decisions require. We therefore propose six empirically grounded desiderata and release all audit artifacts so the community can build instructed code-editing benchmarks whose scores reliably reflect real-world editing capability.

</details>


### [441] [Nidus: Externalized Reasoning for AI-Assisted Engineering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05080)
*Danil Gorinevski*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: Nidus是一个治理运行时，通过机械化V模型实现AI辅助软件交付，能够自我托管构建10万行系统，并在每次提交时验证证明义务，实现系统的自我治理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 工程不变量（可追溯的需求、合理的架构、有证据的交付）无法作为学习行为可靠维护，需要外部机制强制执行。现有方法试图通过强化学习和长链推理内部化工程上下文，但Nidus将其外部化为可验证的工件。

Method: 将工程方法外部化为可判定工件，在每次变更前验证。组织标准编译为指南书（约束库），由治理项目导入并通过可判定评估强制执行。实现递归自我治理、基于信息素的协调、近端规范强化和治理剧场预防。

Result: 在自我托管部署中，三个LLM家族（Claude、Gemini、Codex）交付了10万行系统，每次提交都验证证明义务。约束表面复合增长，每个义务永久消除一类非工程输出，开发历史成为形式化开发过程。

Conclusion: Nidus通过外部化工程方法为可验证工件，实现了AI辅助软件交付的机械化治理。约束表面通过递归自我治理、信息素协调和近端规范强化，确保工程不变量得到强制执行，防止治理剧场，形成单调增长的义务集。

Abstract: We present Nidus, a governance runtime that mechanizes the V-model for AI-assisted software delivery. In the self-hosting deployment, three LLM families (Claude, Gemini, Codex) delivered a 100,000-line system under proof obligations verified against the current obligation set on every commit. The system governed its own construction.
  Engineering invariants - traced requirements, justified architecture, evidenced deliveries - cannot be reliably maintained as learned behavior; assurance requires enforcement by a mechanism external to the proposer. Nidus externalizes the engineering methodology into a decidable artifact verified on every mutation before persistence. Organizational standards compile into guidebooks - constraint libraries imported by governed projects and enforced by decidable evaluation.
  Four contributions: (1) recursive self-governance - the constraint surface constrains mutations to itself; (2) stigmergic coordination - friction from the surface routes agents without central control; (3) proximal spec reinforcement - the living artifact externalizes the engineering context that RL and long-chain reasoning try to internalize; the specification is the reward function, UNSAT verdicts shape behavior at inference time, no weight updates; (4) governance theater prevention - compliance evidence cannot be fabricated within the modeled mutation path. The constraint surface compounds: each obligation permanently eliminates a class of unengineered output. The artifact's development history is a formal development - every state satisfies all active obligations, and the obligation set grows monotonically.

</details>


### [442] [Scaling Coding Agents via Atomic Skills](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05013)
*Yingwei Ma,Yue Liu,Xinlong Yang,Yanhao Li,Kelin Fu,Yibo Miao,Yuchong Xie,Zhexu Wang,Shing-Chi Cheung*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 论文提出了一种新的LLM编码智能体扩展范式，从任务级优化转向原子技能掌握，通过联合强化学习提升五个基础原子技能，这些技能的改进能很好地泛化到未见过的复合编码任务中。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前LLM编码智能体主要在复合基准测试（如bug修复）上训练，导致任务特定的过拟合和有限的泛化能力。需要一种更通用的方法来提升编码智能体的性能。

Method: 首先形式化五个基础原子技能：代码定位、代码编辑、单元测试生成、问题复现和代码审查。然后通过联合强化学习对这些原子技能进行扩展训练，确保技能之间没有负面干扰或权衡。

Result: 实验表明，联合强化学习将5个原子技能和5个复合任务的平均性能提升了18.7%。更重要的是，原子技能的改进能很好地泛化到其他未见过的复合编码任务，如bug修复、代码重构、机器学习工程和代码安全。

Conclusion: 通过原子技能训练编码智能体是一种有效的扩展范式，原子技能具有更好的泛化性和可组合性，为编码智能体的发展提供了新的方向。

Abstract: Current LLM coding agents are predominantly trained on composite benchmarks (e.g., bug fixing), which often leads to task-specific overfitting and limited generalization. To address this, we propose a novel scaling paradigm that shifts the focus from task-level optimization to atomic skill mastery. We first formalize five fundamental atomic skills, code localization, code editing, unit-test generation, issue reproduction, and code review, that serve as the basis vectors for complex software engineering tasks. Compared with composite coding tasks, these atomic skills are more generalizable and composable. Then, we scale coding agents by performing joint RL over atomic skills. In this manner, atomic skills are consistently improved without negative interference or trade-offs between them.
