*Hang Yang,Fangju Yang,Yangming Zhang,Ibrahim Alsarraj,Yuhao Wang,Zhenye Luo,Zixi Chen,Ke Wu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出基于流匹配的软体连续机器人逆动力学学习框架，将逆动力学重构为条件流匹配问题，使用Rectified Flow生成物理一致的控制输入，相比传统回归方法将轨迹跟踪RMSE降低50%以上。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 软体连续机器人的逆动力学学习面临高维非线性和复杂驱动耦合的挑战。传统反馈控制器存在控制抖动问题，确定性回归方法难以捕捉复杂非线性映射以实现精确动态跟踪。

Method: 提出基于开环前馈控制的逆动力学框架，将逆动力学重构为条件流匹配问题，采用Rectified Flow作为轻量级实例生成物理一致的控制输入而非条件平均值。引入两个变体：RF-Physical使用基于物理的先验进行残差建模；RF-FWD在流匹配过程中集成前向动力学一致性损失。

Result: 框架将轨迹跟踪RMSE降低50%以上（相比MLP、LSTM、Transformer等基线）。系统在峰值末端执行器速度1.14 m/s下保持稳定开环执行，推理延迟低于毫秒级（0.995 ms）。

Conclusion: 流匹配作为学习软体机器人系统微分逆动力学的鲁棒高性能范式，能够生成物理一致的控制输入，显著提升轨迹跟踪精度和系统性能。

Abstract: Learning the inverse dynamics of soft continuum robots remains challenging due to high-dimensional nonlinearities and complex actuation coupling. Conventional feedback-based controllers often suffer from control chattering due to corrective oscillations, while deterministic regression-based learners struggle to capture the complex nonlinear mappings required for accurate dynamic tracking. Motivated by these limitations, we propose an inverse-dynamics framework for open-loop feedforward control that learns the system's differential dynamics as a generative transport map. Specifically, inverse dynamics is reformulated as a conditional flow-matching problem, and Rectified Flow (RF) is adopted as a lightweight instance to generate physically consistent control inputs rather than conditional averages. Two variants are introduced to further enhance physical consistency: RF-Physical, utilizing a physics-based prior for residual modeling; and RF-FWD, integrating a forward-dynamics consistency loss during flow matching. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that our framework reduces trajectory tracking RMSE by over 50% compared to standard regression baselines (MLP, LSTM, Transformer). The system sustains stable open-loop execution at a peak end-effector velocity of 1.14 m/s with sub-millisecond inference latency (0.995 ms). This work demonstrates flow matching as a robust, high-performance paradigm for learning differential inverse dynamics in soft robotic systems.

</details>


### [520] [Open-Loop Planning, Closed-Loop Verification: Speculative Verification for VLA](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.02965)
*Zihua Wang,Zhitao Lin,Ruibo Li,Yu Zhang,Xu Yang,Siya Mi,Xiu-Shen Wei*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: SV-VLA框架结合了高效的开环长时程规划与轻量级闭环在线验证，在保持VLA模型高效性的同时提升动态环境中的控制鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VLA模型在具身控制中表现出色但推理成本高，采用动作分块预测的方法虽然提高了效率，但开环执行对环境变化敏感且缺乏闭环反馈，容易导致误差累积。

Method: 提出SV-VLA框架：使用重型VLA作为低频宏观规划器生成动作块和规划上下文，同时部署轻量级验证器基于最新观测持续监控执行。验证器结合当前观测和规划上下文，比较规划动作与闭环参考动作，仅在必要时触发重新规划。

Result: 实验表明SV-VLA成功结合了分块预测的高效性与闭环控制的鲁棒性，能够在动态环境中实现高效可靠的VLA控制。

Conclusion: SV-VLA框架有效解决了VLA模型在效率和鲁棒性之间的权衡问题，为动态环境中的具身控制提供了兼顾计算效率和执行可靠性的解决方案。

Abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models, as large foundation models for embodied control, have shown strong performance in manipulation tasks. However, their performance comes at high inference cost. To improve efficiency, recent methods adopt action chunking, which predicts a sequence of future actions for open-loop execution. Although effective for reducing computation, open-loop execution is sensitive to environmental changes and prone to error accumulation due to the lack of close-loop feedback. To address this limitation, we propose Speculative Verification for VLA Control (SV-VLA), a framework that combines efficient open-loop long-horizon planning with lightweight closed-loop online verification. Specifically, SV-VLA uses a heavy VLA as a low-frequency macro-planner to generate an action chunk together with a planning context, while a lightweight verifier continuously monitors execution based on the latest observations. Conditioned on both the current observation and the planning context, the verifier compares the planned action against a closed-loop reference action and triggers replanning only when necessary. Experiments demonstrate that SV-VLA combines the efficiency of chunked prediction with the robustness of closed-loop control, enabling efficient and reliable VLA-based control in dynamic environments. Code is available: https://github.com/edsad122/SV-VLA.

</details>


### [521] [Learning Task-Invariant Properties via Dreamer: Enabling Efficient Policy Transfer for Quadruped Robots](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.02911)
*Junyang Liang,Yuxuan Liu,Yabin Chang,Junfan Lin,Junkai Ji,Hui Li,Changxin Huang,Jianqiang Li*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: DreamTIP框架在Dreamer世界模型中引入任务不变属性学习，通过LLM指导识别接触稳定性、地形间隙等鲁棒属性，结合混合回放缓冲和正则化约束，显著提升四足机器人在复杂地形上的sim-to-real迁移性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决四足机器人在多样动态地形上运动的主要挑战：仿真与现实环境之间的差异。传统sim-to-real方法依赖手动特征设计或昂贵的真实世界微调，需要更高效、鲁棒的迁移方法。

Method: 提出DreamTIP框架：1) 利用大语言模型识别任务不变属性（如接触稳定性、地形间隙）；2) 将这些属性作为辅助预测目标集成到Dreamer世界模型中；3) 设计高效适应策略，包括混合回放缓冲和正则化约束，防止表示崩溃和灾难性遗忘。

Result: 在Stair、Climb、Tilt、Crawl等复杂地形上，DreamTIP显著优于现有基线方法：在8个模拟迁移任务中平均性能提升28.1%；在真实世界Climb任务中，基线成功率仅10%，而DreamTIP达到100%成功率。

Conclusion: 将任务不变属性融入Dreamer学习为机器人运动控制提供了一种新颖的鲁棒可迁移解决方案，有效解决了sim-to-real迁移中的动态变化适应问题，显著提升了四足机器人在复杂地形上的运动性能。

Abstract: Achieving quadruped robot locomotion across diverse and dynamic terrains presents significant challenges, primarily due to the discrepancies between simulation environments and real-world conditions. Traditional sim-to-real transfer methods often rely on manual feature design or costly real-world fine-tuning. To address these limitations, this paper proposes the DreamTIP framework, which incorporates Task-Invariant Properties learning within the Dreamer world model architecture to enhance sim-to-real transfer capabilities. Guided by large language models, DreamTIP identifies and leverages Task-Invariant Properties, such as contact stability and terrain clearance, which exhibit robustness to dynamic variations and strong transferability across tasks. These properties are integrated into the world model as auxiliary prediction targets, enabling the policy to learn representations that are insensitive to underlying dynamic changes. Furthermore, an efficient adaptation strategy is designed, employing a mixed replay buffer and regularization constraints to rapidly calibrate to real-world dynamics while effectively mitigating representation collapse and catastrophic forgetting. Extensive experiments on complex terrains, including Stair, Climb, Tilt, and Crawl, demonstrate that DreamTIP significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in both simulated and real-world environments. Our method achieves an average performance improvement of 28.1% across eight distinct simulated transfer tasks. In the real-world Climb task, the baseline method achieved only a 10\ success rate, whereas our method attained a 100% success rate. These results indicate that incorporating Task-Invariant Properties into Dreamer learning offers a novel solution for achieving robust and transferable robot locomotion.

</details>


### [522] [RAGE: A Tightly Coupled Radar-Aided Grip Estimator For Autonomous Race Cars](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.02892)
*Davide Malvezzi,Nicola Musiu,Eugenio Mascaro,Francesco Iacovacci,Marko Bertogna*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: RAGE：一种仅使用标准传感器（IMU和雷达）实时估计车辆速度、轮胎侧偏角和侧向力的方法，适用于自动驾驶赛车在极限工况下的运行。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 实时估计车辆-轮胎-路面摩擦对自动驾驶赛车安全有效运行至关重要。传统方法依赖昂贵、专业的传感器，限制了可扩展性和部署。

Method: 提出RAGE实时估计器，仅使用标准传感器（如IMU和雷达）同时推断车辆速度、轮胎侧偏角和侧向力。

Result: 通过高保真仿真和EAV-24自动驾驶赛车的真实实验验证，证明了该方法在估计车辆侧向动力学方面的准确性和有效性。

Conclusion: RAGE提供了一种使用标准传感器实时估计车辆动力学参数的有效方法，解决了传统方法依赖昂贵专业传感器的问题，适用于自动驾驶赛车在极限工况下的应用。

Abstract: Real-time estimation of vehicle-tire-road friction is critical for allowing autonomous race cars to safely and effectively operate at their physical limits. Traditional approaches to measure tire grip often depend on costly, specialized sensors that require custom installation, limiting scalability and deployment. In this work, we introduce RAGE, a novel real-time estimator that simultaneously infers the vehicle velocity, slip angles of the tires and the lateral forces that act on them, using only standard sensors, such as IMUs and RADARs, which are commonly available on most of modern autonomous platforms. We validate our approach through both high-fidelity simulations and real-world experiments conducted on the EAV-24 autonomous race car, demonstrating the accuracy and effectiveness of our method in estimating the vehicle lateral dynamics.

</details>


### [523] [Orientation Matters: Learning Radiation Patterns of Multi-Rotor UAVs In-Flight to Enhance Communication Availability Modeling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.02827)
*Martin Zoula,Daniel Bonilla Licea,Jan Faigl,Václav Navrátil,Martin Saska*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一种通过校准飞行数据学习异构四旋翼无人机天线辐射模式的方法，使用球谐级数或诱导样本加权平均建模，通过多项式系数线性回归同时解耦两个独立无人机的辐射模式，在真实数据集上实现3.6 dB RMS误差。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在现实应用中，无人机设置变化（如有效载荷变更）需要快速重新校准天线辐射模式，以实现精确的自主路径规划和集群控制。现有方法缺乏对异构无人机天线辐射模式的同时学习和解耦能力。

Method: 1) 使用球谐级数或诱导样本加权平均建模天线辐射模式；2) 通过多项式系数线性回归同时解耦两个独立无人机的辐射模式；3) 设计联合校准轨迹，利用无障碍消声高度环境中的可用飞行时间。

Result: 在真实世界数据集上验证了学习两个辐射模式的可行性，达到3.6 dB RMS误差，与测量噪声水平相当。该方法能够实现快速重新校准，支持精确的自主路径规划和集群控制。

Conclusion: 提出的辐射模式学习和解耦方法能够有效处理无人机设置变化，为现实应用中需要快速重新校准的场景提供了可行解决方案，有助于实现精确的自主路径规划和集群控制。

Abstract: The paper presents an approach for learning antenna Radiation Patterns (RPs) of a pair of heterogeneous quadrotor Uncrewed Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) by calibration flight data. RPs are modeled either as a Spherical Harmonics series or as a weighted average over inducing samples. Linear regression of polynomial coefficients simultaneously decouples the two independent UAVs' RPs. A joint calibration trajectory exploits available flight time in an obstacle-free anechoic altitude. Evaluation on a real-world dataset demonstrates the feasibility of learning both radiation patterns, achieving 3.6 dB RMS error, the measurement noise level. The proposed RP learning and decoupling can be exploited in rapid recalibration upon payload changes, thereby enabling precise autonomous path planning and swarm control in real-world applications where setup changes are expected.

</details>


### [524] [MFE: A Multimodal Hand Exoskeleton with Interactive Force, Pressure and Thermo-haptic Feedback](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.02820)
*Ziyuan Tang,Yitian Guo,Chenxi Xiao*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种多模态反馈外骨骼（MFE），用于在机器人遥操作中提供力、压力和热反馈，增强用户的情境感知能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前触觉设备通常只提供单一模态的反馈，无法传达丰富的多模态感官信息（力、压力、热感觉），限制了机器人遥操作中的情境感知和交互真实性。

Method: 开发了多模态反馈外骨骼（MFE），具有20个自由度的手部姿态捕捉能力。采用主动机构提供3.5-8.1N的推拉力反馈；指尖集成基于电渗原理的平面执行器提供压力和振动刺激（最高2.47kPa）；集成热电热泵提供10-55°C的热反馈。将MFE集成到使用X-Arm 6和Inspire Hand机械臂的机器人遥操作系统中进行验证。

Result: 用户研究中，参与者成功识别和操作可变形物体，并能区分具有不同温度的远程物体。结果表明MFE增强了情境感知能力，提高了机器人遥操作系统的可用性和透明度。

Conclusion: MFE通过提供力、压力和热的多模态触觉反馈，有效解决了现有触觉设备反馈模式单一的问题，显著提升了机器人遥操作系统的交互真实性和用户体验。

Abstract: Recent advancements in virtual reality and robotic teleoperation have greatly increased the variety of haptic information that must be conveyed to users. While existing haptic devices typically provide unimodal feedback to enhance situational awareness, a gap remains in their ability to deliver rich, multimodal sensory feedback encompassing force, pressure, and thermal sensations. To address this limitation, we present the Multimodal Feedback Exoskeleton (MFE), a hand exoskeleton designed to deliver hybrid haptic feedback. The MFE features 20 degrees of freedom for capturing hand pose. For force feedback, it employs an active mechanism capable of generating 3.5-8.1 N of pushing and pulling forces at the fingers' resting pose, enabling realistic interaction with deformable objects. The fingertips are equipped with flat actuators based on the electro-osmotic principle, providing pressure and vibration stimuli and achieving up to 2.47 kPa of contact pressure to render tactile sensations. For thermal feedback, the MFE integrates thermoelectric heat pumps capable of rendering temperatures from 10 to 55 degrees Celsius. We validated the MFE by integrating it into a robotic teleoperation system using the X-Arm 6 and Inspire Hand manipulator. In user studies, participants successfully recognized and manipulated deformable objects and differentiated remote objects with varying temperatures. These results demonstrate that the MFE enhances situational awareness, as well as the usability and transparency of robotic teleoperation systems.

</details>


### [525] [Learning Structured Robot Policies from Vision-Language Models via Synthetic Neuro-Symbolic Supervision](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.02812)
*Alessandro Adami,Tommaso Tubaldo,Marco Todescato,Ruggero Carli,Pietro Falco*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该研究提出了一种神经符号方法，使用视觉语言模型从视觉观察、自然语言指令和系统规范生成可执行的行为树策略，通过合成数据监督实现结构化机器人策略学习。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前基于视觉语言模型的端到端视觉运动策略不透明且难以分析，限制了其在安全关键机器人应用中的使用。而经典机器人系统依赖结构化策略表示，提供可解释性、模块化和反应式执行。需要弥合高维学习和符号控制之间的差距。

Method: 提出神经符号方法：1）使用VLM从多模态感知（视觉观察、自然语言指令、结构化系统规范）合成可执行的行为树策略；2）引入自动化流水线生成合成多模态数据集，包含域随机化场景和由基础模型生成的指令-策略对；3）完全从合成监督中学习结构化策略。

Result: 在两个机器人操作器上的真实世界实验表明，完全从合成监督学习的结构化策略成功迁移到物理系统。基础模型能够适应生成可解释的结构化机器人策略。

Conclusion: 基础模型可以适应生成可解释和结构化的机器人策略，为多模态机器人决策提供不透明端到端方法的替代方案。该方法结合了学习方法的感知能力和符号方法的可解释性。

Abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) have recently demonstrated strong capabilities in mapping multimodal observations to robot behaviors. However, most current approaches rely on end-to-end visuomotor policies that remain opaque and difficult to analyze, limiting their use in safety-critical robotic applications. In contrast, classical robotic systems often rely on structured policy representations that provide interpretability, modularity, and reactive execution. This work investigates how foundation models can be specialized to generate structured robot policies grounded in multimodal perception, bridging high-dimensional learning and symbolic control. We propose a neuro-symbolic approach in which a VLM synthesizes executable Behavior Tree policies from visual observations, natural language instructions, and structured system specifications. To enable scalable supervision without manual annotation, we introduce an automated pipeline that generates a synthetic multimodal dataset of domain-randomized scenes paired with instruction-policy examples produced by a foundation model. Real-world experiments on two robotic manipulators show that structured policies learned entirely from synthetic supervision transfer successfully to physical systems. The results indicate that foundation models can be adapted to produce interpretable and structured robot policies, providing an alternative to opaque end-to-end approaches for multimodal robot decision making.

</details>


### [526] [Vision-Based End-to-End Learning for UAV Traversal of Irregular Gaps via Differentiable Simulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.02779)
*Linzuo Zhang,Yu Hu,Feng Yu,Yang Deng,Wenxian Yu,Danping Zou*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种完全基于视觉的端到端框架，使无人机能够直接根据深度图像生成控制指令，穿越复杂且未见过的环境中的不规则缝隙。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统方法依赖显式的缝隙提取和测量，而现有的端到端方法通常假设规则形状的缝隙，导致泛化能力差和实用性有限。无人机在检查、搜救和灾难响应等应用中需要具备穿越狭窄不规则缝隙的能力。

Method: 采用完全基于视觉的端到端框架，将深度图像直接映射到控制指令。在SE(3)空间中工作，利用可微分模拟、Stop-Gradient算子和双峰初始化分布实现稳定穿越。还包含两个辅助预测模块：缝隙穿越成功分类器和可穿越性预测器。

Result: 广泛的模拟和真实世界实验证明了该方法的有效性、泛化能力和实际鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 该框架能够使无人机在未见环境中稳定穿越连续复杂缝隙，解决了传统方法和现有端到端方法的局限性，具有实际应用价值。

Abstract: -Navigation through narrow and irregular gaps is an essential skill in autonomous drones for applications such as inspection, search-and-rescue, and disaster response. However, traditional planning and control methods rely on explicit gap extraction and measurement, while recent end-to-end approaches often assume regularly shaped gaps, leading to poor generalization and limited practicality. In this work, we present a fully vision-based, end-to-end framework that maps depth images directly to control commands, enabling drones to traverse complex gaps within unseen environments. Operating in the Special Euclidean group SE(3), where position and orientation are tightly coupled, the framework leverages differentiable simulation, a Stop-Gradient operator, and a Bimodal Initialization Distribution to achieve stable traversal through consecutive gaps. Two auxiliary prediction modules-a gap-crossing success classifier and a traversability predictor-further enhance continuous navigation and safety. Extensive simulation and real-world experiments demonstrate the approach's effectiveness, generalization capability, and practical robustness.

</details>


### [527] [Geometrically-Constrained Radar-Inertial Odometry via Continuous Point-Pose Uncertainty Modeling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.02745)
*Wooseong Yang,Dongjae Lee,Minwoo Jung,Ayoung Kim*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种几何约束的雷达-惯性里程计与建图方法，通过联合处理点和位姿不确定性，利用连续轨迹模型传播控制点的不确定性，实现动态观测置信度评估和自适应雷达点降权，显著提升了在挑战性环境中的定位精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 雷达里程计在恶劣环境中的鲁棒定位至关重要，但雷达回波的稀疏性和独特的噪声特性限制了其性能。现有方法难以有效处理雷达测量的不确定性，导致建图精度和里程计性能受限。

Method: 采用连续轨迹模型估计任意时间戳的位姿不确定性，通过传播控制点的不确定性实现。将位姿不确定性连续集成到异方差测量不确定性中，在点投影过程中动态评估观测置信度，自适应降权无信息雷达点。利用量化的不确定性构建高保真地图，并在雷达-惯性里程计中结合显式几何约束。

Result: 在多样化的真实世界数据集上进行广泛实验，结果表明该方法在准确性和效率方面均显著优于现有基线方法，实现了实质性性能提升。

Conclusion: 提出的几何约束雷达-惯性里程计与建图框架通过联合处理点和位姿不确定性，结合显式几何约束和不确定性感知建图，有效提升了雷达里程计在挑战性环境中的性能，为鲁棒定位提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: Radar odometry is crucial for robust localization in challenging environments; however, the sparsity of reliable returns and distinctive noise characteristics impede its performance. This paper introduces geometrically-constrained radar-inertial odometry and mapping that jointly consolidates point and pose uncertainty. We employ the continuous trajectory model to estimate the pose uncertainty at any arbitrary timestamp by propagating uncertainties of the control points. These pose uncertainties are continuously integrated with heteroscedastic measurement uncertainty during point projection, thereby enabling dynamic evaluation of observation confidence and adaptive down-weighting of uninformative radar points. By leveraging quantified uncertainties in radar mapping, we construct a high-fidelity map that improves odometry accuracy under imprecise radar measurements. Moreover, we reveal the effectiveness of explicit geometrical constraints in radar-inertial odometry when incorporated with the proposed uncertainty-aware mapping framework. Extensive experiments on diverse real-world datasets demonstrate the superiority of our method, yielding substantial performance improvements in both accuracy and efficiency compared to existing baselines.

</details>


### [528] [Learning Locomotion on Complex Terrain for Quadrupedal Robots with Foot Position Maps and Stability Rewards](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.02744)
*Matthew Hwang,Yubin Liu,Ryo Hakoda,Takeshi Oishi*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一种结合足部位置映射和动态稳定性奖励的注意力框架，用于四足机器人在复杂地形上的精确稳定运动


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前基于强化学习的四足运动方法虽然提高了泛化性和足部放置精度，但依赖从关节角度隐式推断足部位置，缺乏基于优化方法的显式精度和稳定性保证

Method: 引入高度图中的足部位置映射，结合动态运动稳定性奖励，在注意力框架中实现复杂地形上的运动控制

Result: 在训练中见过的地形和域外地形上广泛验证，结果表明该方法能够实现精确稳定的运动，提高了在域内和域外地形的运动成功率

Conclusion: 提出的方法通过显式足部位置映射和动态稳定性奖励，在注意力框架下实现了四足机器人在复杂地形上的精确稳定运动

Abstract: Quadrupedal locomotion over complex terrain has been a long-standing research topic in robotics. While recent reinforcement learning-based locomotion methods improve generalizability and foot-placement precision, they rely on implicit inference of foot positions from joint angles, lacking the explicit precision and stability guarantees of optimization-based approaches. To address this, we introduce a foot position map integrated into the heightmap, and a dynamic locomotion-stability reward within an attention-based framework to achieve locomotion on complex terrain. We validate our method extensively on terrains seen during training as well as out-of-domain (OOD) terrains. Our results demonstrate that the proposed method enables precise and stable movement, resulting in improved locomotion success rates on both in-domain and OOD terrains.

</details>


### [529] [V2X-QA: A Comprehensive Reasoning Dataset and Benchmark for Multimodal Large Language Models in Autonomous Driving Across Ego, Infrastructure, and Cooperative Views](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.02710)
*Junwei You,Pei Li,Zhuoyu Jiang,Weizhe Tang,Zilin Huang,Rui Gan,Jiaxi Liu,Yan Zhao,Sikai Chen,Bin Ran*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: V2X-QA是一个用于评估多模态大语言模型在自动驾驶中多视角推理能力的真实世界数据集和基准测试，涵盖车辆侧、基础设施侧和协同视角，通过专家验证的多选题标注实现细粒度诊断。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自动驾驶基准测试主要关注自我中心视角，无法系统评估模型在基础设施中心和协同驾驶条件下的性能，因此需要开发能够评估多视角推理能力的基准。

Method: 构建V2X-QA数据集，采用视图解耦评估协议，在统一的MCQA框架下支持车辆侧、基础设施侧和协同驾驶条件的受控比较。数据集包含12个任务分类，涵盖感知、预测、推理和规划，并通过专家验证的MCQA标注实现细粒度诊断。同时提出V2X-MoE基准对齐基线模型，采用显式视图路由和特定视角的LoRA专家。

Result: 对10个代表性SOTA专有和开源模型的评估显示：视角可访问性显著影响性能；基础设施侧推理支持有意义的宏观交通理解；协同推理仍然具有挑战性，需要跨视图对齐和证据整合而非简单增加视觉输入。V2X-MoE表现出色，表明显式视角专业化是多视图推理的有前景方向。

Conclusion: V2X-QA为研究联网自动驾驶中的多视角推理、可靠性和协同物理智能提供了基础。显式视角专业化是提升多视图推理能力的有效方法，协同推理需要更复杂的跨视图对齐机制。

Abstract: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have shown strong potential for autonomous driving, yet existing benchmarks remain largely ego-centric and therefore cannot systematically assess model performance in infrastructure-centric and cooperative driving conditions. In this work, we introduce V2X-QA, a real-world dataset and benchmark for evaluating MLLMs across vehicle-side, infrastructure-side, and cooperative viewpoints. V2X-QA is built around a view-decoupled evaluation protocol that enables controlled comparison under vehicle-only, infrastructure-only, and cooperative driving conditions within a unified multiple-choice question answering (MCQA) framework. The benchmark is organized into a twelve-task taxonomy spanning perception, prediction, and reasoning and planning, and is constructed through expert-verified MCQA annotation to enable fine-grained diagnosis of viewpoint-dependent capabilities. Benchmark results across ten representative state-of-the-art proprietary and open-source models show that viewpoint accessibility substantially affects performance, and infrastructure-side reasoning supports meaningful macroscopic traffic understanding. Results also indicate that cooperative reasoning remains challenging since it requires cross-view alignment and evidence integration rather than simply additional visual input. To address these challenges, we introduce V2X-MoE, a benchmark-aligned baseline with explicit view routing and viewpoint-specific LoRA experts. The strong performance of V2X-MoE further suggests that explicit viewpoint specialization is a promising direction for multi-view reasoning in autonomous driving. Overall, V2X-QA provides a foundation for studying multi-perspective reasoning, reliability, and cooperative physical intelligence in connected autonomous driving. The dataset and V2X-MoE resources are publicly available at: https://github.com/junwei0001/V2X-QA.

</details>


### [530] [A Rapid Instrument Exchange System for Humanoid Robots in Minimally Invasive Surgery](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.02707)
*Bingcong Zhang,Yihang Lyv,Lianbo Ma,Yushi He,Pengfei Wei,Xingchi Liu,Jinhua Li,Jianchang Zhao,Lizhi Pan*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于沉浸式遥操作的人形机器人快速器械交换系统，通过单轴顺应性对接和环境约束释放机制实现低延迟操作，结合第一人称视角感知降低认知负荷


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 人形机器人具有微创手术的巨大潜力，但其固有的双臂配置需要高效的器械交换能力来执行复杂手术，模仿外科医生手动切换器械的自然工作流程

Method: 采用沉浸式遥操作快速器械交换系统，基于单轴顺应性对接和环境约束释放的低延迟机制，集成头戴式显示器的实时第一人称视角感知

Result: 专家与新手的比较评估显示系统具有高操作鲁棒性和快速收敛的学习曲线；新手经过短暂训练后器械装卸性能显著提升；系统成功验证了人形机器人在受限临床环境中执行稳定器械交换的技术可行性

Conclusion: 虽然长距离空间对齐在时间成本和协作稳定性方面仍存在挑战，但该系统显著降低了对接过程中的操作复杂性和认知负荷，为人形机器人微创手术应用提供了可行的技术方案

Abstract: Humanoid robot technologies have demonstrated immense potential for minimally invasive surgery (MIS). Unlike dedicated multi-arm surgical platforms, the inherent dual-arm configuration of humanoid robots necessitates an efficient instrument exchange capability to perform complex procedures, mimicking the natural workflow where surgeons manually switch instruments. To address this, this paper proposes an immersive teleoperated rapid instrument exchange system. The system utilizes a low-latency mechanism based on single-axis compliant docking and environmental constraint release. Integrated with real-time first-person view (FPV) perception via a head-mounted display (HMD), this framework significantly reduces operational complexity and cognitive load during the docking process. Comparative evaluations between experts and novices demonstrate high operational robustness and a rapidly converging learning curve; novice performance in instrument attachment and detachment improved substantially after brief training. While long-distance spatial alignment still presents challenges in time cost and collaborative stability, this study successfully validates the technical feasibility of humanoid robots executing stable instrument exchanges within constrained clinical environments.

</details>


### [531] [Differentiable SpaTiaL: Symbolic Learning and Reasoning with Geometric Temporal Logic for Manipulation Tasks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.02643)
*Licheng Luo,Kaier Liang,Cristian-Ioan Vasile,Mingyu Cai*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出Differentiable SpaTiaL，首个端到端可微的符号时空逻辑工具箱，通过构建平滑的几何基元实现从高层语义规范到底层几何配置的可微映射


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在杂乱环境中执行复杂操作需要满足耦合的几何和时间约束。现有可微时序逻辑主要关注机器人内部状态而忽略交互对象-环境关系，而考虑这种交互的空间逻辑方法依赖离散几何引擎，这会破坏计算图并阻碍精确梯度传播

Method: 提出完全张量化的工具箱，直接在多边形集合上构建平滑、自动梯度兼容的几何基元。通过解析推导关键空间谓词（包括有符号距离、相交、包含和方向关系）的可微松弛，实现端到端可微映射，无需调用外部离散求解器

Result: 该框架解锁了两个核心能力：(i) 在严格时空约束下进行大规模并行轨迹优化，(ii) 通过反向传播直接从演示中学习空间逻辑参数。实验结果验证了所提框架的有效性和可扩展性

Conclusion: Differentiable SpaTiaL是首个端到端可微的符号时空逻辑工具箱，通过可微空间谓词实现了从高层语义规范到底层几何配置的完整可微映射，为复杂操作任务提供了强大的优化和学习能力

Abstract: Executing complex manipulation in cluttered environments requires satisfying coupled geometric and temporal constraints. Although Spatio-Temporal Logic (SpaTiaL) offers a principled specification framework, its use in gradient-based optimization is limited by non-differentiable geometric operations. Existing differentiable temporal logics focus on the robot's internal state and neglect interactive object-environment relations, while spatial logic approaches that capture such interactions rely on discrete geometry engines that break the computational graph and preclude exact gradient propagation. To overcome this limitation, we propose Differentiable SpaTiaL, a fully tensorized toolbox that constructs smooth, autograd-compatible geometric primitives directly over polygonal sets. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first end-to-end differentiable symbolic spatio-temporal logic toolbox. By analytically deriving differentiable relaxations of key spatial predicates--including signed distance, intersection, containment, and directional relations--we enable an end-to-end differentiable mapping from high-level semantic specifications to low-level geometric configurations, without invoking external discrete solvers. This fully differentiable formulation unlocks two core capabilities: (i) massively parallel trajectory optimization under rigorous spatio-temporal constraints, and (ii) direct learning of spatial logic parameters from demonstrations via backpropagation. Experimental results validate the effectiveness and scalability of the proposed framework.Code Available: https://github.com/plen1lune/DiffSpaTiaL

</details>


### [532] [From Impact to Insight: Dynamics-Aware Proprioceptive Terrain Sensing on Granular Media](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.02563)
*Yifeng Zhang,Yue Wu,Jake Futterman,Jacob Meseha,Eduardo Rosales,Irie Cooper,J. Diego Caporale,Feifei Qian*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该研究开发了一个基于物理的框架，用于在高速跳跃期间通过本体感知进行动态地形表征，揭示了加速度相关的附加质量效应在高速运动中对颗粒地形力响应的重要影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在自然地形中移动的机器人需要解释高度动态条件下产生的接触力，但大多数地形表征方法依赖于准静态假设，忽略了冲击和快速姿态转换期间产生的速度和加速度相关效应。特别是在高速跳跃等动态运动中，准静态假设会导致地形属性估计出现显著偏差。

Method: 通过控制冲击速度和腿部刚度的系统变化进行受控跳跃实验，测量颗粒地形相互作用。开发了基于物理的框架，将力分解与基于动量观测器的估计器相结合，补偿刚体惯性和重力，并引入加速度感知加权回归来处理高加速度事件期间增加的力方差。

Result: 实验表明，准静态假设在高速跳跃期间会导致颗粒地形属性估计出现较大差异，特别是在触地和控制器诱导的刚度转换期间。速度相关的阻力无法完全解释这些差异，而是加速度相关的附加质量效应（与脚部下方颗粒夹带相关）主导了瞬态力响应。所提出的方法能够在不同运动条件下一致地恢复颗粒刚度参数，与线性执行器地面真实值密切匹配。

Conclusion: 高速运动期间准确的地形推断需要明确处理加速度相关的颗粒效应。该研究为机器人在动态探索陆地及行星环境时表征复杂可变形地形提供了基础框架。

Abstract: Robots that traverse natural terrain must interpret contact forces generated under highly dynamic conditions. However, most terrain characterization approaches rely on quasi-static assumptions that neglect velocity- and acceleration-dependent effects arising during impact and rapid stance transitions. In this work, we investigate granular terrain interaction during high-speed hopping and develop a physics-based framework for dynamic terrain characterization using proprioceptive sensing alone. Through controlled hopping experiments with systematically varied impact speed and leg compliance, our measurements reveal that quasi-static based assumptions lead to large discrepancies in granular terrain property estimation during high-speed hopping, particularly upon touchdown and controller-induced stiffness transitions. Velocity-dependent drag alone cannot explain these discrepancies. Instead, acceleration-dependent added-mass effects-associated with grain entrainment beneath the foot-dominate transient force responses. We integrate this force decomposition with a momentum-observer-based estimator that compensates for rigid-body inertia and gravity, and introduce an acceleration-aware weighted regression to account for increased force variance during high-acceleration events. Together, these methods enable consistent recovery of granular stiffness parameters across locomotion conditions, closely matching linear-actuator ground truth. Our results demonstrate that accurate terrain inference during high-speed locomotion requires explicit treatment of acceleration-dependent granular effects, and provide a foundation for robots to characterize complex deformable terrain during dynamic exploration of terrestrial and planetary environments.

</details>


### [533] [Tune to Learn: How Controller Gains Shape Robot Policy Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.02523)
*Antonia Bronars,Younghyo Park,Pulkit Agrawal*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 控制器增益选择应基于学习算法的可学习性，而非传统基于任务刚度的方法，不同学习范式需要不同的增益设置


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统基于任务刚度选择位置控制器增益的方法在与状态条件策略结合时失效，因为有效刚度来自学习反应与控制动力学的相互作用。需要研究增益选择如何影响不同学习范式的可学习性

Method: 系统研究位置控制器增益对三种现代机器人学习流程的影响：行为克隆、从零开始的强化学习、以及仿真到现实的迁移。通过多个任务和机器人实体的广泛实验，分析不同增益设置下的学习性能

Result: (1) 行为克隆受益于柔顺和过阻尼增益区域；(2) 强化学习在适当的超参数调优下可在所有增益区域成功；(3) 仿真到现实迁移受到刚性和过阻尼增益区域的损害

Conclusion: 最优增益选择取决于所使用的学习范式，而非期望的任务行为。控制器增益应基于学习算法的可学习性进行选择，这为机器人学习中的控制器设计提供了新视角

Abstract: Position controllers have become the dominant interface for executing learned manipulation policies. Yet a critical design decision remains understudied: how should we choose controller gains for policy learning? The conventional wisdom is to select gains based on desired task compliance or stiffness. However, this logic breaks down when controllers are paired with state-conditioned policies: effective stiffness emerges from the interplay between learned reactions and control dynamics, not from gains alone. We argue that gain selection should instead be guided by learnability: how amenable different gain settings are to the learning algorithm in use. In this work, we systematically investigate how position controller gains affect three core components of modern robot learning pipelines: behavior cloning, reinforcement learning from scratch, and sim-to-real transfer. Through extensive experiments across multiple tasks and robot embodiments, we find that: (1) behavior cloning benefits from compliant and overdamped gain regimes, (2) reinforcement learning can succeed across all gain regimes given compatible hyperparameter tuning, and (3) sim-to-real transfer is harmed by stiff and overdamped gain regimes. These findings reveal that optimal gain selection depends not on the desired task behavior, but on the learning paradigm employed. Project website: https://younghyopark.me/tune-to-learn

</details>


### [534] [F2F-AP: Flow-to-Future Asynchronous Policy for Real-time Dynamic Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.02408)
*Haoyu Wei,Xiuwei Xu,Ziyang Cheng,Hang Yin,Angyuan Ma,Bingyao Yu,Jie Zhou,Jiwen Lu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出基于预测物体流的异步推理框架，通过合成未来观测来补偿延迟，提升动态操作任务的响应性和成功率


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 异步推理在机器人操作中普遍存在，但固有延迟导致生成的动作滞后于实时环境，在动态场景中这种时间错位严重损害策略对快速变化环境的理解和反应能力

Method: 提出新框架，利用预测的物体流合成未来观测，采用基于流的对比学习目标，将预测观测的视觉特征表示与真实未来状态对齐，使异步策略能够进行前瞻性规划和运动

Result: 实验结果表明，该方法在复杂动态操作任务中显著提升了响应性和成功率

Conclusion: 通过预测物体流合成未来观测的框架能够有效补偿异步推理中的延迟问题，使机器人策略在动态环境中具备主动规划和执行能力

Abstract: Asynchronous inference has emerged as a prevalent paradigm in robotic manipulation, achieving significant progress in ensuring trajectory smoothness and efficiency. However, a systemic challenge remains unresolved, as inherent latency causes generated actions to inevitably lag behind the real-time environment. This issue is particularly exacerbated in dynamic scenarios, where such temporal misalignment severely compromises the policy's ability to interpret and react to rapidly evolving surroundings. In this paper, we propose a novel framework that leverages predicted object flow to synthesize future observations, incorporating a flow-based contrastive learning objective to align the visual feature representations of predicted observations with ground-truth future states. Empowered by this anticipated visual context, our asynchronous policy gains the capacity for proactive planning and motion, enabling it to explicitly compensate for latency and robustly execute manipulation tasks involving actively moving objects. Experimental results demonstrate that our approach significantly enhances responsiveness and success rates in complex dynamic manipulation tasks.

</details>


### [535] [A virtual-variable-length method for robust inverse kinematics of multi-segment continuum robots](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.02256)
*Weiting Feng,Federico Renda,Yunjie Yang,Francesco Giorgio-Serchi*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出虚拟可变长度方法解决多段连续体机械臂逆运动学问题，相比传统雅可比方法提升20%收敛成功率，减少40-80%平均迭代次数


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统雅可比逆运动学求解器在从中性/静止配置初始化时收敛缓慢，在某些条件下可能无法收敛（死锁），需要更鲁棒的方法

Method: 提出虚拟可变长度方法，在求解迭代过程中引入段长的虚拟变化，赋予虚拟轴向自由度，缓解不利行为和约束，促进收敛

Result: 在180万次随机试验中，相比基准雅可比和阻尼最小二乘求解器，VVL方法提升20%收敛成功率，减少40-80%平均迭代次数，有效缓解边界邻近配置导致的收敛失败

Conclusion: 虚拟可变长度方法为多段连续体机械臂逆运动学提供了更鲁棒、高效的求解方案，特别适用于传统方法容易陷入死锁的情况

Abstract: This paper proposes a new, robust method to solve the inverse kinematics (IK) of multi-segment continuum manipulators. Conventional Jacobian-based solvers, especially when initialized from neutral/rest configurations, often exhibit slow convergence and, in certain conditions, may fail to converge (deadlock). The Virtual-Variable-Length (VVL) method proposed here introduces fictitious variations of segments' length during the solution iteration, conferring virtual axial degrees of freedom that alleviate adverse behaviors and constraints, thus enabling or accelerating convergence. Comprehensive numerical experiments were conducted to compare the VVL method against benchmark Jacobian-based and Damped Least Square IK solvers. Across more than $1.8\times 10^6$ randomized trials covering manipulators with two to seven segments, the proposed approach achieved up to a 20$\%$ increase in convergence success rate over the benchmark and a 40-80$\%$ reduction in average iteration count under equivalent accuracy thresholds ($10^{-4}-10^{-8}$). While deadlocks are not restricted to workspace boundaries and may occur at arbitrary poses, our empirical study identifies boundary-proximal configurations as a frequent cause of failed convergence and the VVL method mitigates such occurrences over a statistical sample of test cases.

</details>


### [536] [Backup-Based Safety Filters: A Comparative Review of Backup CBF, Model Predictive Shielding, and gatekeeper](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.02401)
*Taekyung Kim,Aswin D. Menon,Akshunn Trivedi,Dimitra Panagou*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文通过统一比较框架重新审视了三种基于备份的安全过滤器方法，揭示了它们之间的理论联系和差异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的基于备份的安全过滤器方法（Backup CBF、MPS和gatekeeper）虽然相关，但缺乏统一的理论框架进行比较分析。本文旨在澄清这些方法之间的理论联系和差异，为研究人员提供一个紧凑的教程和综述。

Method: 采用统一的安全过滤器抽象和共享符号，建立比较框架。通过分析过滤器非活动集（即名义策略保持不变的状态集）来比较三种方法。特别展示了MPS是gatekeeper的特例，并将gatekeeper与Backup CBF非活动集在隐式安全集内部联系起来。

Result: 揭示了三种方法具有共同的备份策略结构，但存在关键算法差异。MPS被证明是gatekeeper的特殊情况。同时识别了基于备份的安全过滤器保守性的关键来源：安全性通常通过备份操作的可行性来评估，而不是通过名义策略的持续安全执行。

Conclusion: 通过统一框架澄清了三种基于备份的安全过滤器方法之间的理论关系，为理解这些方法提供了系统视角，并指出了保守性来源，有助于未来改进安全过滤器设计。

Abstract: This paper revisits three backup-based safety filters -- Backup Control Barrier Functions (Backup CBF), Model Predictive Shielding (MPS), and gatekeeper -- through a unified comparative framework. Using a common safety-filter abstraction and shared notation, we make explicit both their common backup-policy structure and their key algorithmic differences. We compare the three methods through their filter-inactive sets, i.e., the states where the nominal policy is left unchanged. In particular, we show that MPS is a special case of gatekeeper, and we further relate gatekeeper to the interior of the Backup CBF inactive set within the implicit safe set. This unified view also highlights a key source of conservatism in backup-based safety filters: safety is often evaluated through the feasibility of a backup maneuver, rather than through the nominal policy's continued safe execution. The paper is intended as a compact tutorial and review that clarifies the theoretical connections and differences among these methods.

</details>


### [537] [PRO-SPECT: Probabilistically Safe Scalable Planning for Energy-Aware Coordinated UAV-UGV Teams in Stochastic Environments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.02142)
*Roger Fowler,Cahit Ikbal Er,Benjamin Johnsenberg,Yasin Yazicioglu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出PRO-SPECT算法，为无人机-无人车团队在随机环境中提供风险有界的能量感知路径规划，确保能量耗尽概率不超过用户指定风险水平


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究假设确定性旅行时间或使用固定鲁棒性边界，无法有效处理随机环境中的能量约束问题，需要一种能够量化并控制任务失败概率的方法

Method: 将问题建模为混合整数规划，提出PRO-SPECT多项式时间算法，支持离线规划和在线重规划，通过概率约束确保能量耗尽概率不超过指定风险水平

Result: 算法能够生成风险有界的规划方案，提供理论可行性证明和时间复杂度分析，数值比较和仿真验证了方法的性能优势

Conclusion: PRO-SPECT算法有效解决了随机环境中无人机-无人车团队的能源感知规划问题，通过风险有界的方法在不确定环境下提供可靠保障

Abstract: We consider energy-aware planning for an unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) and unmanned ground vehicle (UGV) team operating in a stochastic environment. The UAV must visit a set of air points in minimum time while respecting energy constraints, relying on the UGV as a mobile charging station. Unlike prior work that assumed deterministic travel times or used fixed robustness margins, we model travel times as random variables and bound the probability of failure (energy depletion) across the entire mission to a user-specified risk level. We formulate the problem as a Mixed-Integer Program and propose PRO-SPECT, a polynomial-time algorithm that generates risk-bounded plans. The algorithm supports both offline planning and online re-planning, enabling the team to adapt to disturbances while preserving the risk bound. We provide theoretical results on solution feasibility and time complexity. We also demonstrate the performance of our method via numerical comparisons and simulations.

</details>


### [538] [ROS 2-Based LiDAR Perception Framework for Mobile Robots in Dynamic Production Environments, Utilizing Synthetic Data Generation, Transformation-Equivariant 3D Detection and Multi-Object Tracking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.02109)
*Lukas Bergs,Tan Chung,Marmik Thakkar,Alexander Moriz,Amon Göppert,Chinnawut Nantabut,Robert Schmitt*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出基于ROS的LiDAR框架，集成合成数据训练的变换等变3D检测与基于中心姿态的多目标跟踪，提升工业移动机械臂感知系统的鲁棒性和通用性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 动态生产环境中的自适应机器人需要鲁棒的感知能力，包括6D姿态估计和多目标跟踪。现有方法存在对真实世界数据依赖、噪声鲁棒性不足以及时空一致性等问题。

Method: 基于ROS的LiDAR框架，集成合成数据训练的变换等变3D检测方法，结合基于中心姿态的多目标跟踪技术，减少对真实世界数据的依赖并提升时空一致性。

Result: 在72个场景中通过运动捕捉技术验证：独立姿态估计IoU为62.6%，集成多目标跟踪后提升至83.12%；LiDAR框架实现91.12%的高阶跟踪准确率。

Conclusion: 该LiDAR框架显著提升了工业移动机械臂感知系统的鲁棒性和通用性，为动态生产环境中的自适应机器人提供了有效的感知解决方案。

Abstract: Adaptive robots in dynamic production environments require robust perception capabilities, including 6D pose estimation and multi-object tracking. To address limitations in real-world data dependency, noise robustness, and spatiotemporal consistency, a LiDAR framework based on the Robot Operating System integrating a synthetic-data-trained Transformation-Equivariant 3D Detection with multi-object-tracking leveraging center poses is proposed. Validated across 72 scenarios with motion capture technology, overall results yield an Intersection over Union of 62.6% for standalone pose estimation, rising to 83.12% with multi-object-tracking integration. Our LiDAR-based framework achieves 91.12% of Higher Order Tracking Accuracy, advancing robustness and versatility of LiDAR-based perception systems for industrial mobile manipulators.

</details>


### [539] [Cross-Modal Visuo-Tactile Object Perception](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.02108)
*Anirvan Dutta,Simone Tasciotti,Claudia Cusseddu,Ang Li,Panayiota Poirazi,Julijana Gjorgjieva,Etienne Burdet,Patrick van der Smagt,Mohsen Kaboli*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出跨模态潜在滤波器(CMLF)，通过贝叶斯推理学习物理对象属性的结构化因果潜在状态空间，实现视觉与触觉的双向先验传递，提升机器人感知的效率和鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自主机器人操作中，物理属性估计对安全和效率至关重要。视觉和触觉提供互补信息，但这些属性只能间接观测且难以精确建模，现有方法主要强调强制传感器融合或静态跨模态对齐，缺乏对不确定性和信念随时间演化的考虑。

Method: 提出跨模态潜在滤波器(CMLF)，受人类多感官感知和主动推理启发，学习物理对象属性的结构化因果潜在状态空间。支持视觉与触觉间的双向先验传递，通过随时间演化的贝叶斯推理过程整合感官证据。

Result: 真实世界机器人实验表明，CMLF在不确定性条件下比基线方法提高了潜在物理属性估计的效率和鲁棒性。模型还表现出类似人类的感知耦合现象，包括对跨模态幻觉的易感性和相似的学习跨感官关联轨迹。

Conclusion: CMLF在实现可泛化、鲁棒且物理一致的机器人多感官感知跨模态集成方面迈出了重要一步，展示了类似人类的感知特性，为更自然的机器人感知系统提供了基础。

Abstract: Estimating physical properties is critical for safe and efficient autonomous robotic manipulation, particularly during contact-rich interactions. In such settings, vision and tactile sensing provide complementary information about object geometry, pose, inertia, stiffness, and contact dynamics, such as stick-slip behavior. However, these properties are only indirectly observable and cannot always be modeled precisely (e.g., deformation in non-rigid objects coupled with nonlinear contact friction), making the estimation problem inherently complex and requiring sustained exploitation of visuo-tactile sensory information during action. Existing visuo-tactile perception frameworks have primarily emphasized forceful sensor fusion or static cross-modal alignment, with limited consideration of how uncertainty and beliefs about object properties evolve over time. Inspired by human multi-sensory perception and active inference, we propose the Cross-Modal Latent Filter (CMLF) to learn a structured, causal latent state-space of physical object properties. CMLF supports bidirectional transfer of cross-modal priors between vision and touch and integrates sensory evidence through a Bayesian inference process that evolves over time. Real-world robotic experiments demonstrate that CMLF improves the efficiency and robustness of latent physical properties estimation under uncertainty compared to baseline approaches. Beyond performance gains, the model exhibits perceptual coupling phenomena analogous to those observed in humans, including susceptibility to cross-modal illusions and similar trajectories in learning cross-sensory associations. Together, these results constitutes a significant step toward generalizable, robust and physically consistent cross-modal integration for robotic multi-sensory perception.

</details>


### [540] [HyVGGT-VO: Tightly Coupled Hybrid Dense Visual Odometry with Feed-Forward Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.02107)
*Junxiang Pan,Lipu Zhou,Baojie Chen*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: HyVGGT-VO是一个新颖的视觉里程计框架，将传统稀疏VO的计算效率与基于前馈模型的密集重建能力相结合，通过自适应混合跟踪前端和分层优化实现了实时性能与高精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法存在两难：基于前馈模型的密集VO计算负担重，难以实现实时位姿估计；传统稀疏方法计算效率高但缺乏密集重建能力。需要结合两者优势。

Method: 1) 设计自适应混合跟踪前端，动态切换传统光流和VGGT跟踪头以确保鲁棒性；2) 提出分层优化框架，联合优化VO位姿和VGGT预测尺度以保证全局尺度一致性。

Result: 相比现有VGGT方法处理速度提升约5倍，在室内EuRoC数据集上平均轨迹误差降低85%，在室外KITTI基准上降低12%。

Conclusion: HyVGGT-VO成功将传统VO框架与最先进的前馈模型VGGT紧密耦合，实现了计算效率与密集重建能力的平衡，为实时密集视觉SLAM提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Dense visual odometry (VO), which provides pose estimation and dense 3D reconstruction, serves as the cornerstone for applications ranging from robotics to augmented reality. Recently, feed-forward models have demonstrated remarkable capabilities in dense mapping. However, when these models are used in dense visual SLAM systems, their heavy computational burden restricts them to yielding sparse pose outputs at keyframes while still failing to achieve real-time pose estimation. In contrast, traditional sparse methods provide high computational efficiency and high-frequency pose outputs, but lack the capability for dense reconstruction. To address these limitations, we propose HyVGGT-VO, a novel framework that combines the computational efficiency of sparse VO with the dense reconstruction capabilities of feed-forward models. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work to tightly couple a traditional VO framework with VGGT, a state-of-the-art feed-forward model. Specifically, we design an adaptive hybrid tracking frontend that dynamically switches between traditional optical flow and the VGGT tracking head to ensure robustness. Furthermore, we introduce a hierarchical optimization framework that jointly refines VO poses and the scale of VGGT predictions to ensure global scale consistency. Our approach achieves an approximately 5x processing speedup compared to existing VGGT-based methods, while reducing the average trajectory error by 85% on the indoor EuRoC dataset and 12% on the outdoor KITTI benchmark. Our code will be publicly available upon acceptance. Project page: https://geneta2580.github.io/HyVGGT-VO.io.

</details>


### [541] [O-ConNet: Geometry-Aware End-to-End Inference of Over-Constrained Spatial Mechanisms](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.02038)
*Haoyu Sun,Meng Zhao,Tianhao Wang,Jianxu Wu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: O-ConNet：一种端到端深度学习框架，仅从三个稀疏可达点推断空间过约束机构的结构参数并重建完整运动轨迹，无需在推理时显式求解约束方程。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 深度学习在科学发现中展现出强大潜力，但其建模宏观刚体运动学约束的能力尚未充分探索。本研究旨在探索深度学习在空间过约束机构上的应用，解决从稀疏观测中推断机构参数和运动轨迹的问题。

Method: 提出O-ConNet端到端框架，仅使用三个稀疏可达点作为输入，通过深度学习模型直接推断机构的结构参数并重建完整运动轨迹。该方法避免了在推理过程中显式求解复杂的约束方程。

Result: 在包含42,860个有效样本的自建Bennett 4R数据集上，O-ConNet取得Param-MAE 0.276±0.077和Traj-MAE 0.145±0.018（10次运行均值±标准差），分别比最强序列基线（LSTM-Seq2Seq）提升65.1%和88.2%。

Conclusion: 端到端学习能够捕捉闭环几何结构，为在极稀疏观测条件下进行空间过约束机构的逆向设计提供了实用途径。

Abstract: Deep learning has shown strong potential for scientific discovery, but its ability to model macroscopic rigid-body kinematic constraints remains underexplored. We study this problem on spatial over-constrained mechanisms and propose O-ConNet, an end-to-end framework that infers mechanism structural parameters from only three sparse reachable points while reconstructing the full motion trajectory, without explicitly solving constraint equations during inference. On a self-constructed Bennett 4R dataset of 42,860 valid samples, O-ConNet achieves Param-MAE 0.276 +/- 0.077 and Traj-MAE 0.145 +/- 0.018 (mean +/- std over 10 runs), outperforming the strongest sequence baseline (LSTM-Seq2Seq) by 65.1 percent and 88.2 percent, respectively. These results suggest that end-to-end learning can capture closed-loop geometric structure and provide a practical route for inverse design of spatial over-constrained mechanisms under extremely sparse observations.

</details>


### [542] [Bridging Discrete Planning and Continuous Execution for Redundant Robot](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.02021)
*Teng Yan,Yue Yu,Yihan Liu,Bingzhuo Zhong*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种连接离散规划与连续执行的桥梁框架，通过改进的体素网格强化学习规划器和任务优先级阻尼最小二乘逆运动学层，显著提升了7自由度冗余机械臂在密集环境中的路径规划成功率和执行质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的体素网格强化学习方法在7自由度冗余机械臂路径规划中，直接通过逐点数值逆运动学执行会导致步长抖动、关节突变和奇异配置附近的不稳定性问题，需要解决离散规划与连续执行之间的鸿沟。

Method: 1) 规划侧：引入步长归一化的26邻域笛卡尔动作和几何平局打破机制来抑制不必要的转向和消除步长振荡；2) 执行侧：实现任务优先级阻尼最小二乘逆运动学层，将末端执行器位置作为主要任务，姿态和关节居中作为投影到零空间的从属任务，结合信任区域裁剪和关节速度约束。

Result: 在7自由度机械臂的随机稀疏、中等和密集环境中，该方法将密集场景的规划成功率从约0.58提升到1.00，代表性路径长度从约1.53米缩短到1.10米，在保持末端执行器误差低于1毫米的同时，将峰值关节加速度降低了一个数量级以上。

Conclusion: 该桥梁框架在不修改离散规划器本身的情况下，显著提高了基于体素的强化学习路径在冗余机械臂上的连续执行质量，有效解决了离散规划与连续执行之间的不匹配问题。

Abstract: Voxel-grid reinforcement learning is widely adopted for path planning in redundant manipulators due to its simplicity and reproducibility. However, direct execution through point-wise numerical inverse kinematics on 7-DoF arms often yields step-size jitter, abrupt joint transitions, and instability near singular configurations. This work proposes a bridging framework between discrete planning and continuous execution without modifying the discrete planner itself. On the planning side, step-normalized 26-neighbor Cartesian actions and a geometric tie-breaking mechanism are introduced to suppress unnecessary turns and eliminate step-size oscillations. On the execution side, a task-priority damped least-squares (TP-DLS) inverse kinematics layer is implemented. This layer treats end-effector position as a primary task, while posture and joint centering are handled as subordinate tasks projected into the null space, combined with trust-region clipping and joint velocity constraints. On a 7-DoF manipulator in random sparse, medium, and dense environments, this bridge raises planning success in dense scenes from about 0.58 to 1.00, shortens representative path length from roughly 1.53 m to 1.10 m, and while keeping end-effector error below 1 mm, reduces peak joint accelerations by over an order of magnitude, substantially improving the continuous execution quality of voxel-based RL paths on redundant manipulators.

</details>


### [543] [Integrated Identification of Collaborative Robots for Robot Assisted 3D Printing Processes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.01991)
*Alessandro Dimauro,Davide Tebaldi,Fabio Pini,Luigi Biagiotti,Francesco Leali*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一种基于模型的集成参数识别方法，用于提高机器人辅助增材制造系统的精度和控制性能，通过五步识别流程确保参数物理一致性，并在6自由度协作机器人上验证了有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器人辅助增材制造虽然克服了传统笛卡尔系统的尺寸和运动学限制，但机器人动态复杂性增加带来了精度、控制和误差预测的挑战。协作机器人通常存在传感和编程限制，需要可靠的动态模型来提升系统性能。

Method: 提出集成参数识别方法，包含五个步骤：1)几何和惯性分析；2)摩擦参数识别；3)控制器参数识别；4)剩余参数识别；5)确保参数物理一致性。该方法整合了机器人、执行器和控制器的参数识别。

Result: 在6自由度协作机器人用于热塑性挤出工艺的实际案例中验证了识别方法。实验结果显示，识别模型与实际机器人的结果匹配度非常好，证明了该方法在提高精度、控制和误差预测方面的潜力。

Conclusion: 提出的集成建模方法能够在协作机器人典型的传感和编程限制下获得可靠的动态模型，为机器人辅助3D打印过程提供了增强精度、控制和误差预测的有效途径。

Abstract: In recent years, the integration of additive manufacturing (AM) and industrial robotics has opened new perspectives for the production of complex components, particularly in the automotive sector. Robot-assisted additive manufacturing processes overcome the dimensional and kinematic limitations of traditional Cartesian systems, enabling non-planar deposition and greater geometric flexibility. However, the increasing dynamic complexity of robotic manipulators introduces challenges related to precision, control, and error prediction. This work proposes a model-based approach equipped with an integrated identification procedure of the system's parameters, including the robot, the actuators and the controllers. We show that the integrated modeling procedure allows to obtain a reliable dynamic model even in the presence of sensory and programming limitations typical of collaborative robots. The manipulator's dynamic model is identified through an integrated five step methodology: starting with geometric and inertial analysis, followed by friction and controller parameters identification, all the way to the remaining parameters identification. The proposed procedure intrinsically ensures the physical consistency of the identified parameters. The identification approach is validated on a real world case study involving a 6-Degrees-Of-Freedom (DoFs) collaborative robot used in a thermoplastic extrusion process. The very good matching between the experimental results given by actual robot and those given by the identified model shows the potential enhancement of precision, control, and error prediction in Robot Assisted 3D Printing Processes.

</details>


### [544] [Posterior Optimization with Clipped Objective for Bridging Efficiency and Stability in Generative Policy Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.01860)
*Yuhui Chen,Haoran Li,Zhennan Jiang,Yuxing Qin,Yuxuan Wan,Weiheng Liu,Dongbin Zhao*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: POCO是一个用于机器人操作的后验优化强化学习框架，通过期望最大化过程将奖励加权的隐式后验提炼到策略中，无需似然估计，采用离线到在线范式，防止灾难性策略崩溃。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管表达性生成模型能够捕捉复杂多模态的动作分布，但通过强化学习微调这些策略仍然面临不稳定性和样本效率低下的挑战。

Method: POCO将策略改进形式化为时序动作块的后验推断问题，通过期望最大化过程将奖励加权的隐式后验提炼到策略中，采用离线到在线范式，将在线探索锚定到预训练先验，模型无关设计可微调大型VLA模型而无需架构修改。

Result: 在7个仿真基准和4个接触丰富的真实世界任务中，POCO防止了灾难性策略崩溃，超越了最先进的基线方法，在真实世界任务中实现了96.7%的成功率。

Conclusion: POCO提供了一个原则性的强化学习框架，能够有效微调表达性生成模型，在仿真和真实世界机器人操作任务中表现出优越的性能和稳定性。

Abstract: Expressive generative models have advanced robotic manipulation by capturing complex, multi-modal action distributions over temporally extended trajectories. However, fine-tuning these policies via RL remains challenging due to instability and sample inefficiency. We introduce Posterior Optimization with Clipped Objective (POCO), a principled RL framework that formulates policy improvement as a posterior inference problem tailored for temporal action chunks. Through an Expectation-Maximization procedure, POCO distills a reward-weighted implicit posterior into the policy without likelihood estimation. Furthermore, POCO adopts an offline-to-online paradigm that anchors online exploration to pre-trained priors, and its model-agnostic design scales to fine-tune large VLA models without architectural modifications. Evaluations across 7 simulation benchmarks and 4 contact-rich real-world tasks demonstrate that POCO prevents catastrophic policy collapse, outperforms SOTA baselines, and achieves a 96.7% success rate on real-world tasks. Videos are available at our project website https://cccedric.github.io/poco/.

</details>


### [545] [Preferential Bayesian Optimization with Crash Feedback](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.01776)
*Johanna Menn,David Stenger,Sebastian Trimpe*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: CrashPBO：一种改进的偏好贝叶斯优化方法，允许用户在优化过程中同时表达偏好和报告实验崩溃，显著减少硬件系统实验中的崩溃次数


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在机器人硬件系统（如四旋翼飞行器控制）的参数优化中，标准偏好贝叶斯优化无法处理实验崩溃的情况。崩溃会导致耗时的实验重置、设备磨损等不良后果，而现有方法无法利用崩溃反馈，导致频繁探索会导致崩溃的参数

Method: 提出CrashPBO机制，扩展标准偏好贝叶斯优化框架，允许用户在优化过程中同时提供两种反馈：1）对实验结果的偏好比较；2）报告实验是否发生崩溃。该方法将崩溃信息整合到贝叶斯优化模型中，避免探索会导致崩溃的参数空间区域

Result: 在合成函数基准测试中，CrashPBO将崩溃次数减少了63%，并提高了数据效率。在三个机器人平台上的实验验证了该方法的广泛适用性和可迁移性

Conclusion: CrashPBO提供了一个灵活、用户友好的框架，用于在人类反馈（包括偏好和崩溃信息）下进行参数学习，特别适用于硬件系统优化，能显著减少实验崩溃并提高优化效率

Abstract: Bayesian optimization is a popular black-box optimization method for parameter learning in control and robotics. It typically requires an objective function that reflects the user's optimization goal. However, in practical applications, this objective function is often inaccessible due to complex or unmeasurable performance metrics. Preferential Bayesian optimization (PBO) overcomes this limitation by leveraging human feedback through pairwise comparisons, eliminating the need for explicit performance quantification. When applying PBO to hardware systems, such as in quadcopter control, crashes can cause time-consuming experimental resets, wear and tear, or otherwise undesired outcomes. Standard PBO methods cannot incorporate feedback from such crashed experiments, resulting in the exploration of parameters that frequently lead to experimental crashes. We thus introduce CrashPBO, a user-friendly mechanism that enables users to both express preferences and report crashes during the optimization process. Benchmarking on synthetic functions shows that this mechanism reduces crashes by 63% and increases data efficiency. Through experiments on three robotics platforms, we demonstrate the wide applicability and transferability of CrashPBO, highlighting that it provides a flexible, user-friendly framework for parameter learning with human feedback on preferences and crashes.

</details>


### [546] [Realistic Lip Motion Generation Based on 3D Dynamic Viseme and Coarticulation Modeling for Human-Robot Interaction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.01756)
*Sheng Li,Jingcheng Huang,Min Li*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出基于3D动态视位和协同发音建模的唇部运动生成框架，用于人形机器人的语音驱动唇部同步


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 实现逼真的唇部同步对于人形机器人自然非语言交互至关重要，现有方法在连续语音流中处理运动冲突方面存在不足

Method: 基于中文发音理论构建3D动态视位库，采用声母-韵母解耦和能量调制的协同发音机制，将高维空间唇部运动重定向到14自由度唇部驱动系统

Result: 通过皮尔逊相关系数和平均绝对加加速度指标进行定量消融实验，验证了框架的效率和准确性

Conclusion: 该研究为人形机器人的语音驱动唇部运动生成提供了一个轻量级、高效且高度实用的范式

Abstract: Realistic lip synchronization is essential for the natural human-robot non-verbal interaction of humanoid robots. Motivated by this need, this paper presents a lip motion generation framework based on 3D dynamic viseme and coarticulation modeling. By analyzing Chinese pronunciation theory, a 3D dynamic viseme library is constructed based on the ARKit standard, which offers coherent prior trajectories of lips. To resolve motion conflicts within continuous speech streams, a coarticulation mechanism is developed by incorporating initial-final (Shengmu-Yunmu) decoupling and energy modulation. After developing a strategy to retarget high-dimensional spatial lip motion to a 14-DOF lip actuation system of a humanoid head platform, the efficiency and accuracy of the proposed architecture is experimentally validated and demonstrated with quantitative ablation experiments using the metrics of the Pearson Correlation Coefficient (PCC) and the Mean Absolute Jerk (MAJ). This research offers a lightweight, efficient, and highly practical paradigm for the speech-driven lip motion generation of humanoid robots. The 3D dynamic viseme library and real-world deployment videos are available at {https://github.com/yuesheng21/Phoneme-to-Lip-14DOF}

</details>


### [547] [Analysis of Efficient Transmission Methods of Grid Maps for Intelligent Vehicles](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.01753)
*Robin Dehler,Dominik Authaler,Aryan Thakur,Thomas Wodtko,Michael Buchholz*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种基于补丁的通信管道，利用现有压缩算法高效传输网格地图数据，解决了网格地图在分布式处理和V2X应用中数据量过大的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 网格地图是智能车辆和机器人环境建模的基础方法，但细胞级建模导致数据量过大。虽然补丁网格地图通过调整细胞大小在一定程度上缓解了这个问题，但其数据量对于分布式处理或V2X应用仍然过大。需要从通信角度解决网格地图数据传输的效率问题。

Method: 基于补丁网格地图方法，提出一种补丁式通信管道，利用现有压缩算法高效传输网格地图数据。对车辆内部通信和V2X通信两种场景进行综合分析，并通过两个真实世界实验设置验证分析结果。

Result: 通过提出的通信管道，实现了网格地图数据的高效传输。分析验证了该方法在车辆内部通信和V2X应用中的有效性，并为智能交通系统中网格地图数据传输提供了推荐指南。

Conclusion: 该研究为解决网格地图数据传输效率问题提供了有效方案，提出的补丁式通信管道能够显著减少数据传输量，为智能交通系统中的分布式处理和V2X应用提供了实用指导。

Abstract: Grid mapping is a fundamental approach to modeling the environment of intelligent vehicles or robots. Compared with object-based environment modeling, grid maps offer the distinct advantage of representing the environment without requiring any assumptions about objects, such as type or shape. For grid-map-based approaches, the environment is divided into cells, each containing information about its respective area, such as occupancy. This representation of the entire environment is crucial for achieving higher levels of autonomy. However, it has the drawback that modeling the scene at the cell level results in inherently large data sizes. Patched grid maps tackle this issue to a certain extent by adapting cell sizes in specific areas. Nevertheless, the data sizes of patched grid maps are still too large for novel distributed processing setups or vehicle-to-everything (V2X) applications. Our work builds on a patch-based grid-map approach and investigates the size problem from a communication perspective. To address this, we propose a patch-based communication pipeline that leverages existing compression algorithms to transmit grid-map data efficiently. We provide a comprehensive analysis of this pipeline for both intra-vehicle and V2X-based communication. The analysis is verified for these use cases with two real-world experiment setups. Finally, we summarize recommended guidelines for the efficient transmission of grid-map data in intelligent transportation systems.

</details>


### [548] [Causal Scene Narration with Runtime Safety Supervision for Vision-Language-Action Driving](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.01723)
*Yun Li,Yidu Zhang,Simon Thompson,Ehsan Javanmardi,Manabu Tsukada*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出CSN方法，通过意图-约束对齐、定量基础和结构化分离重构VLA文本输入，结合安全监督和训练对齐，显著提升自动驾驶性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前自动驾驶VLA模型处理多样化文本输入（导航指令、危险警告、交通状态描述）时，这些输入常以不连贯的片段呈现，迫使模型自行发现哪些环境约束与当前操作相关，导致效率低下。

Method: 引入因果场景叙述（CSN），在推理时通过意图-约束对齐、定量基础和结构化分离重构VLA文本输入；结合基于单纯形的运行时安全监督，以及使用带负对数似然正则化的Plackett-Luce DPO进行训练时对齐。

Result: 多城镇闭环CARLA评估显示，CSN将原始LMDrive的驾驶评分提升+31.1%，偏好对齐变体提升+24.5%；因果结构贡献了39.1%的性能增益；感知噪声消融实验证实CSN对现实感知误差具有鲁棒性。

Conclusion: CSN通过结构化文本输入显著提升VLA自动驾驶性能；语义安全监督改善违规评分，而反应式碰撞时间监控会降低性能，表明VLA系统需要意图感知监控；因果结构对性能提升有重要贡献。

Abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models for autonomous driving must integrate diverse textual inputs, including navigation commands, hazard warnings, and traffic state descriptions, yet current systems often present these as disconnected fragments, forcing the model to discover on its own which environmental constraints are relevant to the current maneuver. We introduce Causal Scene Narration (CSN), which restructures VLA text inputs through intent-constraint alignment, quantitative grounding, and structured separation, at inference time with zero GPU cost. We complement CSN with Simplex-based runtime safety supervision and training-time alignment via Plackett-Luce DPO with negative log-likelihood (NLL) regularization. A multi-town closed-loop CARLA evaluation shows that CSN improves Driving Score by +31.1% on original LMDrive and +24.5% on the preference-aligned variant. A controlled ablation reveals that causal structure accounts for 39.1% of this gain, with the remainder attributable to information content alone. A perception noise ablation confirms that CSN's benefit is robust to realistic sensing errors. Semantic safety supervision improves Infraction Score, while reactive Time-To-Collision monitoring degrades performance, demonstrating that intent-aware monitoring is needed for VLA systems.

</details>


### [549] [Hi-LOAM: Hierarchical Implicit Neural Fields for LiDAR Odometry and Mapping](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.01720)
*Zhiliu Yang,Jianyuan Zhang,Lianhui Zhao,Jinyu Dai,Zhu Yang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: Hi-LOAM：一种基于多尺度隐式神经表示的LiDAR里程计与建图框架，采用自监督学习，通过哈希表和八叉树结构存储层次化特征，实现无对应关系的扫描到隐式匹配


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LOAM框架要么依赖监督信号，要么缺乏重建保真度，难以准确描绘大规模复杂场景的细节。需要克服这些限制，开发更精确、更通用的定位与建图方法

Method: 1. 输入LiDAR点云数据；2. 基于八叉树结构在多个层级的哈希表中学习和存储层次化潜在特征；3. 通过浅层MLP将多尺度特征解码为有符号距离值进行建图；4. 采用无对应关系的扫描到隐式匹配范式进行位姿估计；5. 整个训练过程完全自监督

Result: 在多个真实世界和合成数据集上的广泛实验表明，Hi-LOAM在有效性和泛化能力方面优于现有最先进方法，展现了优越的性能

Conclusion: Hi-LOAM通过多尺度隐式神经表示和自监督学习，实现了高保真度的LiDAR定位与建图，克服了现有方法的局限性，具有良好的通用性和实际应用价值

Abstract: LiDAR Odometry and Mapping (LOAM) is a pivotal technique for embodied-AI applications such as autonomous driving and robot navigation. Most existing LOAM frameworks are either contingent on the supervision signal, or lack of the reconstruction fidelity, which are deficient in depicting details of large-scale complex scenes. To overcome these limitations, we propose a multi-scale implicit neural localization and mapping framework using LiDAR sensor, called Hi-LOAM. Hi-LOAM receives LiDAR point cloud as the input data modality, learns and stores hierarchical latent features in multiple levels of hash tables based on an octree structure, then these multi-scale latent features are decoded into signed distance value through shallow Multilayer Perceptrons (MLPs) in the mapping procedure. For pose estimation procedure, we rely on a correspondence-free, scan-to-implicit matching paradigm to estimate optimal pose and register current scan into the submap. The entire training process is conducted in a self-supervised manner, which waives the model pre-training and manifests its generalizability when applied to diverse environments. Extensive experiments on multiple real-world and synthetic datasets demonstrate the superior performance, in terms of the effectiveness and generalization capabilities, of our Hi-LOAM compared to existing state-of-the-art methods.

</details>


### [550] [3-D Relative Localization for Multi-Robot Systems with Angle and Self-Displacement Measurements](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.01703)
*Chenyang Liang,Liangming Chen,Baoyi Cui,Jie Mei*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出基于机器人间内角与自位移测量的3D相对定位框架，包含线性定位理论与抗噪声MAP估计器


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决在测量噪声存在下利用机器人间局部测量实现相对定位的挑战性问题

Method: 1) 提出分布式线性相对定位算法及可定位性充分条件；2) 将线性计算过程重构为流形上的加权总体最小二乘优化问题；3) 结合神经密度估计器处理先验概率密度未知问题；4) 设计边缘化机制控制计算成本

Result: 开发了系统性的3D相对定位框架，能够以纯线性方式确定邻居的相对位置和方向，并通过改进的MAP估计器有效处理测量噪声

Conclusion: 该框架通过线性定位理论、WTLS优化、NDE结合和边缘化机制，系统解决了相对定位中的噪声处理、非凸优化、先验未知和计算复杂度等关键挑战

Abstract: Realizing relative localization by leveraging inter-robot local measurements is a challenging problem, especially in the presence of measurement noise. Motivated by this challenge, in this paper we propose a novel and systematic 3-D relative localization framework based on inter-robot interior angle and self-displacement measurements. Initially, we propose a linear relative localization theory comprising a distributed linear relative localization algorithm and sufficient conditions for localizability. According to this theory, robots can determine their neighbors' relative positions and orientations in a purely linear manner. Subsequently, in order to deal with measurement noise, we present an advanced Maximum a Posterior (MAP) estimator by addressing three primary challenges existing in the MAP estimator. Firstly, it is common to formulate the MAP problem as an optimization problem, whose inherent non-convexity can result in local optima. To address this issue, we reformulate the linear computation process of the linear relative localization algorithm as a Weighted Total Least Squares (WTLS) optimization problem on manifolds. The optimal solution of the WTLS problem is more accurate, which can then be used as initial values when solving the optimization problem associated with the MAP problem, thereby reducing the risk of falling into local optima. The second challenge is the lack of knowledge of the prior probability density of the robots' relative positions and orientations at the initial time, which is required as an input for the MAP estimator. To deal with it, we combine the WTLS with a Neural Density Estimator (NDE). Thirdly, to prevent the increasing size of the relative positions and orientations to be estimated as the robots continuously move when solving the MAP problem, a marginalization mechanism is designed, which ensures that the computational cost remains constant.

</details>


### [551] [AURA: Multimodal Shared Autonomy for Real-World Urban Navigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.01659)
*Yukai Ma,Honglin He,Selina Song,Wayne Wu,Bolei Zhou*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: AURA是一个用于城市导航的共享自主框架，将高层人类指令与低层AI控制解耦，通过空间感知指令编码器对齐多模态输入，显著减少接管频率并提升导航稳定性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 复杂城市环境中的长时程导航依赖持续人工操作，导致疲劳、效率降低和安全问题。现有共享自主方法要求人类与AI在同一动作空间操作，造成高认知负荷。

Method: 提出AURA多模态框架，将城市导航分解为高层人类指令和低层AI控制。包含空间感知指令编码器，对齐多样化人类指令与视觉空间上下文。构建大规模MM-CoS数据集用于训练，包含遥操作和视觉语言描述。

Result: 仿真和真实世界实验表明，AURA能有效遵循人类指令，减少手动操作工作量，提升导航稳定性，支持在线适应。在类似接管条件下，共享自主框架将接管频率降低超过44%。

Conclusion: AURA通过解耦高层指令与低层控制，显著降低了共享自主中的认知负荷，为复杂城市环境中的机器人导航提供了有效的协作解决方案。

Abstract: Long-horizon navigation in complex urban environments relies heavily on continuous human operation, which leads to fatigue, reduced efficiency, and safety concerns. Shared autonomy, where a Vision-Language AI agent and a human operator collaborate on maneuvering the mobile machine, presents a promising solution to address these issues. However, existing shared autonomy methods often require humans and AI to operate within the same action space, leading to high cognitive overhead. We present Assistive Urban Robot Autonomy (AURA), a new multi-modal framework that decomposes urban navigation into high-level human instruction and low-level AI control. AURA incorporates a Spatial-Aware Instruction Encoder to align various human instructions with visual and spatial context. To facilitate training, we construct MM-CoS, a large-scale dataset comprising teleoperation and vision-language descriptions. Experiments in simulation and the real world demonstrate that AURA effectively follows human instructions, reduces manual operation effort, and improves navigation stability, while enabling online adaptation. Moreover, under similar takeover conditions, our shared autonomy framework reduces the frequency of takeovers by more than 44%. Demo video and more detail are provided in the project page.

</details>


### [552] [Smooth Feedback Motion Planning with Reduced Curvature](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.01614)
*Aref Amiri,Steven M. LaValle*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一种在单元分解上优化反馈运动规划的方法，通过对齐局部向量场和构建星形链来生成更直接的轨迹，减少路径弯曲和控制能耗。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于单元分解的反馈运动规划算法产生的路径存在不必要的弯曲，导致运动速度变慢和控制能耗增加，需要更高效的优化方法。

Method: 提出启发式方法系统地对齐和分配局部向量场以产生更直接的轨迹，配合新颖的几何算法构建围绕目标的最大星形链，形成大"漏斗"区域，可在其中安全应用直接朝向目标的最优控制律。

Result: 仿真显示该方法生成明显更直接的路径，平均减少91.40%的总弯曲度和45.47%的LQR控制能耗。与基于采样和优化的规划器比较证实了时间效率和鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 该方法在计算上高效，适用于任何有限维单纯复形，但实际应用聚焦于低维配置空间（d≤3），其中单纯分解在计算上可行，显著改善了反馈运动规划的路径质量。

Abstract: Feedback motion planning over cell decompositions provides a robust method for generating collision-free robot motion with formal guarantees. However, existing algorithms often produce paths with unnecessary bending, leading to slower motion and higher control effort. This paper presents a computationally efficient method to mitigate this issue for a given simplicial decomposition. A heuristic is introduced that systematically aligns and assigns local vector fields to produce more direct trajectories, complemented by a novel geometric algorithm that constructs a maximal star-shaped chain of simplexes around the goal. This creates a large ``funnel'' in which an optimal, direct-to-goal control law can be safely applied. Simulations demonstrate that our method generates measurably more direct paths, reducing total bending by an average of 91.40\% and LQR control effort by an average of 45.47\%. Furthermore, comparative analysis against sampling-based and optimization-based planners confirms the time efficacy and robustness of our approach. While the proposed algorithms work over any finite-dimensional simplicial complex embedded in the collision-free subset of the configuration space, the practical application focuses on low-dimensional ($d\le3$) configuration spaces, where simplicial decomposition is computationally tractable.

</details>


### [553] [Boosting Vision-Language-Action Finetuning with Feasible Action Neighborhood Prior](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.01570)
*Haochen Niu,Kanyu Zhang,Shuyu Yin,Qinghai Guo,Peilin Liu,Fei Wen*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出FAN引导的正则化方法，通过高斯先验使VLA模型输出分布与可行动作邻域对齐，提高机器人操作的样本效率和泛化能力


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现实机器人操作中，每个状态存在可行动作邻域而非单一正确动作，但现有VLA训练方法直接继承自语言设置，未利用FAN特性，导致泛化差和样本效率低

Method: 引入FAN引导的正则化器，通过高斯先验使模型输出分布与FAN几何结构对齐，促进在偏好方向和幅度周围的局部平滑单峰预测

Result: 在强化微调(RFT)和监督微调(SFT)实验中，方法显著提高了样本效率和成功率，在分布内和分布外场景均有改善

Conclusion: 通过与物理操作内在动作容差对齐，FAN引导的正则化为样本高效、可泛化的VLA适应提供了原则性和实用方法

Abstract: In real-world robotic manipulation, states typically admit a neighborhood of near-equivalent actions. That is, for each state, there exist a feasible action neighborhood (FAN) rather than a single correct action, within which motions yield indistinguishable progress. However, prevalent VLA training methodologies are directly inherited from linguistic settings and do not exploit the FAN property, thus leading to poor generalization and low sample efficiency. To address this limitation, we introduce a FAN-guided regularizer that shapes the model's output distribution to align with the geometry of FAN. Concretely, we introduce a Gaussian prior that promotes locally smooth and unimodal predictions around the preferred direction and magnitude. In extensive experiments across both reinforced finetuning (RFT) and supervised finetuning (SFT), our method achieves significant improvement in sample efficiency, and success rate in both in-distribution and out-of-distribution (OOD) scenarios. By aligning with the intrinsic action tolerance of physical manipulation, FAN-guided regularization provides a principled and practical method for sample-efficient, and generalizable VLA adaptation.

</details>


### [554] [AnchorVLA: Anchored Diffusion for Efficient End-to-End Mobile Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.01567)
*Jia Syuen Lim,Zhizhen Zhang,Peter Bohm,Brendan Tidd,Zi Huang,Yadan Luo*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: AnchorVLA：一种用于移动操作的扩散式视觉语言动作策略，通过锚定扩散和轻量级自校正机制，在保持动作多样性的同时实现低延迟闭环控制


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 移动操作中的核心挑战是在保持多个合理动作模型的同时，在执行过程中保持反应性。扩散策略虽然能建模多模态动作分布，但完整的迭代去噪在控制时成本高昂；动作分块虽然能分摊推理成本，但会导致部分开环行为和漂移累积

Method: AnchorVLA结合轻量级VLA适配骨干和锚定扩散动作头，在锚定轨迹周围进行局部去噪，使用截断扩散计划；引入测试时自校正机制，通过轻量级残差校正模块在部署过程中进行高频、每步调整

Result: 在多样化移动操作任务中，AnchorVLA在扰动和分布偏移下提高了成功率和稳定性，同时保持低延迟推理

Conclusion: AnchorVLA通过锚定扩散和自校正机制，有效解决了移动操作中保持动作多样性与实时反应性之间的平衡问题，为扩散策略在实时控制中的应用提供了实用解决方案

Abstract: A central challenge in mobile manipulation is preserving multiple plausible action models while remaining reactive during execution. A bottle in a cluttered scene can often be approached and grasped in multiple valid ways. Robust behavior depends on preserving this action diversity while remaining reactive as the scene evolves. Diffusion policies are appealing because they model multimodal action distributions rather than collapsing to one solution. But in practice, full iterative denoising is costly at control time. Action chunking helps amortize inference, yet it also creates partially open-loop behavior, allowing small mismatches to accumulate into drift. We present AnchorVLA, a diffusion-based VLA policy for mobile manipulation built on the core insight that when sampling begins near a plausible solution manifold, extensive denoising is unnecessary to recover multimodal, valid actions. AnchorVLA combines a lightweight VLA adaptation backbone with an anchored diffusion action head, which denoises locally around anchor trajectories using a truncated diffusion schedule. This retains multimodal action generation while reducing inference cost for closed-loop control. Crucially, to mitigate chunking-induced drift, we introduce a test-time self-correction mechanism via a lightweight residual correction module that makes high-frequency, per-step adjustments during rollout. Across diverse mobile manipulation tasks, AnchorVLA improves success and stability under disturbances and distribution shifts while maintaining low-latency inference. The source code is made available at https://github.com/jason-lim26/AnchorVLA.

</details>


### [555] [A Dynamic Toolkit for Transmission Characteristics of Precision Reducers with Explicit Contact Geometry](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.02387)
*Jiacheng Miao,Chao Liu,Qiliang Wang,Yunhui Guan,Weidong He*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出用于精密减速器传动特性分析的动态工具包，通过显式接触几何建模实现高精度计算


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 精密减速器是机器人系统的关键组件，直接影响各类机器人（人形、四足、协作、工业、SCARA）的运动精度和动态性能，需要解决接触行为建模、齿轮刚度评估和系统振动预测等挑战

Method: 提出统一框架，集成先进接触理论和数值求解方法，采用模块化、可脚本化架构支持不同减速器拓扑结构的快速重构

Result: 相比传统动力学软件，该工具包提供更高精度和计算效率，通过已发布基准的数值验证确认了方法的准确性

Conclusion: 该动态工具包为精密减速器传动特性分析提供了有效的解决方案，支持机器人系统性能优化

Abstract: Precision reducers are critical components in robotic systems, directly affecting the motion accuracy and dynamic performance of humanoid robots, quadruped robots, collaborative robots, industrial robots, and SCARA robots. This paper presents a dynamic toolkit for analyzing the transmission characteristics of precision reducers with explicit contact geometry. A unified framework is proposed to address the challenges in modeling accurate contact behaviors, evaluating gear stiffness, and predicting system vibrations. By integrating advanced contact theories and numerical solving methods, the proposed toolkit offers higher precision and computational efficiency compared to traditional dynamics software. The toolkit is designed with a modular, scriptable architecture that supports rapid reconfiguration across diverse reducer topologies. Numerical validation against published benchmarks confirms the accuracy of the proposed approach.

</details>


### [556] [ReinVBC: A Model-based Reinforcement Learning Approach to Vehicle Braking Controller](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04401)
*Haoxin Lin,Junjie Zhou,Daheng Xu,Yang Yu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出ReinVBC方法，使用基于模型的离线强化学习解决车辆制动控制问题，通过工程化设计获得可靠的车辆动力学模型和制动策略，可替代生产级防抱死制动系统


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 车辆制动系统作为确保安全性和可操纵性的关键模块，在生产过程中依赖大量人工校准。减少人工和时间消耗同时保持车辆制动控制器性能对汽车行业有重大益处。基于模型的离线强化学习方法为处理现实世界控制任务提供了有前景的解决方案

Method: 提出ReinVBC方法，将基于模型的离线强化学习应用于车辆制动控制问题。在模型学习和利用范式中引入有用的工程化设计，以获得可靠的车辆动力学模型和有效的制动策略

Result: 多个结果表明该方法在现实世界车辆制动中具有能力，并且有潜力替代生产级防抱死制动系统

Conclusion: 基于模型的离线强化学习是解决车辆制动控制问题的有效方法，ReinVBC通过工程化设计实现了可靠的车辆动力学建模和制动策略学习，展示了替代传统生产级制动系统的潜力

Abstract: Braking system, the key module to ensure the safety and steer-ability of current vehicles, relies on extensive manual calibration during production. Reducing labor and time consumption while maintaining the Vehicle Braking Controller (VBC) performance greatly benefits the vehicle industry. Model-based methods in offline reinforcement learning, which facilitate policy exploration within a data-driven dynamics model, offer a promising solution for addressing real-world control tasks. This work proposes ReinVBC, which applies an offline model-based reinforcement learning approach to deal with the vehicle braking control problem. We introduce useful engineering designs into the paradigm of model learning and utilization to obtain a reliable vehicle dynamics model and a capable braking policy. Several results demonstrate the capability of our method in real-world vehicle braking and its potential to replace the production-grade anti-lock braking system.

</details>


### [557] [Distal-Stable Beam for Continuum Robots](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.01490)
*Ryouichi Saito,Takahiro Koide,Yuya Tanaka,Yasutaka Nakashima,Motoji Yamamoto,Ayato Kanada*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一种新型结构单元"远端稳定梁"，通过纯几何设计实现强刚度梯度，在保持中间段柔顺性的同时确保远端高刚性，为连续体机器人提供同时具备安全性和精度的新设计方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 连续体机器人适合受限环境但存在远端刚度低的问题，在外部载荷下会产生大的姿态误差，需要一种能同时保持柔顺性和远端稳定性的解决方案。

Method: 提出远端稳定梁结构单元，由两根平行杆和一根收敛杆通过导向盘约束组成，引入几何耦合来抑制变形模式并保持远端姿态，实现纯几何设计的强刚度梯度。

Result: 实验表明远端刚度比中心高12倍，相比传统悬臂梁有约100倍的改进，实现了中间段柔顺和远端高刚度的同时满足。

Conclusion: 该机制无需主动刚度调节即可实现柔顺性和远端稳定性的同时满足，为需要安全性和精度的连续体机器人提供了新的设计方法。

Abstract: Continuum robots are well suited for constrained environments but suffer from low distal stiffness, resulting in large posture errors under external loads. In this paper, we propose a novel structural primitive, the Distal-Stable Beam, which achieves a strong stiffness gradient through purely geometric design, maintaining compliance in the intermediate section while ensuring high distal rigidity. The structure consists of two parallel rods and one convergent rod constrained by guide disks, introducing geometric coupling that suppresses deformation modes and preserves distal posture.
