### [597] [DIAL: Decoupling Intent and Action via Latent World Modeling for End-to-End VLA](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.29844)
*Yi Chen,Yuying Ge,Hui Zhou,Mingyu Ding,Yixiao Ge,Xihui Liu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: DIAL框架通过可微分潜在意图瓶颈桥接高级决策与低级运动执行，利用VLM进行潜在世界建模，实现稳定训练和卓越性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有端到端VLA模型将VLM主要用作多模态编码器，直接映射视觉语言特征到低级动作，这未能充分利用VLM在高级决策中的潜力，并导致训练不稳定和语义表征退化

Method: 引入DIAL框架，使用基于VLM的System-2进行潜在世界建模，在VLM原生特征空间中合成潜在视觉前瞻；轻量级System-1策略将预测意图与当前观测解码为精确动作；采用两阶段训练：解耦预热阶段和端到端联合优化

Result: 在RoboCasa GR1 Tabletop基准测试中建立新的最先进水平，性能优于先前方法且仅需1/10的演示数据；通过异质人类演示学习物理基础操作先验，在真实人形机器人部署中展现对未见物体和新配置的零样本泛化能力

Conclusion: DIAL通过可微分潜在意图瓶颈有效桥接高级决策与低级运动执行，解决了现有VLA模型训练不稳定和VLM潜力未充分利用的问题，实现了稳定优化和卓越的泛化性能

Abstract: The development of Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models has been significantly accelerated by pre-trained Vision-Language Models (VLMs). However, most existing end-to-end VLAs treat the VLM primarily as a multimodal encoder, directly mapping vision-language features to low-level actions. This paradigm underutilizes the VLM's potential in high-level decision making and introduces training instability, frequently degrading its rich semantic representations. To address these limitations, we introduce DIAL, a framework bridging high-level decision making and low-level motor execution through a differentiable latent intent bottleneck. Specifically, a VLM-based System-2 performs latent world modeling by synthesizing latent visual foresight within the VLM's native feature space; this foresight explicitly encodes intent and serves as the structural bottleneck. A lightweight System-1 policy then decodes this predicted intent together with the current observation into precise robot actions via latent inverse dynamics. To ensure optimization stability, we employ a two-stage training paradigm: a decoupled warmup phase where System-2 learns to predict latent futures while System-1 learns motor control under ground-truth future guidance within a unified feature space, followed by seamless end-to-end joint optimization. This enables action-aware gradients to refine the VLM backbone in a controlled manner, preserving pre-trained knowledge. Extensive experiments on the RoboCasa GR1 Tabletop benchmark show that DIAL establishes a new state-of-the-art, achieving superior performance with 10x fewer demonstrations than prior methods. Furthermore, by leveraging heterogeneous human demonstrations, DIAL learns physically grounded manipulation priors and exhibits robust zero-shot generalization to unseen objects and novel configurations during real-world deployment on a humanoid robot.

</details>


### [598] [Reconfiguration of supernumerary robotic limbs for human augmentation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.29808)
*Mustafa Mete,Anastasia Bolotnikova,Alexander Schuessler,Jamie Paik*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出基于定量人体增强分析的可重构超数机器人肢体框架，通过定义增强比来评估不同工作空间，指导SRL配置以适应动态非结构化环境。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有超数机器人肢体主要针对结构化工业环境中的特定任务设计，缺乏对动态非结构化环境的适应性。需要开发能够根据任务需求灵活调整的SRL系统。

Method: 提出可重构SRL框架，通过定量分析人体增强来指导SRL开发。定义人类增强比来评估协作、可见扩展和非可见扩展工作空间，系统化选择SRL的放置、形态和自主性。使用折纸启发的模块化元件构建可重构SRL进行验证。

Result: 实验验证表明，基于定量增强分析的可重构SRL能够更好地匹配任务需求，为日常环境中的适应性人体增强和辅助提供了新视角。

Conclusion: 可重构SRL框架结合定量人体增强分析，能够实现更适应动态非结构化环境的个性化人机交互，为日常环境中的适应性增强提供了系统化方法。

Abstract: Wearable robots aim to seamlessly adapt to humans and their environment with personalized interactions. Existing supernumerary robotic limbs (SRLs), which enhance the physical capabilities of humans with additional extremities, have thus far been developed primarily for task-specific applications in structured industrial settings, limiting their adaptability to dynamic and unstructured environments. Here, we introduce a novel reconfigurable SRL framework grounded in a quantitative analysis of human augmentation to guide the development of more adaptable SRLs for diverse scenarios. This framework captures how SRL configuration shapes workspace extension and human-robot collaboration. We define human augmentation ratios to evaluate collaborative, visible extended, and non-visible extended workspaces, enabling systematic selection of SRL placement, morphology, and autonomy for a given task. Using these metrics, we demonstrate how quantitative augmentation analysis can guide the reconfiguration and control of SRLs to better match task requirements. We validate the proposed approach through experiments with a reconfigurable SRL composed of origami-inspired modular elements. Our results suggest that reconfigurable SRLs, informed by quantitative human augmentation analysis, offer a new perspective for providing adaptable human augmentation and assistance in everyday environments.

</details>


### [599] [SafeDMPs: Integrating Formal Safety with DMPs for Adaptive HRI](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.29708)
*Soumyodipta Nath,Pranav Tiwari,Ravi Prakash*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: SafeDMPs框架将动态运动基元（DMPs）的闭环效率与时空管（STTs）的可证明安全控制律相结合，无需在线优化即可实现实时安全机器人运动


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决机器人同时具备抗干扰鲁棒性和可证明安全性的核心挑战。DMPs具有固有稳定性但缺乏形式化安全保证，而CBFs等正式方法提供可证明安全性但依赖计算昂贵的实时优化，不适合高频控制

Method: 提出SafeDMPs框架，将DMPs的闭环形式效率和动态鲁棒性与基于时空管（STTs）的可证明安全、非优化控制律相结合。该协同方法生成既能抗干扰适应新目标，又能保证避开静态和动态障碍物的运动

Result: 在7自由度机器人机械臂上的实验结果表明，SafeDMPs比基于优化的基准方法快几个数量级且更精确，成为实时、安全、协作机器人的理想解决方案

Conclusion: SafeDMPs解决了传统需要在线优化的问题，实现了闭环形式解，为实时安全协作机器人提供了高效、可证明安全的运动生成框架

Abstract: Robots operating in human-centric environments must be both robust to disturbances and provably safe from collisions. Achieving these properties simultaneously and efficiently remains a central challenge. While Dynamic Movement Primitives (DMPs) offer inherent stability and generalization from single demonstrations, they lack formal safety guarantees. Conversely, formal methods like Control Barrier Functions (CBFs) provide provable safety but often rely on computationally expensive, real-time optimization, hindering their use in high-frequency control. This paper introduces SafeDMPs, a novel framework that resolves this trade-off. We integrate the closed-form efficiency and dynamic robustness of DMPs with a provably safe, non-optimization-based control law derived from Spatio-Temporal Tubes (STTs). This synergy allows us to generate motions that are not only robust to perturbations and adaptable to new goals, but also guaranteed to avoid static and dynamic obstacles. Our approach achieves a closed-form solution for a problem that traditionally requires online optimization. Experimental results on a 7-DOF robot manipulator demonstrate that SafeDMPs is orders of magnitude faster and more accurate than optimization-based baselines, making it an ideal solution for real-time, safe, and collaborative robotics.

</details>


### [600] [Design and Aerodynamic Modeling of MetaMorpher: A Hybrid Rotary andFixed-Wing Morphing UAV](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.29646)
*Anja Bosak,Dorian Erić,Ana Milas,Stjepan Bogdan*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出MetaMorpher变形无人机，通过非线性数学模型和模块化设计，在垂直起降敏捷性和固定翼巡航效率之间取得平衡


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决传统无人机在垂直起降敏捷性和固定翼巡航效率之间的权衡问题，通过变形设计实现两种飞行模式的最优结合

Method: 基于spincopter平台，采用轻质材料和新型机翼折叠策略的简化机械架构，建立非线性飞行动力学模型，支持分段机翼结构的任意力分布，实现模块化设计

Result: 在Simulink环境中测试多种飞行模式，模型在不同结构配置下表现出可预测的行为，证明其作为快速设计评估工具的可靠性

Conclusion: MetaMorpher变形无人机通过非线性模型和模块化设计，成功实现了垂直起降敏捷性和固定翼巡航效率的平衡，为无人机设计提供了有效的快速评估工具

Abstract: In this paper, we present a generalized, comprehensive nonlinear mathematical model and conceptual design for the MetaMorpher, a metamorphic Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV) designed to bridge the gap between vertical takeoff and landing agility and fixed-wing cruising efficiency. Building on the successful design of the spincopter platform, this work introduces a simplified mechanical architecture using lightweight materials and a novel wing-folding strategy. Unlike traditional rigid-body approximations, we derive a nonlinear flight dynamics model that enables arbitrary force distributions across a segmented wing structure. This modularity allows for testing different airfoils, mass distributions, and chord lengths in a single environment. As part of this work, various flight modes were specifically tested and analyzed in the Simulink environment. The results show that the model behaves predictably under different structural configurations, demonstrating its reliability as a tool for rapid design evaluation.

</details>


### [601] [Semantic Zone-Based Map Management for Stable AI-Integrated Mobile Robots](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.29627)
*Huichang Yun,Seungho Yoo*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出基于语义区域的稠密地图管理方法，用于内存受限的移动机器人，通过语义区域级别的关键帧管理来稳定稠密地图使用，提高AI模型性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在内存受限的边缘机器人上同时部署大型AI模型（VLMs/LLMs）和稠密地图具有挑战性。当内存预算超限时，关键帧无法及时加载，会降低定位稳定性并干扰模型性能

Method: 提出语义区域地图管理方法：将关键帧与语义室内区域（如房间、走廊）关联，在语义区域级别进行关键帧管理，优先加载空间相关的地图内容，同时遵守内存约束

Result: 在大型模拟室内环境和NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano上评估，使用Qwen3.5:0.8b时，相比几何地图管理策略，吞吐量提高3.3 tokens/s，延迟降低21.7%。消除内存溢出故障和执行停滞问题，保持定位稳定性

Conclusion: 该方法使内存受限的AI集成移动机器人能够高效利用稠密地图，在内存压力下保持定位稳定性和VLM稳健运行

Abstract: Recent advances in large AI models (VLMs and LLMs) and joint use of the 3D dense maps, enable mobile robots to provide more powerful and interactive services grounded in rich spatial context. However, deploying both heavy AI models and dense maps on edge robots is challenging under strict memory budgets. When the memory budget is exceeded, required keyframes may not be loaded in time, which can degrade the stability of position estimation and interfering model performance. We proposes a semantic zone-based map management approach to stabilize dense-map utilization under memory constraints. We associate keyframes with semantic indoor regions (e.g., rooms and corridors) and keyframe management at the semantic zone level prioritizes spatially relevant map content while respecting memory constraints. This reduces keyframe loading and unloading frequency and memory usage. We evaluate the proposed approach in large-scale simulated indoor environments and on an NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano under concurrent SLAM-VLM execution. With Qwen3.5:0.8b, the proposed method improves throughput by 3.3 tokens/s and reduces latency by 21.7% relative to a geometric map-management strategy. Furthermore, while the geometric strategy suffers from out-of-memory failures and stalled execution under memory pressure, the proposed method eliminates both issues, preserving localization stability and enabling robust VLM operation. These results demonstrate that the proposed approach enables efficient dense map utilization for memory constrained, AI-integrated mobile robots. Code is available at: https://github.com/huichangs/rtabmap/tree/segment

</details>


### [602] [GraSP-STL: A Graph-Based Framework for Zero-Shot Signal Temporal Logic Planning via Offline Goal-Conditioned Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.29533)
*Ancheng Hou,Ruijia Liu,Xiang Yin*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出GraSP-STL框架，用于从离线轨迹中进行零样本STL规划，无需环境交互或任务特定重训练


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决在仅有任务无关行为策略收集的离线数据集、无分析动力学模型、无环境交互、无任务特定重训练条件下的离线零样本STL规划问题

Method: 学习目标条件值函数，诱导有限时域可达性度量，构建有向图抽象，通过图搜索规划航点序列，使用算术几何平均鲁棒性及其区间语义评估，由学习的目标条件策略执行

Result: 实验结果表明该框架在一系列离线STL规划任务中有效，能够实现零样本泛化到未见STL任务和长时域规划

Conclusion: GraSP-STL框架将可重用的可达性学习与任务条件规划分离，通过离线数据中短时域行为的组合实现零样本泛化和长时域规划

Abstract: This paper studies offline, zero-shot planning under Signal Temporal Logic (STL) specifications. We assume access only to an offline dataset of state-action-state transitions collected by a task-agnostic behavior policy, with no analytical dynamics model, no further environment interaction, and no task-specific retraining. The objective is to synthesize a control strategy whose resulting trajectory satisfies an arbitrary unseen STL specification. To this end, we propose GraSP-STL, a graph-search-based framework for zero-shot STL planning from offline trajectories. The method learns a goal-conditioned value function from offline data and uses it to induce a finite-horizon reachability metric over the state space. Based on this metric, it constructs a directed graph abstraction whose nodes represent representative states and whose edges encode feasible short-horizon transitions. Planning is then formulated as a graph search over waypoint sequences, evaluated using arithmetic-geometric mean robustness and its interval semantics, and executed by a learned goal-conditioned policy. The proposed framework separates reusable reachability learning from task-conditioned planning, enabling zero-shot generalization to unseen STL tasks and long-horizon planning through the composition of short-horizon behaviors from offline data. Experimental results demonstrate its effectiveness on a range of offline STL planning tasks.

</details>


### [603] [Communication Outage-Resistant UUV State Estimation: A Variational History Distillation Approach](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.29512)
*Shuyue Li,Miguel López-Benítez,Eng Gee Lim,Fei Ma,Qian Dong,Mengze Cao,Limin Yu,Xiaohui Qin*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出变分历史蒸馏方法，通过从历史轨迹提取模式合成虚拟测量，解决UUV集群通信中断时的状态估计问题，在40秒通信中断期间将预测误差从170米降至15米。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: UUV集群可靠运行依赖连续水声通信，但该通信方式易受间歇中断。通信中断时，标准状态估计器如UKF被迫进行开环预测，若环境中存在未建模动态因素（如未知洋流），估计误差会迅速增长，可能导致任务失败。

Method: 提出变分历史蒸馏方法，将轨迹预测视为近似贝叶斯推理过程，将基于物理的标准运动模型与直接从UUV历史轨迹提取的模式相结合。通过从历史轨迹蒸馏合成"虚拟测量"，并引入自适应置信机制，随着通信中断时间延长逐渐降低对虚拟测量的信任度。

Result: 在高保真环境中的大量蒙特卡洛仿真表明，该方法在40秒通信中断期间将预测均方根误差降低了91%，从约170米降至15米。

Conclusion: VHD方法即使在完全通信中断情况下也能保持鲁棒的状态估计性能，为解决UUV集群通信中断问题提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: The reliable operation of Unmanned Underwater Vehicle (UUV) clusters is highly dependent on continuous acoustic communication. However, this communication method is highly susceptible to intermittent interruptions. When communication outages occur, standard state estimators such as the Unscented Kalman Filter (UKF) will be forced to make open-loop predictions. If the environment contains unmodeled dynamic factors, such as unknown ocean currents, this estimation error will grow rapidly, which may eventually lead to mission failure. To address this critical issue, this paper proposes a Variational History Distillation (VHD) approach. VHD regards trajectory prediction as an approximate Bayesian reasoning process, which links a standard motion model based on physics with a pattern extracted directly from the past trajectory of the UUV. This is achieved by synthesizing ``virtual measurements'' distilled from historical trajectories. Recognizing that the reliability of extrapolated historical trends degrades over extended prediction horizons, an adaptive confidence mechanism is introduced. This mechanism allows the filter to gradually reduce the trust of virtual measurements as the communication outage time is extended. Extensive Monte Carlo simulations in a high-fidelity environment demonstrate that the proposed method achieves a 91% reduction in prediction Root Mean Square Error (RMSE), reducing the error from approximately 170 m to 15 m during a 40-second communication outage. These results demonstrate that VHD can maintain robust state estimation performance even under complete communication loss.

</details>


### [604] [CReF: Cross-modal and Recurrent Fusion for Depth-conditioned Humanoid Locomotion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.29452)
*Yuan Hao,Ruiqi Yu,Shixin Luo,Guoteng Zhang,Jun Wu,Qiuguo Zhu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: CReF：一种单阶段深度条件人形机器人运动框架，通过跨模态注意力直接学习原始深度数据中的运动相关特征，无需显式几何中间表示，实现复杂地形鲁棒穿越


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有感知人形机器人运动方法通常依赖于显式几何抽象（如机器人中心的2.5D地形表示或几何相关辅助目标），这些方法继承了中间或监督目标的表示偏差，对垂直结构、穿孔障碍和复杂现实世界杂乱环境的适应性受限

Method: 提出CReF框架：1）通过本体感受查询的跨模态注意力耦合本体感受和深度标记；2）使用门控残差融合块融合结果表示；3）采用GRU进行时间集成，通过高速公路式输出门实现状态依赖的循环和前馈特征混合；4）引入地形感知落脚点放置奖励，从足端点云样本中提取可支撑落脚点候选并奖励靠近最近可支撑候选的触地位置

Result: 仿真和物理人形机器人实验表明，该方法能在多样化地形上实现鲁棒穿越，并能有效零样本迁移到包含扶手、空心托盘组件、严重反射干扰和视觉杂乱室外环境的真实场景

Conclusion: CReF通过直接从原始深度数据学习运动相关特征，避免了显式几何中间表示的局限性，实现了对复杂几何地形（包括垂直结构、穿孔障碍等）的鲁棒运动控制，展示了在真实世界杂乱环境中的有效零样本迁移能力

Abstract: Stable traversal over geometrically complex terrain increasingly requires exteroceptive perception, yet prior perceptive humanoid locomotion methods often remain tied to explicit geometric abstractions, either by mediating control through robot-centric 2.5D terrain representations or by shaping depth learning with auxiliary geometry-related targets. Such designs inherit the representational bias of the intermediate or supervisory target and can be restrictive for vertical structures, perforated obstacles, and complex real-world clutter. We propose CReF (Cross-modal and Recurrent Fusion), a single-stage depth-conditioned humanoid locomotion framework that learns locomotion-relevant features directly from raw forward-facing depth without explicit geometric intermediates. CReF couples proprioception and depth tokens through proprioception-queried cross-modal attention, fuses the resulting representation with a gated residual fusion block, and performs temporal integration with a Gated Recurrent Unit (GRU) regulated by a highway-style output gate for state-dependent blending of recurrent and feedforward features. To further improve terrain interaction, we introduce a terrain-aware foothold placement reward that extracts supportable foothold candidates from foot-end point-cloud samples and rewards touchdown locations that lie close to the nearest supportable candidate. Experiments in simulation and on a physical humanoid demonstrate robust traversal over diverse terrains and effective zero-shot transfer to real-world scenes containing handrails, hollow pallet assemblies, severe reflective interference, and visually cluttered outdoor surroundings.

</details>


### [605] [RAAP: Retrieval-Augmented Affordance Prediction with Cross-Image Action Alignment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.29419)
*Qiyuan Zhuang,He-Yang Xu,Yijun Wang,Xin-Yang Zhao,Yang-Yang Li,Xiu-Shen Wei*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: RAAP框架通过结合检索与对齐学习，解耦静态接触点定位和动态动作方向预测，实现少样本泛化的物体可供性预测


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有物体可供性预测方法存在局限性：检索方法因稀疏性和覆盖不足而脆弱，大规模模型在未见类别上经常错误定位接触点并误预测接触后动作，阻碍了鲁棒泛化

Method: 提出检索增强的可供性预测框架，通过密集对应关系迁移接触点，并通过检索增强的对齐模型预测动作方向，该模型使用双权重注意力整合多个参考

Result: 在DROID和HOI4D的紧凑子集上训练，每个任务仅需数十个样本，就能在未见物体和类别上实现一致性能，并在仿真和真实世界中实现零样本机器人操作

Conclusion: RAAP框架统一了可供性检索与对齐学习，通过解耦接触点定位和动作方向预测，实现了对未见物体和类别的鲁棒泛化，为机器人精细交互提供了有效解决方案

Abstract: Understanding object affordances is essential for enabling robots to perform purposeful and fine-grained interactions in diverse and unstructured environments. However, existing approaches either rely on retrieval, which is fragile due to sparsity and coverage gaps, or on large-scale models, which frequently mislocalize contact points and mispredict post-contact actions when applied to unseen categories, thereby hindering robust generalization. We introduce Retrieval-Augmented Affordance Prediction (RAAP), a framework that unifies affordance retrieval with alignment-based learning. By decoupling static contact localization and dynamic action direction, RAAP transfers contact points via dense correspondence and predicts action directions through a retrieval-augmented alignment model that consolidates multiple references with dual-weighted attention. Trained on compact subsets of DROID and HOI4D with as few as tens of samples per task, RAAP achieves consistent performance across unseen objects and categories, and enables zero-shot robotic manipulation in both simulation and the real world. Project website: https://github.com/SEU-VIPGroup/RAAP.

</details>


### [606] [CLaD: Planning with Grounded Foresight via Cross-Modal Latent Dynamics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.29409)
*Andrew Jeong,Jaemin Kim,Sebin Lee,Sung-Eui Yoon*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: CLaD框架通过非对称交叉注意力建模本体感知与语义状态的联合演化，使用自监督目标预测基础潜在前瞻，结合扩散策略生成动作，在LIBERO-LONG基准上达到94.7%成功率


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法在语义空间或潜在空间中规划，未能显式对齐跨模态转换。机器人操作涉及通过底层动作耦合的动力学和语义转换，需要建模这些状态的联合演化

Method: 提出CLaD框架，通过非对称交叉注意力让动力学转换查询语义转换，使用EMA目标编码器和辅助重建损失的自监督目标预测基础潜在前瞻，防止表示坍塌。预测的前瞻与观测调制后条件化扩散策略生成动作

Result: 在LIBERO-LONG基准上达到94.7%成功率，与大型视觉语言动作模型性能相当但参数显著减少

Conclusion: CLaD通过显式对齐跨模态转换，有效建模机器人操作中的动力学-语义联合演化，在保持高性能的同时减少了模型复杂度

Abstract: Robotic manipulation involves kinematic and semantic transitions that are inherently coupled via underlying actions. However, existing approaches plan within either semantic or latent space without explicitly aligning these cross-modal transitions. To address this, we propose CLaD, a framework that models how proprioceptive and semantic states jointly evolve under actions through asymmetric cross-attention that allows kinematic transitions to query semantic ones. CLaD predicts grounded latent foresights via self-supervised objectives with EMA target encoders and auxiliary reconstruction losses, preventing representation collapse while anchoring predictions to observable states. Predicted foresights are modulated with observations to condition a diffusion policy for action generation. On LIBERO-LONG benchmark, CLaD achieves 94.7\% success rate, competitive with large VLAs with significantly fewer parameters.

</details>


### [607] [Learning Semantic Priorities for Autonomous Target Search](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.29391)
*Max Lodel,Nils Wilde,Robert Babuška,Javier Alonso-Mora*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一种利用专家输入训练语义优先级模型的目标搜索方法，通过组合优化在边界探索规划器中使用学习到的优先级，实现基于语义特征的高效目标搜索


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前目标搜索方法依赖相似领域的大数据集训练，限制了在多样化环境中的适应性。人类专家拥有关于语义关系的高层知识，可以有效指导机器人在多样化且未见过的环境中进行目标搜索

Method: 提出一种目标搜索方法，利用专家输入训练语义优先级模型，通过组合优化在边界探索规划器中使用学习到的优先级，确保鲁棒性和完全覆盖

Result: 在未见过的环境中进行仿真测试，该方法比覆盖驱动的探索规划器始终实现更快的目标恢复

Conclusion: 通过利用专家知识训练语义优先级模型，可以实现基于语义特征的高效目标搜索，提高在多样化未知环境中的搜索效率

Abstract: The use of semantic features can improve the efficiency of target search in unknown environments for robotic search and rescue missions. Current target search methods rely on training with large datasets of similar domains, which limits the adaptability to diverse environments. However, human experts possess high-level knowledge about semantic relationships necessary to effectively guide a robot during target search missions in diverse and previously unseen environments. In this paper, we propose a target search method that leverages expert input to train a model of semantic priorities. By employing the learned priorities in a frontier exploration planner using combinatorial optimization, our approach achieves efficient target search driven by semantic features while ensuring robustness and complete coverage. The proposed semantic priority model is trained with several synthetic datasets of simulated expert guidance for target search. Simulation tests in previously unseen environments show that our method consistently achieves faster target recovery than a coverage-driven exploration planner.

</details>


### [608] [Interacting Multiple Model Proprioceptive Odometry for Legged Robots](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.29383)
*Wanlei Li,Zichang Chen,Shilei Li,Xiaogang Xiong,Yunjiang Lou*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出基于交互多模型（IMM）的足式机器人本体感知里程计框架，通过多接触假设解决传统点接触假设在实际运动中的局限性，提高姿态估计精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 足式机器人状态估计面临挑战：足式里程计可观测性有限，依赖测量约束抑制漂移。当外部感知传感器不可靠时，主要依赖本体感知测量（特别是接触相关的腿部运动学信息）。现有方法大多基于理想化点接触假设，在实际运动中常被违反，导致约束有效性降低，估计精度下降。

Method: 提出基于交互多模型（IMM）的本体感知里程计框架。在统一概率框架内纳入多个接触假设，实现在线模式切换和变接触条件下的概率融合。

Result: 大量仿真和真实世界实验表明，该方法在保持可比计算效率的同时，实现了优于最先进方法的姿态估计精度。

Conclusion: 通过IMM框架处理多接触假设，有效解决了传统点接触假设的局限性，显著提升了足式机器人在外部感知传感器不可靠时的本体感知里程计性能。

Abstract: State estimation for legged robots remains challenging because legged odometry generally suffers from limited observability and therefore depends critically on measurement constraints to suppress drift. When exteroceptive sensors are unreliable or degraded, such constraints are mainly derived from proprioceptive measurements, particularly contact-related leg kinematics information. However, most existing proprioceptive odometry methods rely on an idealized point-contact assumption, which is often violated during real locomotion. Consequently, the effectiveness of proprioceptive constraints may be significantly reduced, resulting in degraded estimation accuracy. To address these limitations, we propose an interacting multiple model (IMM)-based proprioceptive odometry framework for legged robots. By incorporating multiple contact hypotheses within a unified probabilistic framework, the proposed method enables online mode switching and probabilistic fusion under varying contact conditions. Extensive simulations and real-world experiments demonstrate that the proposed method achieves superior pose estimation accuracy over state-of-the-art methods while maintaining comparable computational efficiency.

</details>


### [609] [Industrial-Grade Robust Robot Vision for Screw Detection and Removal under Uneven Conditions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.29363)
*Tomoki Ishikura,Genichiro Matsuda,Takuya Kiyokawa,Kensuke Harada*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出自动化空调室外机拆解系统，集成两阶段检测方法和局部校准策略，实现高精度螺丝检测和操作，在真实测试中达到78.3%拆解成功率


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 日本劳动力减少而家电回收需求增加，需要自动化拆解流程。空调室外机拆解自动化面临尺寸变化、污垢和锈蚀等挑战

Method: 集成任务特定的两阶段检测方法和基于网格的局部校准策略，无需预编程坐标

Result: 螺丝检测召回率达99.8%，操作精度±0.75mm，120台真实测试中拆解成功率78.3%，平均周期时间193秒

Conclusion: 系统验证了工业应用的可行性，能够应对尺寸变化和环境退化问题

Abstract: As the amount of used home appliances is expected to increase despite the decreasing labor force in Japan, there is a need to automate disassembling processes at recycling plants. The automation of disassembling air conditioner outdoor units, however, remains a challenge due to unit size variations and exposure to dirt and rust. To address these challenges, this study proposes an automated system that integrates a task-specific two-stage detection method and a lattice-based local calibration strategy. This approach achieved a screw detection recall of 99.8% despite severe degradation and ensured a manipulation accuracy of +/-0.75 mm without pre-programmed coordinates. In real-world validation with 120 units, the system attained a disassembly success rate of 78.3% and an average cycle time of 193 seconds, confirming its feasibility for industrial application.

</details>


### [610] [IMPASTO: Integrating Model-Based Planning with Learned Dynamics Models for Robotic Oil Painting Reproduction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.29315)
*Yingke Wang,Hao Li,Yifeng Zhu,Hong-Xing Yu,Ken Goldberg,Li Fei-Fei,Jiajun Wu,Yunzhu Li,Ruohan Zhang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 机器人油画复制系统IMPASTO：通过自学习像素动力学模型与模型预测控制，实现仅凭目标图像序列就能规划并执行笔触轨迹、力度和颜色的油画复制


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器人复制油画需要解决柔性画笔的力敏控制、笔触效果预测和多步骤笔触规划等挑战，且通常缺乏人类逐步演示或精确仿真器。研究旨在探索机器人能否仅凭目标油画图像序列，就能推断并执行所需的笔触轨迹、力度和颜色来完成复制。

Method: IMPASTO系统整合了学习的像素动力学模型与基于模型的规划方法。动力学模型从图像观察和参数化笔触动作预测画布更新；采用后退时域模型预测控制优化器规划轨迹和力度；通过力敏控制器在7自由度机械臂上执行笔触。系统集成了低层力控制、学习动力学模型和高层闭环规划，完全通过机器人自学习训练。

Result: IMPASTO能够近似人类艺术家的单笔触数据集和多笔触艺术作品，在复制精度上优于基线方法。系统展示了从机器人自学习中获得的像素动力学模型与模型预测控制的有效集成。

Conclusion: IMPASTO证明了机器人可以通过自学习像素动力学模型和模型预测控制，仅凭目标图像序列就能成功复制油画作品，实现了力敏控制、学习模型和高层规划的集成，为机器人艺术创作提供了新途径。

Abstract: Robotic reproduction of oil paintings using soft brushes and pigments requires force-sensitive control of deformable tools, prediction of brushstroke effects, and multi-step stroke planning, often without human step-by-step demonstrations or faithful simulators. Given only a sequence of target oil painting images, can a robot infer and execute the stroke trajectories, forces, and colors needed to reproduce it? We present IMPASTO, a robotic oil-painting system that integrates learned pixel dynamics models with model-based planning. The dynamics models predict canvas updates from image observations and parameterized stroke actions; a receding-horizon model predictive control optimizer then plans trajectories and forces, while a force-sensitive controller executes strokes on a 7-DoF robot arm. IMPASTO integrates low-level force control, learned dynamics models, and high-level closed-loop planning, learns solely from robot self-play, and approximates human artists' single-stroke datasets and multi-stroke artworks, outperforming baselines in reproduction accuracy. Project website: https://impasto-robopainting.github.io/

</details>


### [611] [MRReP: Mixed Reality-based Hand-drawn Reference Path Editing Interface for Mobile Robot Navigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.00059)
*Takumi Taki,Masato Kobayashi,Yuki Uranishi*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: MRReP：基于混合现实的界面，允许用户通过手势在物理地面上绘制参考路径，以指导移动机器人导航，相比传统2D界面提高了路径指定精度和可用性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前自主移动机器人在人机共享室内环境中运行时，需要反映人类空间意图的路径（如避免干扰行人流、保持舒适距离），但传统路径规划器主要优化几何成本，对人类操作者明确指定路线的支持有限。

Method: 提出MRReP混合现实界面，用户通过手势直接在物理地面上绘制手绘参考路径（HRP），通过定制的手绘参考路径规划器将用户指定的点序列转换为全局路径，集成到机器人导航栈中实现自主导航。

Result: 在受试者内实验中，与传统的2D基线界面相比，MRReP提高了路径指定精度、可用性和感知工作负荷，同时在物理环境中实现了更稳定的路径指定。

Conclusion: 在混合现实中直接指定路径是将人类空间意图融入移动机器人导航的有效方法，MRReP界面能够更好地捕捉和实现人类操作者的空间意图。

Abstract: Autonomous mobile robots operating in human-shared indoor environments often require paths that reflect human spatial intentions, such as avoiding interference with pedestrian flow or maintaining comfortable clearance. However, conventional path planners primarily optimize geometric costs and provide limited support for explicit route specification by human operators. This paper presents MRReP, a Mixed Reality-based interface that enables users to draw a Hand-drawn Reference Path (HRP) directly on the physical floor using hand gestures. The drawn HRP is integrated into the robot navigation stack through a custom Hand-drawn Reference Path Planner, which converts the user-specified point sequence into a global path for autonomous navigation. We evaluated MRReP in a within-subject experiment against a conventional 2D baseline interface. The results demonstrated that MRReP enhanced path specification accuracy, usability, and perceived workload, while enabling more stable path specification in the physical environment. These findings suggest that direct path specification in MR is an effective approach for incorporating human spatial intention into mobile robot navigation. Additional material is available at https://mertcookimg.github.io/mrrep

</details>


### [612] [Long-Reach Robotic Cleaning for Lunar Solar Arrays](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.29240)
*Stanley Wang,Velin Kojouharov,Long Yin Chung,Daniel Morton,Mark Cutkosky*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出用于月球太阳能板清洁的小型移动机器人，配备长臂可展开机械臂和可更换清洁工具，通过顺应腕部和力控实现稳定接触清洁


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 商业月球活动加速了对可靠表面基础设施的需求，维护任务如检查、清洁、除尘和小型维修对保持性能和延长系统寿命至关重要。月球太阳能板长期运行中会积累月尘，导致输出功率快速下降，缩短任务寿命

Method: 设计小型移动机器人，配备轻质可展开长臂机械臂和可更换清洁工具；在先前视觉引导长臂操作基础上，增加带末端力感知的顺应腕部和基于速度的导纳控制器，以调节表面清洁期间的稳定接触

Result: 在平面表面的初步实验台上，系统在0.3米至1.0米臂长范围内执行简单清洁运动时，能维持约2N的法向力，初始接触后RMS力误差约为0.2N

Conclusion: 早期结果表明，可展开长臂机械臂是用于月球基础设施（如太阳能板、散热器和光学表面）机器人维护的有前景架构

Abstract: Commercial lunar activity is accelerating the need for reliable surface infrastructure and routine operations to keep it functioning. Maintenance tasks such as inspection, cleaning, dust mitigation, and minor repair are essential to preserve performance and extend system life. A specific application is the cleaning of lunar solar arrays. Solar arrays are expected to provide substantial fraction of lunar surface power and operate for months to years, supplying continuous energy to landers, habitats, and surface assets, making sustained output mission-critical. However, over time lunar dust accumulates on these large solar arrays, which can rapidly degrade panel output and reduce mission lifetime. We propose a small mobile robot equipped with a long-reach, lightweight deployable boom and interchangeable cleaning tool to perform gentle cleaning over meter-scale workspaces with minimal human involvement. Building on prior vision-guided long-reach manipulation, we add a compliant wrist with distal force sensing and a velocity-based admittance controller to regulate stable contact during surface cleaning. In preliminary benchtop experiments on a planar surface, the system maintained approximately 2 N normal force while executing a simple cleaning motion over boom lengths from 0.3 m to 1.0 m, with RMS force error of approximately 0.2 N after initial contact. These early results suggest that deployable long-reach manipulators are a promising architecture for robotic maintenance of lunar infrastructure such as solar arrays, radiators, and optical surfaces.

</details>


### [613] [Long-Reach Robotic Manipulation for Assembly and Outfitting of Lunar Structures](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.29226)
*Stanley Wang,Venny Kojouharov,Long Yin Chung,Daniel Morton,Mark Cutkosky*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一种用于月球基础设施建设的紧凑型长臂机械臂，采用可展开复合臂结构，能够在大尺度结构上进行电缆布线等精细操作


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 月球表面基础设施建设需要半自主或全自主机器人操作，特别是电缆布线等任务需要在大尺度结构上进行运输、布线和精细操作

Method: 设计紧凑型长臂机械臂，采用可展开复合臂结构；表征可展开结构的偏转、振动和展开特性；提出操作控制策略以减轻这些效应

Result: 实验表明，在臂长达到1.8米时，末端精度误差平均小于15毫米；通过电缆布线任务展示了在月球装备应用中的潜力

Conclusion: 所提出的机械臂系统能够满足月球基础设施建设中长臂操作需求，特别是在电缆布线等精细操作任务中具有应用潜力

Abstract: Future infrastructure construction on the lunar surface will require semi- or fully-autonomous operation from robots deployed at the build site. In particular, tasks such as electrical outfitting necessitate transport, routing, and fine manipulation of cables across large structures. To address this need, we present a compact and long-reach manipulator incorporating a deployable composite boom, capable of performing manipulation tasks across large structures and workspaces. We characterize the deflection, vibration, and blossoming characteristics inherent to the deployable structure, and present a manipulation control strategy to mitigate these effects. Experiments indicate an average endpoint accuracy error of less than 15 mm for boom lengths up to 1.8 m. We demonstrate the approach with a cable routing task to illustrate the potential for lunar outfitting applications that benefit from long reach.

</details>


### [614] [Kilohertz-Safe: A Scalable Framework for Constrained Dexterous Retargeting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.29213)
*Yinxiao Tian,Ziyi Yang,Zinan Zhao,Zhen Kan*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种可扩展的运动重定向框架，将非线性重定向问题转化为关节微分空间中的凸二次规划，实现高频实时性能并保证安全性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 灵巧手遥操作需要同时实现高频实时性能和异构运动学与安全约束的运动重定向方法。现有非线性优化方法计算成本过高，学习型方法缺乏形式化安全保证

Method: 将非线性重定向问题重新表述为关节微分空间中的凸二次规划，通过系统线性化纳入异构约束（包括运动学极限和碰撞避免），并集成控制屏障函数提供形式化安全保证

Result: 在Wuji Hand平台上通过仿真和硬件实验验证，优于Dex-Retargeting和GeoRT等最先进方法，平均延迟9.05ms，超过95%的重定向帧满足安全标准，有效减少复杂操作任务中的自碰撞和穿透

Conclusion: 提出的框架实现了可扩展的高频运动重定向，同时提供形式化安全保证，为灵巧手遥操作提供了一种高效可靠的解决方案

Abstract: Dexterous hand teleoperation requires motion re-targeting methods that simultaneously achieve high-frequency real-time performance and enforcement of heterogeneous kinematic and safety constraints. Existing nonlinear optimization-based approaches often incur prohibitive computational cost, limiting their applicability to kilohertz-level control, while learning-based methods typically lack formal safety guarantees. This paper proposes a scalable motion retargeting framework that reformulates the nonlinear retargeting problem into a convex quadratic program in joint differential space. Heterogeneous constraints, including kinematic limits and collision avoidance, are incorporated through systematic linearization, resulting in improved computational efficiency and numerical stability. Control barrier functions are further integrated to provide formal safety guarantees during the retargeting process. The proposed framework is validated through simulations and hardware experiments on the Wuji Hand platform, outperforming state-of-the-art methods such as Dex-Retargeting and GeoRT. The framework achieves high-frequency operation with an average latency of 9.05 ms, while over 95% of retargeted frames satisfy the safety criteria, effectively mitigating self-collision and penetration during complex manipulation tasks.

</details>


### [615] [Efficient Camera Pose Augmentation for View Generalization in Robotic Policy Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.29192)
*Sen Wang,Huaiyi Dong,Jingyi Tian,Jiayi Li,Zhuo Yang,Tongtong Cao,Anlin Chen,Shuang Wu,Le Wang,Sanping Zhou*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: GenSplat：基于3D高斯泼溅的视图泛化策略学习框架，通过单次前向传播从稀疏未标定输入重建3D场景，并通过视图渲染增强策略的3D结构理解能力


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有2D视觉运动策略在视图泛化方面存在严重不足，因为它们依赖静态观测，在未见过的视图中难以保持一致的动作映射

Method: 1. 使用置换等变架构从稀疏未标定输入单次前向重建3D场景；2. 设计3D先验蒸馏策略正则化3DGS优化，防止纯光度监督的几何坍塌；3. 从稳定3D表示渲染多样合成视图，系统性地增强训练观测流形

Result: 该方法迫使策略基于底层3D结构做出决策，在严重空间扰动下实现鲁棒执行，而基线方法性能严重下降

Conclusion: GenSplat通过3D高斯泼溅框架实现视图泛化的策略学习，解决了2D中心化策略的视图泛化缺陷，通过3D场景重建和视图增强提升策略的3D结构理解能力

Abstract: Prevailing 2D-centric visuomotor policies exhibit a pronounced deficiency in novel view generalization, as their reliance on static observations hinders consistent action mapping across unseen views. In response, we introduce GenSplat, a feed-forward 3D Gaussian Splatting framework that facilitates view-generalized policy learning through novel view rendering. GenSplat employs a permutation-equivariant architecture to reconstruct high-fidelity 3D scenes from sparse, uncalibrated inputs in a single forward pass. To ensure structural integrity, we design a 3D-prior distillation strategy that regularizes the 3DGS optimization, preventing the geometric collapse typical of purely photometric supervision. By rendering diverse synthetic views from these stable 3D representations, we systematically augment the observational manifold during training. This augmentation forces the policy to ground its decisions in underlying 3D structures, thereby ensuring robust execution under severe spatial perturbations where baselines severely degrade.

</details>


### [616] [Generalizable Dense Reward for Long-Horizon Robotic Tasks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.00055)
*Silong Yong,Stephen Sheng,Carl Qi,Xiaojie Wang,Evan Sheehan,Anurag Shivaprasad,Yaqi Xie,Katia Sycara,Yesh Dattatreya*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: VLLR提出了一种结合LLM/VLM外部奖励和策略自确定性内部奖励的密集奖励框架，用于微调机器人基础策略，无需人工奖励工程，在CHORES基准上显著提升任务成功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有机器人基础策略主要通过大规模模仿学习训练，但在长时程任务中因分布偏移和误差累积而表现不佳。强化学习可以微调这些模型，但需要人工奖励工程才能在不同任务上有效工作。

Method: VLLR框架包含：(1) 使用LLM分解任务为可验证子任务，VLM估计进度以初始化价值函数进行简短预热；(2) 基于策略自确定性的内部奖励，在PPO微调过程中提供每步内在指导。避免了完整训练期间的高推理成本。

Result: 在CHORES基准（移动操作和导航）上，VLLR相比预训练策略获得高达56%的绝对成功率提升，相比最先进的RL微调方法在分布内任务上提升5%，在分布外任务上提升10%，且无需人工奖励工程。

Conclusion: VLLR通过结合LLM/VLM外部奖励和策略自确定性内部奖励，有效解决了机器人基础策略微调中的奖励工程问题，在分布内和分布外任务上都取得了显著性能提升，两种奖励机制具有互补优势。

Abstract: Existing robotic foundation policies are trained primarily via large-scale imitation learning. While such models demonstrate strong capabilities, they often struggle with long-horizon tasks due to distribution shift and error accumulation. While reinforcement learning (RL) can finetune these models, it cannot work well across diverse tasks without manual reward engineering. We propose VLLR, a dense reward framework combining (1) an extrinsic reward from Large Language Models (LLMs) and Vision-Language Models (VLMs) for task progress recognition, and (2) an intrinsic reward based on policy self-certainty. VLLR uses LLMs to decompose tasks into verifiable subtasks and then VLMs to estimate progress to initialize the value function for a brief warm-up phase, avoiding prohibitive inference cost during full training; and self-certainty provides per-step intrinsic guidance throughout PPO finetuning. Ablation studies reveal complementary benefits: VLM-based value initialization primarily improves task completion efficiency, while self-certainty primarily enhances success rates, particularly on out-of-distribution tasks. On the CHORES benchmark covering mobile manipulation and navigation, VLLR achieves up to 56% absolute success rate gains over the pretrained policy, up to 5% gains over state-of-the-art RL finetuning methods on in-distribution tasks, and up to $10\%$ gains on out-of-distribution tasks, all without manual reward engineering. Additional visualizations can be found in https://silongyong.github.io/vllr_project_page/

</details>


### [617] [Gleanmer: A 6 mW SoC for Real-Time 3D Gaussian Occupancy Mapping](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.29005)
*Zih-Sing Fu,Peter Zhi Xuan Li,Sertac Karaman,Vivienne Sze*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: Gleanmer是一款用于3D占用地图的SoC芯片，采用高斯模型(GMMap)实现高效能实时建图，在16nm工艺下功耗低于6mW，支持边缘应用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 边缘计算应用（如AR/VR和自主导航）需要高保真3D占用地图，但受限于功耗约束。现有方案在能效方面存在不足，需要专门硬件加速器来满足实时性和低功耗需求。

Method: 提出Gleanmer SoC，包含针对高斯模型(GMMap)的专用加速器。采用算法-硬件协同优化：1）直接计算紧凑高斯模型；2）高效重用高斯数据；3）高斯近似计算减少硬件面积。在16nm CMOS工艺上实现。

Result: 1）建图和查询能耗分别降低63%和81%；2）加速器面积减少38%；3）实时处理640x480图像，建图帧率超过88fps；4）地图查询每秒处理超过540K坐标；5）首个实现实时3D占用地图的SoC，功耗低于6mW。

Conclusion: Gleanmer通过算法-硬件协同优化成功实现了高效能的3D占用地图处理，为边缘计算应用提供了首个低于6mW功耗的实时解决方案，在能效和性能方面均有显著提升。

Abstract: High-fidelity 3D occupancy mapping is essential for many edge-based applications (such as AR/VR and autonomous navigation) but is limited by power constraints. We present Gleanmer, a system on chip (SoC) with an accelerator for GMMap, a 3D occupancy map using Gaussians. Through algorithm-hardware co-optimizations for direct computation and efficient reuse of these compact Gaussians, Gleanmer reduces construction and query energy by up to 63% and 81%, respectively. Approximate computation on Gaussians reduces accelerator area by 38%. Using 16nm CMOS, Gleanmer processes 640x480 images in real time beyond 88 fps during map construction and processes over 540K coordinates per second during map query. To our knowledge, Gleanmer is the first fabricated SoC to achieve real-time 3D occupancy mapping under 6 mW for edge-based applications.

</details>


### [618] [Large Neighborhood Search for Multi-Agent Task Assignment and Path Finding with Precedence Constraints](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28968)
*Viraj Parimi,Brian C. Williams*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种用于任务分配与路径规划及优先级约束（TAPF-PC）的大邻域搜索方法，通过迭代重新分配任务来优化固定分配方案，在满足优先级约束的同时降低路由成本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统多智能体路径规划与优先级约束（MAPF-PC）方法假设任务分配是固定的，但实际应用中解决方案质量不仅取决于智能体如何移动，还取决于哪个智能体执行哪个任务。这促使研究者提出TAPF-PC问题，需要联合优化任务分配、优先级满足和路由成本。

Method: 采用大邻域搜索方法：从可行的MAPF-PC种子解开始，通过基于重新分配的邻域修复进行迭代改进。在每个选定的邻域内恢复可行性，从而在耦合的TAPF-PC搜索空间中寻找优化解。

Result: 在多个基准测试系列和扩展规模下的实验表明，最佳配置改进了89.1%的实例相对于固定分配种子解，证明大邻域搜索能有效捕捉在优先级约束下灵活重新分配的收益。

Conclusion: 大邻域搜索方法是解决TAPF-PC问题的有效策略，能够通过迭代重新分配显著提升解决方案质量，在满足优先级约束的同时优化任务分配和路径规划。

Abstract: Many multi-robot applications require tasks to be completed efficiently and in the correct order, so that downstream operations can proceed at the right time. Multi-agent path finding with precedence constraints (MAPF-PC) is a well-studied framework for computing collision-free plans that satisfy ordering relations when task sequences are fixed in advance. In many applications, however, solution quality depends not only on how agents move, but also on which agent performs which task. This motivates the lifted problem of task assignment and path finding with precedence constraints (TAPF-PC), which extends MAPF-PC by jointly optimizing assignment, precedence satisfaction, and routing cost. To address the resulting coupled TAPF-PC search space, we develop a large neighborhood search approach that starts from a feasible MAPF-PC seed and iteratively improves it through reassignment-based neighborhood repair, restoring feasibility within each selected neighborhood. Experiments across multiple benchmark families and scaling regimes show that the best-performing configuration improves 89.1% of instances over fixed-assignment seed solutions, demonstrating that large neighborhood search effectively captures the gains from flexible reassignment under precedence constraints.

</details>


### [619] [AutoWorld: Scaling Multi-Agent Traffic Simulation with Self-Supervised World Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28963)
*Mozhgan Pourkeshavatz,Tianran Liu,Nicholas Rhinehart*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: AutoWorld是一个基于世界模型的交通仿真框架，利用无标签LiDAR数据提升仿真性能，通过级联DPP采样增强多样性，在WOSAC基准测试中取得最佳表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有数据驱动的交通仿真器严重依赖有监督学习（标注轨迹或语义标注），扩展成本高昂，而大量无标签传感器数据未被充分利用。需要探索如何利用无标签数据提升交通仿真性能。

Method: 1. 从无标签LiDAR占用表示中学习世界模型；2. 构建从粗到细的预测场景上下文作为多智能体运动生成模型的输入；3. 使用级联确定性点过程（DPP）框架指导世界模型和运动模型的采样过程，提升样本多样性；4. 设计运动感知的潜在监督目标，增强场景动态表示。

Result: 在WOSAC基准测试中，AutoWorld在主要评估指标Realism Meta Metric（RMM）上排名第一。实验表明，包含无标签LiDAR数据能持续提升仿真性能，各组件有效性通过消融实验验证。

Conclusion: AutoWorld为无需额外标注即可扩展交通仿真真实性提供了新途径，证明了无标签数据在提升仿真性能方面的价值，为大规模交通仿真系统开发提供了有效框架。

Abstract: Multi-agent traffic simulation is central to developing and testing autonomous driving systems. Recent data-driven simulators have achieved promising results, but rely heavily on supervised learning from labeled trajectories or semantic annotations, making it costly to scale their performance. Meanwhile, large amounts of unlabeled sensor data can be collected at scale but remain largely unused by existing traffic simulation frameworks. This raises a key question: How can a method harness unlabeled data to improve traffic simulation performance? In this work, we propose AutoWorld, a traffic simulation framework that employs a world model learned from unlabeled occupancy representations of LiDAR data. Given world model samples, AutoWorld constructs a coarse-to-fine predictive scene context as input to a multi-agent motion generation model. To promote sample diversity, AutoWorld uses a cascaded Determinantal Point Process framework to guide the sampling processes of both the world model and the motion model. Furthermore, we designed a motion-aware latent supervision objective that enhances AutoWorld's representation of scene dynamics. Experiments on the WOSAC benchmark show that AutoWorld ranks first on the leaderboard according to the primary Realism Meta Metric (RMM). We further show that simulation performance consistently improves with the inclusion of unlabeled LiDAR data, and study the efficacy of each component with ablations. Our method paves the way for scaling traffic simulation realism without additional labeling. Our project page contains additional visualizations and released code.

</details>


### [620] [World2Rules: A Neuro-Symbolic Framework for Learning World-Governing Safety Rules for Aviation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28952)
*Haichuan Wang,Jay Patrikar,Sebastian Scherer*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: World2Rules：一个从多模态航空数据中学习安全规则的神经符号框架，通过分层反射推理和归纳逻辑编程验证，在噪声数据中提取可解释的一阶逻辑规则。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现实世界安全关键系统依赖复杂、上下文相关的规则，手动制定不完整且易错。从多模态数据学习面临噪声、不一致性和稀疏故障案例的挑战。神经模型缺乏形式化保证，符号方法对不完美观测脆弱。

Method: 神经符号框架：使用神经模型从文本和视觉数据中提取候选符号事实作为提议机制，通过归纳逻辑编程作为验证层。采用分层反射推理，在示例、子集和规则三个层次强制一致性，过滤不可靠证据，聚合相互一致的组件，修剪无支持的假设。

Result: 在真实航空安全数据上评估，World2Rules学习的规则比纯神经方法F1分数高23.6%，比单次神经符号基线高43.2%。规则紧凑、可解释，适合安全关键推理和形式化分析。

Conclusion: World2Rules成功结合神经和符号方法的优势，从噪声多模态数据中学习安全规则，提供形式化保证和可解释性，适用于安全关键系统的规则学习。

Abstract: Many real-world safety-critical systems are governed by explicit rules that define unsafe world configurations and constrain agent interactions. In practice, these rules are complex and context-dependent, making manual specification incomplete and error-prone. Learning such rules from real-world multimodal data is further challenged by noise, inconsistency, and sparse failure cases. Neural models can extract structure from text and visual data but lack formal guarantees, while symbolic methods provide verifiability yet are brittle when applied directly to imperfect observations. We present World2Rules, a neuro-symbolic framework for learning world-governing safety rules from real-world multimodal aviation data. World2Rules learns from both nominal operational data and aviation crash and incident reports, treating neural models as proposal mechanisms for candidate symbolic facts and inductive logic programming as a verification layer. The framework employs hierarchical reflective reasoning, enforcing consistency across examples, subsets, and rules to filter unreliable evidence, aggregate only mutually consistent components, and prune unsupported hypotheses. This design limits error propagation from noisy neural extractions and yields compact, interpretable first-order logic rules that characterize unsafe world configurations. We evaluate World2Rules on real-world aviation safety data and show that it learns rules that achieve 23.6% higher F1 score than purely neural and 43.2% higher F1 score than single-pass neuro-symbolic baseline, while remaining suitable for safety-critical reasoning and formal analysis.

</details>


### [621] [Why That Robot? A Qualitative Analysis of Justification Strategies for Robot Color Selection Across Occupational Contexts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28919)
*Jiangen He,Wanqi Zhang,Jessica K. Barfield*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 研究用户如何合理化选择不同肤色和拟人特征的机器人，发现功能主义是主要理由，但用户会调整实用理由以符合种族和职业刻板印象，且偏见常隐藏在意识之下。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着机器人越来越多地进入劳动力市场，需要了解隐性社会偏见如何影响用户对机器人的偏好，特别是肤色和拟人特征在不同职业背景下的选择合理化过程。

Method: 通过定性分析4,146份来自1,038名参与者的开放式理由，开发并验证了一个多维编码方案（κ=0.73），研究了四种职业背景下机器人颜色选择的推理框架。

Result: 功能主义是主要合理化策略（52%），但参与者会系统调整实用理由以符合种族和职业刻板印象；种族刻板印象提示显著改变了颜色选择，但理由仍被标准情感或任务相关推理掩盖；人口背景显著影响合理化策略；机器人形状强烈调节颜色解释，高度拟人化时用户从功能推理转向机器中心去种族化。

Conclusion: 研究揭示了偏见如何在机器人选择中运作，提供了可操作的设计建议，有助于减少未来劳动力机器人中社会偏见的延续。

Abstract: As robots increasingly enter the workforce, human-robot interaction (HRI) must address how implicit social biases influence user preferences. This paper investigates how users rationalize their selections of robots varying in skin tone and anthropomorphic features across different occupations. By qualitatively analyzing 4,146 open-ended justifications from 1,038 participants, we map the reasoning frameworks driving robot color selection across four professional contexts. We developed and validated a comprehensive, multidimensional coding scheme via human--AI consensus ($κ= 0.73$). Our results demonstrate that while utilitarian \textit{Functionalism} is the dominant justification strategy (52\%), participants systematically adapted these practical rationales to align with established racial and occupational stereotypes. Furthermore, we reveal that bias frequently operates beneath conscious rationalization: exposure to racial stereotype primes significantly shifted participants' color choices, yet their spoken justifications remained masked by standard affective or task-related reasoning. We also found that demographic backgrounds significantly shape justification strategies, and that robot shape strongly modulates color interpretation. Specifically, as robots become highly anthropomorphic, users increasingly retreat from functional reasoning toward \textit{Machine-Centric} de-racialization. Through these empirical results, we provide actionable design implications to help reduce the perpetuation of societal biases in future workforce robots.

</details>


### [622] [See Something, Say Something: Context-Criticality-Aware Mobile Robot Communication for Hazard Mitigations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28901)
*Bhavya Oza,Devam Shah,Ghanashyama Prabhu,Devika Kodi,Aliasghar Arab*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出一个基于VLM/LLM感知的自适应消息生成框架，通过系统性的情境敏感关键性评估来减少响应时间并提高应急响应效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在安全关键场景中，自主移动机器人需要快速准确地响应危险情况。现有系统存在响应延迟或误判问题，直接增加了行动时间和损害风险。需要一种能够根据情境敏感评估关键性级别、时间敏感性和缓解可行性的系统化方法。

Method: 提出一个框架，其中基于VLM/LLM的感知驱动自适应消息生成。系统根据情境评估危险的关键性级别、时间敏感性和缓解可行性，例如厨房中的刀具产生平静确认，而走廊中的同一物体触发紧急协调警报。

Result: 通过巡逻移动机器人进行了60多次运行验证，不仅实现了更快的响应速度，还将用户信任度提升至82%，相比固定优先级基线有显著改善。结构化关键性评估同时提高了响应速度和缓解效果。

Conclusion: 系统化的情境敏感关键性评估对于自主移动机器人在安全关键场景中的有效响应至关重要。基于VLM/LLM的自适应消息生成框架能够显著减少响应时间并提高用户信任度，验证了结构化关键性评估在提高响应速度和缓解效果方面的有效性。

Abstract: The proverb ``see something, say something'' captures a core responsibility of autonomous mobile robots in safety-critical situations: when they detect a hazard, they must communicate--and do so quickly. In emergency scenarios, delayed or miscalibrated responses directly increase the time to action and the risk of damage. We argue that a systematic context-sensitive assessment of the criticality level, time sensitivity, and feasibility of mitigation is necessary for AMRs to reduce time to action and respond effectively. This paper presents a framework in which VLM/LLM-based perception drives adaptive message generation, for example, a knife in a kitchen produces a calm acknowledgment; the same object in a corridor triggers an urgent coordinated alert. Validation in 60+ runs using a patrolling mobile robot not only empowers faster response, but also brings user trusts to 82\% compared to fixed-priority baselines, validating that structured criticality assessment improves both response speed and mitigation effectiveness.

</details>


### [623] [Robust Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning for Small UAS Separation Assurance under GPS Degradation and Spoofing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28900)
*Alex Zongo,Filippos Fotiadis,Ufuk Topcu,Peng Wei*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种基于多智能体强化学习的鲁棒分离保障方法，用于应对GPS降级和欺骗攻击下的小型无人机系统，通过闭式对抗扰动表达式避免对抗训练，在高达35%的腐败率下实现近零碰撞率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在合作监视中，小型无人机系统依赖GPS广播位置信息，当这些位置信息被腐败时，整个观测的空中交通状态变得不可靠。需要解决GPS降级和欺骗攻击下的鲁棒分离保障问题。

Method: 将状态观测腐败建模为智能体与对手之间的零和博弈，推导出对抗扰动的闭式表达式，避免对抗训练，实现线性时间评估。将该闭式对抗策略集成到MARL策略梯度算法中，获得鲁棒的反策略。

Result: 在高密度小型无人机仿真中，在腐败水平高达35%的情况下观察到近零碰撞率，优于未使用对抗扰动训练的基线策略。证明了闭式表达式能以二阶精度近似真实最坏情况对抗扰动。

Conclusion: 该方法通过闭式对抗扰动表达式有效解决了GPS腐败下的鲁棒分离保障问题，避免了对抗训练的计算负担，在高腐败率下仍能保持优异的安全性能。

Abstract: We address robust separation assurance for small Unmanned Aircraft Systems (sUAS) under GPS degradation and spoofing via Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning (MARL). In cooperative surveillance, each aircraft (or agent) broadcasts its GPS-derived position; when such position broadcasts are corrupted, the entire observed air traffic state becomes unreliable. We cast this state observation corruption as a zero-sum game between the agents and an adversary: with probability R, the adversary perturbs the observed state to maximally degrade each agent's safety performance. We derive a closed-form expression for this adversarial perturbation, bypassing adversarial training entirely and enabling linear-time evaluation in the state dimension. We show that this expression approximates the true worst-case adversarial perturbation with second-order accuracy. We further bound the safety performance gap between clean and corrupted observations, showing that it degrades at most linearly with the corruption probability under Kullback-Leibler regularization. Finally, we integrate the closed-form adversarial policy into a MARL policy gradient algorithm to obtain a robust counter-policy for the agents. In a high-density sUAS simulation, we observe near-zero collision rates under corruption levels up to 35%, outperforming a baseline policy trained without adversarial perturbations.

</details>


### [624] [Bootstrap Perception Under Hardware Depth Failure for Indoor Robot Navigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28890)
*Nishant Pushparaju,Vivek Mattam,Aliasghar Arab*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种针对硬件深度传感器失效的室内机器人导航自举感知系统，通过幸存的有效像素校准单目深度估计，在传感器失效时填补感知空白，实现故障感知的层次化融合。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 室内机器人导航中，飞行时间相机在反光表面会丢失大量深度像素（高达78%），而2D LiDAR无法感知扫描平面以上的障碍物，需要一种在传感器失效时仍能保持可靠感知的解决方案。

Method: 利用传感器失效的自参照特性：幸存的有效像素用于校准学习的单目深度到度量尺度，形成故障感知的层次化感知架构：LiDAR作为几何锚点，硬件深度在有效时保留，学习深度仅在需要时填补空白。

Result: 在走廊和动态行人评估中，选择性融合比单独使用LiDAR将成本地图障碍物覆盖率提高了55-110%。紧凑的蒸馏学生模型在Jetson Orin Nano上达到218 FPS，在闭环仿真中实现9/10导航成功率且零碰撞，性能匹配地面真实深度基线而成本仅为基础模型的一小部分。

Conclusion: 该系统通过自举感知方法有效解决了硬件深度传感器失效问题，实现了故障感知的层次化融合，在保持高实时性的同时显著提升了障碍物覆盖率，为室内机器人导航提供了可靠的感知解决方案。

Abstract: We present a bootstrap perception system for indoor robot navigation under hardware depth failure. In our corridor data, the time-of-flight camera loses up to 78% of its depth pixels on reflective surfaces, yet a 2D LiDAR alone cannot sense obstacles above its scan plane. Our system exploits a self-referential property of this failure: the sensor's surviving valid pixels calibrate learned monocular depth to metric scale, so the system fills its own gaps without external data. The architecture forms a failure-aware sensing hierarchy, conservative when sensors work and filling in when they fail: LiDAR remains the geometric anchor, hardware depth is kept where valid, and learned depth enters only where needed. In corridor and dynamic pedestrian evaluations, selective fusion increases costmap obstacle coverage by 55-110% over LiDAR alone. A compact distilled student runs at 218\,FPS on a Jetson Orin Nano and achieves 9/10 navigation success with zero collisions in closed-loop simulation, matching the ground-truth depth baseline at a fraction of the foundation model's cost.

</details>


### [625] [A Semantic Observer Layer for Autonomous Vehicles: Pre-Deployment Feasibility Study of VLMs for Low-Latency Anomaly Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28888)
*Kunal Runwal,Swaraj Gajare,Daniel Adejumo,Omkar Ankalkope,Siddhant Baroth,Aliasghar Arab*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出语义观察层架构：使用量化视觉语言模型以1-2Hz频率监控自动驾驶中的语义异常，触发安全接管机制


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 语义异常（像素级检测器无法推理的上下文相关危险）对自动驾驶安全构成关键风险，需要专门监控机制

Method: 采用Nvidia Cosmos-Reason1-7B模型，结合NVFP4量化和FlashAttention2优化，构建语义观察层并行于主控制循环运行

Result: 实现~500ms推理时间，比未优化的FP16基线快约50倍；发现NF4量化导致召回率崩溃（10.6%）作为硬部署约束

Conclusion: 为具身AI自动驾驶平台的语义观察架构建立了预部署可行性案例，通过性能指标到安全目标的映射分析

Abstract: Semantic anomalies-context-dependent hazards that pixel-level detectors cannot reason about-pose a critical safety risk in autonomous driving. We propose a \emph{semantic observer layer}: a quantized vision-language model (VLM) running at 1--2\,Hz alongside the primary AV control loop, monitoring for semantic edge cases, and triggering fail-safe handoffs when detected. Using Nvidia Cosmos-Reason1-7B with NVFP4 quantization and FlashAttention2, we achieve ~500 ms inference a ~50x speedup over the unoptimized FP16 baseline (no quantization, standard PyTorch attention) on the same hardware--satisfying the observer timing budget. We benchmark accuracy, latency, and quantization behavior in static and video conditions, identify NF4 recall collapse (10.6%) as a hard deployment constraint, and a hazard analysis mapping performance metrics to safety goals. The results establish a pre-deployment feasibility case for the semantic observer architecture on embodied-AI AV platforms.

</details>


### [626] [FocusVLA: Focused Visual Utilization for Vision-Language-Action Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28740)
*Yichi Zhang,Weihao Yuan,Yizhuo Zhang,Xidong Zhang,Jia Wan*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: FocusVLA通过模态级联注意力消除捷径路径，并引入聚焦注意力动态选择任务相关视觉区域，解决了VLA模型中视觉信息利用不足的问题，显著提升了动作生成质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型在动作生成中存在三个主要瓶颈：1）架构偏差导致模型忽略视觉细节；2）过多视觉token使注意力难以聚焦正确区域；3）任务无关视觉信息引入大量噪声。这些问题严重影响了动作生成质量。

Method: 提出FocusVLA框架，包含两个核心组件：1）模态级联注意力，消除语言到动作的捷径路径，强制模型依赖任务相关视觉细节；2）聚焦注意力，动态选择任务相关视觉区域，控制信息量并抑制任务无关噪声。

Result: 在模拟和真实机器人基准测试中，FocusVLA不仅有效利用视觉细节执行灵巧操作，还在多种任务上显著提升性能并加速收敛。

Conclusion: VLA性能主要受限于视觉信息利用方式而非视觉表示质量。FocusVLA通过引导注意力到任务相关视觉区域，有效桥接视觉与动作，解决了现有自回归策略的瓶颈。

Abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models improve action generation by conditioning policies on rich vision-language information. However, current auto-regressive policies are constrained by three bottlenecks: (1) architectural bias drives models to overlook visual details, (2) an excessive number of visual tokens makes attention difficult to focus on the correct regions, and (3) task-irrelevant visual information introduces substantial noise - together severely impairing the quality of action. In this paper, we investigate how to effectively utilize different visual representations for action generation. To this end, we first empirically validate the above issues and show that VLA performance is primarily limited by how visual information is utilized, rather than by the quality of visual representations. Based on these insights, we introduce FocusVLA, a novel paradigm that directs the model's attention to task-relevant visual regions to effectively bridge vision to action. Specifically, we first propose Modality Cascaded Attention to eliminate shortcut pathways, thereby compelling VLA models to rely on task-relevant visual details for action generation. Furthermore, we propose Focus Attention, which dynamically selects task-relevant visual patches to control information quantity while explicitly modulating their influence to suppress task-irrelevant noise. Extensive experiments on both simulated and real-world robotic benchmarks demonstrate that FocusVLA not only effectively leverages visual details to perform dexterous manipulations, but also substantially improves performance and accelerates convergence across a variety of tasks.

</details>


### [627] [Pandora: Articulated 3D Scene Graphs from Egocentric Vision](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28732)
*Alan Yu,Yun Chang,Christopher Xie,Luca Carlone*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 利用人类佩戴Project Aria眼镜采集的自我中心数据，构建包含可动部件模型的3D场景图，提升机器人对物体动态和容器关系的理解，增强移动操作能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统机器人建图系统受限于机器人自身传感器和技能，无法完全探索环境（如无法打开抽屉、访问壁柜），导致地图不完整。需要利用人类探索数据来弥补这些盲点。

Method: 利用人类佩戴Project Aria眼镜自然探索场景时采集的自我中心数据，通过简单启发式方法恢复可动物体部件模型，并将其集成到3D场景图表示中。

Result: 所恢复的可动部件模型质量与基于其他输入模态的最先进方法相当；构建的包含可动部件的3D场景图能更好理解物体动态和容器关系；在波士顿动力Spot机器人执行移动操作任务（检索隐藏目标物品）中表现出色。

Conclusion: 利用人类自我中心数据构建的包含可动部件的3D场景图能有效弥补机器人建图的局限性，提升机器人对环境的理解能力和操作性能，为知识从人类向机器人的直接转移提供了有效途径。

Abstract: Robotic mapping systems typically approach building metric-semantic scene representations from the robot's own sensors and cameras. However, these "first person" maps inherit the robot's own limitations due to its embodiment or skillset, which may leave many aspects of the environment unexplored. For example, the robot might not be able to open drawers or access wall cabinets. In this sense, the map representation is not as complete, and requires a more capable robot to fill in the gaps. We narrow these blind spots in current methods by leveraging egocentric data captured as a human naturally explores a scene wearing Project Aria glasses, giving a way to directly transfer knowledge about articulation from the human to any deployable robot. We demonstrate that, by using simple heuristics, we can leverage egocentric data to recover models of articulate object parts, with quality comparable to those of state-of-the-art methods based on other input modalities. We also show how to integrate these models into 3D scene graph representations, leading to a better understanding of object dynamics and object-container relationships. We finally demonstrate that these articulated 3D scene graphs enhance a robot's ability to perform mobile manipulation tasks, showcasing an application where a Boston Dynamics Spot is tasked with retrieving concealed target items, given only the 3D scene graph as input.

</details>


### [628] [SOLE-R1: Video-Language Reasoning as the Sole Reward for On-Robot Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28730)
*Philip Schroeder,Thomas Weng,Karl Schmeckpeper,Eric Rosen,Stephen Hart,Ondrej Biza*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: SOLE-R1是一个专门为强化学习设计的视频语言推理模型，能够仅通过原始视频观察和自然语言目标生成密集的任务进度估计作为奖励信号，实现零样本在线强化学习。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前最强的视觉语言模型在强化学习中作为评估器时，在部分可观测性和分布偏移条件下容易失败，导致策略利用感知错误而非真正解决问题。需要专门设计的模型来克服这些限制。

Method: 开发SOLE-R1模型，采用时空链式推理方法，通过大规模视频轨迹和推理合成管道生成时间对齐的链式推理轨迹，结合基础空间和多帧时间推理能力，使用监督微调与可验证奖励的强化学习混合框架进行训练。

Result: 在四个不同仿真环境和真实机器人设置中，SOLE-R1实现了从随机初始化的零样本在线强化学习，成功完成了24个未见任务，显著优于GPT-5和Gemini-3-Pro等强视觉语言奖励模型，且对奖励攻击表现出更强的鲁棒性。

Conclusion: SOLE-R1通过专门设计的视频语言推理架构和训练方法，成功解决了现有视觉语言模型在强化学习奖励生成中的局限性，为无地面真值奖励、成功指示、演示或任务特定调优的机器人学习提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) have shown impressive capabilities across diverse tasks, motivating efforts to leverage these models to supervise robot learning. However, when used as evaluators in reinforcement learning (RL), today's strongest models often fail under partial observability and distribution shift, enabling policies to exploit perceptual errors rather than solve the task. To address this limitation, we introduce SOLE-R1 (Self-Observing LEarner), a video-language reasoning model explicitly designed to serve as the sole reward signal for online RL. Given only raw video observations and a natural-language goal, SOLE-R1 performs per-timestep spatiotemporal chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning and produces dense estimates of task progress that can be used directly as rewards. To train SOLE-R1, we develop a large-scale video trajectory and reasoning synthesis pipeline that generates temporally grounded CoT traces aligned with continuous progress supervision. This data is combined with foundational spatial and multi-frame temporal reasoning, and used to train the model with a hybrid framework that couples supervised fine-tuning with RL from verifiable rewards. Across four different simulation environments and a real-robot setting, SOLE-R1 enables zero-shot online RL from random initialization: robots learn previously unseen manipulation tasks without ground-truth rewards, success indicators, demonstrations, or task-specific tuning. SOLE-R1 succeeds on 24 unseen tasks and substantially outperforms strong vision-language rewarders, including GPT-5 and Gemini-3-Pro, while exhibiting markedly greater robustness to reward hacking.

</details>


### [629] [DRIVE-Nav: Directional Reasoning, Inspection, and Verification for Efficient Open-Vocabulary Navigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28691)
*Maoguo Gao,Zejun Zhu,Zhiming Sun,Zhengwei Ma,Longze Yuan,Zhongjing Ma,Zhigang Gao,Jinhui Zhang,Suli Zou*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: DRIVE-Nav是一个用于开放词汇目标导航的结构化框架，通过围绕持久方向而非原始边界点组织探索，减少重复访问并提高路径效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有零样本方法在不完整观测下基于密集边界点进行推理，导致路线选择不稳定、重复访问和额外动作开销。需要更稳定的探索策略来改善开放词汇目标导航的效率。

Method: 提出结构化框架DRIVE-Nav：1) 从加权快速行进法路径中提取和跟踪方向候选；2) 维护代表性视图进行语义检查；3) 结合视觉语言引导的提示增强与跨帧验证提高基础可靠性；4) 限制决策在240度前向视野内的相关方向上。

Result: 在HM3D-OVON上达到50.2% SR和32.6% SPL，比先前最佳方法提升1.9% SR和5.6% SPL。在HM3Dv2和MP3D上获得最佳SPL，并成功迁移到物理人形机器人，实际部署验证了有效性。

Conclusion: DRIVE-Nav通过结构化方向组织探索，显著减少了冗余访问并提高了路径效率，在多个基准测试中表现出优越性能，证明了其在开放词汇目标导航任务中的有效性。

Abstract: Open-Vocabulary Object Navigation (OVON) requires an embodied agent to locate a language-specified target in unknown environments. Existing zero-shot methods often reason over dense frontier points under incomplete observations, causing unstable route selection, repeated revisits, and unnecessary action overhead. We present DRIVE-Nav, a structured framework that organizes exploration around persistent directions rather than raw frontiers. By inspecting encountered directions more completely and restricting subsequent decisions to still-relevant directions within a forward 240 degree view range, DRIVE-Nav reduces redundant revisits and improves path efficiency. The framework extracts and tracks directional candidates from weighted Fast Marching Method (FMM) paths, maintains representative views for semantic inspection, and combines vision-language-guided prompt enrichment with cross-frame verification to improve grounding reliability. Experiments on HM3D-OVON, HM3Dv2, and MP3D demonstrate strong overall performance and consistent efficiency gains. On HM3D-OVON, DRIVE-Nav achieves 50.2% SR and 32.6% SPL, improving the previous best method by 1.9% SR and 5.6% SPL. It also delivers the best SPL on HM3Dv2 and MP3D and transfers to a physical humanoid robot. Real-world deployment also demonstrates its effectiveness. Project page: https://coolmaoguo.github.io/drive-nav-page/

</details>


### [630] [Serialized Red-Green-Gray: Quicker Heuristic Validation of Edges in Dynamic Roadmap Graphs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28674)
*Yulie Arad,Stav Ashur,Marta Markowicz,James D. Motes,Marco Morales,Nancy M. Amato*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: RGG框架通过红-绿-灰分类快速识别动态环境中路线图边的有效性，SerRGG利用GPU加速实现2-9倍速度提升，适用于时间敏感的机器人应用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统基于路线图的方法在动态环境中面临挑战：需要低效地重建路线图或进行昂贵的碰撞检测来更新现有路线图，无法适应障碍物姿态的频繁变化。

Method: 提出Red-Green-Gray框架，基于SPITE方法使用保守几何近似快速将路线图边分类为无效(红)、有效(绿)或不确定(灰)。SerRGG是高性能变体，利用批量序列化和向量化实现GPU加速。

Result: RGG有效减少了需要完全验证的未知边数量，SerRGG相比顺序实现实现了2-9倍的速度提升，结合了几何精度和计算速度的优势。

Conclusion: RGG框架和SerRGG变体通过快速边分类和GPU加速，为动态环境中的运动规划提供了高效解决方案，特别适用于时间关键的机器人应用。

Abstract: Motion planning in dynamic environments, such as robotic warehouses, requires fast adaptation to frequent changes in obstacle poses. Traditional roadmap-based methods struggle in such settings, relying on inefficient reconstruction of a roadmap or expensive collision detection to update the existing roadmap. To address these challenges we introduce the Red-Green-Gray (RGG) framework, a method that builds on SPITE to quickly classify roadmap edges as invalid (red), valid (green), or uncertain (gray) using conservative geometric approximations. Serial RGG provides a high-performance variant leveraging batch serialization and vectorization to enable efficient GPU acceleration. Empirical results demonstrate that while RGG effectively reduces the number of unknown edges requiring full validation, SerRGG achieves a 2-9x speedup compared to the sequential implementation. This combination of geometric precision and computational speed makes SerRGG highly effective for time-critical robotic applications.

</details>


### [631] [A Self-Rotating Tri-Rotor UAV for Field of View Expansion and Autonomous Flight](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28581)
*Xiaobin Zhou,Zihao Zheng,Aoxu Jin,Lei Qiang,Bo Zhu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: SPINNER是一种自旋转三旋翼无人机，通过连续旋转运动扩展机载传感器视场，无需额外传感器或能耗，同时实现三维位置和姿态控制，并采用抗干扰控制框架保证飞行稳定性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 无人机感知受限于机载传感器（如相机和LiDAR）的狭窄视场，传统方法需要增加额外传感器或能耗来扩展视场，这增加了系统复杂性和成本。

Method: 1. 设计自旋转三旋翼无人机平台，通过连续旋转运动扩展传感器视场；2. 仅使用三个无刷电机实现三维位置和滚转-俯仰姿态控制；3. 采用抗扭矩板设计调节旋转速度；4. 开发结合非线性模型预测控制和增量非线性动态逆的干扰补偿控制框架，应对旋转飞行带来的强耦合、严重非线性和复杂干扰。

Result: 1. 在风速高达4.8 m/s的干扰下保持稳健飞行；2. 最大速度2.0 m/s时实现高精度轨迹跟踪；3. 在停车场和森林环境测试中，旋转感知机制显著提高了视场覆盖范围和感知能力。

Conclusion: SPINNER通过创新的自旋转设计，在不增加额外传感器或能耗的情况下，有效扩展了无人机感知视场，同时通过先进的抗干扰控制框架保证了飞行稳定性，为无人机在复杂环境中的感知和导航提供了新解决方案。

Abstract: Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) perception relies on onboard sensors like cameras and LiDAR, which are limited by the narrow field of view (FoV). We present Self-Perception INertial Navigation Enabled Rotorcraft (SPINNER), a self-rotating tri-rotor UAV for the FoV expansion and autonomous flight. Without adding extra sensors or energy consumption, SPINNER significantly expands the FoV of onboard camera and LiDAR sensors through continuous spin motion, thereby enhancing environmental perception efficiency. SPINNER achieves full 3-dimensional position and roll--pitch attitude control using only three brushless motors, while adjusting the rotation speed via anti-torque plates design. To address the strong coupling, severe nonlinearity, and complex disturbances induced by spinning flight, we develop a disturbance compensation control framework that combines nonlinear model predictive control (MPC) with incremental nonlinear dynamic inversion. Experimental results demonstrate that SPINNER maintains robust flight under wind disturbances up to 4.8 \,m/s and achieves high-precision trajectory tracking at a maximum speed of 2.0\,m/s. Moreover, tests in parking garages and forests show that the rotational perception mechanism substantially improves FoV coverage and enhances perception capability of SPINNER.

</details>


<div id='eess.AS'></div>

# eess.AS [[Back]](#toc)

### [632] [Active noise cancellation on open-ear smart glasses](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05519)
*Kuang Yuan,Freddy Yifei Liu,Tong Xiao,Yiwen Song,Chengyi Shen,Saksham Bhutani,Justin Chan,Swarun Kumar*

Main category: eess.AS

TL;DR: 首个针对开放式智能眼镜的实时主动降噪系统，仅使用眼镜框架上的麦克风和开放式扬声器，在100-1000Hz频率范围内实现平均9.6-11.2dB的噪声降低


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 智能眼镜作为日益普及的可穿戴平台，音频是其关键交互方式。然而，在嘈杂环境中，由于智能眼镜采用开放式扬声器设计，不封闭耳道，导致听力体验不佳。传统的主动降噪技术依赖于耳道内或入口处的误差麦克风测量残余声音，与开放式设计不兼容。

Method: 开发了首个针对开放式智能眼镜的实时主动降噪系统，仅使用嵌入眼镜框架的麦克风和微型开放式扬声器。采用低延迟计算流程：通过分布在眼镜框架周围的8个麦克风阵列估计耳朵处的噪声，实时生成反相声信号来抵消环境噪声。构建了定制眼镜原型，并在8种移动环境下进行用户研究，专注于100-1000Hz频率范围（环境噪声集中区域）。

Result: 在100-1000Hz频率范围内，无需任何校准的情况下实现平均9.6dB的噪声降低；经过简短的用户特定校准后，噪声降低提升至11.2dB。系统在移动环境中有效工作，验证了开放式智能眼镜主动降噪的可行性。

Conclusion: 成功实现了首个针对开放式智能眼镜的实时主动降噪系统，克服了传统主动降噪技术与开放式设计不兼容的挑战。该系统仅使用眼镜框架上的传感器和扬声器，在移动环境中有效降低环境噪声，为智能眼镜在嘈杂环境中的音频交互提供了实用解决方案。

Abstract: Smart glasses are becoming an increasingly prevalent wearable platform, with audio as a key interaction modality. However, hearing in noisy environments remains challenging because smart glasses are equipped with open-ear speakers that do not seal the ear canal. Furthermore, the open-ear design is incompatible with conventional active noise cancellation (ANC) techniques, which rely on an error microphone inside or at the entrance of the ear canal to measure the residual sound heard after cancellation. Here we present the first real-time ANC system for open-ear smart glasses that suppresses environmental noise using only microphones and miniaturized open-ear speakers embedded in the glasses frame. Our low-latency computational pipeline estimates the noise at the ear from an array of eight microphones distributed around the glasses frame and generates an anti-noise signal in real-time to cancel environmental noise. We develop a custom glasses prototype and evaluate it in a user study across 8 environments under mobility in the 100--1000 Hz frequency range, where environmental noise is concentrated. We achieve a mean noise reduction of 9.6 dB without any calibration, and 11.2 dB with a brief user-specific calibration.

</details>


<div id='cs.HC'></div>

# cs.HC [[Back]](#toc)

### [633] [AI and Collective Decisions: Strengthening Legitimacy and Losers' Consent](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05368)
*Suyash Fulay,Prerna Ravi,Emily Kubin,Shrestha Mohanty,Michiel Bakker,Deb Roy*

Main category: cs.HC

TL;DR: AI系统通过半结构化访谈收集个人经历并可视化展示，增强集体决策的程序合法性，即使参与者未获得期望结果仍能提高信任和理解


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: AI在扩大集体决策规模方面应用广泛，但较少关注如何支持程序合法性，特别是失败者同意的问题——即未获得期望结果的参与者是否仍认为决策公平。研究旨在探索AI如何基于参与者的不同经验和信念来支撑集体决策，以及接触这些经验是否能增加信任、理解和社会凝聚力，即使人们不同意最终结果。

Method: 构建了一个系统：1) 使用半结构化AI访谈者收集政策话题上的个人经历；2) 创建交互式可视化，展示预测的政策支持度以及参与者表达的经历。通过随机实验(n=181)评估系统效果，所有参与者都面对与自身偏好相反的决策结果。

Result: 与可视化交互显著提高了感知合法性、对结果的信任以及对他人的理解，尽管所有参与者都遇到了与自身偏好相反的决策结果。这表明AI工具能够增强集体决策的程序合法性。

Conclusion: 该工具的设计和评估为未来研究提供了方向，表明AI不仅可以帮助实现民主过程的规模和效率，还能增加参与者之间的信任和联系。研究强调了AI在支持程序合法性和促进社会凝聚力方面的潜力。

Abstract: AI is increasingly used to scale collective decision-making, but far less attention has been paid to how such systems can support procedural legitimacy, particularly the conditions shaping losers' consent: whether participants who do not get their preferred outcome still accept it as fair. We ask: (1) how can AI help ground collective decisions in participants' different experiences and beliefs, and (2) whether exposure to these experiences can increase trust, understanding, and social cohesion even when people disagree with the outcome. We built a system that uses a semi-structured AI interviewer to elicit personal experiences on policy topics and an interactive visualization that displays predicted policy support alongside those voiced experiences. In a randomized experiment (n = 181), interacting with the visualization increased perceived legitimacy, trust in outcomes, and understanding of others' perspectives, even though all participants encountered decisions that went against their stated preferences. Our hope is that the design and evaluation of this tool spurs future researchers to focus on how AI can help not only achieve scale and efficiency in democratic processes, but also increase trust and connection between participants.

</details>


### [634] [OGA-AID: Clinician-in-the-loop AI Report Drafting Assistant for Multimodal Observational Gait Analysis in Post-Stroke Rehabilitation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05360)
*Khoi T. N. Nguyen,Nghia D. Nguyen,Hui Yu Koh,Patrick W. H. Kwong,Karen Sui Geok Chua,Ananda Sidarta,Baosheng Yu*

Main category: cs.HC

TL;DR: OGA-AID：一种用于卒中后康复步态分析的多模态多智能体LLM系统，通过协调3个专业智能体将运动视频、运动捕捉数据和临床资料整合为结构化报告，在临床医生参与下显著提升评估质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 卒中后康复中的步态分析耗时且认知负荷大，临床医生需要整合步态视频和运动捕捉数据生成结构化报告，现有方法效率低下，需要自动化辅助工具来减轻临床负担。

Method: 提出OGA-AID系统，采用临床医生在环的多智能体大语言模型架构，协调3个专业智能体分别处理患者运动记录、运动学轨迹和临床资料，综合生成结构化评估报告。

Result: 在真实患者数据上由专业物理治疗师评估，OGA-AID持续优于单次多模态基线方法且误差低；在临床医生在环设置中，简短的专家初步注释进一步降低了与参考评估的误差。

Conclusion: 多模态智能体系统在结构化临床步态评估中具有可行性，AI辅助分析与人类临床判断在康复工作流程中具有互补关系，OGA-AID展示了这种协同作用的潜力。

Abstract: Gait analysis is essential in post-stroke rehabilitation but remains time-intensive and cognitively demanding, especially when clinicians must integrate gait videos and motion-capture data into structured reports. We present OGA-AID, a clinician-in-the-loop multi-agent large language model system for multimodal report drafting. The system coordinates 3 specialized agents to synthesize patient movement recordings, kinematic trajectories, and clinical profiles into structured assessments. Evaluated with expert physiotherapists on real patient data, OGA-AID consistently outperforms single-pass multimodal baselines with low error. In clinician-in-the-loop settings, brief expert preliminary notes further reduce error compared to reference assessments. Our findings demonstrate the feasibility of multimodal agentic systems for structured clinical gait assessment and highlight the complementary relationship between AI-assisted analysis and human clinical judgment in rehabilitation workflows.

</details>


### [635] [From Use to Oversight: How Mental Models Influence User Behavior and Output in AI Writing Assistants](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05166)
*Shalaleh Rismani,Su Lin Blodgett,Q. Vera Liao,Alexandra Olteanu,AJung Moon*

Main category: cs.HC

TL;DR: 研究探讨用户对AI写作助手的不同心智模型（功能型vs结构型）如何影响其控制行为和写作结果，发现结构型心智模型虽提升系统理解，却可能导致更多语法错误


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管AI写作助手已无处不在，但用户心智模型如何影响其使用行为尚不清楚。研究旨在探索不同类型心智模型（功能型vs结构型）如何影响用户对AI建议的控制行为（请求、接受、编辑）和写作结果，特别是在需要用户监督易出错AI输出的情境下

Method: 通过系统描述诱导48名参与者形成不同心智模型（功能型或结构型），然后使用写作助手完成求职信写作任务。助手偶尔提供预设的语法错误建议以测试心智模型是否影响参与者的批判性监督。分析心智模型对系统理解、控制行为和写作质量的影响

Result: 结构型心智模型参与者对系统有更好理解，但产生反效果：他们虽然认为系统更易用，却写出更多语法错误的信件。这表明系统理解、信任和控制之间存在复杂关系，在需要监督易出错AI输出的情境中，更好的系统理解可能导致过度信任和更少批判性监督

Conclusion: 用户对AI写作助手的心智模型显著影响其控制行为和写作结果。结构型心智模型虽增强系统理解，却可能因过度信任而减少对AI建议的批判性监督，导致更多错误。这揭示了在易出错AI系统中，系统理解、信任和用户监督之间的复杂权衡关系

Abstract: AI-based writing assistants are ubiquitous, yet little is known about how users' mental models shape their use. We examine two types of mental models -- functional or related to what the system does, and structural or related to how the system works -- and how they affect control behavior -- how users request, accept, or edit AI suggestions as they write -- and writing outcomes. We primed participants ($N = 48$) with different system descriptions to induce these mental models before asking them to complete a cover letter writing task using a writing assistant that occasionally offered preconfigured ungrammatical suggestions to test whether the mental models affected participants' critical oversight. We find that while participants in the structural mental model condition demonstrate a better understanding of the system, this can have a backfiring effect: while these participants judged the system as more usable, they also produced letters with more grammatical errors, highlighting a complex relationship between system understanding, trust, and control in contexts that require user oversight of error-prone AI outputs.

</details>


### [636] [Justified or Just Convincing? Error Verifiability as a Dimension of LLM Quality](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04418)
*Xiaoyuan Zhu,Kimberly Le Truong,Riccardo Fogliato,Gokul Swamy,Weijian Zhang,Minglai Yang,Longtian Ye,Bangya Liu,Minghao Liu,Andrew Ilyas,Steven Wu*

Main category: cs.HC

TL;DR: 论文提出错误可验证性概念和v_bal度量，用于评估模型生成的解释是否能帮助用户区分答案正确性，发现现有方法无法提升可验证性，并提出两种有效的领域特定改进方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
