Conclusion: OpenCEM平台通过提供公开可用的模拟器和数据集，旨在加速下一代智能、可持续且真正上下文感知的能源系统的研究，特别支持利用大型语言模型的创新控制算法和预测模型的开发。

Abstract: Addressing the critical need for intelligent, context-aware energy management in renewable systems, we introduce the \textbf{OpenCEM Simulator and Dataset}: the first open-source digital twin explicitly designed to integrate rich, unstructured contextual information with quantitative renewable energy dynamics. Traditional energy management relies heavily on numerical time series, thereby neglecting the significant predictive power embedded in human-generated context (e.g., event schedules, system logs, user intentions). OpenCEM bridges this gap by offering a unique platform comprising both a meticulously aligned, language-rich dataset from a real-world PV-and-battery microgrid installation and a modular simulator capable of natively processing this multi-modal context. The OpenCEM Simulator provides a high-fidelity environment for developing and validating novel control algorithms and prediction models, particularly those leveraging Large Language Models. We detail its component-based architecture, hybrid data-driven and physics-based modelling capabilities, and demonstrate its utility through practical examples, including context-aware load forecasting and the implementation of online optimal battery charging control strategies. By making this platform publicly available, OpenCEM aims to accelerate research into the next generation of intelligent, sustainable, and truly context-aware energy systems.

</details>


### [675] [Minimal Information Control Invariance via Vector Quantization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.03132)
*Ege Yuceel,Teodor Tchalakov,Sayan Mitra*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出一种基于向量量化自编码器的控制方法，通过联合学习状态空间划分和有限控制码本，在保证安全约束的同时大幅减少控制信号数量，在12维四旋翼模型上实现157倍码本压缩。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 安全关键自主系统需要在有限计算和感知预算下满足硬状态约束，但基于学习的控制器往往比安全操作所需的复杂度高得多。需要形式化这种差距，研究在采样数据控制下使紧集前向不变所需的不同控制信号数量。

Method: 1) 将问题与信息论中的不变熵概念联系起来；2) 提出向量量化自编码器联合学习状态空间划分和有限控制码本；3) 开发基于Lipschitz可达集包围和平方和规划的迭代前向认证算法。

Result: 在12维非线性四旋翼模型上，学习到的控制器相比均匀网格基线实现了157倍的码本大小缩减，同时保持了不变性。实证表征了与安全操作兼容的最小感知分辨率。

Conclusion: 该方法通过联合学习状态划分和控制码本，在保证安全约束的前提下显著降低了控制复杂度，为安全关键系统的资源高效控制提供了新思路。

Abstract: Safety-critical autonomous systems must satisfy hard state constraints under tight computational and sensing budgets, yet learning-based controllers are often far more complex than safe operation requires. To formalize this gap, we study how many distinct control signals are needed to render a compact set forward invariant under sampled-data control, connecting the question to the information-theoretic notion of invariance entropy. We propose a vector-quantized autoencoder that jointly learns a state-space partition and a finite control codebook, and develop an iterative forward certification algorithm that uses Lipschitz-based reachable-set enclosures and sum-of-squares programming. On a 12-dimensional nonlinear quadrotor model, the learned controller achieves a $157\times$ reduction in codebook size over a uniform grid baseline while preserving invariance, and we empirically characterize the minimum sensing resolution compatible with safe operation.

</details>


### [676] [Safe and Near-Optimal Gate Control: A Case Study from the Danish West Coast](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04545)
*Martin Kristjansen,Kim Guldstrand Larsen,Marius Mikučionis,Christian Schilling*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 使用Uppaal Stratego为丹麦Ringkoebing Fjord水闸系统构建数字孪生，通过在线学习控制器来优化水闸操作，满足安全与性能需求


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 目前Ringkoebing Fjord的水闸由人工操作员控制，需要满足多种冲突的安全和性能要求，包括维持目标水位范围、允许海上交通和促进鱼类洄游。人工操作难以同时优化这些目标，需要自动化解决方案

Method: 使用Uppaal Stratego构建水闸系统的数字孪生模型，结合海平面和风速预测，以在线学习方式训练水闸控制器。评估了不同海平面场景下的控制器性能

Result: 与基线控制器相比，学习到的控制器能够满足所有安全要求，同时在性能要求方面表现相似。在不同海平面场景（正常潮汐、高水位、低水位）下均表现良好

Conclusion: 基于数字孪生和在线学习的控制器能够有效替代人工操作，在满足安全要求的同时优化水闸系统的多目标性能，为类似的水利工程管理提供了自动化解决方案

Abstract: Ringkoebing Fjord is an inland water basin on the Danish west coast separated from the North Sea by a set of gates used to control the amount of water entering and leaving the fjord. Currently, human operators decide when and how many gates to open or close for controlling the fjord's water level, with the goal to satisfy a range of conflicting safety and performance requirements such as keeping the water level in a target range, allowing maritime traffic, and enabling fish migration. Uppaal Stratego. We then use this digital twin along with forecasts of the sea level and the wind speed to learn a gate controller in an online fashion. We evaluate the learned controllers under different sea-level scenarios, representing normal tidal behavior, high waters, and low waters. Our evaluation demonstrates that, unlike a baseline controller, the learned controllers satisfy the safety requirements, while performing similarly regarding the other requirements.

</details>


### [677] [Global Geometry of Orthogonal Foliations in the Control Allocation of Signed-Quadratic Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.01912)
*Antonio Franchi*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 论文形式化分析了带符号二次驱动映射系统的冗余解析微分拓扑，揭示了驱动空间的全局分层结构，并证明了基于正交流形的分配器能避免几何奇异性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究动机在于理解带符号二次驱动映射系统的冗余解析微分拓扑结构，特别是驱动空空间的全局拓扑特性，以及如何避免经典伪线性静态分配策略中不可避免的奇异性问题。

Method: 通过分析最小冗余情况，建立定义非线性驱动空空间的连续纤维丛的全局拓扑；证明正交于这些纤维的分布是全局可积的，并由精确对数势场控制；该场将驱动空间分层为横向层，其组合大小遵循严格二项式级数。

Result: 揭示了驱动空间的结构分层：相邻正交面通过低维互易铰链连续连接，层间由边界超平面（门户）分隔；经典伪线性分配策略必然与奇异边界超平面相交，导致无限导数奇异性；而基于正交流形的分配器产生连续可微全局截面，仅需线性数量扇区，极端情况下可形成单一全局微分同胚。

Conclusion: 该几何框架为螺旋桨驱动架构（包括多旋翼无人机、海洋和水下航行器）的控制分配提供了理论基础，基于正交流形的分配器能完全避免几何秩损失和边界穿越奇异性。

Abstract: This work formalizes the differential topology of redundancy resolution for systems governed by signed-quadratic actuation maps. By analyzing the minimally redundant case, the global topology of the continuous fiber bundle defining the nonlinear actuation null-space is established. The distribution orthogonal to these fibers is proven to be globally integrable and governed by an exact logarithmic potential field. This field foliates the actuator space, inducing a structural stratification of all orthants into transverse layers whose combinatorial sizes follow a strictly binomial progression. Within these layers, adjacent orthants are continuously connected via lower-dimensional strata termed reciprocal hinges, while the layers themselves are separated by boundary hyperplanes, or portals, that act as global sections of the fibers. This partition formally distinguishes extremal and transitional layers, which exhibit fundamentally distinct fiber topologies and foliation properties. Through this geometric framework, classical pseudo-linear static allocation strategies are shown to inevitably intersect singular boundary hyperplanes, triggering infinite-derivative kinetic singularities and fragmenting the task space into an exponential number of singularity-separated sectors. In contrast, allocators derived from the orthogonal manifolds yield continuously differentiable global sections with only a linear number of sectors for transversal layers, or can even form a single global diffeomorphism to the task space in the case of the two extremal layers, thus completely avoiding geometric rank-loss and boundary-crossing singularities. These theoretical results directly apply to the control allocation of propeller-driven architectures, including multirotor UAVs, marine, and underwater vehicles.

</details>


### [678] [Extended Hybrid Timed Petri Nets with Semi-Supervised Anomaly Detection for Switched Systems, Modelling and Fault Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04051)
*Fatiha Hamdi,Abdelhafid Zeroual,Fouzi Harrou*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出基于扩展时间连续Petri网和半监督异常检测的混合系统统一故障检测框架，通过LMI设计模式依赖混合观测器，使用OC-SVM等半监督方法处理残差，实现离散、连续和混合故障的高精度检测。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 混合物理系统同时包含连续和离散动态，且可能同时受故障影响。传统故障检测方法通常将这两种动态分开处理，限制了捕捉交互故障模式的能力。需要一种统一框架来处理混合系统的故障检测问题。

Method: 1. 提出扩展时间连续Petri网模型，引入标记依赖流函数实现离散与连续动态的内在耦合；2. 设计模式依赖混合观测器，通过离线求解线性矩阵不等式确保任意切换下的稳定性；3. 使用半监督异常检测方法（OC-SVM、SVDD、EE）处理观测器生成的残差，仅需正常数据训练。

Result: 仿真验证表明：1. 对离散、连续和混合故障均实现高检测精度；2. 快速收敛和鲁棒性能；3. OC-SVM和SVDD在检测率和误报率之间提供最佳权衡；4. 计算效率高，主要复杂度限于离线LMI设计阶段，适合实时部署。

Conclusion: 提出的统一故障检测框架成功整合了ETCPN模型和半监督异常检测，有效处理混合系统的故障检测问题。该方法避免了依赖标记故障数据，通过离线LMI设计确保了观测器稳定性，实现了高性能的故障检测，为混合系统的实时故障监测提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: Hybrid physical systems combine continuous and discrete dynamics, which can be simultaneously affected by faults. Conventional fault detection methods often treat these dynamics separately, limiting their ability to capture interacting fault patterns. This paper proposes a unified fault detection framework for hybrid dynamical systems by integrating an Extended Timed Continuous Petri Net (ETCPN) model with semi-supervised anomaly detection. The proposed ETCPN extends existing Petri net formalisms by introducing marking-dependent flow functions, enabling intrinsic coupling between discrete and continuous dynamics. Based on this structure, a mode-dependent hybrid observer is designed, whose stability under arbitrary switching is ensured via Linear Matrix Inequalities (LMIs), solved offline to determine observer gains. The observer generates residuals that reflect discrepancies between the estimated and measured outputs. These residuals are processed using semi-supervised methods, including One-Class SVM (OC-SVM), Support Vector Data Description (SVDD), and Elliptic Envelope (EE), trained exclusively on normal data to avoid reliance on labeled faults. The framework is validated through simulations involving discrete faults, continuous faults, and hybrid faults. Results demonstrate high detection accuracy, fast convergence, and robust performance, with OC-SVM and SVDD providing the best trade-off between detection rate and false alarms. The framework is computationally efficient for real-time deployment, as the main complexity is confined to the offline LMI design phase.

</details>


### [679] [Stable Walking for Bipedal Locomotion under Foot-Slip via Virtual Nonholonomic Constraints](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.29050)
*Leonardo Colombo,Álvaro Rodríguez Abella,Alexandre Anahory Simoes,Anthony Bloch*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出一种通过虚拟非完整约束将滑移纳入双足行走控制框架的方法，在滑移条件下稳定行走


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 双足机器人在低摩擦或不确定地形上行走时，脚部滑移是主要的不稳定因素。传统控制方法通常假设无滑移接触，因此在发生滑移时性能会下降。

Method: 通过虚拟非完整约束将滑移纳入运动模型，这些约束调节支撑脚的切向速度，同时与用于生成行走步态的虚拟完整约束兼容。形成具有连续摆动动力学和离散冲击事件的混合动力系统，通过非线性反馈律实施两类约束，为降阶运动动力学创建滑移兼容的混合零动力学流形。

Result: 通过相关的庞加莱映射表征周期性行走步态的稳定性，数值结果表明该方法能在滑移条件下实现稳定控制。

Conclusion: 提出的控制框架通过显式地将滑移纳入运动模型，实现了在滑移条件下的稳定双足行走，为低摩擦或不确定地形上的鲁棒运动控制提供了新方法。

Abstract: Foot slip is a major source of instability in bipedal locomotion on low-friction or uncertain terrain. Standard control approaches typically assume no-slip contact and therefore degrade when slip occurs. We propose a control framework that explicitly incorporates slip into the locomotion model through virtual nonholonomic constraints, which regulate the tangential stance-foot velocity while remaining compatible with the virtual holonomic constraints used to generate the walking gait. The resulting closed-loop system is formulated as a hybrid dynamical system with continuous swing dynamics and discrete impact events. A nonlinear feedback law enforces both classes of constraints and yields a slip-compatible hybrid zero dynamics manifold for the reduced-order locomotion dynamics. Stability of periodic walking gaits is characterized through the associated Poincaré map, and numerical results illustrate stabilization under slip conditions.

</details>


### [680] [Koopman Operator Framework for Modeling and Control of Off-Road Vehicle on Deformable Terrain](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28965)
*Kartik Loya,Phanindra Tallapragada*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出了一种用于自主越野车辆在可变形地形上预测控制的混合物理信息与数据驱动建模框架，通过Koopman算子将复杂地形力学和车辆动力学线性化表示。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统高保真地形力学模型计算成本过高，难以直接用于控制设计，需要开发既能保持物理准确性又计算高效的控制导向模型。

Method: 使用Bekker-Wong理论建模可变形地形力学，车辆表示为5自由度系统；通过递归子空间识别方法从大规模仿真数据中识别Koopman算子，利用Grassmannian距离在训练中优先处理信息丰富的数据段。

Result: 预测结果显示了稳定的短时域精度和在地形高度轻微变化下的鲁棒性；当嵌入约束MPC时，学习到的预测器能够实现激进机动动作的稳定闭环跟踪，同时满足转向和扭矩限制。

Conclusion: 该混合框架成功地将物理仿真与数据驱动学习相结合，构建的Koopman线性系统既能从仿真数据中学习，又能无缝更新物理系统数据，为越野车辆在可变形地形上的预测控制提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: This work presents a hybrid physics-informed and data-driven modeling framework for predictive control of autonomous off-road vehicles operating on deformable terrain. Traditional high-fidelity terramechanics models are often too computationally demanding to be directly used in control design. Modern Koopman operator methods can be used to represent the complex terramechanics and vehicle dynamics in a linear form. We develop a framework whereby a Koopman linear system can be constructed using data from simulations of a vehicle moving on deformable terrain. For vehicle simulations, the deformable-terrain terramechanics are modeled using Bekker-Wong theory, and the vehicle is represented as a simplified five-degree-of-freedom (5-DOF) system. The Koopman operators are identified from large simulation datasets for sandy loam and clay using a recursive subspace identification method, where Grassmannian distance is used to prioritize informative data segments during training. The advantage of this approach is that the Koopman operator learned from simulations can be updated with data from the physical system in a seamless manner, making this a hybrid physics-informed and data-driven approach. Prediction results demonstrate stable short-horizon accuracy and robustness under mild terrain-height variations. When embedded in a constrained MPC, the learned predictor enables stable closed-loop tracking of aggressive maneuvers while satisfying steering and torque limits.

</details>


### [681] [Lotka-Sharpe Neural Operators for Control of Population PDEs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.03892)
*Miroslav Krstic,Iasson Karafyllis,Luke Bhan,Carina Veil*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 论文提出使用神经算子学习Lotka-Sharpe非线性积分算子，用于年龄结构捕食者-猎物积分偏微分方程系统的反馈控制设计，证明了算子的Lipschitz连续性并实现了近似反馈律的稳定性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 年龄结构捕食者-猎物积分偏微分方程在生态学、流行病学和生物技术中用于建模相互作用种群。反馈设计中的关键挑战是Lotka-Sharpe非线性积分条件隐式定义的标量ζ，该标量将生育率和死亡率映射到ζ。需要解决这一挑战以实现有效的反馈控制。

Method: 首先证明Lotka-Sharpe算子是Lipschitz连续的，确保在生育率和死亡率函数的紧致集上存在任意精确的神经算子近似。然后证明由此产生的近似反馈律在算子近似误差通过其他非线性算子传播到控制输入时，保持半全局实际渐近稳定性。使用神经算子学习LS算子，并在生育率和死亡率函数估计下进行在线应用。

Result: 成功学习了一次性可用的标准Lotka-Sharpe算子，使其可用于未来其他年龄结构种群互连的控制。数值结果表明，在生育率和死亡率函数估计下，神经LS算子的在线应用有效。

Conclusion: 通过神经算子学习Lotka-Sharpe算子解决了年龄结构种群系统反馈控制的关键挑战，证明了近似方法的理论保证，并展示了实际应用的可行性，为生态学、流行病学和生物技术中的种群控制提供了新工具。

Abstract: Age-structured predator-prey integro-partial differential equations provide models of interacting populations in ecology, epidemiology, and biotechnology. A key challenge in feedback design for these systems is the scalar $ζ$, defined implicitly by the Lotka-Sharpe nonlinear integral condition, as a mapping from fertility and mortality rates to $ζ$. To solve this challenge with operator learning, we first prove that the Lotka-Sharpe operator is Lipschitz continuous, guaranteeing the existence of arbitrarily accurate neural operator approximations over a compact set of fertility and mortality functions. We then show that the resulting approximate feedback law preserves semi-global practical asymptotic stability under propagation of the operator approximation error through various other nonlinear operators, all the way through to the control input. In the numerical results, not only do we learn ``once-and-for-all'' the canonical Lotka-Sharpe (LS) operator, and thus make it available for future uses in control of other age-structured population interconnections, but we demonstrate the online usage of the neural LS operator under estimation of the fertility and mortality functions.

</details>


<div id='cs.AI'></div>

# cs.AI [[Back]](#toc)

### [682] [Claw-Eval: Toward Trustworthy Evaluation of Autonomous Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06132)
*Bowen Ye,Rang Li,Qibin Yang,Yuanxin Liu,Linli Yao,Hanglong Lv,Zhihui Xie,Chenxin An,Lei Li,Lingpeng Kong,Qi Liu,Zhifang Sui,Tong Yang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: Claw-Eval：一个端到端的智能体评估套件，通过轨迹感知评分和多模态任务覆盖，解决了现有基准在轨迹不透明、安全评估不足和模态覆盖窄的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有智能体基准存在三个关键局限：(1) 轨迹不透明的评分（仅检查最终输出），(2) 安全性和鲁棒性评估不足，(3) 模态覆盖和交互范式狭窄。需要更全面的评估框架来评估真实世界部署的智能体。

Method: 开发了包含300个人工验证任务的评估套件，涵盖9个类别（通用服务编排、多模态感知与生成、多轮专业对话）。通过三个独立证据通道（执行轨迹、审计日志、环境快照）记录每个智能体动作，实现基于2,159个细粒度评分项的轨迹感知评分。评分协议评估完成度、安全性和鲁棒性，报告平均分数、Pass@k和Pass^k。

Result: 对14个前沿模型的实验显示：(1) 轨迹不透明评估系统性地不可靠，遗漏了44%的安全违规和13%的鲁棒性失败；(2) 受控错误注入主要降低一致性而非峰值能力，Pass^3下降达24%而Pass@3保持稳定；(3) 多模态性能差异显著，大多数模型在视频任务上表现较差，没有单一模型在所有模态上占主导。

Conclusion: Claw-Eval不仅提供了更可靠的智能体评估框架，还揭示了构建可靠可部署智能体的关键方向，强调了轨迹感知评估和多模态能力平衡的重要性。

Abstract: Large language models are increasingly deployed as autonomous agents executing multi-step workflows in real-world software environments. However, existing agent benchmarks suffer from three critical limitations: (1) trajectory-opaque grading that checks only final outputs, (2) underspecified safety and robustness evaluation, and (3) narrow modality coverage and interaction paradigms. We introduce Claw-Eval, an end-to-end evaluation suite addressing all three gaps. It comprises 300 human-verified tasks spanning 9 categories across three groups (general service orchestration, multimodal perception and generation, and multi-turn professional dialogue). Every agent action is recorded through three independent evidence channels (execution traces, audit logs, and environment snapshots), enabling trajectory-aware grading over 2,159 fine-grained rubric items. The scoring protocol evaluates Completion, Safety, and Robustness, reporting Average Score, Pass@k, and Pass^k across three trials to distinguish genuine capability from lucky outcomes. Experiments on 14 frontier models reveal that: (1) trajectory-opaque evaluation is systematically unreliable, missing 44% of safety violations and 13% of robustness failures that our hybrid pipeline catches; (2) controlled error injection primarily degrades consistency rather than peak capability, with Pass^3 dropping up to 24% while Pass@3 remains stable; (3) multimodal performance varies sharply, with most models performing poorer on video than on document or image, and no single model dominating across all modalities. Beyond benchmarking, Claw-Eval highlights actionable directions for agent development, shedding light on what it takes to build agents that are not only capable but reliably deployable.

</details>


### [683] [Artificial Intelligence and the Structure of Mathematics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06107)
*Maissam Barkeshli,Michael R. Douglas,Michael H. Freedman*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: AI有望通过分析证明的全局结构来改变数学研究，提供理解数学形式结构的新途径，并可能回答数学是发现还是发明这一哲学问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: AI的进步为数学带来了变革性能力，有望帮助解决重大开放问题并自主发现新的数学概念。本文探讨AI如何通过分析证明的全局结构来理解数学的形式结构，这可能为数学基础结构提供新的视角。

Method: 提出基于通用证明和结构超图的形式数学结构框架，并概述能够实现自动数学发现的AI模型所需的主要成分和标准。计划让AI智能体探索柏拉图式数学世界。

Result: 提出了一个理解数学形式结构的新框架，并设想了AI在数学发现中的潜在作用。虽然没有具体的实验结果，但提出了理论框架和未来研究方向。

Conclusion: AI可能通过探索数学的形式结构为我们提供对数学本质的新理解，包括数学是发现还是发明这一哲学问题。AI智能体探索柏拉图式数学世界可能揭示数学的整体结构以及人类可理解的部分。

Abstract: Recent progress in artificial intelligence (AI) is unlocking transformative capabilities for mathematics. There is great hope that AI will help solve major open problems and autonomously discover new mathematical concepts. In this essay, we further consider how AI may open a grand perspective on mathematics by forging a new route, complementary to mathematical\textbf{ logic,} to understanding the global structure of formal \textbf{proof}\textbf{s}. We begin by providing a sketch of the formal structure of mathematics in terms of universal proof and structural hypergraphs and discuss questions this raises about the foundational structure of mathematics. We then outline the main ingredients and provide a set of criteria to be satisfied for AI models capable of automated mathematical discovery. As we send AI agents to traverse Platonic mathematical worlds, we expect they will teach us about the nature of mathematics: both as a whole, and the small ribbons conducive to human understanding. Perhaps they will shed light on the old question: "Is mathematics discovered or invented?" Can we grok the terrain of these \textbf{Platonic worlds}?

</details>


### [684] [How LLMs Follow Instructions: Skillful Coordination, Not a Universal Mechanism](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06015)
*Elisabetta Rocchetti,Alfio Ferrara*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 该研究通过诊断性探测发现，指令微调后的语言模型并非通过单一通用机制来遵循指令，而是通过技能性地协调多种语言能力来实现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 指令微调通常被认为赋予语言模型遵循指令的领域通用能力，但其底层机制尚不明确。研究旨在探究指令遵循是依赖单一通用机制还是组合性技能部署。

Method: 在三个指令微调模型上，对九个多样化任务进行诊断性探测分析。包括：1）比较通用探测与任务特定专家的性能；2）分析跨任务迁移能力；3）进行因果消融实验；4）分析任务在不同层的分层情况；5）进行时间动态分析。

Result: 1）通用探测始终不如任务特定专家，表明表征共享有限；2）跨任务迁移能力弱且按技能相似性聚类；3）因果消融显示稀疏的非对称依赖而非共享表征；4）任务按复杂度分层，结构约束早期出现，语义任务后期出现；5）时间分析显示约束满足在生成过程中作为动态监控而非预生成规划。

Conclusion: 指令遵循更适合被描述为多种语言能力的技能性协调，而非单一抽象约束检查过程的部署。这表明模型通过组合现有技能而非发展通用机制来遵循指令。

Abstract: Instruction tuning is commonly assumed to endow language models with a domain-general ability to follow instructions, yet the underlying mechanism remains poorly understood. Does instruction-following rely on a universal mechanism or compositional skill deployment? We investigate this through diagnostic probing across nine diverse tasks in three instruction-tuned models.
  Our analysis provides converging evidence against a universal mechanism. First, general probes trained across all tasks consistently underperform task-specific specialists, indicating limited representational sharing. Second, cross-task transfer is weak and clustered by skill similarity. Third, causal ablation reveals sparse asymmetric dependencies rather than shared representations. Tasks also stratify by complexity across layers, with structural constraints emerging early and semantic tasks emerging late. Finally, temporal analysis shows constraint satisfaction operates as dynamic monitoring during generation rather than pre-generation planning.
  These findings indicate that instruction-following is better characterized as skillful coordination of diverse linguistic capabilities rather than deployment of a single abstract constraint-checking process.

</details>


### [685] [Epistemic Blinding: An Inference-Time Protocol for Auditing Prior Contamination in LLM-Assisted Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06013)
*Michael Cuccarese*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出"认知盲化"协议，在基于LLM的药物靶点优先排序系统中，通过匿名化实体标识符来区分模型输出中数据驱动推理与记忆先验知识的比例，恢复可审计性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM在跨多个生物数据集进行药物靶点优先排序时，其输出会无声地混合数据驱动推理和记忆的实体先验知识，且这种混合比例无法从单一输出中确定，导致无法评估智能体是否遵循研究者设计的分析流程。

Method: 提出认知盲化协议：在推理时将实体标识符替换为匿名代码后再提示LLM，然后将输出与未盲化的对照组进行比较。该方法不使LLM推理确定化，但能测量输出中来自提供数据与模型参数知识的比例。系统还包括LLM引导的评分函数进化优化和盲化智能体推理。

Result: 在四种癌症类型的肿瘤药物靶点优先排序中，盲化改变了16%的top-20预测，同时保持已验证靶点的相同恢复率。在S&P 500股票筛选中，品牌认知偏见在五个随机种子中重塑了30-40%的top-20排名。协议已开源发布。

Conclusion: 认知盲化协议不是为了提高结果质量，而是为了解决LLM输出中数据与记忆知识混合的不可见性问题，恢复分析过程的可审计性，确保智能体遵循研究者设计的分析流程而非依赖记忆偏见。

Abstract: This paper presents epistemic blinding in the context of an agentic system that uses large language models to reason across multiple biological datasets for drug target prioritization. During development, it became apparent that LLM outputs silently blend data-driven inference with memorized priors about named entities - and the blend is invisible: there is no way to determine, from a single output, how much came from the data on the page and how much came from the model's training memory. Epistemic blinding is a simple inference-time protocol that replaces entity identifiers with anonymous codes before prompting, then compares outputs against an unblinded control. The protocol does not make LLM reasoning deterministic, but it restores one critical axis of auditability: measuring how much of an output came from the supplied data versus the model's parametric knowledge. The complete target identification system is described - including LLM-guided evolutionary optimization of scoring functions and blinded agentic reasoning for target rationalization - with demonstration that both stages operate without access to entity identity. In oncology drug target prioritization across four cancer types, blinding changes 16% of top-20 predictions while preserving identical recovery of validated targets. The contamination problem is shown to generalize beyond biology: in S&P 500 equity screening, brand-recognition bias reshapes 30-40% of top-20 rankings across five random seeds. To lower the barrier to adoption, the protocol is released as an open-source tool and as a Claude Code skill that enables one-command epistemic blinding within agentic workflows. The claim is not that blinded analysis produces better results, but that without blinding, there is no way to know to what degree the agent is adhering to the analytical process the researcher designed.

</details>


### [686] [Beyond Compromise: Pareto-Lenient Consensus for Efficient Multi-Preference LLM Alignment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05965)
*Renxuan Tan,Rongpeng Li,Zhifeng Zhao,Honggang Zhang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出Pareto-Lenient Consensus (PLC)框架，通过共识驱动的宽松梯度修正，允许局部性能退化以换取联盟盈余，从而逃离局部次优均衡并探索远端帕累托前沿


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有多目标偏好对齐方法主要依赖静态线性标量化或刚性梯度投影，这些方法通过强制冲突避免或同步下降，往往过早收敛到局部平稳点，牺牲了潜在的全局帕累托改进

Method: 提出Pareto-Lenient Consensus (PLC)博弈论框架，将对齐重新构想为动态协商过程，引入共识驱动的宽松梯度修正，动态容忍局部退化，前提是有足够的优势联盟盈余

Result: 理论分析验证PLC能够促进僵局逃离并渐近收敛到帕累托共识均衡；大量实验表明PLC在固定偏好对齐和全局帕累托前沿质量方面均超越基线方法

Conclusion: PLC框架突破了现有多目标偏好对齐方法的局限性，展示了协商驱动对齐作为MPA有前景的研究方向

Abstract: Transcending the single-preference paradigm, aligning LLMs with diverse human values is pivotal for robust deployment. Contemporary Multi-Objective Preference Alignment (MPA) approaches predominantly rely on static linear scalarization or rigid gradient projection to navigate these trade-offs. However, by enforcing strict conflict avoidance or simultaneous descent, these paradigms often prematurely converge to local stationary points. While mathematically stable, these points represent a conservative compromise where the model sacrifices potential global Pareto improvements to avoid transient local trade-offs. To break this deadlock, we propose Pareto-Lenient Consensus (PLC), a game-theoretic framework that reimagines alignment as a dynamic negotiation process. Unlike rigid approaches, PLC introduces consensus-driven lenient gradient rectification, which dynamically tolerates local degradation provided there is a sufficient dominant coalition surplus, thereby empowering the optimization trajectory to escape local suboptimal equilibrium and explore the distal Pareto-optimal frontier. Theoretical analysis validates PLC can facilitate stalemate escape and asymptotically converge to a Pareto consensus equilibrium. Moreover, extensive experiments show that PLC surpasses baselines in both fixed-preference alignment and global Pareto frontier quality. This work highlights the potential of negotiation-driven alignment as a promising avenue for MPA. Our codes are available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/aaa-6BB8.

</details>


### [687] [Towards Trustworthy Report Generation: A Deep Research Agent with Progressive Confidence Estimation and Calibration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05952)
*Yi Yuan,Xuhong Wang,Shanzhe Lei*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出一种具有渐进置信度估计与校准功能的新型深度研究智能体，用于生成可信赖的研究报告，解决现有评估框架无法有效衡量开放研究场景中内容可信度的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有深度研究智能体能够自动生成多领域研究报告，但当前基于主观维度的评估框架无法有效衡量报告的可信度。在开放研究场景中，由于缺乏真实答案，现有方法难以评估生成内容的认知置信度，导致校准困难，用户容易受到误导或虚假信息的影响。

Method: 提出一种新型深度研究智能体，在报告生成流程中整合渐进置信度估计与校准机制。系统采用深思熟虑的搜索模型，结合深度检索和多跳推理，确保输出基于可验证的证据，并为每个主张分配置信度分数。通过精心设计的工作流程，生成具有增强透明度的可信赖报告。

Result: 实验结果表明，该方法显著提高了报告的可解释性，并大幅增强了用户信任度。案例研究进一步验证了系统在生成可信赖报告方面的有效性。

Conclusion: 通过整合渐进置信度估计与校准机制，提出的深度研究智能体能够生成更可信赖的研究报告，有效解决了开放研究场景中内容可信度评估的挑战，为自动化研究系统提供了更可靠的解决方案。

Abstract: As agent-based systems continue to evolve, deep research agents are capable of automatically generating research-style reports across diverse domains. While these agents promise to streamline information synthesis and knowledge exploration, existing evaluation frameworks-typically based on subjective dimensions-fail to capture a critical aspect of report quality: trustworthiness. In open-ended research scenarios where ground-truth answers are unavailable, current evaluation methods cannot effectively measure the epistemic confidence of generated content, making calibration difficult and leaving users susceptible to misleading or hallucinated information. To address this limitation, we propose a novel deep research agent that incorporates progressive confidence estimation and calibration within the report generation pipeline. Our system leverages a deliberative search model, featuring deep retrieval and multi-hop reasoning to ground outputs in verifiable evidence while assigning confidence scores to individual claims. Combined with a carefully designed workflow, this approach produces trustworthy reports with enhanced transparency. Experimental results and case studies demonstrate that our method substantially improves interpretability and significantly increases user trust.

</details>


### [688] [HybridKV: Hybrid KV Cache Compression for Efficient Multimodal Large Language Model Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05887)
*Bowen Zeng,Feiyang Ren,Jun Zhang,Xiaoling Gu,Ke Chen,Lidan Shou,Huan Li*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: HybridKV是一个混合KV缓存压缩框架，通过分层预算分配和针对不同注意力头的差异化压缩策略，显著减少多模态大语言模型的KV缓存内存占用和加速解码。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多模态大语言模型在推理时面临KV缓存快速增长的问题，每个视觉输入会扩展为数千个token，导致缓存随上下文长度线性增长并持续占用GPU内存，造成高昂的内存开销和延迟。

Method: 提出HybridKV混合KV缓存压缩框架，包含三个阶段：1) 使用文本中心注意力将注意力头分类为静态或动态类型；2) 采用自上而下的分层预算分配方案分配KV预算；3) 静态头通过文本优先剪枝压缩，动态头通过分块检索压缩。

Result: 在11个多模态基准测试中，使用Qwen2.5-VL-7B模型，HybridKV将KV缓存内存减少高达7.9倍，解码速度提升1.52倍，性能几乎无下降甚至优于完整缓存MLLM。

Conclusion: HybridKV通过考虑注意力头的异构行为并采用差异化压缩策略，有效解决了MLLM中KV缓存的内存和延迟问题，为高效多模态推理提供了实用解决方案。

Abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have advanced unified reasoning over text, images, and videos, but their inference is hindered by the rapid growth of key-value (KV) caches. Each visual input expands into thousands of tokens, causing caches to scale linearly with context length and remain resident in GPU memory throughout decoding, which leads to prohibitive memory overhead and latency even on high-end GPUs. A common solution is to compress caches under a fixed allocated budget at different granularities: token-level uniformly discards less important tokens, layer-level varies retention across layers, and head-level redistributes budgets across heads. Yet these approaches stop at allocation and overlook the heterogeneous behaviors of attention heads that require distinct compression strategies. We propose HybridKV, a hybrid KV cache compression framework that integrates complementary strategies in three stages: heads are first classified into static or dynamic types using text-centric attention; then a top-down budget allocation scheme hierarchically assigns KV budgets; finally, static heads are compressed by text-prior pruning and dynamic heads by chunk-wise retrieval. Experiments on 11 multimodal benchmarks with Qwen2.5-VL-7B show that HybridKV reduces KV cache memory by up to $7.9\times$ and achieves $1.52\times$ faster decoding, with almost no performance drop or even higher relative to the full-cache MLLM.

</details>


### [689] [Joint Knowledge Base Completion and Question Answering by Combining Large Language Models and Small Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05875)
*Yinan Liu,Dongying Lin,Sigang Luo,Xiaochun Yang,Bin Wang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: JCQL框架结合LLM和SLM优势，通过迭代方式联合增强知识库补全(KBC)和知识库问答(KBQA)任务


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究通常依赖小语言模型(SLM)联合增强KBC和KBQA，忽略了大型语言模型(LLM)的强大推理能力。KBC和KBQA是密切相关且内在互补的任务，联合解决这两个任务可以使它们相互增强

Method: 提出JCQL框架：1) KBC增强KBQA：将SLM训练的KBC模型作为LLM智能体的动作，增强基于LLM智能体的KBQA模型的推理路径，缓解LLM的幻觉和高计算成本问题；2) KBQA增强KBC：利用KBQA的推理路径作为补充训练数据，增量微调KBC模型，提升SLM在KBC中的能力

Result: 在两个公共基准数据集上的大量实验表明，JCQL在KBC和KBQA任务上都超越了所有基线方法

Conclusion: 通过结合LLM和SLM的优势，JCQL框架能够以迭代方式使KBC和KBQA任务相互增强，取得了显著性能提升

Abstract: Knowledge Bases (KBs) play a key role in various applications. As two representative KB-related tasks, knowledge base completion (KBC) and knowledge base question answering (KBQA) are closely related and inherently complementary with each other. Thus, it will be beneficial to solve the task of joint KBC and KBQA to make them reinforce each other. However, existing studies usually rely on the small language model (SLM) to enhance them jointly, and the large language model (LLM)'s strong reasoning ability is ignored. In this paper, by combining the strengths of the LLM with the SLM, we propose a novel framework JCQL, which can make these two tasks enhance each other in an iterative manner. To make KBC enhance KBQA, we augment the LLM agent-based KBQA model's reasoning paths by incorporating an SLM-trained KBC model as an action of the agent, alleviating the LLM's hallucination and high computational costs issue in KBQA. To make KBQA enhance KBC, we incrementally fine-tune the KBC model by leveraging KBQA's reasoning paths as its supplementary training data, improving the ability of the SLM in KBC. Extensive experiments over two public benchmark data sets demonstrate that JCQL surpasses all baselines for both KBC and KBQA tasks.

</details>


### [690] [When Do We Need LLMs? A Diagnostic for Language-Driven Bandits](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05859)
*Uljad Berdica,Fernando Acero,Anton Ipsen,Parisa Zehtabi,Michael Cashmore,Manuela Veloso*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: LLMP-UCB算法利用LLM进行不确定性估计，但实验表明轻量级数值bandit在文本嵌入上表现相当或更好，成本更低；嵌入维度可调节探索-利用平衡，并提出几何诊断指导LLM与轻量级bandit的选择。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决上下文多臂老虎机问题中LLM推理成本高、不确定性估计困难的问题，为金融领域的推荐系统、动态投资组合调整等应用提供成本效益高的决策框架。

Method: 提出LLMP-UCB算法通过重复推理从LLM获取不确定性估计；同时探索轻量级数值bandit在文本嵌入（密集或Matryoshka嵌入）上的应用；使用嵌入维度作为探索-利用平衡的调节杠杆；提出基于臂嵌入的几何诊断方法。

Result: 轻量级数值bandit在文本嵌入上的表现与LLM-based解决方案相当或更好，成本显著降低；嵌入维度可有效调节探索-利用平衡，实现成本-性能权衡；几何诊断方法能有效指导何时使用LLM驱动推理或轻量级数值bandit。

Conclusion: 为金融服务的AI应用提供了成本效益高、不确定性感知的决策部署框架，强调轻量级解决方案的实用价值，并为实践者提供了选择LLM与轻量级bandit的指导原则。

Abstract: We study Contextual Multi-Armed Bandits (CMABs) for non-episodic sequential decision making problems where the context includes both textual and numerical information (e.g., recommendation systems, dynamic portfolio adjustments, offer selection; all frequent problems in finance). While Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly applied to these settings, utilizing LLMs for reasoning at every decision step is computationally expensive and uncertainty estimates are difficult to obtain. To address this, we introduce LLMP-UCB, a bandit algorithm that derives uncertainty estimates from LLMs via repeated inference. However, our experiments demonstrate that lightweight numerical bandits operating on text embeddings (dense or Matryoshka) match or exceed the accuracy of LLM-based solutions at a fraction of their cost. We further show that embedding dimensionality is a practical lever on the exploration-exploitation balance, enabling cost--performance tradeoffs without prompt complexity. Finally, to guide practitioners, we propose a geometric diagnostic based on the arms' embedding to decide when to use LLM-driven reasoning versus a lightweight numerical bandit. Our results provide a principled deployment framework for cost-effective, uncertainty-aware decision systems with broad applicability across AI use cases in financial services.

</details>


### [691] [Hierarchical Reinforcement Learning with Augmented Step-Level Transitions for LLM Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05808)
*Shuai Zhen,Yanhua Yu,Ruopei Guo,Nan Cheng,Yang Deng*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: STEP-HRL是一个分层强化学习框架，通过仅基于单步转移而非完整交互历史进行步级学习，解决了LLM智能体依赖长交互历史导致计算成本高和可扩展性有限的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM智能体通常依赖越来越长的交互历史，导致高计算成本和有限的可扩展性。需要一种方法能够在不依赖完整历史的情况下进行有效决策。

Method: 提出STEP-HRL分层强化学习框架：1）将任务分层结构化，使用完成的子任务表示整体任务的全局进度；2）引入本地进度模块，迭代选择性地总结每个子任务内的交互历史，产生紧凑的本地进度摘要；3）这些组件共同为高层和低层策略生成增强的步级转移。

Result: 在ScienceWorld和ALFWorld基准测试中，STEP-HRL在性能和泛化能力方面显著优于基线方法，同时减少了token使用量。

Conclusion: STEP-HRL通过步级学习和分层结构，有效解决了LLM智能体对长交互历史的依赖问题，在保持高性能的同时显著降低了计算成本，提高了可扩展性。

Abstract: Large language model (LLM) agents have demonstrated strong capabilities in complex interactive decision-making tasks. However, existing LLM agents typically rely on increasingly long interaction histories, resulting in high computational cost and limited scalability. In this paper, we propose STEP-HRL, a hierarchical reinforcement learning (HRL) framework that enables step-level learning by conditioning only on single-step transitions rather than full interaction histories. STEP-HRL structures tasks hierarchically, using completed subtasks to represent global progress of overall task. By introducing a local progress module, it also iteratively and selectively summarizes interaction history within each subtask to produce a compact summary of local progress. Together, these components yield augmented step-level transitions for both high-level and low-level policies. Experimental results on ScienceWorld and ALFWorld benchmarks consistently demonstrate that STEP-HRL substantially outperforms baselines in terms of performance and generalization while reducing token usage. Our code is available at https://github.com/TonyStark042/STEP-HRL.

</details>


### [692] [Vision-Guided Iterative Refinement for Frontend Code Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05839)
*Hannah Sansford,Derek H. C. Law,Wei Liu,Abhishek Tripathi,Niresh Agarwal,Gerrit J. J. van den Burg*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出一个完全自动化的批评者循环框架，使用视觉语言模型作为视觉批评者对渲染的网页提供结构化反馈，指导生成代码的迭代优化，在WebDev Arena数据集上实现最高17.8%的性能提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 基于大语言模型的代码生成通常依赖多阶段人工循环优化，这种方法有效但成本高昂，特别是在前端网页开发这种解决方案质量依赖于渲染视觉输出的领域。

Method: 1. 构建完全自动化的批评者循环框架，其中视觉语言模型作为视觉批评者对渲染的网页提供结构化反馈；2. 使用LoRA进行参数高效微调，研究批评者提供的改进能否被代码生成LLM内化。

Result: 1. 在WebDev Arena数据集的真实用户请求中，该方法带来一致的解决方案质量改进，经过三个优化周期实现最高17.8%的性能提升；2. 微调实现了最佳批评者循环解决方案25%的增益，且没有显著增加token数量。

Conclusion: 基于VLM的前端代码生成自动化批评比单次LLM推理能产生更高质量的解决方案，突显了迭代优化对于网页开发复杂视觉输出的重要性。

Abstract: Code generation with large language models often relies on multi-stage human-in-the-loop refinement, which is effective but very costly - particularly in domains such as frontend web development where the solution quality depends on rendered visual output. We present a fully automated critic-in-the-loop framework in which a vision-language model serves as a visual critic that provides structured feedback on rendered webpages to guide iterative refinement of generated code. Across real-world user requests from the WebDev Arena dataset, this approach yields consistent improvements in solution quality, achieving up to 17.8% increase in performance over three refinement cycles. Next, we investigate parameter-efficient fine-tuning using LoRA to understand whether the improvements provided by the critic can be internalized by the code-generating LLM. Fine-tuning achieves 25% of the gains from the best critic-in-the-loop solution without a significant increase in token counts. Our findings indicate that automated, VLM-based critique of frontend code generation leads to significantly higher quality solutions than can be achieved through a single LLM inference pass, and highlight the importance of iterative refinement for the complex visual outputs associated with web development.

</details>


### [693] [Reciprocal Trust and Distrust in Artificial Intelligence Systems: The Hard Problem of Regulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05826)
*Martino Maggetti*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 论文主张AI系统应被视为具有一定能动性的实体，能够与人类建立信任关系，并探讨这对AI监管的启示


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着AI系统日益普及，政策制定者、科学家和公众面临如何监管AI的复杂问题。核心挑战在于AI的可信度及其影响因素，这对民主治理和AI发展部署至关重要。现有讨论需要进一步深化对AI系统本质的理解。

Method: 通过理论论证，提出AI系统应被视为能够行使某种形式能动性的人工制品，从而能够与人类建立信任或怀疑关系。分析这种双向信任动态对监管机构的影响。

Result: 确立了AI系统作为具有能动性实体的概念框架，识别出双向信任动态对AI监管带来的关键挑战和未解困境。

Conclusion: AI系统的信任关系具有双向性，这为监管带来了新的复杂性。需要解决由此产生的关键紧张关系和未解困境，以指导未来的AI治理框架。

Abstract: Policy makers, scientists, and the public are increasingly confronted with thorny questions about the regulation of artificial intelligence (AI) systems. A key common thread concerns whether AI can be trusted and the factors that can make it more trustworthy in front of stakeholders and users. This is indeed crucial, as the trustworthiness of AI systems is fundamental for both democratic governance and for the development and deployment of AI. This article advances the discussion by arguing that AI systems should also be recognized, as least to some extent, as artifacts capable of exercising a form of agency, thereby enabling them to engage in relationships of trust or distrust with humans. It further examines the implications of these reciprocal trust dynamics for regulators tasked with overseeing AI systems. The article concludes by identifying key tensions and unresolved dilemmas that these dynamics pose for the future of AI regulation and governance.

</details>


### [694] [Part-Level 3D Gaussian Vehicle Generation with Joint and Hinge Axis Estimation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05070)
*Shiyao Qian,Yuan Ren,Dongfeng Bai,Bingbing Liu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出一个从单张或多视角图像生成可动画化3D高斯车辆模型的生成框架，解决现有静态生成方法在部件动画时产生变形的问题


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前自动驾驶仿真框架通常将车辆建模为刚性资产，无法捕捉部件级关节运动。随着感知算法越来越多地利用车轮转向、车门开启等动态信息，需要可动画化的车辆表示。现有的CAD流程受限于库覆盖范围和固定模板，无法忠实重建真实世界实例

Method: 提出生成框架，从单张图像或稀疏多视角输入合成可动画化3D高斯车辆。引入部件边缘细化模块，强制执行高斯所有权排他性；添加运动学推理头，预测可移动部件的关节位置和铰链轴。这两个组件共同实现忠实于部件的仿真

Result: 该方法能够生成可动画化的3D高斯车辆模型，在部件边界处减少变形，提供运动学参数，弥合静态生成与可动画化车辆模型之间的差距

Conclusion: 提出的框架能够从有限输入生成可动画化车辆模型，通过部件边缘细化和运动学推理解决了静态生成方法在动画时的变形问题，为自动驾驶仿真提供了更真实的部件级关节运动表示

Abstract: Simulation is essential for autonomous driving, yet current frameworks often model vehicles as rigid assets and fail to capture part-level articulation. With perception algorithms increasingly leveraging dynamics such as wheel steering or door opening, realistic simulation requires animatable vehicle representations. Existing CAD-based pipelines are limited by library coverage and fixed templates, preventing faithful reconstruction of in-the-wild instances.
  We propose a generative framework that, from a single image or sparse multi-view input, synthesizes an animatable 3D Gaussian vehicle. Our method addresses two challenges: (i) large 3D asset generators are optimized for static quality but not articulation, leading to distortions at part boundaries when animated; and (ii) segmentation alone cannot provide the kinematic parameters required for motion. To overcome this, we introduce a part-edge refinement module that enforces exclusive Gaussian ownership and a kinematic reasoning head that predicts joint positions and hinge axes of movable parts. Together, these components enable faithful part-aware simulation, bridging the gap between static generation and animatable vehicle models.

</details>


### [695] [LUDOBENCH: Evaluating LLM Behavioural Decision-Making Through Spot-Based Board Game Scenarios in Ludo](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05681)
*Ojas Jain,Dhruv Kumar*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: LudoBench是一个用于评估LLM在Ludo游戏中战略推理能力的基准，包含480个手工制作的场景和完整的4玩家模拟器，发现现有模型仅与游戏理论基线达成40-46%的一致率，并表现出两种不同的行为模式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前缺乏评估LLM在具有随机性、多智能体交互和复杂规划需求的游戏环境中战略推理能力的标准化基准。Ludo游戏因其骰子机制、棋子捕获、安全方格导航和归家路径进展等特点，提供了有意义的规划复杂性，适合作为评估平台。

Method: 创建LudoBench基准，包含480个手工制作的场景，覆盖12个行为上不同的决策类别，每个类别隔离特定的战略选择。开发完整的4玩家Ludo模拟器，支持随机、启发式、游戏理论和LLM智能体。游戏理论智能体使用深度受限的期望极小化极大搜索，提供超越贪婪启发式的原则性战略上限。评估了跨越四个模型家族的六个模型。

Result: 所有模型与游戏理论基线的一致率仅为40-46%。模型分裂为两种不同的行为原型：完成者（专注于完成棋子但忽视发展）和建设者（专注于发展但从不完成）。每种原型只捕捉了游戏理论策略的一半。在历史条件怨恨框架下，模型在相同棋盘状态下表现出可测量的行为转变，揭示了提示敏感性是关键脆弱性。

Conclusion: LudoBench为在不确定性下评估LLM战略推理提供了一个轻量级且可解释的框架。现有模型在战略推理方面存在显著缺陷，表现出有限的一致性和可预测的行为模式，提示敏感性是重要脆弱点。该基准有助于系统评估和改进LLM的战略推理能力。

Abstract: We introduce LudoBench, a benchmark for evaluating LLM strategic reasoning in Ludo, a stochastic multi-agent board game whose dice mechanics, piece capture, safe-square navigation, and home-path progression introduce meaningful planning complexity. LudoBench comprises 480 handcrafted spot scenarios across 12 behaviorally distinct decision categories, each isolating a specific strategic choice. We additionally contribute a fully functional 4-player Ludo simulator supporting Random, Heuristic, Game-Theory, and LLM agents. The game-theory agent uses Expectiminimax search with depth-limited lookahead to provide a principled strategic ceiling beyond greedy heuristics. Evaluating six models spanning four model families, we find that all models agree with the game-theory baseline only 40-46% of the time. Models split into distinct behavioral archetypes: finishers that complete pieces but neglect development, and builders that develop but never finish. Each archetype captures only half of the game theory strategy. Models also display measurable behavioral shifts under history-conditioned grudge framing on identical board states, revealing prompt-sensitivity as a key vulnerability. LudoBench provides a lightweight and interpretable framework for benchmarking LLM strategic reasoning under uncertainty. All code, the spot dataset (480 entries) and model outputs are available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/LudoBench-5CBF/

</details>


### [696] [Emergent social transmission of model-based representations without inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05777)
*Silja Keßler,Miriam Bautista-Salinero,Claudio Tennie,Charley M. Wu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 通过强化学习模拟证明，即使没有复杂的心理推断能力，仅凭简单社会线索（如观察专家行动）也能间接传递高级认知表征，支持文化传播的简单机制解释。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索人类如何在有限认知能力下通过他人获取丰富灵活的环境知识，挑战传统认为需要复杂心理推断的观点，验证文化进化理论中简单社会线索支持行为传递的可能性。

Method: 使用强化学习模拟：天真智能体在可重构环境中寻找奖励，分为单独学习或观察专家学习两种条件。学习者不推断心理状态，仅通过启发式选择行动或基于观察行动增强价值表征。比较模型基础学习者在社会暴露下的表现。

Result: 简单社会线索（观察专家行动）会偏置学习者的经验，使其表征向专家表征收敛。模型基础学习者从社会暴露中获益最大，表现出更快的学习速度和更接近专家的表征。非心理推断过程能有效支持文化传播。

Conclusion: 文化传播可以通过简单的非心理推断过程实现，这些过程利用了个体学习机制。社会线索通过偏置经验间接传递高级表征，为人类知识获取提供了计算上更经济的解释。

Abstract: How do people acquire rich, flexible knowledge about their environment from others despite limited cognitive capacity? Humans are often thought to rely on computationally costly mentalizing, such as inferring others' beliefs. In contrast, cultural evolution emphasizes that behavioral transmission can be supported by simple social cues. Using reinforcement learning simulations, we show how minimal social learning can indirectly transmit higher-level representations. We simulate a naïve agent searching for rewards in a reconfigurable environment, learning either alone or by observing an expert - crucially, without inferring mental states. Instead, the learner heuristically selects actions or boosts value representations based on observed actions. Our results demonstrate that these cues bias the learner's experience, causing its representation to converge toward the expert's. Model-based learners benefit most from social exposure, showing faster learning and more expert-like representations. These findings show how cultural transmission can arise from simple, non-mentalizing processes exploiting asocial learning mechanisms.

</details>


### [697] [Can Large Language Models Reinvent Foundational Algorithms?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05716)
*Jian Zhao,Haoren Luo,Yu Wang,Yuhan Cao,Pingyue Sheng,Tianxing He*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: LLMs能否重新发明计算机科学基础算法？通过"遗忘-再发明"流程测试，发现最强模型Qwen3-4B-Thinking-2507在无提示下能重新发明50%算法，但复杂算法即使有逐步提示也难以成功。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究LLMs是否具备基础创新能力，特别是能否重新发明计算机科学中的基础算法，这是评估其创新潜力的关键前提。

Method: 采用"遗忘-再发明"流程：首先使用基于GRPO的策略性遗忘方法从LLM中移除特定基础算法知识，然后在受控环境中测试模型能否重新发明这些算法。实验涵盖10个目标算法、3个强开源模型和3个提示级别。

Result: Qwen3-4B-Thinking-2507模型在无提示下成功重新发明50%算法，一级提示下70%，二级提示下90%。高级提示能提升成功率，但复杂算法即使有逐步提示也难以成功。测试时强化学习使Strassen算法在二级提示下成功重新发明。生成验证器在再发明阶段对维持推理强度、避免"思维崩溃"现象起关键作用。

Conclusion: LLMs具备一定的基础算法重新发明能力，但存在明显局限性。生成验证器对维持推理过程至关重要。研究揭示了LLMs创新思维的潜力和当前限制。

Abstract: LLMs have shown strong potential to advance scientific discovery. Whether they possess the capacity for foundational innovation, however, remains an open question. In this work, we focus on a prerequisite for foundational innovation: can LLMs reinvent foundational algorithms in computer science? Our \textit{Unlearn-and-Reinvent} pipeline applies LLM unlearning to remove a specific foundational algorithm, such as Dijkstra's or Euclid's algorithm, from an LLM's pretrained knowledge, and then tests whether the model can reinvent it in a controlled environment. To enable effective unlearning, we adopt a GRPO-based, on-policy unlearning method. Across 10 target algorithms, 3 strong open-weight models, and 3 hint levels, our experiments demonstrate that (1) the strongest model Qwen3-4B-Thinking-2507 successfully reinvents 50% of the algorithms with no hint, 70% at hint level 1, and 90% at hint level 2; (2) a few high-level hints can enhance the reinvention success rate, but even step-by-step hints fail for those complicated algorithms; and (3) test-time reinforcement learning enables successful reinvention for the Strassen algorithm at hint level 2. Through analyses of output trajectories and ablation studies, we find that generative verifier in the reinvention phase plays a critical role in sustaining models' reasoning strength, helping to avoid the ``thought collapse'' phenomenon. These findings offer insights into both the potential and current limits of LLMs' innovative thinking.

</details>


### [698] [Thinking Diffusion: Penalize and Guide Visual-Grounded Reasoning in Diffusion Multimodal Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05497)
*Keuntae Kim,Mingyu Kang,Yong Suk Choi*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 该论文针对扩散多模态大语言模型在思维链推理中的两个关键问题：过早生成最终答案和视觉信息利用不足，提出了位置与步数惩罚和视觉推理引导两种方法，显著提升了推理性能并加速了推理过程。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 扩散多模态大语言模型结合思维链推理时存在两个关键问题：1）模型在推理早期就生成最终答案，导致推理不充分；2）模型在初始时间步对视觉提示的依赖度很低，视觉信息利用模式与自回归视觉语言模型存在根本差异。这些问题导致dMLLMs倾向于在未充分基于视觉输入的情况下生成过早的最终答案。

Method: 提出了两种方法：1）位置与步数惩罚：在早期时间步对后续位置的token进行惩罚，延迟过早的答案生成，鼓励跨时间步的渐进推理；2）视觉推理引导：受无分类器引导启发，放大视觉基础信号以增强模型与视觉证据的对齐。

Result: 在各种dMLLMs上的广泛实验表明，该方法实现了高达7.5%的准确率提升，同时相比使用四倍扩散步数的推理实现了超过3倍的加速。

Conclusion: 提出的PSP和VRG方法有效解决了dMLLMs在思维链推理中的过早答案生成和视觉信息利用不足问题，显著提升了推理性能并加速了推理过程，为扩散多模态大语言模型的优化提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: Diffusion large language models (dLLMs) are emerging as promising alternatives to autoregressive (AR) LLMs. Recently, this paradigm has been extended to multimodal tasks, leading to the development of diffusion multimodal large language models (dMLLMs). These models are expected to retain the reasoning capabilities of LLMs while enabling faster inference through parallel generation. However, when combined with Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning, dMLLMs exhibit two critical issues. First, we observe that dMLLMs often generate the final answer token at a very early timestep. This trend indicates that the model determines the answer before sufficient reasoning, leading to degraded reasoning performance. Second, during the initial timesteps, dMLLMs show minimal dependency on visual prompts, exhibiting a fundamentally different pattern of visual information utilization compared to AR vision-language models. In summary, these findings indicate that dMLLMs tend to generate premature final answers without sufficiently grounding on visual inputs. To address these limitations, we propose Position and Step Penalty (PSP) and Visual Reasoning Guidance (VRG). PSP penalizes tokens in later positions during early timesteps, delaying premature answer generation and encouraging progressive reasoning across timesteps. VRG, inspired by classifier-free guidance, amplifies visual grounding signals to enhance the model's alignment with visual evidence. Extensive experiments across various dMLLMs demonstrate that our method achieves up to 7.5% higher accuracy while delivering more than 3x speedup compared to reasoning with four times more diffusion steps.

</details>


### [699] [QA-MoE: Towards a Continuous Reliability Spectrum with Quality-Aware Mixture of Experts for Robust Multimodal Sentiment Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05704)
*Yitong Zhu,Yuxuan Jiang,Guanxuan Jiang,Bojing Hou,Peng Yuan Zhou,Ge Lin Kan,Yuyang Wang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出QA-MoE框架，通过自监督的认知不确定性量化模态可靠性，统一处理模态缺失和质量退化问题，实现连续可靠性条件下的多模态情感分析。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现实场景中多模态输入常受动态噪声或模态缺失影响，现有方法将其视为离散情况或假设固定损坏比例，限制了在连续变化可靠性条件下的适应性。

Method: 首先引入连续可靠性谱统一缺失和质量退化问题，然后提出QA-MoE框架，通过自监督认知不确定性量化模态可靠性，明确指导专家路由，抑制不可靠信号的误差传播同时保留任务相关信息。

Result: 大量实验表明，QA-MoE在各种退化场景下取得竞争性或最先进的性能，并在实践中展现出有前景的"一个检查点适用所有"特性。

Conclusion: QA-MoE通过连续可靠性谱和基于不确定性的专家路由机制，有效解决了多模态情感分析中动态噪声和模态缺失的挑战，提升了模型在现实场景中的鲁棒性和适应性。

Abstract: Multimodal Sentiment Analysis (MSA) aims to infer human sentiment from textual, acoustic, and visual signals. In real-world scenarios, however, multimodal inputs are often compromised by dynamic noise or modality missingness. Existing methods typically treat these imperfections as discrete cases or assume fixed corruption ratios, which limits their adaptability to continuously varying reliability conditions. To address this, we first introduce a Continuous Reliability Spectrum to unify missingness and quality degradation into a single framework. Building on this, we propose QA-MoE, a Quality-Aware Mixture-of-Experts framework that quantifies modality reliability via self-supervised aleatoric uncertainty. This mechanism explicitly guides expert routing, enabling the model to suppress error propagation from unreliable signals while preserving task-relevant information. Extensive experiments indicate that QA-MoE achieves competitive or state-of-the-art performance across diverse degradation scenarios and exhibits a promising One-Checkpoint-for-All property in practice.

</details>


### [700] [PECKER: A Precisely Efficient Critical Knowledge Erasure Recipe For Machine Unlearning in Diffusion Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05634)
*Zhiyong Ma,Zhitao Deng,Huan Tang,Jialin Chen,Zhijun Zheng,Zhengping Li,Qingyuan Chuai*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: PECKER是一种高效的机器遗忘方法，通过显著性掩码优先更新对遗忘目标数据贡献最大的参数，减少不必要的梯度计算，在保持遗忘效果的同时显著缩短训练时间。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有机器遗忘方法虽然有效，但存在训练时间和计算开销过大的问题，根源在于梯度更新方向不佳，降低了训练效率并破坏收敛稳定性。

Method: 在蒸馏框架中引入显著性掩码，优先更新对遗忘目标数据贡献最大的参数，减少不必要的梯度计算，从而缩短整体训练时间而不牺牲遗忘效果。

Result: 在CIFAR-10和STL-10数据集上，PECKER能够更快地生成遗忘相关类别或概念的样本，同时与真实图像分布紧密对齐，在类别遗忘和概念遗忘任务上都实现了更短的训练时间。

Conclusion: PECKER是一种高效的机器遗忘方法，能够匹配或超越现有方法，通过优化梯度更新方向显著减少计算开销，为GenAI模型的安全合规操作提供了实用解决方案。

Abstract: Machine unlearning (MU) has become a critical technique for GenAI models' safe and compliant operation. While existing MU methods are effective, most impose prohibitive training time and computational overhead. Our analysis suggests the root cause lies in poorly directed gradient updates, which reduce training efficiency and destabilize convergence. To mitigate these issues, we propose PECKER, an efficient MU approach that matches or outperforms prevailing methods. Within a distillation framework, PECKER introduces a saliency mask to prioritize updates to parameters that contribute most to forgetting the targeted data, thereby reducing unnecessary gradient computation and shortening overall training time without sacrificing unlearning efficacy. Our method generates samples that unlearn related class or concept more quickly, while closely aligning with the true image distribution on CIFAR-10 and STL-10 datasets, achieving shorter training times for both class forgetting and concept forgetting.

</details>


### [701] [Beyond Behavior: Why AI Evaluation Needs a Cognitive Revolution](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05631)
*Amir Konigsberg*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 该论文认为图灵测试不仅是一种实用简化，更是一种认识论承诺，即仅通过行为证据来评估智能，这种承诺限制了AI研究70年，使其无法探究智能的内部过程和机制，需要进行类似心理学中行为主义到认知主义的认识论转变。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 论文旨在揭示图灵测试背后的认识论承诺如何长期约束AI研究，使其无法探究智能的内部机制和计算过程，从而限制了该领域对智能本质的理解。

Method: 通过历史分析追溯图灵行为认识论如何嵌入AI评估基础设施，并与心理学中行为主义到认知主义的转变进行结构类比，论证行为证据的局限性。

Result: 图灵的行为认识论使AI领域无法询问关于过程、机制和内部组织的重要问题，这些问题是认知心理学、神经科学等相关学科能够探讨的，导致AI无法区分通过不同计算过程实现相同输出的系统。

Conclusion: AI领域需要进行类似认知革命的认识论转变，认识到行为证据本身不足以支持该领域希望做出的建构性主张，需要发展后行为主义的认识论框架来探究智能的内部机制。

Abstract: In 1950, Alan Turing proposed replacing the question "Can machines think?" with a behavioral test: if a machine's outputs are indistinguishable from those of a thinking being, the question of whether it truly thinks can be set aside. This paper argues that Turing's move was not only a pragmatic simplification but also an epistemological commitment, a decision about what kind of evidence counts as relevant to intelligence attribution, and that this commitment has quietly constrained AI research for seven decades. We trace how Turing's behavioral epistemology became embedded in the field's evaluative infrastructure, rendering unaskable a class of questions about process, mechanism, and internal organization that cognitive psychology, neuroscience, and related disciplines learned to ask. We draw a structural parallel to the behaviorist-to-cognitivist transition in psychology: just as psychology's commitment to studying only observable behavior prevented it from asking productive questions about internal mental processes until that commitment was abandoned, AI's commitment to behavioral evaluation prevents it from distinguishing between systems that achieve identical outputs through fundamentally different computational processes, a distinction on which intelligence attribution depends. We argue that the field requires an epistemological transition comparable to the cognitive revolution: not an abandonment of behavioral evidence, but a recognition that behavioral evidence alone is insufficient for the construct claims the field wishes to make. We articulate what a post-behaviorist epistemology for AI would involve and identify the specific questions it would make askable that the field currently has no way to ask.

</details>


### [702] [Label Effects: Shared Heuristic Reliance in Trust Assessment by Humans and LLM-as-a-Judge](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05593)
*Xin Sun,Di Wu,Sijing Qin,Isao Echizen,Abdallah El Ali,Saku Sugawara*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 研究发现人类和LLM评估者都会因信息标注的来源标签而产生偏见，对标注为"人类创作"的内容给予更高信任度，即使内容完全相同。这种标签偏见在人类眼动数据和LLM内部状态分析中都得到证实。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 挑战LLM作为自动评估者（LLM-as-a-Judge）的可靠性，揭示其评估结果会受到披露的来源标签偏见影响。研究旨在验证人类和LLM评估者是否都会对标注为人类创作的内容给予更高信任度，即使内容完全相同。

Method: 采用反事实设计，比较相同内容在不同来源标签（人类创作 vs AI生成）下的信任评估。收集人类眼动数据以分析注意力模式，同时分析LLM内部状态，包括注意力分配和决策不确定性（通过logits测量）。

Result: 人类和LLM评估者都对标注为人类创作的内容给予更高信任度。眼动数据显示人类严重依赖来源标签作为启发式线索。LLM内部状态分析显示，模型在不同标签条件下对标签区域的注意力密度都高于内容区域，且在人类标签下的标签主导性更强。AI标签下的决策不确定性高于人类标签。

Conclusion: 来源标签是人类和LLM评估者的显著启发式线索。这对标签敏感的LLM-as-a-Judge评估的有效性提出了质疑。研究谨慎指出，将模型与人类偏好对齐可能会将人类的启发式依赖传播到模型中，这促使需要去偏见的评估和对齐方法。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used as automated evaluators (LLM-as-a-Judge). This work challenges its reliability by showing that trust judgments by LLMs are biased by disclosed source labels. Using a counterfactual design, we find that both humans and LLM judges assign higher trust to information labeled as human-authored than to the same content labeled as AI-generated. Eye-tracking data reveal that humans rely heavily on source labels as heuristic cues for judgments. We analyze LLM internal states during judgment. Across label conditions, models allocate denser attention to the label region than the content region, and this label dominance is stronger under Human labels than AI labels, consistent with the human gaze patterns. Besides, decision uncertainty measured by logits is higher under AI labels than Human labels. These results indicate that the source label is a salient heuristic cue for both humans and LLMs. It raises validity concerns for label-sensitive LLM-as-a-Judge evaluation, and we cautiously raise that aligning models with human preferences may propagate human heuristic reliance into models, motivating debiased evaluation and alignment.

</details>


### [703] [LatentAudit: Real-Time White-Box Faithfulness Monitoring for Retrieval-Augmented Generation with Verifiable Deployment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05358)
*Zhe Yu,Wenpeng Xing,Meng Han*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: LatentAudit：基于残差流几何的白盒审计器，通过测量生成器激活与证据表示的Mahalanobis距离来实时监测RAG系统的忠实性，无需额外判断模型，支持公开验证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: RAG系统虽能减轻幻觉但无法完全消除，需要在推理时判断答案是否真正得到检索证据的支持。现有方法需要额外判断模型或复杂校准，缺乏实时、可验证的解决方案。

Method: 提出LatentAudit白盒审计器：汇集开放权重生成器中后层残差流激活，计算其与证据表示的Mahalanobis距离，形成二次判别规则。该方法无需辅助判断模型，可在生成时运行，仅需少量保留集进行校准。

Result: 在PubMedQA上使用Llama-3-8B达到0.942 AUROC，延迟仅0.77ms。跨三个QA基准和五个模型家族保持稳定性能，在包含矛盾、检索缺失和部分支持噪声的四重压力测试中，PubMedQA达到0.9566-0.9815 AUROC，HotpotQA达到0.9142-0.9315 AUROC。16位定点精度下保持99.8%的FP16 AUROC性能。

Conclusion: 残差流几何携带可用的忠实性信号，该信号能经受架构变化和实际检索失败，且同一规则支持公开验证。这为实时RAG忠实性监测和可选的可验证部署提供了实用基础。

Abstract: Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) mitigates hallucination but does not eliminate it: a deployed system must still decide, at inference time, whether its answer is actually supported by the retrieved evidence. We introduce LatentAudit, a white-box auditor that pools mid-to-late residual-stream activations from an open-weight generator and measures their Mahalanobis distance to the evidence representation. The resulting quadratic rule requires no auxiliary judge model, runs at generation time, and is simple enough to calibrate on a small held-out set. We show that residual-stream geometry carries a usable faithfulness signal, that this signal survives architecture changes and realistic retrieval failures, and that the same rule remains amenable to public verification. On PubMedQA with Llama-3-8B, LatentAudit reaches 0.942 AUROC with 0.77,ms overhead. Across three QA benchmarks and five model families (Llama-2/3, Qwen-2.5/3, Mistral), the monitor remains stable; under a four-way stress test with contradictions, retrieval misses, and partial-support noise, it reaches 0.9566--0.9815 AUROC on PubMedQA and 0.9142--0.9315 on HotpotQA. At 16-bit fixed-point precision, the audit rule preserves 99.8% of the FP16 AUROC, enabling Groth16-based public verification without revealing model weights or activations. Together, these results position residual-stream geometry as a practical basis for real-time RAG faithfulness monitoring and optional verifiable deployment.

</details>


### [704] [A canonical generalization of OBDD](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05537)
*Florent Capelli,YooJung Choi,Stefan Mengel,Martín Muñoz,Guy Van den Broeck*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: TDD是布尔函数的新模型，扩展了OBDD，作为结构化d-DNNF的限制，具有与OBDD相同的可处理性但更简洁，能对树宽k的CNF公式实现FPT大小的表示


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: OBDD在表示某些CNF公式时存在大小限制，特别是树宽k的CNF公式无法用FPT大小的OBDD表示。需要一种更强大的表示模型，既能保持OBDD的可处理性，又能更简洁地表示更广泛的布尔函数

Method: 引入树决策图(TDD)作为布尔函数模型，它是结构化d-DNNF的限制形式（尊重vtree T）。研究TDD的编译复杂性，特别是通过自底向上编译将CNF公式编译为确定性TDD，并将该方法与Bova和Szeider引入的因子宽度概念联系起来

Result: TDD具有与OBDD相同的可处理性（模型计数、枚举、条件化和应用），但更简洁。特别地，树宽k的CNF公式可以用FPT大小的TDD表示，而这对OBDD是不可能的。自底向上编译的复杂性与因子宽度概念相关

Conclusion: TDD是OBDD的有效推广，保持了OBDD的所有可处理性优点，同时能够更简洁地表示更广泛的布尔函数类，特别是解决了OBDD无法用FPT大小表示树宽k的CNF公式的限制

Abstract: We introduce Tree Decision Diagrams (TDD) as a model for Boolean functions that generalizes OBDD. They can be seen as a restriction of structured d-DNNF; that is, d-DNNF that respect a vtree $T$. We show that TDDs enjoy the same tractability properties as OBDD, such as model counting, enumeration, conditioning, and apply, and are more succinct. In particular, we show that CNF formulas of treewidth $k$ can be represented by TDDs of FPT size, which is known to be impossible for OBDD. We study the complexity of compiling CNF formulas into deterministic TDDs via bottom-up compilation and relate the complexity of this approach with the notion of factor width introduced by Bova and Szeider.

</details>


### [705] [Experience Transfer for Multimodal LLM Agents in Minecraft Game](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05533)
*Chenghao Li,Jun Liu,Songbo Zhang,Huadong Jian,Hao Ni,Lik-Hang Lee,Sung-Ho Bae,Guoqing Wang,Yang Yang,Chaoning Zhang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: Echo是一个面向迁移的记忆框架，通过将可重用知识分解为五个维度，帮助多模态LLM智能体从先前经验中提取可操作知识，在复杂游戏环境中实现经验迁移和任务加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多模态LLM智能体在复杂游戏环境中需要持续重用过去经验来高效解决新任务。现有方法通常将记忆视为静态记录的被动存储库，缺乏明确的经验迁移机制，导致智能体无法有效识别和重用跨任务的模式。

Method: 提出Echo框架，将可重用知识分解为五个维度：结构、属性、过程、功能和交互。基于此框架，采用上下文类比学习（ICAL）来检索相关经验并通过上下文示例将其适配到未见任务。

Result: 在Minecraft实验中，从零开始学习设置下，Echo在对象解锁任务上实现了1.3倍到1.7倍的加速。此外，Echo表现出爆发式链式解锁现象，在获得可迁移经验后短时间内快速解锁多个相似物品。

Conclusion: 经验迁移是提高多模态LLM智能体在复杂交互环境中效率和适应性的有前景方向。Echo框架通过明确的知识分解和上下文类比学习，使智能体能够有效识别跨任务模式并重用先前经验。

Abstract: Multimodal LLM agents operating in complex game environments must continually reuse past experience to solve new tasks efficiently. In this work, we propose Echo, a transfer-oriented memory framework that enables agents to derive actionable knowledge from prior interactions rather than treating memory as a passive repository of static records. To make transfer explicit, Echo decomposes reusable knowledge into five dimensions: structure, attribute, process, function, and interaction. This formulation allows the agent to identify recurring patterns shared across different tasks and infer what prior experience remains applicable in new situations. Building on this formulation, Echo leverages In-Context Analogy Learning (ICAL) to retrieve relevant experiences and adapt them to unseen tasks through contextual examples. Experiments in Minecraft show that, under a from-scratch learning setting, Echo achieves a 1.3x to 1.7x speed-up on object-unlocking tasks. Moreover, Echo exhibits a burst-like chain-unlocking phenomenon, rapidly unlocking multiple similar items within a short time interval after acquiring transferable experience. These results suggest that experience transfer is a promising direction for improving the efficiency and adaptability of multimodal LLM agents in complex interactive environments.

</details>


### [706] [Inventory of the 12 007 Low-Dimensional Pseudo-Boolean Landscapes Invariant to Rank, Translation, and Rotation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05530)
*Arnaud Liefooghe,Sébastien Verel*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 该论文提出了比传统秩不变性更强的"秩景观不变性"概念，对伪布尔函数在1、2、3维情况下的不变景观类进行了详尽分类，发现非单射函数产生更多不变类，揭示了景观拓扑特性与算法行为的复杂关系。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统随机优化算法仅依赖解的相对排序（秩不变性），但作者认为需要考虑更全面的景观特性，包括邻域结构和对称性（平移和旋转），以更好地理解问题难度和算法性能。

Method: 引入秩景观不变性概念，对伪布尔函数在1、2、3维情况下进行详尽的不变景观类分类，包括单射和非单射情况，分析景观拓扑特性与算法行为的关系。

Result: 共发现12,007个不变景观类，相比仅秩不变性显著减少；非单射函数产生的不变类远多于单射函数；揭示了欺骗性、中性、爬山策略性能等复杂景观特性与算法行为的组合关系。

Conclusion: 秩景观不变性提供了更精细的问题分类框架，为教学和基准设计提供了资源，有助于构建具有可控难度的大型问题，推进对景观难度和算法性能的理解。

Abstract: Many randomized optimization algorithms are rank-invariant, relying solely on the relative ordering of solutions rather than absolute fitness values. We introduce a stronger notion of rank landscape invariance: two problems are equivalent if their ranking, but also their neighborhood structure and symmetries (translation and rotation), induce identical landscapes. This motivates the study of rank landscapes rather than individual functions. While prior work analyzed the rankings of injective function classes in isolation, we provide an exhaustive inventory of the invariant landscape classes for pseudo-Boolean functions of dimensions 1, 2, and 3, including non-injective cases. Our analysis reveals 12,007 classes in total, a significant reduction compared to rank-invariance alone. We find that non-injective functions yield far more invariant landscape classes than injective ones. In addition, complex combinations of topological landscape properties and algorithm behaviors emerge, particularly regarding deceptiveness, neutrality, and the performance of hill-climbing strategies. The inventory serves as a resource for pedagogical purposes and benchmark design, offering a foundation for constructing larger problems with controlled hardness and advancing our understanding of landscape difficulty and algorithm performance.

</details>


### [707] [Market-Bench: Benchmarking Large Language Models on Economic and Trade Competition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05523)
*Yushuo Zheng,Huiyu Duan,Zicheng Zhang,Yucheng Zhu,Xiongkuo Min,Guangtao Zhai*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: Market-Bench是一个评估大语言模型在经济相关任务中能力的基准测试，通过构建可配置的多智能体供应链经济模型，测试LLM作为零售商在采购和零售阶段的竞争表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 目前大语言模型管理和获取经济资源的能力尚不明确，需要建立一个系统性的评估框架来测试LLM在经济竞争环境中的表现。

Method: 构建可配置的多智能体供应链经济模型，LLM作为零售商智能体参与两个阶段：1) 采购阶段：在预算约束的拍卖中竞标有限库存；2) 零售阶段：设定零售价格、生成营销口号，并通过基于角色的注意力机制提供给买家。记录完整的轨迹数据，使用经济、运营和语义指标进行自动评估。

Result: 对20个开源和闭源LLM智能体的基准测试显示显著的性能差异和赢家通吃现象：只有一小部分LLM零售商能够持续实现资本增值，而许多模型尽管语义匹配得分相似，却只能徘徊在盈亏平衡点附近。

Conclusion: Market-Bench为研究LLM在竞争市场中的互动提供了一个可复现的测试平台，揭示了LLM在经济任务中存在的显著能力差异和竞争动态。

Abstract: The ability of large language models (LLMs) to manage and acquire economic resources remains unclear. In this paper, we introduce \textbf{Market-Bench}, a comprehensive benchmark that evaluates the capabilities of LLMs in economically-relevant tasks through economic and trade competition. Specifically, we construct a configurable multi-agent supply chain economic model where LLMs act as retailer agents responsible for procuring and retailing merchandise. In the \textbf{procurement} stage, LLMs bid for limited inventory in budget-constrained auctions. In the \textbf{retail} stage, LLMs set retail prices, generate marketing slogans, and provide them to buyers through a role-based attention mechanism for purchase. Market-Bench logs complete trajectories of bids, prices, slogans, sales, and balance-sheet states, enabling automatic evaluation with economic, operational, and semantic metrics. Benchmarking on 20 open- and closed-source LLM agents reveals significant performance disparities and winner-take-most phenomenon, \textit{i.e.}, only a small subset of LLM retailers can consistently achieve capital appreciation, while many hover around the break-even point despite similar semantic matching scores. Market-Bench provides a reproducible testbed for studying how LLMs interact in competitive markets.

</details>


### [708] [UniCreative: Unifying Long-form Logic and Short-form Sparkle via Reference-Free Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05517)
*Xiaolong Wei,Zerun Zhu,Simin Niu,Xingyu Zhang,Peiying Yu,Changxuan Xiao,Yuchen Li,Jicheng Yang,Zhejun Zhao,Chong Meng,Long Xia,Daiting Shi*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: UniCreative：统一的无参考强化学习框架，通过自适应约束感知奖励模型和策略优化算法，解决长文本全局连贯性与短文本局部表现力之间的张力，无需监督微调和真实参考。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决创意写作中长文本全局连贯性与短文本局部表现力之间的根本矛盾。现有对齐范式依赖静态奖励信号和高质量监督数据，成本高且难以扩展。

Method: 提出UniCreative统一框架：1) AC-GenRM自适应约束感知奖励模型，动态合成查询特定标准进行细粒度偏好判断；2) ACPO策略优化算法，在无监督微调和真实参考情况下，对齐内容质量和结构范式的人类偏好。

Result: AC-GenRM与专家评估高度一致，ACPO在多样化写作任务中显著提升性能。分析显示模型涌现出元认知能力：能自主区分需要严格规划的任务和适合直接生成的任务。

Conclusion: 提出的直接对齐方法有效验证了模型学习区分不同写作需求的能力，为创意写作中的全局与局部平衡问题提供了解决方案。

Abstract: A fundamental challenge in creative writing lies in reconciling the inherent tension between maintaining global coherence in long-form narratives and preserving local expressiveness in short-form texts. While long-context generation necessitates explicit macroscopic planning, short-form creativity often demands spontaneous, constraint-free expression. Existing alignment paradigms, however, typically employ static reward signals and rely heavily on high-quality supervised data, which is costly and difficult to scale. To address this, we propose \textbf{UniCreative}, a unified reference-free reinforcement learning framework. We first introduce \textbf{AC-GenRM}, an adaptive constraint-aware reward model that dynamically synthesizes query-specific criteria to provide fine-grained preference judgments. Leveraging these signals, we propose \textbf{ACPO}, a policy optimization algorithm that aligns models with human preferences across both content quality and structural paradigms without supervised fine-tuning and ground-truth references. Empirical results demonstrate that AC-GenRM aligns closely with expert evaluations, while ACPO significantly enhances performance across diverse writing tasks. Crucially, our analysis reveals an emergent meta-cognitive ability: the model learns to autonomously differentiate between tasks requiring rigorous planning and those favoring direct generation, validating the effectiveness of our direct alignment approach.

</details>


### [709] [OmniDiagram: Advancing Unified Diagram Code Generation via Visual Interrogation Reward](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05514)
*Haoyue Yang,Xuanle Zhao,Xuexin Liu,Feibang Jiang,Yao Zhu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: OmniDiagram是一个统一的可编程图表生成框架，通过Viva视觉反馈策略和M3²Diagram数据集，在图表代码生成任务上实现了新的SOTA。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有可编程图表生成研究局限于狭窄的任务定义和语言支持，限制了其在不同图表类型中的适用性。需要建立一个统一框架来支持多样化的图表代码语言和任务定义。

Method: 提出OmniDiagram统一框架，包含三个核心组件：1) 支持多种图表代码语言和任务定义；2) 引入Viva视觉反馈策略，通过生成针对性视觉查询来评估渲染图表的视觉保真度；3) 构建M3²Diagram大规模数据集（超过196k高质量实例）。采用SFT与基于Viva的RL相结合的训练方法。

Result: 实验结果表明，SFT与基于Viva的RL相结合使OmniDiagram在图表代码生成基准测试中建立了新的最先进水平（SOTA）。

Conclusion: OmniDiagram通过统一的框架设计、创新的Viva视觉反馈策略和大规模数据集，解决了现有图表生成方法的局限性，实现了更广泛适用的高性能图表代码生成系统。

Abstract: The paradigm of programmable diagram generation is evolving rapidly, playing a crucial role in structured visualization. However, most existing studies are confined to a narrow range of task formulations and language support, constraining their applicability to diverse diagram types. In this work, we propose OmniDiagram, a unified framework that incorporates diverse diagram code languages and task definitions. To address the challenge of aligning code logic with visual fidelity in Reinforcement Learning (RL), we introduce a novel visual feedback strategy named Visual Interrogation Verifies All (\textsc{Viva}). Unlike brittle syntax-based rules or pixel-level matching, \textsc{Viva} rewards the visual structure of rendered diagrams through a generative approach. Specifically, \textsc{Viva} actively generates targeted visual inquiries to scrutinize diagram visual fidelity and provides fine-grained feedback for optimization. This mechanism facilitates a self-evolving training process, effectively obviating the need for manually annotated ground truth code. Furthermore, we construct M3$^2$Diagram, the first large-scale diagram code generation dataset, containing over 196k high-quality instances. Experimental results confirm that the combination of SFT and our \textsc{Viva}-based RL allows OmniDiagram to establish a new state-of-the-art (SOTA) across diagram code generation benchmarks.

</details>


### [710] [SCMAPR: Self-Correcting Multi-Agent Prompt Refinement for Complex-Scenario Text-to-Video Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05489)
*Chengyi Yang,Pengzhen Li,Jiayin Qi,Aimin Zhou,Ji Wu,Ji Liu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: SCMAPR是一个用于文本到视频生成的场景感知自校正多智能体提示词优化框架，通过多智能体协作解决复杂场景下文本提示的模糊性和不完整性，显著提升生成质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前文本到视频生成系统在复杂场景下表现不佳，主要原因是文本提示存在模糊性和不完整性。需要开发专门的提示词优化框架来应对复杂场景的挑战。

Method: 提出SCMAPR框架，采用阶段式多智能体优化流程：1) 将提示词路由到基于分类的场景进行策略选择；2) 合成场景感知的重写策略并执行策略条件优化；3) 进行结构化语义验证，检测到违规时触发条件修订。

Result: 在3个现有基准和自建的T2V-Complexity基准上，SCMAPR在复杂场景下持续改善文本-视频对齐和整体生成质量，在VBench和EvalCrafter上平均得分提升2.67%和3.28%，在T2V-CompBench上提升0.028，优于3个最先进的基线方法。

Conclusion: SCMAPR通过多智能体协作的提示词优化框架，有效解决了文本到视频生成中复杂场景的挑战，显著提升了生成质量和对齐度，并为该领域提供了专门的评估基准。

Abstract: Text-to-Video (T2V) generation has benefited from recent advances in diffusion models, yet current systems still struggle under complex scenarios, which are generally exacerbated by the ambiguity and underspecification of text prompts. In this work, we formulate complex-scenario prompt refinement as a stage-wise multi-agent refinement process and propose SCMAPR, i.e., a scenario-aware and Self-Correcting Multi-Agent Prompt Refinement framework for T2V prompting. SCMAPR coordinates specialized agents to (i) route each prompt to a taxonomy-grounded scenario for strategy selection, (ii) synthesize scenario-aware rewriting policies and perform policy-conditioned refinement, and (iii) conduct structured semantic verification that triggers conditional revision when violations are detected. To clarify what constitutes complex scenarios in T2V prompting, provide representative examples, and enable rigorous evaluation under such challenging conditions, we further introduce {T2V-Complexity}, which is a complex-scenario T2V benchmark consisting exclusively of complex-scenario prompts. Extensive experiments on 3 existing benchmarks and our T2V-Complexity benchmark demonstrate that SCMAPR consistently improves text-video alignment and overall generation quality under complex scenarios, achieving up to 2.67\% and 3.28 gains in average score on VBench and EvalCrafter, and up to 0.028 improvement on T2V-CompBench over 3 State-Of-The-Art baselines.

</details>


### [711] [Auditable Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05485)
*Yi Nian,Aojie Yuan,Haiyue Zhang,Jiate Li,Yue Zhao*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 论文主张：没有可审计性，任何智能体系统都无法实现问责制。作者定义了智能体可审计性的五个维度，并提出了三种机制类别，通过实证研究验证了当前生态系统中可审计性基本安全前提的缺失。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着LLM智能体能够调用工具、查询数据库、委托任务和触发外部副作用，一旦智能体系统能够在世界中行动，问题不再仅仅是能否防止有害行为，而是部署后这些行为是否仍然可被追责。作者关注智能体系统的问责制问题，强调可审计性是实现问责制的前提。

Method: 1. 概念区分：明确问责制、可审计性和审计的定义；2. 定义智能体可审计性的五个维度：行动可恢复性、生命周期覆盖、策略可检查性、责任归属和证据完整性；3. 提出三种机制类别：检测、执行和恢复；4. 通过多层证据支持观点：生态系统测量、运行时可行性测试和受控恢复实验。

Result: 1. 生态系统测量显示基本安全前提广泛缺失（6个知名开源项目中发现了617个安全问题）；2. 运行时可行性测试表明，带有防篡改记录的执行前调解仅增加8.3毫秒的中位数开销；3. 受控恢复实验证明，即使传统日志缺失，责任相关信息仍可部分恢复。

Conclusion: 论文提出智能体系统的可审计性卡片，并基于机制类别识别了六个开放研究问题。核心结论是：没有可审计性，任何智能体系统都无法实现问责制，需要系统性的可审计性设计和实现。

Abstract: LLM agents call tools, query databases, delegate tasks, and trigger external side effects. Once an agent system can act in the world, the question is no longer only whether harmful actions can be prevented--it is whether those actions remain answerable after deployment. We distinguish accountability (the ability to determine compliance and assign responsibility), auditability (the system property that makes accountability possible), and auditing (the process of reconstructing behavior from trustworthy evidence). Our claim is direct: no agent system can be accountable without auditability.
  To make this operational, we define five dimensions of agent auditability, i.e., action recoverability, lifecycle coverage, policy checkability, responsibility attribution, and evidence integrity, and identify three mechanism classes (detect, enforce, recover) whose temporal information-and-intervention constraints explain why, in practice, no single approach suffices. We support the position with layered evidence rather than a single benchmark: lower-bound ecosystem measurements suggest that even basic security prerequisites for auditability are widely unmet (617 security findings across six prominent open-source projects); runtime feasibility results show that pre-execution mediation with tamper-evident records adds only 8.3 ms median overhead; and controlled recovery experiments show that responsibility-relevant information can be partially recovered even when conventional logs are missing. We propose an Auditability Card for agent systems and identify six open research problems organized by mechanism class.

</details>


### [712] [Can We Trust a Black-box LLM? LLM Untrustworthy Boundary Detection via Bias-Diffusion and Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05483)
*Xiaotian Zhou,Di Tang,Xiaofeng Wang,Xiaozhong Liu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出GMRL-BD算法，基于知识图谱和强化学习智能体，在仅黑盒访问LLM和有限查询约束下，高效识别LLM可能产生偏见回答的主题边界。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型语言模型虽然能在广泛主题上回答问题，但有时会产生偏见、意识形态化或错误的回答。如果没有明确了解哪些主题的回答可信，会限制其应用。需要一种方法来识别LLM不可信的主题边界。
