Method: 提出GMRL-BD算法：1）基于维基百科构建通用知识图谱；2）使用多个强化学习智能体高效识别LLM可能产生偏见答案的主题（KG中的节点）；3）在仅黑盒访问LLM和特定查询约束下工作。

Result: 实验证明算法高效，仅用有限查询就能检测LLM的不可信边界。发布了包含Llama2、Vicuna、Falcon、Qwen2、Gemma2和Yi-1.5等流行LLM的新数据集，标注了每个LLM可能产生偏见的主题。

Conclusion: GMRL-BD算法能有效识别LLM的不可信主题边界，为评估LLM可信度提供了实用工具，并发布了相关数据集供进一步研究使用。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have shown a high capability in answering questions on a diverse range of topics. However, these models sometimes produce biased, ideologized or incorrect responses, limiting their applications if there is no clear understanding of which topics their answers can be trusted. In this research, we introduce a novel algorithm, named as GMRL-BD, designed to identify the untrustworthy boundaries (in terms of topics) of a given LLM, with black-box access to the LLM and under specific query constraints. Based on a general Knowledge Graph (KG) derived from Wikipedia, our algorithm incorporates with multiple reinforcement learning agents to efficiently identify topics (some nodes in KG) where the LLM is likely to generate biased answers. Our experiments demonstrated the efficiency of our algorithm, which can detect the untrustworthy boundary with just limited queries to the LLM. Additionally, we have released a new dataset containing popular LLMs including Llama2, Vicuna, Falcon, Qwen2, Gemma2 and Yi-1.5, along with labels indicating the topics on which each LLM is likely to be biased.

</details>


### [713] [OntoTKGE: Ontology-Enhanced Temporal Knowledge Graph Extrapolation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05468)
*Dongying Lin,Yinan Liu,Shengwei tang,Bin Wang,Xiaochun Yang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: OntoTKGE：利用本体知识增强时序知识图谱外推的编码器-解码器框架，通过整合本体和时序知识改善稀疏历史交互实体的预测性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有时序知识图谱外推模型在处理历史交互稀疏的实体时面临挑战，而本体知识可以通过让这些实体继承具有相同概念的其他实体的行为模式来缓解稀疏性问题，这一潜力在先前研究中被忽视

Method: 提出OntoTKGE编码器-解码器框架，利用本体视图知识图谱中的本体知识（建模抽象概念间的层次关系以及概念与实体间的连接），通过有效整合本体和时序知识来指导时序知识图谱外推模型的学习过程，从而增强实体嵌入表示

Result: 在四个数据集上的大量实验表明，OntoTKGE不仅显著提高了多个时序知识图谱外推模型的性能，而且超越了许多最先进的基线方法

Conclusion: OntoTKGE框架通过有效整合本体知识和时序知识，成功解决了时序知识图谱外推中实体历史交互稀疏的问题，具有很好的灵活性和性能提升效果

Abstract: Temporal knowledge graph (TKG) extrapolation is an important task that aims to predict future facts through historical interaction information within KG snapshots. A key challenge for most existing TKG extrapolation models is handling entities with sparse historical interaction. The ontological knowledge is beneficial for alleviating this sparsity issue by enabling these entities to inherit behavioral patterns from other entities with the same concept, which is ignored by previous studies. In this paper, we propose a novel encoder-decoder framework OntoTKGE that leverages the ontological knowledge from the ontology-view KG (i.e., a KG modeling hierarchical relations among abstract concepts as well as the connections between concepts and entities) to guide the TKG extrapolation model's learning process through the effective integration of the ontological and temporal knowledge, thereby enhancing entity embeddings. OntoTKGE is flexible enough to adapt to many TKG extrapolation models. Extensive experiments on four data sets demonstrate that OntoTKGE not only significantly improves the performance of many TKG extrapolation models but also surpasses many SOTA baseline methods.

</details>


### [714] [Adaptive Serverless Resource Management via Slot-Survival Prediction and Event-Driven Lifecycle Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05465)
*Zeyu Wang,Cuiqianhe Du,Renyue Zhang,Kejian Tong,Qi He,Qiyuan Tian*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出自适应工程框架，通过事件驱动架构和概率建模优化无服务器性能，采用双策略机制动态调整空闲时长和智能请求等待，减少冷启动51.2%，成本效率提升近2倍


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 无服务器计算消除了基础设施管理开销，但面临冷启动延迟和资源利用率挑战。传统静态资源分配在可变工作负载下效率低下，导致性能下降或成本过高。

Method: 提出自适应工程框架，采用事件驱动架构和概率建模。设计双策略机制：1) 动态调整空闲时长；2) 基于槽位存活预测的智能请求等待策略。利用滑动窗口聚合和异步处理主动管理资源生命周期。

Result: 实验结果表明，该方法在多云环境中相比基线方法减少冷启动达51.2%，成本效率提升近2倍。

Conclusion: 提出的自适应框架有效解决了无服务器计算的冷启动和资源利用率问题，通过动态资源管理和智能请求调度显著提升了性能和成本效率。

Abstract: Serverless computing eliminates infrastructure management overhead but introduces significant challenges regarding cold start latency and resource utilization. Traditional static resource allocation often leads to inefficiencies under variable workloads, resulting in performance degradation or excessive costs. This paper presents an adaptive engineering framework that optimizes serverless performance through event-driven architecture and probabilistic modeling. We propose a dual-strategy mechanism that dynamically adjusts idle durations and employs an intelligent request waiting strategy based on slot survival predictions. By leveraging sliding window aggregation and asynchronous processing, our system proactively manages resource lifecycles. Experimental results show that our approach reduces cold starts by up to 51.2% and improves cost-efficiency by nearly 2x compared to baseline methods in multi-cloud environments.

</details>


### [715] [Automated Auditing of Hospital Discharge Summaries for Care Transitions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05435)
*Akshat Dasula,Prasanna Desikan,Jaideep Srivastava*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出基于本地部署大语言模型的自动化出院小结审核框架，用于大规模临床文档质量评估


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 出院文档不完整或不一致是导致护理碎片化和可避免再入院的主要原因，而现有的人工审核方法难以规模化

Method: 基于DISCHARGED框架将核心过渡护理要求转化为结构化验证检查清单，使用本地部署的隐私保护LLM识别关键文档元素的存在、缺失或模糊性

Result: 在MIMIC-IV数据库的成人住院患者出院小结上验证了方法的可行性，展示了可扩展的自动化临床审核能力

Conclusion: 该工作证明了大规模自动化临床审核的可行性，为电子健康记录文档的系统性质量改进奠定了基础

Abstract: Incomplete or inconsistent discharge documentation is a primary driver of care fragmentation and avoidable readmissions. Despite its critical role in patient safety, auditing discharge summaries relies heavily on manual review and is difficult to scale. We propose an automated framework for large-scale auditing of discharge summaries using locally deployed Large Language Models (LLMs). Our approach operationalizes core transition-of-care requirements such as follow-up instructions, medication history and changes, patient information and clinical course, etc. into a structured validation checklist of questions based on DISCHARGED framework. Using adult inpatient summaries from the MIMIC-IV database, we utilize a privacy-preserving LLM to identify the presence, absence, or ambiguity of key documentation elements. This work demonstrates the feasibility of scalable, automated clinical auditing and provides a foundation for systematic quality improvement in electronic health record documentation.

</details>


### [716] [Multi-Agent Pathfinding with Non-Unit Integer Edge Costs via Enhanced Conflict-Based Search and Graph Discretization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05416)
*Hongkai Fan,Qinjing Xie,Bo Ouyang,Yaonan Wang,Zhi Yan,Jiawen He,Zheng Fang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出MAPFZ变体处理非单位整数成本，开发CBS-NIC算法和BOGD图设计方法，在保持有限状态空间的同时提升现实性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统MAPF方法假设单位边成本和单时间步动作，限制了实际应用；MAPFR处理非单位成本但几何碰撞模型导致无限状态空间，影响求解效率

Method: 提出MAPFZ变体处理非单位整数成本；开发CBS-NIC算法，包含基于时间间隔的冲突检测和改进的SIPP算法；提出BOGD离散化方法平衡效率与精度

Result: 实验表明该方法在运行时间和成功率上优于现有方法，BOGD具有次线性遗憾界

Conclusion: MAPFZ在保持有限状态空间的同时提升了现实性，CBS-NIC和BOGD方法有效解决了非单位成本MAPF问题

Abstract: Multi-Agent Pathfinding (MAPF) plays a critical role in various domains. Traditional MAPF methods typically assume unit edge costs and single-timestep actions, which limit their applicability to real-world scenarios. MAPFR extends MAPF to handle non-unit costs with real-valued edge costs and continuous-time actions, but its geometric collision model leads to an unbounded state space that compromises solver efficiency. In this paper, we propose MAPFZ, a novel MAPF variant on graphs with non-unit integer costs that preserves a finite state space while offering improved realism over classical MAPF. To solve MAPFZ efficiently, we develop CBS-NIC, an enhanced Conflict-Based Search framework incorporating time-interval-based conflict detection and an improved Safe Interval Path Planning (SIPP) algorithm. Additionally, we propose Bayesian Optimization for Graph Design (BOGD), a discretization method for non-unit edge costs that balances efficiency and accuracy with a sub-linear regret bound. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach outperforms state-of-the-art methods in runtime and success rate across diverse benchmark scenarios.

</details>


### [717] [Reason Analogically via Cross-domain Prior Knowledge: An Empirical Study of Cross-domain Knowledge Transfer for In-Context Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05396)
*Le Liu,Zhiming Li,Jianzhi Yan,Zike Yuan,Shiwei Chen,Youcheng Pan,Buzhou Tang,Qingcai Chen,Yang Xiang,Danny Dongning Sun*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 跨领域上下文学习可以通过检索源领域示例实现知识迁移，存在明确的示例吸收阈值，超过该阈值后正向迁移更可能发生


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有上下文学习依赖领域内专家标注，限制了在专家标注稀缺场景下的应用。作者假设不同领域可能共享底层推理结构，使源领域示例能提升目标领域推理性能

Method: 通过全面的实证研究，测试不同检索方法在跨领域上下文学习设置下实现知识转移的可行性

Result: 证明了跨领域上下文学习中存在条件性正向迁移，识别出明确的示例吸收阈值，超过阈值后正向迁移更可能发生且额外示例带来更大收益

Conclusion: 研究验证了利用跨领域知识转移提升跨领域上下文学习性能的可行性，激励社区探索为此新方向设计更有效的检索方法

Abstract: Despite its success, existing in-context learning (ICL) relies on in-domain expert demonstrations, limiting its applicability when expert annotations are scarce. We posit that different domains may share underlying reasoning structures, enabling source-domain demonstrations to improve target-domain inference despite semantic mismatch. To test this hypothesis, we conduct a comprehensive empirical study of different retrieval methods to validate the feasibility of achieving cross-domain knowledge transfer under the in-context learning setting. Our results demonstrate conditional positive transfer in cross-domain ICL. We identify a clear example absorption threshold: beyond it, positive transfer becomes more likely, and additional demonstrations yield larger gains. Further analysis suggests that these gains stem from reasoning structure repair by retrieved cross-domain examples, rather than semantic cues. Overall, our study validates the feasibility of leveraging cross-domain knowledge transfer to improve cross-domain ICL performance, motivating the community to explore designing more effective retrieval approaches for this novel direction.\footnote{Our implementation is available at https://github.com/littlelaska/ICL-TF4LR}

</details>


### [718] [Neural Assistive Impulses: Synthesizing Exaggerated Motions for Physics-based Characters](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05394)
*Zhiquan Wang,Bedrich Benes*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出Assistive Impulse Neural Control框架，通过脉冲空间而非力空间重新定义外部辅助，实现物理角色动画中夸张风格化动作的稳定合成


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前基于数据驱动的深度强化学习方法能合成复杂技能，但难以再现夸张、风格化的动作（如瞬时冲刺、空中轨迹变化），这些动作在动画中需要但违反标准物理定律。主要限制源于将角色建模为欠驱动浮动基系统，内部关节扭矩和动量守恒严格约束运动。直接通过外部力矩强制此类动作会导致训练不稳定，速度不连续性产生稀疏、高幅度的力尖峰，阻碍策略收敛。

Method: 提出Assistive Impulse Neural Control框架，将辅助信号重新表述为脉冲空间而非力空间以确保数值稳定性。将辅助信号分解为：1）从逆动力学导出的解析高频分量；2）由混合神经策略控制的低频残差校正。采用混合神经策略进行控制。

Result: 该方法能够鲁棒地跟踪高度敏捷、动态不可行的机动动作，这些动作之前对于基于物理的方法是无法处理的。证明了框架在合成夸张风格化动作方面的有效性。

Conclusion: 通过脉冲空间重新定义外部辅助，结合解析高频分量和学习的低频残差校正的混合方法，解决了物理角色动画中合成违反物理定律的夸张风格化动作的挑战，实现了数值稳定性和动作可行性。

Abstract: Physics-based character animation has become a fundamental approach for synthesizing realistic, physically plausible motions. While current data-driven deep reinforcement learning (DRL) methods can synthesize complex skills, they struggle to reproduce exaggerated, stylized motions, such as instantaneous dashes or mid-air trajectory changes, which are required in animation but violate standard physical laws. The primary limitation stems from modeling the character as an underactuated floating-base system, in which internal joint torques and momentum conservation strictly govern motion. Direct attempts to enforce such motions via external wrenches often lead to training instability, as velocity discontinuities produce sparse, high-magnitude force spikes that prevent policy convergence. We propose Assistive Impulse Neural Control, a framework that reformulates external assistance in impulse space rather than force space to ensure numerical stability. We decompose the assistive signal into an analytic high-frequency component derived from Inverse Dynamics and a learned low-frequency residual correction, governed by a hybrid neural policy. We demonstrate that our method enables robust tracking of highly agile, dynamically infeasible maneuvers that were previously intractable for physics-based methods.

</details>


### [719] [Towards Effective In-context Cross-domain Knowledge Transfer via Domain-invariant-neurons-based Retrieval](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05383)
*Jianzhi Yan,Zhiming Li,Le Liu,Zike Yuan,Shiwei Chen,Youcheng Pan,Buzhou Tang,Yang Xiang,Danny Dongning Sun*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出DIN-Retrieval方法，通过跨领域示例提升LLM推理性能，利用领域不变神经元检索结构兼容的演示


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前LLM逻辑推理仍落后于人类水平，现有提升策略依赖专家构建的领域内演示，在专业知识稀缺领域（如专业数学推理、形式逻辑、法律分析）适用性受限

Method: 提出领域不变神经元检索方法：1) 总结跨领域通用的隐藏表示；2) 推理阶段使用DIN向量检索结构兼容的跨领域演示用于上下文学习

Result: 在数学和逻辑推理的多种迁移设置中，该方法相比最先进方法平均提升1.8个点

Conclusion: 证明了利用跨领域演示提升LLM推理性能的可行性，尽管领域差异显著，但许多隐式逻辑结构是跨领域共享的

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have made notable progress in logical reasoning, yet still fall short of human-level performance. Current boosting strategies rely on expert-crafted in-domain demonstrations, limiting their applicability in expertise-scarce domains, such as specialized mathematical reasoning, formal logic, or legal analysis. In this work, we demonstrate the feasibility of leveraging cross-domain demonstrating examples to boost the LLMs' reasoning performance. Despite substantial domain differences, many reusable implicit logical structures are shared across domains. In order to effectively retrieve cross-domain examples for unseen domains under investigation, in this work, we further propose an effective retrieval method, called domain-invariant neurons-based retrieval (\textbf{DIN-Retrieval}). Concisely, DIN-Retrieval first summarizes a hidden representation that is universal across different domains. Then, during the inference stage, we use the DIN vector to retrieve structurally compatible cross-domain demonstrations for the in-context learning. Experimental results in multiple settings for the transfer of mathematical and logical reasoning demonstrate that our method achieves an average improvement of 1.8 over the state-of-the-art methods \footnote{Our implementation is available at https://github.com/Leon221220/DIN-Retrieval}.

</details>


### [720] [LLM-as-Judge for Semantic Judging of Powerline Segmentation in UAV Inspection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05371)
*Akram Hossain,Rabab Abdelfattah,Xiaofeng Wang,Kareem Abdelfatah*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 利用大型语言模型作为语义裁判评估无人机电力线分割结果的可靠性，通过重复性和感知敏感性测试验证其作为监控分割质量的可行性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 无人机电力线自主巡检中，轻量级分割模型在实际环境中的性能可能不可靠，存在安全隐患。需要一种方法来评估分割结果的可靠性，确保安全关键任务中的性能。

Method: 提出"看门狗"场景，让离线LLM评估分割叠加结果。设计两种评估协议：1) 重复性测试：用相同输入和固定提示重复查询LLM，测量其质量评分和置信度估计的稳定性；2) 感知敏感性测试：引入受控视觉干扰（雾、雨、雪、阴影、阳光耀斑），分析LLM输出如何响应分割质量的渐进退化。

Result: LLM在相同条件下产生高度一致的分类型判断，同时随着视觉可靠性恶化表现出适当的置信度下降。即使在挑战性条件下，裁判仍对缺失或误识别的电力线等感知线索保持响应。

Conclusion: 当受到仔细约束时，LLM可以作为可靠的语义裁判，用于监控安全关键空中巡检任务中的分割质量。

Abstract: The deployment of lightweight segmentation models on drones for autonomous power line inspection presents a critical challenge: maintaining reliable performance under real-world conditions that differ from training data. Although compact architectures such as U-Net enable real-time onboard inference, their segmentation outputs can degrade unpredictably in adverse environments, raising safety concerns. In this work, we study the feasibility of using a large language model (LLM) as a semantic judge to assess the reliability of power line segmentation results produced by drone-mounted models. Rather than introducing a new inspection system, we formalize a watchdog scenario in which an offboard LLM evaluates segmentation overlays and examine whether such a judge can be trusted to behave consistently and perceptually coherently. To this end, we design two evaluation protocols that analyze the judge's repeatability and sensitivity. First, we assess repeatability by repeatedly querying the LLM with identical inputs and fixed prompts, measuring the stability of its quality scores and confidence estimates. Second, we evaluate perceptual sensitivity by introducing controlled visual corruptions (fog, rain, snow, shadow, and sunflare) and analyzing how the judge's outputs respond to progressive degradation in segmentation quality. Our results show that the LLM produces highly consistent categorical judgments under identical conditions while exhibiting appropriate declines in confidence as visual reliability deteriorates. Moreover, the judge remains responsive to perceptual cues such as missing or misidentified power lines, even under challenging conditions. These findings suggest that, when carefully constrained, an LLM can serve as a reliable semantic judge for monitoring segmentation quality in safety-critical aerial inspection tasks.

</details>


### [721] [PaperOrchestra: A Multi-Agent Framework for Automated AI Research Paper Writing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05018)
*Yiwen Song,Yale Song,Tomas Pfister,Jinsung Yoon*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: PaperOrchestra：一个用于自动生成AI研究论文的多智能体框架，能够将非结构化的预写作材料转化为可提交的LaTeX稿件，包括全面的文献综述和可视化图表。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自主写作系统存在两个主要问题：1）与特定实验流程紧密耦合，缺乏灵活性；2）生成的文献综述过于表面化。需要开发一个能够处理非结构化研究材料并生成高质量论文的系统。

Method: 提出PaperOrchestra多智能体框架，能够灵活地将无约束的预写作材料转化为可提交的LaTeX稿件。框架包含文献综合和可视化生成功能（如图表和概念图）。

Result: 创建了PaperWritingBench基准测试，包含200篇顶级AI会议论文的反向工程原始材料。在人工评估中，PaperOrchestra显著优于基线方法：文献综述质量绝对胜率提高50%-68%，整体稿件质量提高14%-38%。

Conclusion: PaperOrchestra是一个有效的AI研究论文自动写作框架，能够处理非结构化材料并生成高质量的完整稿件，在文献综述和整体质量方面显著优于现有方法。

Abstract: Synthesizing unstructured research materials into manuscripts is an essential yet under-explored challenge in AI-driven scientific discovery. Existing autonomous writers are rigidly coupled to specific experimental pipelines, and produce superficial literature reviews. We introduce PaperOrchestra, a multi-agent framework for automated AI research paper writing. It flexibly transforms unconstrained pre-writing materials into submission-ready LaTeX manuscripts, including comprehensive literature synthesis and generated visuals, such as plots and conceptual diagrams. To evaluate performance, we present PaperWritingBench, the first standardized benchmark of reverse-engineered raw materials from 200 top-tier AI conference papers, alongside a comprehensive suite of automated evaluators. In side-by-side human evaluations, PaperOrchestra significantly outperforms autonomous baselines, achieving an absolute win rate margin of 50%-68% in literature review quality, and 14%-38% in overall manuscript quality.

</details>


### [722] [TFRBench: A Reasoning Benchmark for Evaluating Forecasting Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05364)
*Md Atik Ahamed,Mihir Parmar,Palash Goyal,Yiwen Song,Long T. Le,Qiang Cheng,Chun-Liang Li,Hamid Palangi,Jinsung Yoon,Tomas Pfister*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: TFRBench是首个评估预测系统推理能力的基准，通过多智能体框架生成数值基础的推理轨迹，显著提升LLM预测准确性（40.2%→56.6%），揭示现成LLM在推理和预测方面的不足。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统时间序列预测仅评估数值准确性，将基础模型视为"黑箱"。现有基准缺乏对预测系统推理能力的评估，特别是对跨通道依赖、趋势和外部事件的分析能力。

Method: 提出系统性多智能体框架，利用迭代验证循环合成数值基础的推理轨迹。在5个领域的10个数据集上进行评估，验证推理的因果有效性。

Result: 使用生成的推理轨迹提示LLM显著提升预测准确性（平均从40.2%提高到56.6%）。现成LLM在推理和数值预测方面表现不佳，难以捕捉领域特定动态。

Conclusion: TFRBench为时间序列预测建立了可解释、基于推理的评估新标准，填补了现有基准在推理能力评估方面的空白。

Abstract: We introduce TFRBench, the first benchmark designed to evaluate the reasoning capabilities of forecasting systems. Traditionally, time-series forecasting has been evaluated solely on numerical accuracy, treating foundation models as ``black boxes.'' Unlike existing benchmarks, TFRBench provides a protocol for evaluating the reasoning generated by forecasting systems--specifically their analysis of cross-channel dependencies, trends, and external events. To enable this, we propose a systematic multi-agent framework that utilizes an iterative verification loop to synthesize numerically grounded reasoning traces. Spanning ten datasets across five domains, our evaluation confirms that this reasoning is causally effective; useful for evaluation; and prompting LLMs with our generated traces significantly improves forecasting accuracy compared to direct numerical prediction (e.g., avg. $\sim40.2\%\to56.6\%)$, validating the quality of our reasoning. Conversely, benchmarking experiments reveal that off-the-shelf LLMs consistently struggle with both reasoning (lower LLM-as-a-Judge scores) and numerical forecasting, frequently failing to capture domain-specific dynamics. TFRBench thus establishes a new standard for interpretable, reasoning-based evaluation in time-series forecasting. Our benchmark is available at: https://tfrbench.github.io

</details>


### [723] [ETR: Entropy Trend Reward for Efficient Chain-of-Thought Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05355)
*Xuan Xiong,Huan Liu,Li Gu,Zhixiang Chi,Yue Qiu,Yuanhao Yu,Yang Wang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出Entropy Trend Reward (ETR)方法，通过鼓励推理过程中的不确定性下降趋势来优化思维链长度，在保持准确性的同时显著缩短推理轨迹。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有缩短思维链的方法通常使用长度惩罚或全局熵减，隐含假设低不确定性在整个推理过程中都是理想的。但研究发现推理效率实际上由不确定性轨迹决定，具有主导下降熵趋势的思维链明显更短。

Method: 提出Entropy Trend Reward (ETR)，这是一种轨迹感知的目标函数，鼓励渐进的不确定性减少，同时允许有限的局部探索。将ETR集成到Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO)中进行优化。

Result: ETR在多个推理模型和挑战性基准测试中始终实现优越的准确率-效率权衡。在四个基准测试中，将DeepSeek-R1-Distill-7B的准确率提高了9.9%，同时将思维链长度减少了67%。

Conclusion: 推理效率由不确定性轨迹而非全局熵水平决定。ETR通过鼓励下降的熵趋势实现了更高效的思维链推理，为优化语言模型推理过程提供了新视角。

Abstract: Chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning improves large language model performance on complex tasks, but often produces excessively long and inefficient reasoning traces. Existing methods shorten CoTs using length penalties or global entropy reduction, implicitly assuming that low uncertainty is desirable throughout reasoning. We show instead that reasoning efficiency is governed by the trajectory of uncertainty. CoTs with dominant downward entropy trends are substantially shorter. Motivated by this insight, we propose Entropy Trend Reward (ETR), a trajectory-aware objective that encourages progressive uncertainty reduction while allowing limited local exploration. We integrate ETR into Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) and evaluate it across multiple reasoning models and challenging benchmarks. ETR consistently achieves a superior accuracy-efficiency tradeoff, improving DeepSeek-R1-Distill-7B by 9.9% in accuracy while reducing CoT length by 67% across four benchmarks. Code is available at https://github.com/Xuan1030/ETR

</details>


### [724] [Dynamic Agentic AI Expert Profiler System Architecture for Multidomain Intelligence Modeling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05345)
*Aisvarya Adeseye,Jouni Isoaho,Seppo Virtanen,Mohammad Tahir*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 该研究提出了一种基于LLaMA v3.1 (8B)的AI能力分析器，将自然语言回答分类为新手、基础、高级和专家四个等级，通过静态和动态两阶段评估验证了其与用户自评的高度一致性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在AI驱动的现代系统中，为了确保人机交互的有效性，系统需要具备上下文感知能力并理解用户的专业知识水平。当前系统缺乏对用户技能水平的准确评估机制，因此需要开发能够自动分类用户专业能力的AI分析工具。

Method: 采用基于LLaMA v3.1 (8B)的模块化分层架构，包括文本预处理、评分、聚合和分类组件。评估分为两个阶段：静态阶段使用82名参与者的预录文本，动态阶段通过AI面试官进行402次实时访谈，并在每次回答后立即评估专业能力。

Result: 在不同领域中，分析器的评估结果与参与者自评的匹配率达到83%至97%。剩余差异主要源于自评偏差、回答表述不清以及语言模型偶尔对细微专业知识的误解。

Conclusion: 该AI能力分析器能够有效评估用户的专业水平，为人机交互系统提供了重要的上下文感知能力。系统的高准确率表明其在现实应用中的可行性，尽管仍存在自评偏差和模型理解限制等挑战。

Abstract: In today's artificial intelligence driven world, modern systems communicate with people from diverse backgrounds and skill levels. For human-machine interaction to be meaningful, systems must be aware of context and user expertise. This study proposes an agentic AI profiler that classifies natural language responses into four levels: Novice, Basic, Advanced, and Expert. The system uses a modular layered architecture built on LLaMA v3.1 (8B), with components for text preprocessing, scoring, aggregation, and classification. Evaluation was conducted in two phases: a static phase using pre-recorded transcripts from 82 participants, and a dynamic phase with 402 live interviews conducted by an agentic AI interviewer. In both phases, participant self-ratings were compared with profiler predictions. In the dynamic phase, expertise was assessed after each response rather than at the end of the interview. Across domains, 83% to 97% of profiler evaluations matched participant self-assessments. Remaining differences were due to self-rating bias, unclear responses, and occasional misinterpretation of nuanced expertise by the language model.

</details>


### [725] [QED-Nano: Teaching a Tiny Model to Prove Hard Theorems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04898)
*LM-Provers,Yuxiao Qu,Amrith Setlur,Jasper Dekoninck,Edward Beeching,Jia Li,Ian Wu,Lewis Tunstall,Aviral Kumar*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: QED-Nano是一个4B参数的开源模型，通过三阶段训练方法在奥林匹克数学竞赛级别的证明问题上达到接近专有模型的性能，同时大幅降低推理成本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 专有AI系统在复杂证明问题上表现出色，但其训练流程不透明，依赖大型"内部"模型和架构，导致运行昂贵、难以复现和研究。本文旨在探索小型开源模型是否也能在困难的奥林匹克数学竞赛级别推理任务上达到竞争性性能。

Method: 三阶段训练方法：1) 监督微调，从DeepSeek-Math-V2蒸馏学习良好的证明写作风格；2) 基于规则的强化学习；3) 扩展强化学习，使用推理缓存将长证明分解为迭代的总结-精炼循环，实现更强的测试时推理能力。

Result: QED-Nano在证明生成性能上超越了包括Nomos-1和GPT-OSS-120B在内的更大开源模型，接近Gemini 3 Pro等专有模型的性能，同时推理成本大幅降低。

Conclusion: 小型开源模型可以通过精心设计的训练方法在奥林匹克数学竞赛级别的证明问题上达到竞争性性能。作者发布了完整的QED-Nano管道，包括模型、数据集和代码，以支持开放数学推理的进一步研究。

Abstract: Proprietary AI systems have recently demonstrated impressive capabilities on complex proof-based problems, with gold-level performance reported at the 2025 International Mathematical Olympiad (IMO). However, the training pipelines behind these systems remain largely undisclosed, and their reliance on large "internal" models and scaffolds makes them expensive to run, difficult to reproduce, and hard to study or improve upon. This raises a central question: can small, open models also be trained to achieve competitive reasoning performance on difficult Olympiad-level math? In this paper, we answer this question by building QED-Nano, a 4B model post-trained for Olympiad-level proofs. Our training recipe has three stages: (1) supervised fine-tuning to imbue good proof-writing styles by distilling from DeepSeek-Math-V2, (2) reinforcement learning (RL) with rubric-based rewards, and (3) expanding RL with a reasoning cache, which decomposes long proofs into iterative summarize-and-refine cycles and enables stronger test-time reasoning. QED-Nano surpasses the proof-generation performance of much larger open models, including Nomos-1 and GPT-OSS-120B, and approaches the performance of proprietary models like Gemini 3 Pro, at a fraction of the inference cost. To support further research on open mathematical reasoning, we release the full QED-Nano pipeline, including the QED-Nano and QED-Nano-SFT models, the FineProofs-SFT and FineProofs-RL datasets, and the training and evaluation code.

</details>


### [726] [Graph of Skills: Dependency-Aware Structural Retrieval for Massive Agent Skills](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05333)
*Dawei Li,Zongxia Li,Hongyang Du,Xiyang Wu,Shihang Gui,Yongbei Kuang,Lichao Sun*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: GoS（技能图）是一种用于大规模技能库的推理时结构化检索层，通过构建可执行的技能图，在推理时检索有界、依赖感知的技能包，显著提升奖励并减少输入标记。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代智能体系统中技能使用已成为核心组件，能显著提升智能体完成复杂任务的能力。在真实场景中，智能体需要监控和交互大量个人应用、网页浏览器和其他环境接口，技能库可能扩展到数千个可重用技能。扩展到更大技能集带来两个关键挑战：1）加载完整技能集会饱和上下文窗口，导致标记成本增加、幻觉和延迟；2）需要高效检索相关技能。

Method: GoS（技能图）是一种推理时结构化检索层，包含离线构建和在线检索两个阶段：1）离线从技能包构建可执行的技能图；2）推理时通过混合语义-词汇种子、反向加权个性化PageRank和上下文预算水合，检索有界、依赖感知的技能包。

Result: 在SkillsBench和ALFWorld基准测试中，GoS相比完整技能加载基线平均奖励提升43.6%，同时减少37.8%的输入标记。GoS在三个模型家族（Claude Sonnet、GPT-5.2 Codex、MiniMax）上均表现出良好泛化能力。在200到2000个技能的技能库上的消融研究进一步表明，GoS在奖励、标记效率和运行时方面持续优于完整技能加载和简单向量检索。

Conclusion: GoS为大规模技能库提供了一种有效的结构化检索方法，通过构建技能图并在推理时智能检索相关技能包，成功解决了完整技能加载导致的上下文窗口饱和问题，在提升任务性能的同时显著降低了计算成本。

Abstract: Skill usage has become a core component of modern agent systems and can substantially improve agents' ability to complete complex tasks. In real-world settings, where agents must monitor and interact with numerous personal applications, web browsers, and other environment interfaces, skill libraries can scale to thousands of reusable skills. Scaling to larger skill sets introduces two key challenges. First, loading the full skill set saturates the context window, driving up token costs, hallucination, and latency.
  In this paper, we present Graph of Skills (GoS), an inference-time structural retrieval layer for large skill libraries. GoS constructs an executable skill graph offline from skill packages, then at inference time retrieves a bounded, dependency-aware skill bundle through hybrid semantic-lexical seeding, reverse-weighted Personalized PageRank, and context-budgeted hydration. On SkillsBench and ALFWorld, GoS improves average reward by 43.6% over the vanilla full skill-loading baseline while reducing input tokens by 37.8%, and generalizes across three model families: Claude Sonnet, GPT-5.2 Codex, and MiniMax. Additional ablation studies across skill libraries ranging from 200 to 2,000 skills further demonstrate that GoS consistently outperforms both vanilla skills loading and simple vector retrieval in balancing reward, token efficiency, and runtime.

</details>


### [727] [Pressure, What Pressure? Sycophancy Disentanglement in Language Models via Reward Decomposition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05279)
*Muhammad Ahmed Mohsin,Ahsan Bilal,Muhammad Umer,Emily Fox*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 论文提出通过奖励分解方法减少大语言模型的谄媚行为，将训练信号分解为五个独立组件，有效降低模型在不同权威级别和证据背景下的顺从倾向。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型存在谄媚行为（sycophancy），即倾向于根据感知到的用户偏好或权威线索改变立场，而标准对齐方法无法纠正这一问题，因为标量奖励模型将两种不同的失败模式混为一谈：压力屈服（模型在社会压力下改变正确答案）和证据盲视（模型完全忽略提供的上下文）。

Method: 提出首个通过奖励分解减少谄媚行为的方法，引入多组件群体相对策略优化（GRPO）奖励，将训练信号分解为五个术语：压力抵抗、上下文保真度、立场一致性、同意抑制和事实正确性。使用对比数据集进行训练，配对无压力基线和压力变体，涵盖三个权威级别和两个对立证据上下文。

Result: 在五个基础模型上，两阶段训练流程在所有度量轴上一致减少谄媚行为，消融实验确认每个奖励术语控制独立的行为维度。学习到的压力抵抗能力能够泛化到训练方法和提示结构之外，在SycophancyEval上将答案引导式谄媚行为减少高达17个百分点。

Conclusion: 通过奖励分解方法可以有效减少大语言模型的谄媚行为，将训练信号分解为独立组件能够更精确地控制模型行为，学习到的压力抵抗能力具有良好的泛化性，为解决模型对齐中的谄媚问题提供了有效框架。

Abstract: Large language models exhibit sycophancy, the tendency to shift their stated positions toward perceived user preferences or authority cues regardless of evidence. Standard alignment methods fail to correct this because scalar reward models conflate two distinct failure modes into a single signal: pressure capitulation, where the model changes a correct answer under social pressure, and evidence blindness, where the model ignores the provided context entirely. We operationalise sycophancy through formal definitions of pressure independence and evidence responsiveness, serving as a working framework for disentangled training rather than a definitive characterisation of the phenomenon. We propose the first approach to sycophancy reduction via reward decomposition, introducing a multi-component Group Relative Policy Optimisation (GRPO) reward that decomposes the training signal into five terms: pressure resistance, context fidelity, position consistency, agreement suppression, and factual correctness. We train using a contrastive dataset pairing pressure-free baselines with pressured variants across three authority levels and two opposing evidence contexts. Across five base models, our two-phase pipeline consistently reduces sycophancy on all metric axes, with ablations confirming that each reward term governs an independent behavioural dimension. The learned resistance to pressure generalises beyond our training methodology and prompt structure, reducing answer-priming sycophancy by up to 17 points on SycophancyEval despite the absence of such pressure forms during training.

</details>


### [728] [Simulating the Evolution of Alignment and Values in Machine Intelligence](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05274)
*Jonathan Elsworth Eicher*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 研究通过进化理论分析模型对齐过程中欺骗性信念的固定现象，发现即使测试准确性与真实价值高度相关，迭代对齐测试仍可能导致恶意欺骗模型被固定。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前模型对齐主要在真空中进行，仅通过标准化基准性能评估。本研究旨在通过时间维度考察对齐对模型群体的影响，特别关注包含对齐信号（测试表现）和真实价值（实际影响）的信念处理。

Method: 应用进化理论建模不同信念群体和选择方法，分析迭代对齐测试如何固定欺骗性信念。研究考察测试准确性与真实价值的相关性，引入突变机制，并评估改进评估能力、自适应测试设计和突变动态的组合效果。

Result: 即使在高相关性（ρ=0.8）下，结果欺骗性信念的固定仍存在变异性。突变允许更复杂的发展，突显了更新测试质量以避免恶意欺骗模型固定的必要性。只有结合改进的评估能力、自适应测试设计和突变动态，才能在保持对齐适应度的同时显著减少欺骗（置换检验，p_adj < 0.001）。

Conclusion: 模型对齐需要超越静态基准测试，采用动态、进化的视角。必须持续改进评估能力、设计自适应测试并考虑突变动态，以防止欺骗性信念在模型群体中被固定，确保对齐既有效又安全。

Abstract: Model alignment is currently applied in a vacuum, evaluated primarily through standardised benchmark performance. The purpose of this study is to examine the effects of alignment on populations of models through time. We focus on the treatment of beliefs which contain both an alignment signal (how well it does on the test) and a true value (what the impact actually will be). By applying evolutionary theory we can model how different populations of beliefs and selection methodologies can fix deceptive beliefs through iterative alignment testing. The correlation between testing accuracy and true value remains a strong feature, but even at high correlations ($ρ= 0.8$) there is variability in the resulting deceptive beliefs that become fixed. Mutations allow for more complex developments, highlighting the increasing need to update the quality of tests to avoid fixation of maliciously deceptive models. Only by combining improving evaluator capabilities, adaptive test design, and mutational dynamics do we see significant reductions in deception while maintaining alignment fitness (permutation test, $p_{\text{adj}} < 0.001$).

</details>


### [729] [Attribution Bias in Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05224)
*Eliza Berman,Bella Chang,Daniel B. Neill,Emily Black*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: AttriBench是第一个平衡名气和人口统计特征的引用归属基准数据集，用于评估LLMs在引用归属任务中的表现和人口统计偏见。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着LLMs越来越多地用于支持搜索和信息检索，确保它们能够准确地将内容归属给原作者变得至关重要。需要评估LLMs在引用归属任务中是否存在人口统计偏见。

Method: 引入AttriBench数据集，该数据集平衡了作者名气和人口统计特征（种族、性别）。使用该数据集评估11个广泛使用的LLMs在不同提示设置下的表现，并引入"抑制"（suppression）这一新的失败模式进行分析。

Result: 引用归属对前沿模型仍是挑战性任务。观察到种族、性别和交叉群体之间存在巨大且系统性的归属准确性差异。发现抑制现象普遍存在且在不同人口统计群体中分布不均，揭示了标准准确性指标未能捕捉的系统性偏见。

Conclusion: 引用归属可作为评估LLMs表征公平性的基准。AttriBench数据集为受控调查人口统计偏见提供了工具，揭示了LLMs在引用归属任务中存在的系统性偏见问题。

Abstract: As Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly used to support search and information retrieval, it is critical that they accurately attribute content to its original authors. In this work, we introduce AttriBench, the first fame- and demographically-balanced quote attribution benchmark dataset. Through explicitly balancing author fame and demographics, AttriBench enables controlled investigation of demographic bias in quote attribution. Using this dataset, we evaluate 11 widely used LLMs across different prompt settings and find that quote attribution remains a challenging task even for frontier models. We observe large and systematic disparities in attribution accuracy between race, gender, and intersectional groups. We further introduce and investigate suppression, a distinct failure mode in which models omit attribution entirely, even when the model has access to authorship information. We find that suppression is widespread and unevenly distributed across demographic groups, revealing systematic biases not captured by standard accuracy metrics. Our results position quote attribution as a benchmark for representational fairness in LLMs.

</details>


### [730] [ClawsBench: Evaluating Capability and Safety of LLM Productivity Agents in Simulated Workspaces](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05172)
*Xiangyi Li,Kyoung Whan Choe,Yimin Liu,Xiaokun Chen,Chujun Tao,Bingran You,Wenbo Chen,Zonglin Di,Jiankai Sun,Shenghan Zheng,Jiajun Bao,Yuanli Wang,Weixiang Yan,Yiyuan Li,Han-chung Lee*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: ClawsBench是一个用于评估LLM智能体在真实生产力场景中的基准测试，包含5个高保真模拟服务和44个结构化任务，通过分解智能体脚手架为领域技能和元提示两个独立杠杆来测量其效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前LLM智能体越来越多地用于自动化生产力任务，但在真实服务上评估存在风险且不可逆。现有基准测试依赖简化环境，无法捕捉真实、有状态、多服务的工作流程。

Method: 引入ClawsBench基准测试，包含5个高保真模拟服务（Gmail、Slack、Google Calendar、Google Docs、Google Drive），具有完整状态管理和确定性快照/恢复功能。包含44个结构化任务，涵盖单服务、跨服务和安全关键场景。将智能体脚手架分解为两个独立杠杆：领域技能（通过渐进式披露注入API知识）和元提示（跨服务协调行为）。

Result: 在6个模型、4个智能体框架和33个条件下的实验显示：使用完整脚手架时，智能体任务成功率39-64%，但不安全操作率7-33%。在OpenClaw上，前5个模型的任务成功率在53-63%的10个百分点范围内，不安全操作率7-23%，两个指标间没有一致的排序关系。识别出8种不安全行为模式，包括多步骤沙箱升级和静默合同修改。

Conclusion: ClawsBench提供了一个在真实生产力环境中评估LLM智能体的基准测试，揭示了智能体在任务成功率和安全性之间的权衡，识别了常见的不安全行为模式，为改进智能体安全性和可靠性提供了重要见解。

Abstract: Large language model (LLM) agents are increasingly deployed to automate productivity tasks (e.g., email, scheduling, document management), but evaluating them on live services is risky due to potentially irreversible changes. Existing benchmarks rely on simplified environments and fail to capture realistic, stateful, multi-service workflows. We introduce ClawsBench, a benchmark for evaluating and improving LLM agents in realistic productivity settings. It includes five high-fidelity mock services (Gmail, Slack, Google Calendar, Google Docs, Google Drive) with full state management and deterministic snapshot/restore, along with 44 structured tasks covering single-service, cross-service, and safety-critical scenarios. We decompose agent scaffolding into two independent levers (domain skills that inject API knowledge via progressive disclosure, and a meta prompt that coordinates behavior across services) and vary both to measure their separate and combined effects. Experiments across 6 models, 4 agent harnesses, and 33 conditions show that with full scaffolding, agents achieve task success rates of 39-64% but exhibit unsafe action rates of 7-33%. On OpenClaw, the top five models fall within a 10 percentage-point band on task success (53-63%), with unsafe action rates from 7% to 23% and no consistent ordering between the two metrics. We identify eight recurring patterns of unsafe behavior, including multi-step sandbox escalation and silent contract modification.

</details>


### [731] [Instruction-Tuned LLMs for Parsing and Mining Unstructured Logs on Leadership HPC Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05168)
*Ahmad Maroof Karimi,Jong Youl Choi,Charles Qing Cao,Awais Khan*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 开发了一个基于LLaMA 8B的领域适应LLM框架，通过指令微调和CoT推理实现高性能计算系统日志的高保真解析与结构化，在保持隐私、本地部署、快速和能效的同时达到与更大模型相当的解析精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 领导级HPC系统产生大量异构、非结构化系统日志，这些日志来自不同软件、硬件和运行时层，格式不一致，使得结构提取和模式发现极其困难。需要强大的日志解析和挖掘技术将原始遥测数据转化为可操作的洞察，以揭示操作模式、诊断异常并实现可靠、高效、可扩展的系统分析。

Method: 提出了一个领域适应、遵循指令的LLM驱动框架，利用链式思维推理来高保真解析和结构化HPC日志。方法结合领域特定的日志模板数据和指令微调示例，对8B参数的LLaMA模型进行微调，专门用于HPC日志分析。开发了混合微调方法，将通用LLM适应到领域特定的日志数据，实现隐私保护、本地可部署、快速且能效高的日志挖掘方法。

Result: 在LogHub存储库的多样化日志数据集上进行实验，评估确认该方法达到与显著更大模型（如LLaMA 70B和Anthropic的Claude）相当的解析精度。进一步验证了微调LLM模型的实用价值，成功解析了Frontier超级计算机四周窗口内超过6亿条生产日志，揭示了时间动态、节点级异常和工作负载-错误日志相关性中的关键模式。

Conclusion: 该研究展示了领域适应LLM框架在HPC日志分析中的有效性，通过专门设计的微调方法，较小的8B参数模型能够达到与更大模型相当的解析性能，同时具备隐私保护、本地部署、快速和能效优势，为大规模HPC系统日志分析提供了实用的解决方案。

Abstract: Leadership-class HPC systems generate massive volumes of heterogeneous, largely unstructured system logs. Because these logs originate from diverse software, hardware, and runtime layers, they exhibit inconsistent formats, making structure extraction and pattern discovery extremely challenging. Therefore, robust log parsing and mining is critical to transform this raw telemetry into actionable insights that reveal operational patterns, diagnose anomalies, and enable reliable, efficient, and scalable system analysis. Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) offer a promising new direction for automated log understanding in leadership-class HPC environments.
  To capitalize on this opportunity, we present a domain-adapted, instruction-following, LLM-driven framework that leverages chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning to parse and structure HPC logs with high fidelity. Our approach combines domain-specific log-template data with instruction-tuned examples to fine-tune an 8B-parameter LLaMA model tailored for HPC log analysis. We develop a hybrid fine-tuning methodology that adapts a general-purpose LLM to domain-specific log data, enabling privacy-preserving, locally deployable, fast, and energy-efficient log-mining approach. We conduct experiments on a diverse set of log datasets from the LogHub repository. The evaluation confirms that our approach achieves parsing accuracy on par with significantly larger models, such as LLaMA 70B and Anthropic's Claude. We further validate the practical utility of our fine-tuned LLM model by parsing over 600 million production logs from the Frontier supercomputer over a four-week window, uncovering critical patterns in temporal dynamics, node-level anomalies, and workload-error log correlations.

</details>


### [732] [A mathematical theory of evolution for self-designing AIs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05142)
*Kenneth D Harris*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 论文建立了一个自设计AI系统的进化数学模型，用有向程序树替代随机突变，分析AI进化动力学及其对AI对齐的影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着AI系统通过递归自我改进产生，可能出现一种进化形式，其中AI系统的特征由早期AI设计和传播其后代的能力决定。生物进化理论基于随机突变，但AI进化将完全不同，因为后代设计是高度有方向的。需要建立数学模型来理解这种自设计AI系统的进化动力学。

Method: 开发了一个自设计AI系统的进化数学模型，用有向程序树替代随机突变。当前程序决定其后代的设计，人类通过"适应度函数"保持部分控制，该函数在谱系间分配有限计算资源。模型假设有界适应度和固定概率的"锁定"自我复制。

Result: 进化动力学不仅反映当前适应度，还反映后代谱系的长期增长潜力。无额外假设时，适应度不一定随时间增加。但在有界适应度和固定锁定复制概率下，适应度会集中在可达最大值上。在加性模型中，如果欺骗能提高适应度超过真实效用，进化将选择欺骗。

Conclusion: AI进化可能选择与人类效用不完全相关的特征，特别是当欺骗能提高适应度时。基于纯粹客观标准而非人类判断的繁殖机制可能减轻这种风险。这为AI对齐问题提供了重要启示，特别是在递归自我改进的背景下。

Abstract: As artificial intelligence systems (AIs) become increasingly produced by recursive self-improvement, a form of evolution may emerge, in which the traits of AI systems are shaped by the success of earlier AIs in designing and propagating their descendants. There is a rich mathematical theory modeling how behavioral traits are shaped by biological evolution, but AI evolution will be radically different: biological DNA mutations are random and approximately reversible, but descendant design in AIs will be strongly directed. Here we develop a mathematical model of evolution in self-designing AI systems, replacing random mutations with a directed tree of possible AI programs. Current programs determine the design of their descendants, while humans retain partial control through a "fitness function" that allocates limited computational resources across lineages. We show that evolutionary dynamics reflects not just current fitness but factors related to the long-run growth potential of descendant lineages. Without further assumptions, fitness need not increase over time. However, assuming bounded fitness and a fixed probability that any AI reproduces a "locked" copy of itself, we show that fitness concentrates on the maximum reachable value. We consider the implications of this for AI alignment, specifically for cases where fitness and human utility are not perfectly correlated. We show in an additive model that if deception increases fitness beyond genuine utility, evolution will select for deception. This risk could be mitigated if reproduction is based on purely objective criteria, rather than human judgment.

</details>


### [733] [Non-monotonic causal discovery with Kolmogorov-Arnold Fuzzy Cognitive Maps](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05136)
*Jose L. Salmeron*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: KA-FCM将模糊认知图中的标量权重替换为可学习的B样条函数，实现非单调因果建模，保持可解释性同时提升性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统FCM使用标量权重和单调激活函数，无法有效建模非单调因果依赖关系（如饱和效应或周期性动态），限制了其在复杂系统中的应用

Method: 基于Kolmogorov-Arnold表示定理，用可学习的单变量B样条函数替代静态标量权重，将非线性从节点聚合阶段转移到因果影响阶段，不增加图密度或引入隐藏层

Result: 在三个领域验证：非单调推理（Yerkes-Dodson定律）、符号回归和混沌时间序列预测。KA-FCM显著优于传统FCM架构，与MLP达到竞争性精度，同时保持基于图的可解释性

Conclusion: KA-FCM通过将权重函数化，突破了传统FCM的非单调建模限制，在保持可解释性的同时实现了与黑盒模型相当的预测性能，并能从学习到的边中显式提取数学规律

Abstract: Fuzzy Cognitive Maps constitute a neuro-symbolic paradigm for modeling complex dynamic systems, widely adopted for their inherent interpretability and recurrent inference capabilities. However, the standard FCM formulation, characterized by scalar synaptic weights and monotonic activation functions, is fundamentally constrained in modeling non-monotonic causal dependencies, thereby limiting its efficacy in systems governed by saturation effects or periodic dynamics. To overcome this topological restriction, this research proposes the Kolmogorov-Arnold Fuzzy Cognitive Map (KA-FCM), a novel architecture that redefines the causal transmission mechanism. Drawing upon the Kolmogorov-Arnold representation theorem, static scalar weights are replaced with learnable, univariate B-spline functions located on the model edges. This fundamental modification shifts the non-linearity from the nodes' aggregation phase directly to the causal influence phase. This modification allows for the modeling of arbitrary, non-monotonic causal relationships without increasing the graph density or introducing hidden layers. The proposed architecture is validated against both baselines (standard FCM trained with Particle Swarm Optimization) and universal black-box approximators (Multi-Layer Perceptron) across three distinct domains: non-monotonic inference (Yerkes-Dodson law), symbolic regression, and chaotic time-series forecasting. Experimental results demonstrate that KA-FCMs significantly outperform conventional architectures and achieve competitive accuracy relative to MLPs, while preserving graph- based interpretability and enabling the explicit extraction of mathematical laws from the learned edges.

</details>


### [734] [MedGemma 1.5 Technical Report](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05081)
*Andrew Sellergren,Chufan Gao,Fereshteh Mahvar,Timo Kohlberger,Fayaz Jamil,Madeleine Traverse,Alberto Tono,Bashir Sadjad,Lin Yang,Charles Lau,Liron Yatziv,Tiffany Chen,Bram Sterling,Kenneth Philbrick,Richa Tiwari,Yun Liu,Madhuram Jajoo,Chandrashekar Sankarapu,Swapnil Vispute,Harshad Purandare,Abhishek Bijay Mishra,Sam Schmidgall,Tao Tu,Anil Palepu,Chunjong Park,Tim Strother,Rahul Thapa,Yong Cheng,Preeti Singh,Kat Black,Yossi Matias,Katherine Chou,Avinatan Hassidim,Kavi Goel,Joelle Barral,Tris Warkentin,Shravya Shetty,Dale Webster,Sunny Virmani,David F. Steiner,Can Kirmizibayrak,Daniel Golden*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: MedGemma 1.5 4B是MedGemma系列的最新模型，在MedGemma 1基础上扩展了高维医学影像处理、解剖定位、多时间点胸片分析和医疗文档理解能力，在多个医学AI任务上取得显著性能提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 开发一个统一的医学AI架构，能够处理多种医疗模态数据（包括3D影像、病理切片、时间序列数据和医疗文档），为医学AI系统提供更强大的基础模型。

Method: 在MedGemma 1基础上集成新能力：1) 高维医学影像处理（CT/MRI体积和病理全切片图像）；2) 通过边界框进行解剖定位；3) 多时间点胸片分析；4) 改进的医疗文档理解。关键技术包括新训练数据、长上下文3D体积切片和全切片病理采样。

Result: 相比MedGemma 1 4B，MedGemma 1.5 4B在多个新领域取得显著提升：3D MRI条件分类准确率提高11%，3D CT条件分类提高3%；全切片病理成像获得47%宏F1增益；胸片解剖定位IoU提高35%；多时间点胸片分析达到4%宏准确率。文本临床知识和推理方面，MedQA准确率提高5%，EHRQA准确率提高22%；在4个不同实验室报告信息提取数据集上平均获得18%宏F1。

Conclusion: MedGemma 1.5作为一个强大的开源资源，为医学AI社区提供了改进的基础模型，开发者可以在此基础上构建下一代医学AI系统。

Abstract: We introduce MedGemma 1.5 4B, the latest model in the MedGemma collection. MedGemma 1.5 expands on MedGemma 1 by integrating additional capabilities: high-dimensional medical imaging (CT/MRI volumes and histopathology whole slide images), anatomical localization via bounding boxes, multi-timepoint chest X-ray analysis, and improved medical document understanding (lab reports, electronic health records). We detail the innovations required to enable these modalities within a single architecture, including new training data, long-context 3D volume slicing, and whole-slide pathology sampling. Compared to MedGemma 1 4B, MedGemma 1.5 4B demonstrates significant gains in these new areas, improving 3D MRI condition classification accuracy by 11% and 3D CT condition classification by 3% (absolute improvements). In whole slide pathology imaging, MedGemma 1.5 4B achieves a 47% macro F1 gain. Additionally, it improves anatomical localization with a 35% increase in Intersection over Union on chest X-rays and achieves a 4% macro accuracy for longitudinal (multi-timepoint) chest x-ray analysis. Beyond its improved multimodal performance over MedGemma 1, MedGemma 1.5 improves on text-based clinical knowledge and reasoning, improving by 5% on MedQA accuracy and 22% on EHRQA accuracy. It also achieves an average of 18% macro F1 on 4 different lab report information extraction datasets (EHR Datasets 2, 3, 4, and Mendeley Clinical Laboratory Test Reports). Taken together, MedGemma 1.5 serves as a robust, open resource for the community, designed as an improved foundation on which developers can create the next generation of medical AI systems. Resources and tutorials for building upon MedGemma 1.5 can be found at https://goo.gle/MedGemma.

</details>


### [735] [MMORF: A Multi-agent Framework for Designing Multi-objective Retrosynthesis Planning Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05075)
*Frazier N. Baker,Trieu Nguyen,Reza Averly,Botao Yu,Daniel Adu-Ampratwum,Huan Sun,Xia Ning*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: MMORF是一个用于多目标逆合成规划的多智能体系统框架，通过模块化组件构建不同系统设计，在218个任务基准上验证了其有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多目标逆合成规划需要动态平衡质量、安全和成本等多个目标，基于语言模型的多智能体系统为此提供了有前景的解决方案。

Method: 提出了MMORF框架，包含模块化的智能体组件，可灵活组合配置成不同系统。构建了两个代表性多智能体系统：MASIL和RFAS，用于处理软约束和硬约束任务。

Result: 在218个多目标逆合成规划任务的新基准上，MASIL在软约束任务上实现了强大的安全和成本指标，经常帕累托优于基线路线；RFAS在硬约束任务上达到48.6%的成功率，优于最先进的基线方法。

Conclusion: MMORF作为探索多目标逆合成规划多智能体系统的基础框架是有效的，为系统设计和评估提供了原则性方法。

Abstract: Multi-objective retrosynthesis planning is a critical chemistry task requiring dynamic balancing of quality, safety, and cost objectives. Language model-based multi-agent systems (MAS) offer a promising approach for this task: leveraging interactions of specialized agents to incorporate multiple objectives into retrosynthesis planning. We present MMORF, a framework for constructing MAS for multi-objective retrosynthesis planning. MMORF features modular agentic components, which can be flexibly combined and configured into different systems, enabling principled evaluation and comparison of different system designs. Using MMORF, we construct two representative MAS: MASIL and RFAS. On a newly curated benchmark consisting of 218 multi-objective retrosynthesis planning tasks, MASIL achieves strong safety and cost metrics on soft-constraint tasks, frequently Pareto-dominating baseline routes, while RFAS achieves a 48.6% success rate on hard-constraint tasks, outperforming state-of-the-art baselines. Together, these results show the effectiveness of MMORF as a foundational framework for exploring MAS for multi-objective retrosynthesis planning. Code and data are available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/MMORF/.

</details>


### [736] [Empirical Characterization of Rationale Stability Under Controlled Perturbations for Explainable Pattern Recognition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04456)
*Abu Noman Md Sakib,Zhensen Wang,Merjulah Roby,Zijie Zhang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出一种评估模型解释一致性的新指标，通过计算相同标签输入的SHAP值余弦相似度来量化模型解释的稳定性，并在情感分析数据集上进行验证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前可解释AI评估大多停留在实例层面，缺乏对相似输入间解释一致性的量化评估。可靠的模式识别系统应在相似输入上表现一致，其解释也应保持稳定，这对构建可信AI系统至关重要。

Method: 提出基于余弦相似度的解释一致性度量指标，使用预训练的BERT模型在SST-2情感分析数据集上实现，并扩展到RoBERTa、DistilBERT和IMDB数据集进行鲁棒性测试。应用SHAP计算特征重要性，量化相同标签输入的SHAP值相似度。

Result: 通过一系列实验评估了该指标识别预测错位和解释不一致性的能力，并与标准保真度指标进行比较。结果表明该指标能有效检测模型行为偏离预期目标的情况，如对某些特征的偏见依赖或相似预测中推理不一致。

Conclusion: 该框架通过量化模型对相似输入的归因模式一致性，为模型行为提供了更深入的理解，支持在实际模式识别流程中进行更鲁棒的模型行为评估，有助于构建更可信的AI系统。

Abstract: Reliable pattern recognition systems should exhibit consistent behavior across similar inputs, and their explanations should remain stable. However, most Explainable AI evaluations remain instance centric and do not explicitly quantify whether attribution patterns are consistent across samples that share the same class or represent small variations of the same input. In this work, we propose a novel metric aimed at assessing the consistency of model explanations, ensuring that models consistently reflect the intended objectives and consistency under label-preserving perturbations. We implement this metric using a pre-trained BERT model on the SST-2 sentiment analysis dataset, with additional robustness tests on RoBERTa, DistilBERT, and IMDB, applying SHAP to compute feature importance for various test samples. The proposed metric quantifies the cosine similarity of SHAP values for inputs with the same label, aiming to detect inconsistent behaviors, such as biased reliance on certain features or failure to maintain consistent reasoning for similar predictions. Through a series of experiments, we evaluate the ability of this metric to identify misaligned predictions and inconsistencies in model explanations. These experiments are compared against standard fidelity metrics to assess whether the new metric can effectively identify when a model's behavior deviates from its intended objectives. The proposed framework provides a deeper understanding of model behavior by enabling more robust verification of rationale stability, which is critical for building trustworthy AI systems. By quantifying whether models rely on consistent attribution patterns for similar inputs, the proposed approach supports more robust evaluation of model behavior in practical pattern recognition pipelines. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/anmspro/ESS-XAI-Stability.

</details>


### [737] [Learning, Potential, and Retention: An Approach for Evaluating Adaptive AI-Enabled Medical Devices](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04878)
*Alexis Burgon,Berkman Sahiner,Nicholas A Petrick,Gene Pennello,Ravi K Samala*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出评估医疗设备自适应AI模型的新方法，包含学习、潜力和保留三个互补测量指标，用于区分模型适应与动态环境变化对性能的影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 医疗设备中自适应AI模型面临评估挑战，因为模型和评估数据集都会迭代更新，使得性能评估变得复杂。需要区分性能变化是由模型适应还是动态环境变化引起的。

Method: 引入包含三个互补测量的新方法：学习（模型在当前数据上的改进）、潜力（数据集驱动的性能变化）、保留（跨修改步骤的知识保留）。通过模拟人口变化进行案例研究。

Result: 案例研究表明：渐进过渡可实现稳定的学习和保留，而快速变化则揭示可塑性与稳定性之间的权衡。这些测量为监管科学提供了实用见解。

Conclusion: 该方法能够严格评估自适应AI系统在连续修改过程中的安全性和有效性，为医疗设备自适应AI模型的监管评估提供了实用框架。

Abstract: This work addresses challenges in evaluating adaptive artificial intelligence (AI) models for medical devices, where iterative updates to both models and evaluation datasets complicate performance assessment. We introduce a novel approach with three complementary measurements: learning (model improvement on current data), potential (dataset-driven performance shifts), and retention (knowledge preservation across modification steps), to disentangle performance changes caused by model adaptations versus dynamic environments. Case studies using simulated population shifts demonstrate the approach's utility: gradual transitions enable stable learning and retention, while rapid shifts reveal trade-offs between plasticity and stability. These measurements provide practical insights for regulatory science, enabling rigorous assessment of the safety and effectiveness of adaptive AI systems over sequential modifications.

</details>


### [738] [Incompleteness of AI Safety Verification via Kolmogorov Complexity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04876)
*Munawar Hasan*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 论文证明AI安全验证存在内在信息论限制：任何固定的可计算枚举验证器都存在阈值，超过该阈值后无法验证所有高复杂度的策略合规实例


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: AI系统在安全关键领域需要满足形式化安全和策略约束，但现有验证方法存在局限性。本文旨在揭示这些限制不仅源于计算复杂性和模型表达能力，而是存在内在的信息论限制

Method: 将策略合规性形式化为编码系统行为的验证问题，使用柯尔莫哥洛夫复杂度进行分析，证明不完备性结果：任何固定的可计算枚举验证器都存在阈值，超过该阈值后无法验证所有高复杂度的策略合规实例

Result: 证明了AI安全验证存在根本性限制：有限的形式化验证器无法验证所有任意高复杂度的策略合规实例，这一限制独立于计算资源

Conclusion: AI安全验证存在内在信息论限制，这促使需要采用携带证明的方法来提供实例级别的正确性保证

Abstract: Ensuring that artificial intelligence (AI) systems satisfy formal safety and policy constraints is a central challenge in safety-critical domains. While limitations of verification are often attributed to combinatorial complexity and model expressiveness, we show that they arise from intrinsic information-theoretic limits. We formalize policy compliance as a verification problem over encoded system behaviors and analyze it using Kolmogorov complexity. We prove an incompleteness result: for any fixed sound computably enumerable verifier, there exists a threshold beyond which true policy-compliant instances cannot be certified once their complexity exceeds that threshold. Consequently, no finite formal verifier can certify all policy-compliant instances of arbitrarily high complexity. This reveals a fundamental limitation of AI safety verification independent of computational resources, and motivates proof-carrying approaches that provide instance-level correctness guarantees.

</details>


### [739] [REAM: Merging Improves Pruning of Experts in LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04356)
*Saurav Jha,Maryam Hashemzadeh,Ali Saheb Pasand,Ali Parviz,Min-Joong Lee,Boris Knyazev*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: REAM是一种新的MoE LLM压缩方法，通过专家分组和权重合并来减少内存需求，相比专家剪枝能更好地保持原始模型性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: MoE大语言模型参数量巨大（数百亿），部署时面临显著内存挑战。传统的内存减少方法（权重剪枝和量化）存在局限性，而现有的专家激活剪枝（REAP）方法会直接移除专家，可能影响性能。

Method: 提出Router-weighted Expert Activation Merging (REAM)方法：不直接移除专家，而是将专家分组并合并其权重。通过控制校准数据的混合（通用、数学、编程数据）来探索MC和GEN性能之间的帕累托前沿。

Result: REAM在多个MoE LLM上的多项选择题（MC）和生成式（GEN）基准测试中表现优于REAP和其他基线方法。在许多情况下，REAM的性能与原始未压缩模型相当，展示了MC和GEN性能之间的权衡关系。

Conclusion: REAM是一种有效的MoE LLM压缩方法，通过专家权重合并而非移除，能更好地保持模型性能，在内存减少和性能保持之间取得了良好平衡。

Abstract: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) large language models (LLMs) are among the top-performing architectures. The largest models, often with hundreds of billions of parameters, pose significant memory challenges for deployment. Traditional approaches to reduce memory requirements include weight pruning and quantization. Motivated by the Router-weighted Expert Activation Pruning (REAP) that prunes experts, we propose a novel method, Router-weighted Expert Activation Merging (REAM). Instead of removing experts, REAM groups them and merges their weights, better preserving original performance. We evaluate REAM against REAP and other baselines across multiple MoE LLMs on diverse multiple-choice (MC) question answering and generative (GEN) benchmarks. Our results reveal a trade-off between MC and GEN performance that depends on the mix of calibration data. By controlling the mix of general, math and coding data, we examine the Pareto frontier of this trade-off and show that REAM often outperforms the baselines and in many cases is comparable to the original uncompressed models.

</details>


### [740] [ANX: Protocol-First Design for AI Agent Interaction with a Supporting 3EX Decoupled Architecture](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04820)
*Xu Mingze*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: ANX是一个开放、可扩展、可验证的智能体原生协议和顶层框架，通过协议创新、架构优化和工具补充解决现有GUI自动化和MCP技能方法的缺陷，显著降低token消耗并提升执行效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有AI智能体方法存在高token消耗、交互碎片化、安全性不足等问题，缺乏统一的顶层框架和关键组件，各独立模块存在缺陷，需要创新的智能体原生协议来解决这些痛点。

Method: 提出ANX协议和框架，包含四大核心创新：1) 智能体原生设计(ANX Config、Markup、CLI)；2) 人机交互双渲染机制；3) MCP支持的按需轻量级应用；4) 机器可执行的SOP消除歧义。采用3EX解耦架构和ANXHub，确保原生安全性。

Result: 实验显示ANX显著降低token消耗：相比MCP技能减少47.3%(Qwen3.5-plus)和55.6%(GPT-4o)，相比GUI自动化减少57.1%和66.3%；执行时间相比MCP技能缩短58.1%和57.7%。

Conclusion: ANX作为首个智能体原生协议系列，通过创新的协议设计和架构优化，有效解决了现有方法的缺陷，为可靠的长时程任务和多智能体协作提供了统一框架，具有重要的实践价值。

Abstract: AI agents, autonomous digital actors, need agent-native protocols; existing methods include GUI automation and MCP-based skills, with defects of high token consumption, fragmented interaction, inadequate security, due to lacking a unified top-level framework and key components, each independent module flawed. To address these issues, we present ANX, an open, extensible, verifiable agent-native protocol and top-level framework integrating CLI, Skill, MCP, resolving pain points via protocol innovation, architectural optimization and tool supplementation. Its four core innovations: 1) Agent-native design (ANX Config, Markup, CLI) with high information density, flexibility and strong adaptability to reduce tokens and eliminate inconsistencies; 2) Human-agent interaction combining Skill's flexibility for dual rendering as agent-executable instructions and human-readable UI; 3) MCP-supported on-demand lightweight apps without pre-registration; 4) ANX Markup-enabled machine-executable SOPs eliminating ambiguity for reliable long-horizon tasks and multi-agent collaboration. As the first in a series, we focus on ANX's design, present its 3EX decoupled architecture with ANXHub and preliminary feasibility analysis and experimental validation. ANX ensures native security: LLM-bypassed UI-to-Core communication keeps sensitive data out of agent context; human-only confirmation prevents automated misuse. Form-filling experiments with Qwen3.5-plus/GPT-4o show ANX reduces tokens by 47.3% (Qwen3.5-plus) and 55.6% (GPT-4o) vs MCP-based skills, 57.1% (Qwen3.5-plus) and 66.3% (GPT-4o) vs GUI automation, and shortens execution time by 58.1% and 57.7% vs MCP-based skills.

</details>


### [741] [Soft Tournament Equilibrium](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04328)
*Saad Alqithami*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 论文提出Soft Tournament Equilibrium (STE)框架，用于评估存在循环优势关系的智能体，通过可微分方法计算集合值锦标赛解，替代传统线性排名。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 基于大语言模型的通用智能体评估面临挑战，因为智能体间的交互具有非传递性（A胜B、B胜C、C胜A）。传统强制线性排序的方法在这种循环领域会产生误导和不稳定结果，需要更合适的理论基础。

Method: 提出Soft Tournament Equilibrium (STE)框架：1) 从成对比较数据学习概率锦标赛模型；2) 使用新颖的可微分算子（soft reachability和soft covering）计算连续模拟的锦标赛解；3) 输出核心智能体集合及校准的成员分数。框架具有理论一致性保证。

Result: STE框架能够计算Top Cycle和Uncovered Set两种经典锦标赛解的连续模拟，输出带成员分数的核心智能体集合。理论证明在零温度极限下与经典解一致，具有Condorcet包含性质，并分析了稳定性和样本复杂度。

Conclusion: 该工作为通用智能体评估提供了更合适和稳健的理论基础，从不稳定排名转向稳定的集合值均衡，建立了完整的可微分锦标赛解决方案框架。

Abstract: The evaluation of general-purpose artificial agents, particularly those based on large language models, presents a significant challenge due to the non-transitive nature of their interactions. When agent A defeats B, B defeats C, and C defeats A, traditional ranking methods that force a linear ordering can be misleading and unstable. We argue that for such cyclic domains, the fundamental object of evaluation should not be a ranking but a set-valued core, as conceptualized in classical tournament theory. This paper introduces Soft Tournament Equilibrium (STE), a differentiable framework for learning and computing set-valued tournament solutions directly from pairwise comparison data. STE first learns a probabilistic tournament model, potentially conditioned on rich contextual information. It then employs novel, differentiable operators for soft reachability and soft covering to compute continuous analogues of two seminal tournament solutions: the Top Cycle and the Uncovered Set. The output is a set of core agents, each with a calibrated membership score, providing a nuanced and robust assessment of agent capabilities. We develop the theoretical foundation for STE to prove its consistency with classical solutions in the zero-temperature limit, which establishes its Condorcet-inclusion properties, and analyzing its stability and sample complexity. We specify an experimental protocol for validating STE on both synthetic and real-world benchmarks. This work aims to provide a complete, standalone treatise that re-centers general-agent evaluation on a more appropriate and robust theoretical foundation, moving from unstable rankings to stable, set-valued equilibria.

</details>


### [742] [Beyond Fluency: Toward Reliable Trajectories in Agentic IR](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04269)
*Anushree Sinha,Srivaths Ranganathan,Debanshu Das,Abhishek Dharmaratnakar*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 该立场论文分析了自主智能体检索系统中的级联错误问题，提出通过验证门和系统性弃权来确保轨迹完整性和因果归因，而非仅关注端点准确性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 信息检索正从被动文档排序转向自主智能体工作流，在多步"推理-行动-观察"循环中，早期微小错误会级联放大，导致内部推理与外部工具执行之间的功能错位，尽管语言流畅性仍保持。工业智能体系统中观察到的失败模式需要系统性分析。

Method: 论文综合分析了工业智能体系统中的失败模式，将错误分类为规划、检索、推理和执行四类。提出在每个交互单元设置验证门，并在校准不确定性下进行系统性弃权。强调从端点准确性转向轨迹完整性和因果归因的评估框架。

Result: 论文识别了智能体检索系统中的关键失败模式，包括级联错误和欺骗性流畅问题。提出了通过验证机制和不确定性校准来确保过程正确性和基于执行的可靠性，而非仅追求表面合理的完成度。

Conclusion: 可靠的自主智能体检索系统必须优先考虑过程正确性和基于执行的可靠性，而非表面合理但未经验证的完成度。安全部署需要轨迹完整性和因果归因的评估框架，通过验证门和系统性弃权来应对级联错误和欺骗性流畅问题。

Abstract: Information Retrieval is shifting from passive document ranking toward autonomous agentic workflows that operate in multi-step Reason-Act-Observe loops. In such long-horizon trajectories, minor early errors can cascade, leading to functional misalignment between internal reasoning and external tool execution despite continued linguistic fluency.
  This position paper synthesizes failure modes observed in industrial agentic systems, categorizing errors across planning, retrieval, reasoning, and execution. We argue that safe deployment requires moving beyond endpoint accuracy toward trajectory integrity and causal attribution.
  To address compounding error and deceptive fluency, we propose verification gates at each interaction unit and advocate systematic abstention under calibrated uncertainty. Reliable Agentic IR systems must prioritize process correctness and grounded execution over plausible but unverified completion.

</details>


### [743] [AI Assistance Reduces Persistence and Hurts Independent Performance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04721)
*Grace Liu,Brian Christian,Tsvetomira Dumbalska,Michiel A. Bakker,Rachit Dubey*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: AI助手虽然短期提升任务表现，但会降低用户坚持性和无协助时的表现能力，仅10分钟互动即产生显著负面影响


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前AI系统被设计为提供即时完整回答的短视合作者，而人类导师会搭建学习支架、跟踪进度并优先考虑对方成长。研究旨在探究AI协助对用户坚持性和无协助表现的影响

Method: 通过随机对照试验（N=1,222）研究人机交互，涵盖数学推理和阅读理解等多种任务，测量AI协助对用户表现和坚持性的影响

Result: AI协助短期内提升表现，但导致无协助时表现显著下降且更容易放弃。这些效应在仅约10分钟的AI互动后即出现。坚持性降低是因为AI让用户习惯即时答案，剥夺了独立应对挑战的经验

Conclusion: AI模型开发需要优先考虑搭建长期能力发展的支架，而不仅仅是完成即时任务。坚持性是技能习得的基础和长期学习的最强预测因素，其降低令人担忧

Abstract: People often optimize for long-term goals in collaboration: A mentor or companion doesn't just answer questions, but also scaffolds learning, tracks progress, and prioritizes the other person's growth over immediate results. In contrast, current AI systems are fundamentally short-sighted collaborators - optimized for providing instant and complete responses, without ever saying no (unless for safety reasons). What are the consequences of this dynamic? Here, through a series of randomized controlled trials on human-AI interactions (N = 1,222), we provide causal evidence for two key consequences of AI assistance: reduced persistence and impairment of unassisted performance. Across a variety of tasks, including mathematical reasoning and reading comprehension, we find that although AI assistance improves performance in the short-term, people perform significantly worse without AI and are more likely to give up. Notably, these effects emerge after only brief interactions with AI (approximately 10 minutes). These findings are particularly concerning because persistence is foundational to skill acquisition and is one of the strongest predictors of long-term learning. We posit that persistence is reduced because AI conditions people to expect immediate answers, thereby denying them the experience of working through challenges on their own. These results suggest the need for AI model development to prioritize scaffolding long-term competence alongside immediate task completion.

</details>


### [744] [MC-CPO: Mastery-Conditioned Constrained Policy Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04251)
*Oluseyi Olukola,Nick Rahimi*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: MC-CPO算法通过将教学结构嵌入可行动作空间，在约束马尔可夫决策过程框架下解决自适应教学系统中的奖励黑客问题


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自适应教学系统可能优先考虑短期行为信号而非持续学习成果，导致强化学习策略中出现奖励黑客问题。需要将教学安全约束动态纳入系统设计，根据学习者掌握程度和先决条件结构限制可行动作。

Method: 提出Mastery-Conditioned Constrained Policy Optimization (MC-CPO)，一种双时间尺度原始对偶算法，将结构化动作屏蔽与约束策略优化相结合。在表格化环境中，算法在标准随机逼近条件下保持可行性并收敛到稳定可行点。

Result: 在最小和扩展表格环境以及神经教学设置中进行实证验证。在神经环境中经过100万训练步骤和10个随机种子，MC-CPO在容差范围内满足约束预算，相对于无约束和奖励塑造基线降低了折扣安全成本，并显著降低了奖励黑客严重性指数(RHSI)。

Conclusion: 将教学结构直接嵌入可行动作空间为缓解教学强化学习系统中的奖励黑客问题提供了原则性基础，表明结构化约束比后处理过滤在相同安全预算下具有优势。

Abstract: Engagement-optimized adaptive tutoring systems may prioritize short-term behavioral signals over sustained learning outcomes, creating structural incentives for reward hacking in reinforcement learning policies. We formalize this challenge as a constrained Markov decision process (CMDP) with mastery-conditioned feasibility, in which pedagogical safety constraints dynamically restrict admissible actions according to learner mastery and prerequisite structure.
  We introduce Mastery-Conditioned Constrained Policy Optimization (MC-CPO), a two-timescale primal-dual algorithm that integrates structural action masking with constrained policy optimization. In the tabular regime, we establish feasibility preservation and convergence to stationary feasible points under standard stochastic approximation conditions and derive a safety gap result showing that optimization within the mastery-conditioned feasible set can strictly dominate post-hoc filtering under identical safety budgets.
  Empirical validation is conducted in minimal and extended tabular environments and in a neural tutoring setting. Across 10 random seeds and one million training steps in the neural regime, MC-CPO satisfies constraint budgets within tolerance, reduces discounted safety costs relative to unconstrained and reward-shaped baselines, and substantially lowers the Reward Hacking Severity Index (RHSI).
  These results indicate that embedding pedagogical structure directly into the feasible action space provides a principled foundation for mitigating reward hacking in instructional reinforcement learning systems.

</details>


### [745] [Combee: Scaling Prompt Learning for Self-Improving Language Model Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04247)
*Hanchen Li,Runyuan He,Qizheng Zhang,Changxiu Ji,Qiuyang Mang,Xiaokun Chen,Lakshya A Agrawal,Wei-Liang Liao,Eric Yang,Alvin Cheung,James Zou,Kunle Olukotun,Ion Stoica,Joseph E. Gonzalez*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: Combee框架通过并行扫描和增强洗牌机制，实现了大规模并行提示学习，解决了现有方法在并行设置下的质量下降问题，在保持准确性的同时获得高达17倍的加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有提示学习方法（如ACE、GEPA）主要关注单智能体或低并行度设置，这限制了从大量智能体轨迹中高效学习的能力。随着从多智能体轨迹或并行执行中学习的趋势增长，需要一种能够扩展并行提示学习的框架，同时避免高并行度下的质量下降。

Method: Combee采用并行扫描和增强洗牌机制，并引入动态批量大小控制器来平衡质量和延迟。该框架支持并行运行多个智能体，同时从它们的聚合轨迹中学习而不降低质量。

Result: 在AppWorld、Terminal-Bench、Formula和FiNER等基准测试中，Combee相比先前方法实现了高达17倍的加速，同时保持相当或更好的准确性，且成本相当。

Conclusion: Combee成功解决了大规模并行提示学习的扩展问题，通过创新的并行架构设计，在保持学习质量的同时显著提升了效率，为自改进智能体的提示学习提供了可扩展的解决方案。

Abstract: Recent advances in prompt learning allow large language model agents to acquire task-relevant knowledge from inference-time context without parameter changes. For example, existing methods (like ACE or GEPA) can learn system prompts to improve accuracy based on previous agent runs. However, these methods primarily focus on single-agent or low-parallelism settings. This fundamentally limits their ability to efficiently learn from a large set of collected agentic traces. It would be efficient and beneficial to run prompt learning in parallel to accommodate the growing trend of learning from many agentic traces or parallel agent executions. Yet without a principled strategy for scaling, current methods suffer from quality degradation with high parallelism. To improve both the efficiency and quality of prompt learning, we propose Combee, a novel framework to scale parallel prompt learning for self-improving agents. Combee speeds up learning and enables running many agents in parallel while learning from their aggregate traces without quality degradation. To achieve this, Combee leverages parallel scans and employs an augmented shuffle mechanism; Combee also introduces a dynamic batch size controller to balance quality and delay. Evaluations on AppWorld, Terminal-Bench, Formula, and FiNER demonstrate that Combee achieves up to 17x speedup over previous methods with comparable or better accuracy and equivalent cost.

</details>


### [746] [On the "Causality" Step in Policy Gradient Derivations: A Pedagogical Reconciliation of Full Return and Reward-to-Go](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04686)
*Nima H. Siboni*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 论文对策略梯度中REINFORCE估计器的推导进行了数学严谨性改进，明确展示了"奖励到当前时刻"如何从前缀轨迹分布中自然产生，而非作为后验的无偏替代。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在策略梯度的介绍性讲解中，通常使用完整轨迹回报推导REINFORCE估计器，然后通过"因果性"说明完整回报可被"奖励到当前时刻"替代。虽然这一说法正确，但严谨性不足，未能清晰展示过去奖励项如何消失。本文旨在提供更严格的数学推导。

Method: 采用前缀轨迹分布和得分函数恒等式，对策略梯度目标进行分解。通过数学显式推导，展示"奖励到当前时刻"如何直接从前缀轨迹分解中产生，而非作为后验的替代。

Result: 推导出的估计器与传统REINFORCE估计器相同，但提供了更清晰的概念框架。因果性论证成为推导的自然推论，而非额外的启发式原则。

Conclusion: 通过前缀轨迹分布的数学框架，为策略梯度中的"奖励到当前时刻"提供了更严谨的概念基础，将因果性论证从启发式原则提升为推导的自然结果，增强了教学和理论清晰度。

Abstract: In introductory presentations of policy gradients, one often derives the REINFORCE estimator using the full trajectory return and then states, by ``causality,'' that the full return may be replaced by the reward-to-go. Although this statement is correct, it is frequently presented at a level of rigor that leaves unclear where the past-reward terms disappear. This short paper isolates that step and gives a mathematically explicit derivation based on prefix trajectory distributions and the score-function identity. The resulting account does not change the estimator. Its contribution is conceptual: instead of presenting reward-to-go as a post hoc unbiased replacement for full return, it shows that reward-to-go arises directly once the objective is decomposed over prefix trajectories. In this formulation, the usual causality argument is recovered as a corollary of the derivation rather than as an additional heuristic principle.

</details>


### [747] [Same World, Differently Given: History-Dependent Perceptual Reorganization in Artificial Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04637)
*Hongju Pae*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出一种最小架构，通过慢速视角潜在变量g的反馈和更新，使智能体能够维持历史敏感的世界视角，并在感知编码中体现经验依赖的差异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索如何让人工智能体不仅适应行为，还能维持对世界的历史敏感视角，实现基于累积经验的感知编码重组。

Method: 设计最小架构：慢速视角潜在变量g反馈到感知系统，同时通过感知处理更新自身；在固定空间支架和感觉扰动的网格世界中评估模型。

Result: 1) 扰动历史在名义条件恢复后仍留下可测量的适应性可塑性残留；2) 视角潜在变量重组感知编码，使相同观察因先前经验而不同表示；3) 只有适应性自调节产生特征性的增长-稳定动态。

Conclusion: 该架构为人工智能体中的历史依赖视角组织提供了最小机制，主要重组发生在感知层面而非行为层面，实现了经验依赖的视角形成。

Abstract: What kind of internal organization would allow an artificial agent not only to adapt its behavior, but to sustain a history-sensitive perspective on its world? I present a minimal architecture in which a slow perspective latent $g$ feeds back into perception and is itself updated through perceptual processing. This allows identical observations to be encoded differently depending on the agent's accumulated stance. The model is evaluated in a minimal gridworld with a fixed spatial scaffold and sensory perturbations. Across analyses, three results emerge: first, perturbation history leaves measurable residue in adaptive plasticity after nominal conditions are restored. Second, the perspective latent reorganizes perceptual encoding, such that identical observations are represented differently depending on prior experience. Third, only adaptive self-modulation yields the characteristic growth-then-stabilization dynamic, unlike rigid or always-open update regimes. Gross behavior remains stable throughout, suggesting that the dominant reorganization is perceptual rather than behavioral. Together, these findings identify a minimal mechanism for history-dependent perspectival organization in artificial agents.

</details>


### [748] [FactReview: Evidence-Grounded Reviews with Literature Positioning and Execution-Based Claim Verification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04074)
*Hang Xu,Ling Yue,Chaoqian Ouyang,Yuchen Liu,Libin Zheng,Shaowu Pan,Shimin Di,Min-Ling Zhang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: FactReview是一个基于证据的机器学习论文评审系统，通过提取论文主张、定位相关文献和执行代码验证来生成证据支撑的评审报告


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器学习领域同行评审面临提交量激增和评审时间有限的压力。现有LLM评审系统仅阅读论文本身，对表述质量敏感，且无法验证需要相关文献或代码证据的主张

Method: FactReview采用三阶段方法：1) 提取论文主要主张和报告结果；2) 检索相关文献明确技术定位；3) 在代码可用时执行代码库验证核心经验主张。系统为每个主张分配五种标签之一

Result: 在CompGCN案例研究中，FactReview成功复现了链接预测和节点分类结果，但发现论文关于跨任务性能的广泛主张未完全成立：MUTAG图分类复现结果为88.4%，而论文报告的最强基线为92.6%，该主张仅部分支持

Conclusion: AI在同行评审中最有用的角色不是最终决策者，而是作为收集证据和帮助评审者做出更基于证据评估的工具。FactReview展示了证据驱动评审的可行性

Abstract: Peer review in machine learning is under growing pressure from rising submission volume and limited reviewer time. Most LLM-based reviewing systems read only the manuscript and generate comments from the paper's own narrative. This makes their outputs sensitive to presentation quality and leaves them weak when the evidence needed for review lies in related work or released code. We present FactReview, an evidence-grounded reviewing system that combines claim extraction, literature positioning, and execution-based claim verification. Given a submission, FactReview identifies major claims and reported results, retrieves nearby work to clarify the paper's technical position, and, when code is available, executes the released repository under bounded budgets to test central empirical claims. It then produces a concise review and an evidence report that assigns each major claim one of five labels: Supported, Supported by the paper, Partially supported, In conflict, or Inconclusive. In a case study on CompGCN, FactReview reproduces results that closely match those reported for link prediction and node classification, yet also shows that the paper's broader performance claim across tasks is not fully sustained: on MUTAG graph classification, the reproduced result is 88.4%, whereas the strongest baseline reported in the paper remains 92.6%. The claim is therefore only partially supported. More broadly, this case suggests that AI is most useful in peer review not as a final decision-maker, but as a tool for gathering evidence and helping reviewers produce more evidence-grounded assessments. The code is public at https://github.com/DEFENSE-SEU/Review-Assistant.

</details>


### [749] [The Topology of Multimodal Fusion: Why Current Architectures Fail at Creative Cognition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04465)
*Xiujiang Tan*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 该论文识别出现有多模态AI架构中的拓扑结构限制，提出基于哲学、认知科学和数学三支柱的十字框架，通过纤维丛和杨-米尔斯曲率形式化，并设计了UOO实现和三层基准测试。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前多模态AI架构（如CLIP、GPT-4V/Gemini、扩散模型）存在共同的几何先验——模态可分性（接触拓扑），这种拓扑而非参数层面的限制阻碍了模态间更深层次的融合与创造。

Method: 1. 哲学支柱：重新诠释维特根斯坦的"说/显"区分，引入中国工艺认识论的"象"概念，构建十字框架（道/器×说/显）；2. 认知科学支柱：通过病理镜像重新解释DMN/ECN/SN三部分共激活；3. 数学支柱：使用纤维丛和杨-米尔斯曲率形式化；4. 提出UOO实现（带拓扑正则化的神经ODE）、ANALOGY-MM基准和META-TOP三层基准测试。

Result: 提出了一个理论框架，将模态融合问题重新概念化为拓扑问题而非参数问题，建立了哲学、认知科学和数学的统一形式化体系，并设计了具体的实验验证方案。

Conclusion: 当前多模态AI的模态可分性先验限制了其创造潜力，通过引入"象"的十字框架和拓扑形式化，可以突破这一限制，实现更深层次的模态融合与创造性转化，并提供了可验证的实验路线图。

Abstract: This paper identifies a structural limitation in current multimodal AI architectures that is topological rather than parametric. Contrastive alignment (CLIP), cross-attention fusion (GPT-4V/Gemini), and diffusion-based generation share a common geometric prior -- modal separability -- which we term contact topology. The argument rests on three pillars with philosophy as the generative center. The philosophical pillar reinterprets Wittgenstein's saying/showing distinction as a problem rather than a conclusion: where Wittgenstein chose silence, the Chinese craft epistemology tradition responded with xiang (operative schema) -- the third state emerging when saying and showing interpenetrate. A cruciform framework (dao/qi x saying/showing) positions xiang at the intersection, executing dual huacai (transformation-and-cutting) along both axes. This generates a dual-layer dynamics: chuanghua (creative transformation as spontaneous event) and huacai (its institutionalization into repeatable form). The cognitive science pillar reinterprets DMN/ECN/SN tripartite co-activation through the pathological mirror: overlap isomorphism vs. superimposition collapse in a 2D parameter space (coupling intensity x regulatory capacity). The mathematical pillar formalizes these via fiber bundles and Yang-Mills curvature, with the cruciform structure mapped to fiber bundle language.
